  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\\n7: \\n8: import static com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker.inOrderOrEqual;\\n9: \\n10: import java.io.Serializable;\\n11: import java.time.LocalDate;\\n12: import java.time.ZonedDateTime;\\n13: import java.util.Map;\\n14: import java.util.NoSuchElementException;\\n15: \\n16: import org.joda.beans.Bean;\\n17: import org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\\n18: import org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\\n19: import org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\\n20: import org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\\n21: import org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\\n22: import org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableValidator;\\n23: import org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\\n24: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\\n25: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\\n26: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\\n27: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\\n28: \\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\\n32: import com.opengamma.strata.product.ResolvedProduct;\\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort;\\n34: import com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PutCall;\\n35: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\\n36: \\n37: /**\\n38:  * A vanilla FX option, resolved for pricing.\\n39:  * <p>\\n40:  * This is the resolved form of {@link FxVanillaOption} and is an input to the pricers.\\n41:  * Applications will typically create a {@code ResolvedFxVanillaOption} from a {@code FxVanillaOption}\\n42:  * using {@link FxVanillaOption#resolve(ReferenceData)}.\\n43:  * <p>\\n44:  * A {@code ResolvedFxVanillaOption} is bound to data that changes over time, such as holiday calendars.\\n45:  * If the data changes, such as the addition of a new holiday, the resolved form will not be updated.\\n46:  * Care must be taken when placing the resolved form in a cache or persistence layer.\\n47:  */\\n48: @BeanDefinition\\n49: public final class ResolvedFxVanillaOption\\n50:     implements ResolvedProduct, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\\n51: \\n52:   /**\\n53:    * Whether the option is long or short.\\n54:    * <p>\\n55:    * At expiry, the long party will have the option to enter in this transaction; \\n56:    * the short party will, at the option of the long party, potentially enter into the inverse transaction.\\n57:    */\\n58:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n59:   private final LongShort longShort;\\n60:   /**\\n61:    * The expiry date-time of the option.\\n62:    * <p>\\n63:    * The option is European, and can only be exercised on the expiry date.\\n64:    */\\n65:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n66:   private final ZonedDateTime expiry;\\n67:   /**\\n68:    * The underlying foreign exchange transaction.\\n69:    * <p>\\n70:    * At expiry, if the option is in the money, this foreign exchange will occur.\\n71:    * A call option permits the transaction as specified to occur.\\n72:    * A put option permits the inverse transaction to occur.\\n73:    */\\n74:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n75:   private final ResolvedFxSingle underlying;\\n76: \\n77:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n78:   @ImmutableValidator\\n79:   private void validate() {\\n80:     inOrderOrEqual(expiry.toLocalDate(), underlying.getPaymentDate(), \\\"expiry.date\\\", \\\"underlying.paymentDate\\\");\\n81:   }\\n82: \\n83:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n84:   /**\\n85:    * Gets currency pair of the base currency and counter currency.\\n86:    * <p>\\n87:    * This currency pair is conventional, thus indifferent to the direction of FX.\\n88:    * \\n89:    * @return the currency pair\\n90:    */\\n91:   public CurrencyPair getCurrencyPair() {\\n92:     return underlying.getCurrencyPair();\\n93:   }\\n94: \\n95:   /**\\n96:    * Gets the expiry date of the option.\\n97:    * \\n98:    * @return the expiry date\\n99:    */\\n100:   public LocalDate getExpiryDate() {\\n101:     return expiry.toLocalDate();\\n102:   }\\n103: \\n104:   /**\\n105:    * Gets the strike rate.\\n106:    * \\n107:    * @return the strike\\n108:    */\\n109:   public double getStrike() {\\n110:     return Math.abs(underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() /\\n111:         underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\\n112:   }\\n113: \\n114:   /**\\n115:    * Returns the put/call flag.\\n116:    * <p>\\n117:    * This is the put/call for the base currency.\\n118:    * If the amount for the base currency is positive, the option is a call on the base currency (put on counter currency). \\n119:    * If the amount for the base currency is negative, the option is a put on the base currency (call on counter currency).\\n120:    * \\n121:    * @return the put or call\\n122:    */\\n123:   public PutCall getPutCall() {\\n124:     return underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() > 0d ? PutCall.PUT : PutCall.CALL;\\n125:   }\\n126: \\n127:   /**\\n128:    * Get the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\\n129:    * \\n130:    * @return the counter currency\\n131:    */\\n132:   public Currency getCounterCurrency() {\\n133:     return underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\\n134:   }\\n135: \\n136:   //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\\n137:   /**\\n138:    * The meta-bean for {@code ResolvedFxVanillaOption}.\\n139:    * @return the meta-bean, not null\\n140:    */\\n141:   public static com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\n36: \n37: /**\n38:  * A vanilla FX option, resolved for pricing.\n39:  * <p>\n40:  * This is the resolved form of {@link FxVanillaOption} and is an input to the pricers.\n41:  * Applications will typically create a {@code ResolvedFxVanillaOption} from a {@code FxVanillaOption}\n42:  * using {@link FxVanillaOption#resolve(ReferenceData)}.\n43:  * <p>\n44:  * A {@code ResolvedFxVanillaOption} is bound to data that changes over time, such as holiday calendars.\n45:  * If the data changes, such as the addition of a new holiday, the resolved form will not be updated.\n46:  * Care must be taken when placing the resolved form in a cache or persistence layer.\n47:  */\n48: @BeanDefinition\n49: public final class ResolvedFxVanillaOption\n50:     implements ResolvedProduct, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n51: \n52:   /**\n53:    * Whether the option is long or short.\n54:    * <p>\n55:    * At expiry, the long party will have the option to enter in this transaction; \n56:    * the short party will, at the option of the long party, potentially enter into the inverse transaction.\n57:    */\n58:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n59:   private final LongShort longShort;\n60:   /**\n61:    * The expiry date-time of the option.\n62:    * <p>\n63:    * The option is European, and can only be exercised on the expiry date.\n64:    */\n65:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n66:   private final ZonedDateTime expiry;\n67:   /**\n68:    * The underlying foreign exchange transaction.\n69:    * <p>\n70:    * At expiry, if the option is in the money, this foreign exchange will occur.\n71:    * A call option permits the transaction as specified to occur.\n72:    * A put option permits the inverse transaction to occur.\n73:    */\n74:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n75:   private final ResolvedFxSingle underlying;\n76: \n77:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n78:   @ImmutableValidator\n79:   private void validate() {\n80:     inOrderOrEqual(expiry.toLocalDate(), underlying.getPaymentDate(), \"expiry.date\", \"underlying.paymentDate\");\n81:   }\n82: \n83:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n84:   /**\n85:    * Gets currency pair of the base currency and counter currency.\n86:    * <p>\n87:    * This currency pair is conventional, thus indifferent to the direction of FX.\n88:    * \n89:    * @return the currency pair\n90:    */\n91:   public CurrencyPair getCurrencyPair() {\n92:     return underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n93:   }\n94: \n95:   /**\n96:    * Gets the expiry date of the option.\n97:    * \n98:    * @return the expiry date\n99:    */\n100:   public LocalDate getExpiryDate() {\n101:     return expiry.toLocalDate();\n102:   }\n103: \n104:   /**\n105:    * Gets the strike rate.\n106:    * \n107:    * @return the strike\n108:    */\n109:   public double getStrike() {\n110:     return Math.abs(underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() /\n111:         underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n112:   }\n113: \n114:   /**\n115:    * Returns the put/call flag.\n116:    * <p>\n117:    * This is the put/call for the base currency.\n118:    * If the amount for the base currency is positive, the option is a call on the base currency (put on counter currency). \n119:    * If the amount for the base currency is negative, the option is a put on the base currency (call on counter currency).\n120:    * \n121:    * @return the put or call\n122:    */\n123:   public PutCall getPutCall() {\n124:     return underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() > 0d ? PutCall.PUT : PutCall.CALL;\n125:   }\n126: \n127:   /**\n128:    * Get the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\n129:    * \n130:    * @return the counter currency\n131:    */\n132:   public Currency getCounterCurrency() {\n133:     return underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n134:   }\n135: \n136:   //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n137:   /**\n138:    * The meta-bean for {@code ResolvedFxVanillaOption}.\n139:    * @return the meta-bean, not null\n140:    */\n141:   public static org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\\n24: \\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.product.ResolvedTrade;\\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\\n29: \\n30: /**\\n31:  * A trade in a vanilla FX option, resolved for pricing.\\n32:  * <p>\\n33:  * This is the resolved form of {@link FxVanillaOptionTrade} and is the primary input to the pricers.\\n34:  * Applications will typically create a {@code ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade} from a {@code FxVanillaOptionTrade}\\n35:  * using {@link FxVanillaOptionTrade#resolve(ReferenceData)}.\\n36:  * <p>\\n37:  * A {@code ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade} is bound to data that changes over time, such as holiday calendars.\\n38:  * If the data changes, such as the addition of a new holiday, the resolved form will not be updated.\\n39:  * Care must be taken when placing the resolved form in a cache or persistence layer.\\n40:  */\\n41: @BeanDefinition\\n42: public final class ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade\\n43:     implements ResolvedTrade, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\\n44: \\n45:   /**\\n46:    * @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\", overrideGet = true)\\n51:   private final TradeInfo info;\\n52:   /**\\n53:    * The resolved vanilla FX option product.\\n54:    * <p>\\n55:    * The product captures the contracted financial details of the trade.\\n56:    */\\n57:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\", overrideGet = true)\\n58:   private final ResolvedFxVanillaOption product;\\n59:   /**\\n60:    * The premium of the FX option.\\n61:    * <p>\\n62:    * The premium sign should be compatible with the product Long/Short flag.\\n63:    * This means that the premium is negative for long and positive for short.\\n64:    */\\n65:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n66:   private final Payment premium;\\n67: \\n68:     "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\n7: \n8: import java.io.Serializable;\n9: import java.util.Map;\n10: import java.util.NoSuchElementException;\n11: \n12: import org.joda.beans.Bean;\n13: import org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\n14: import org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\n15: import org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\n16: import org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\n17: import org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\n18: import org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableDefaults;\n19: import org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\n20: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\n21: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\n22: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\n23: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n24: \n25: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.product.ResolvedTrade;\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\n29: \n30: /**\n31:  * A trade in a vanilla FX option, resolved for pricing.\n32:  * <p>\n33:  * This is the resolved form of {@link FxVanillaOptionTrade} and is the primary input to the pricers.\n34:  * Applications will typically create a {@code ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade} from a {@code FxVanillaOptionTrade}\n35:  * using {@link FxVanillaOptionTrade#resolve(ReferenceData)}.\n36:  * <p>\n37:  * A {@code ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade} is bound to data that changes over time, such as holiday calendars.\n38:  * If the data changes, such as the addition of a new holiday, the resolved form will not be updated.\n39:  * Care must be taken when placing the resolved form in a cache or persistence layer.\n40:  */\n41: @BeanDefinition\n42: public final class ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade\n43:     implements ResolvedTrade, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n44: \n45:   /**\n46:    * The additional trade information, defaulted to an empty instance.\n47:    * <p>\n48:    * This allows additional information to be attached to the trade.\n49:    */\n50:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\", overrideGet = true)\n51:   private final TradeInfo info;\n52:   /**\n53:    * The resolved vanilla FX option product.\n54:    * <p>\n55:    * The product captures the contracted financial details of the trade.\n56:    */\n57:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\", overrideGet = true)\n58:   private final ResolvedFxVanillaOption product;\n59:   /**\n60:    * The premium of the FX option.\n61:    * <p>\n62:    * The premium sign should be compatible with the product Long/Short flag.\n63:    * This means that the premium is negative for long and positive for short.\n64:    */\n65:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n66:   private final Payment premium;\n67: \n68:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n69:   @ImmutableDefaults\n70:   private static void applyDefaults(Builder builder) {\n71:     builder.info = TradeInfo.empty();\n72:   }\n73: \n74:   //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n75:   /**\n76:    * The meta-bean for {@code ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade}.\n77:    * @return the meta-bean, not null\n78:    */\n79:   public static ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.Meta meta() {\n80:     return ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE;\n81:   }\n82: \n83:   static {\n84:     MetaBean.register(ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE);\n85:   }\n86: \n87:   /**\n88:    * The serialization version id.\n89:    */\n90:   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n91: \n92:   /**\n93:    * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n94:    * @return the builder, not null\n95:    */\n96:   public static ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.Builder builder() {\n97:     return new ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.Builder();\n98:   }\n99: \n100:   private ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade(\n101:       TradeInfo info,\n102:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption product,\n103:       Payment premium) {\n104:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(info, \"info\");\n105:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(product, \"product\");\n106:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(premium, \"premium\");\n107:     this.info = info;\n108:     this.product = product;\n109:     this.premium = premium;\n110:   }\n111: \n112:   @Override\n113:   public ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.Meta metaBean() {\n114:     return ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE;\n115:   }\n116: \n117:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n118:   /**\n119:    * Gets the additional trade information, defaulted to an empty instance.\n120:    * <p>\n121:    * This allows additional information to be attached to the trade.\n122:    * @return the value of the property, not null\n123:    */\n124:   @Override\n125:   public TradeInfo getInfo() {\n126:     return info;\n127:   }\n128: \n129:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n130:   /**\n131:    * Gets the resolved vanilla FX option product.\n132:    * <p>\n133:    * The product captures the contracted financial details of the trade.\n134:    * @return the value of the property, not null\n135:    */\n136:   @Override\n137:   public ResolvedFxVanillaOption getProduct() {\n138:     return product;\n139:   }\n140: \n141:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n142:   /**\n143:    * Gets the premium of the FX option.\n144:    * <p>\n145:    * The premium sign should be compatible with the product Long/Short flag.\n146:    * This means that the premium is negative for long and positive for short.\n147:    * @return the value of the property, not null\n148:    */\n149:   public Payment getPremium() {\n150:     return premium;\n151:   }\n152: \n153:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n154: {
  "path": "modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxSingleBarrierOption.java",

Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\\n7: \\n8: import java.io.Serializable;\\n9: import java.time.ZonedDateTime;\\n10: import java.util.Map;\\n11: import java.util.NoSuchElementException;\\n12: import java.util.Optional;\\n13: \\n14: import org.joda.beans.Bean;\\n15: import org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\\n16: import org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\\n17: import org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\\n18: import org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\\n19: import org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\\n20: import org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableValidator;\\n21: import org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\\n22: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\\n23: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\\n24: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\\n25: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\\n26: \\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.Resolvable;\\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\\n32: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxOptionProduct;\\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\\n34: \\n35: /**\\n36:  * FX (European) single barrier option.\\n37:  * <p>\\n38:  * An FX option is a financial instrument that provides an option to exchange two currencies at a specified future time\\n39:  * only when barrier event occurs (knock-in option) or does not occur (knock-out option).\\n40:  * <p>\\n41:  * Depending on the barrier defined in {@link Barrier}, the options are classified into four types: up-and-in,\\n42:  * down-and-in, up-and-out and down-and-out.\\n43:  * <p>\\n44:  * For example, an up-and-out call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange with barrier of 1.5 is the option to\\n45:  * perform a foreign exchange on the expiry date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00, only when EUR/USD rate does\\n46:  * not exceed 1.5 during the barrier event observation period.\\n47:  * <p>\\n48:  * In case of the occurrence (non-occurrence for knock-in options) of the barrier event, the option becomes worthless,\\n49:  * or alternatively, a rebate is made.\\n50:  */\\n51: @BeanDefinition\\n52: public final class FxSingleBarrierOption\\n53:     implements FxOptionProduct, Resolvable<ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\\n54: \\n55:   /**\\n56:    * The underlying FX vanilla option.\\n57:    */\\n58:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n59:   private final FxVanillaOption underlyingOption;\\n60:   /**\\n61:    * The barrier description.\\n62:    * <p>\\n63:    * The barrier level stored in this field must be represented based on the direction of the currency pair in the\\n64:    * underlying FX transaction.\\n65:    * <p>\\n66:    * For example, if the underlying option is an option on EUR/GBP, the barrier should be a certain level of EUR/GBP rate.\\n67:    */\\n68:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n69:   private final Barrier barrier;\\n70:   /**\\n71:    * For a 'out' option, the amount is paid when the barrier is reached;\\n72:    * for a 'in' option, the amount is paid at expiry if the barrier is not reached.\\n73:    * <p>\\n74:    * This is the notional amount represented in one of the currency pair.\\n75:    * The amount should be positive.\\n76:    */\\n77:   @PropertyDefinition(get = \\\"optional\\\")\\n78:   private final CurrencyAmount rebate;\\n79: \\n80:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n81:   /**\\n82:    * Obtains FX single barrier option with rebate.\\n83:    *\\n84:    * @param underlyingOption  the underlying FX vanilla option\\n85:    * @param barrier  the barrier\\n86:    * @param rebate  the rebate\\n87:    * @return the instance\\n88:    */\\n89:   public static FxSingleBarrierOption of(FxVanillaOption underlyingOption, Barrier barrier, CurrencyAmount rebate) {\\n90:     return new FxSingleBarrierOption(underlyingOption, barrier, rebate);\\n91:   }\\n92: \\n93:   /**\\n94:    * Obtains FX single barrier option without rebate.\\n95:    *\\n96:    * @param underlyingOption  the underlying FX vanilla option\\n97:    * @param barrier  the barrier\\n98:    * @return the instance\\n99:    */\\n100:   public static FxSingleBarrierOption of(FxVanillaOption underlyingOption, Barrier barrier) {\\n101:     return new FxSingleBarrierOption(underlyingOption, barrier, null);\\n102:   }\\n103: \\n104:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n105:   @ImmutableValidator\\n106:   private void validate() {\\n107:     if (rebate != null) {\\n108:       ArgChecker.isTrue(rebate.getAmount() > 0d, \\\"rebate must be positive\\\");\\n109:       ArgChecker.isTrue(underlyingOption.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair().contains(rebate.getCurrency()),\\n110:           \\\"The rebate currency must be one of underlying currency pair\\\");\\n111:     }\\n112:   }\\n113: \\n114:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n115:   /**\\n116:    * Gets currency pair of the base currency and counter currency.\\n117:    * <p>\\n118:    * This currency pair is conventional, thus indifferent to the direction of FX.\\n119:    *\\n120:    * @return the currency pair\\n121:    */\\n122:   @Override\\n123:   public CurrencyPair getCurrencyPair() {\\n124:     return underlyingOption.getCurrencyPair();\\n125:   }\\n126: \\n127:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n128:   /**\\n129:    * Gets the underlying Fx vanilla option's expiry.\\n130:    * @return the expiry\\n131:    */\\n132:   @Override\\n133:   public ZonedDateTime getExpiry() {\\n134:     return underlyingOption.getExpiry();\\n135:   }\\n136: \\n137:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n138:   @Override\\n139:   public ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\\n140:     if (rebate != null) {\\n141:       return ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(underlyingOption.resolve(refData), barrier, rebate);\\n142:     }\\n143:     return ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(underlyingOption.resolve(refData), barrier);\\n144:   }\\n145: \\n146:   //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\\n147:   /**\\n148:    * The meta-bean for {@code FxSingleBarrierOption}.\\n149:    * @return the meta-bean, not null\\n150:    */\\n151:   public static FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta meta() {\\n152:     return FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\\n153:   }\\n154: \\n155:   static {\\n156:     MetaBean.register(FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta.INSTANCE);\\n157:   }\\n158: \\n159:   /**\\n160:    * The serialization version id.\\n161:    */\\n162:   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\\n163: \\n164:   /**\\n165:    * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\\n166:    * @return the builder, not null\\n167:    */\\n168:   public static FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder builder() {\\n169:     return new FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder();\\n170:   }\\n171: \\n172:   private FxSingleBarrierOption(\\n173:       FxVanillaOption underlyingOption,\\n174:       Barrier barrier,\\n175:       CurrencyAmount rebate) {\\n176:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(underlyingOption, \\\"underlyingOption\\\");\\n177:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(barrier, \\\"barrier\\\");\\n178:     this.underlyingOption = underlyingOption;\\n179:     this.barrier = barrier;\\n180:     this.rebate = rebate;\\n181:     validate();\\n182:   }\\n183: \\n184:   @Override\\n185:   public FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta metaBean() {\\n186:     return FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\\n187:   }\\n188: \\n189:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n190:   /**\\n191:    * Gets the underlying FX vanilla option.\\n192:    * @return the value of the property, not null\\n193:    */\\n194:   public FxVanillaOption getUnderlyingOption() {\\n195:     return underlyingOption;\\n196:   }\\n197: \\n198:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n199:   /**\\n200:    * Gets the barrier description.\\n201:    * <p>\\n202:    * The barrier level stored in this field must be represented based on the direction of the currency pair in the\\n203:    * underlying FX transaction.\\n204:    * <p>\\n205:    * For example, if the underlying option is an option on EUR/GBP, the barrier should be a certain level of EUR/GBP rate.\\n206:    * @return the value of the property, not null\\n207:    */\\n208:   public Barrier getBarrier() {\\n209:     return barrier;\\n210:   }\\n211: \\n212:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n213:   /**\\n214:    * Gets for a 'out' option, the amount is paid when the barrier is reached;\\n215: should be positive.\\n219:    * @return the optional value of the property, not null\\n220:    */\\n221:   public Optional<CurrencyAmount> getRebate() {\\n222:     return Sets the barrier description.\\n473:      * <p>\\n474:      * The barrier level stored in this field must be represented based on the direction of the currency pair in the\\n475:      * underlying FX transaction.\\n476:      * <p>\\n477:      * For example, if the underlying option is an option on EUR/GBP, the barrier should be a certain level of EUR/GBP rate.\\n478:      * @param barrier  the new value, not null\\n479:      * @return this, for chaining, not null\\n480:      */\\n481:     public Builder barrier(Barrier barrier) {\\n482:       JodaBeanUtils.notNull(barrier, \\\"barrier\\\");\\n483:       this.barrier = barrier;\\n484:       return this;\\n485:     }\\n486: \\n487:     /**\\n488:      * Sets for a 'out' option, the amount is paid when the barrier is   "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\n7: \n8: import java.io.Serializable;\n9: import java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n10: import java.util.Map;\n11: import java.util.NoSuchElementException;\n12: import java.util.Optional;\n13: \n14: import org.joda.beans.Bean;\n15: import org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\n16: import org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\n17: import org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\n18: import org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\n19: import org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\n20: import org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableValidator;\n21: import org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\n22: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\n23: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\n24: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\n25: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n26: \n27: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.Resolvable;\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\n32: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxOptionProduct;\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\n34: \n35: /**\n36:  * FX (European) single barrier option.\n37:  * <p>\n38:  * An FX option is a financial instrument that provides an option to exchange two currencies at a specified future time\n39:  * only when barrier event occurs (knock-in option) or does not occur (knock-out option).\n40:  * <p>\n41:  * Depending on the barrier defined in {@link Barrier}, the options are classified into four types: up-and-in,\n42:  * down-and-in, up-and-out and down-and-out.\n43:  * <p>\n44:  * For example, an up-and-out call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange with barrier of 1.5 is the option to\n45:  * perform a foreign exchange on the expiry date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00, only when EUR/USD rate does\n46:  * not exceed 1.5 during the barrier event observation period.\n47:  * <p>\n48:  * In case of the occurrence (non-occurrence for knock-in options) of the barrier event, the option becomes worthless,\n49:  * or alternatively, a rebate is made.\n50:  */\n51: @BeanDefinition\n52: public final class FxSingleBarrierOption\n53:     implements FxOptionProduct, Resolvable<ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n54: \n55:   /**\n56:    * The underlying FX vanilla option.\n57:    */\n58:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n59:   private final FxVanillaOption underlyingOption;\n60:   /**\n61:    * The barrier description.\n62:    * <p>\n63:    * The barrier level stored in this field must be represented based on the direction of the currency pair in the\n64:    * underlying FX transaction.\n65:    * <p>\n66:    * For example, if the underlying option is an option on EUR/GBP, the barrier should be a certain level of EUR/GBP rate.\n67:    */\n68:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n69:   private final Barrier barrier;\n70:   /**\n71:    * For a 'out' option, the amount is paid when the barrier is reached;\n72:    * for a 'in' option, the amount is paid at expiry if the barrier is not reached.\n73:    * <p>\n74:    * This is the notional amount represented in one of the currency pair.\n75:    * The amount should be positive.\n76:    */\n77:   @PropertyDefinition(get = \"optional\")\n78:   private final CurrencyAmount rebate;\n79: \n80:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n81:   /**\n82:    * Obtains FX single barrier option with rebate.\n83:    *\n84:    * @param underlyingOption  the underlying FX vanilla option\n85:    * @param barrier  the barrier\n86:    * @param rebate  the rebate\n87:    * @return the instance\n88:    */\n89:   public static FxSingleBarrierOption of(FxVanillaOption underlyingOption, Barrier barrier, CurrencyAmount rebate) {\n90:     return new FxSingleBarrierOption(underlyingOption, barrier, rebate);\n91:   }\n92: \n93:   /**\n94:    * Obtains FX single barrier option without rebate.\n95:    *\n96:    * @param underlyingOption  the underlying FX vanilla option\n97:    * @param barrier  the barrier\n98:    * @return the instance\n99:    */\n100:   public static FxSingleBarrierOption of(FxVanillaOption underlyingOption, Barrier barrier) {\n101:     return new FxSingleBarrierOption(underlyingOption, barrier, null);\n102:   }\n103: \n104:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n105:   @ImmutableValidator\n106:   private void validate() {\n107:     if (rebate != null) {\n108:       ArgChecker.isTrue(rebate.getAmount() > 0d, \"rebate must be positive\");\n109:       ArgChecker.isTrue(underlyingOption.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair().contains(rebate.getCurrency()),\n110:           \"The rebate currency must be one of underlying currency pair\");\n111:     }\n112:   }\n113: \n114:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n115:   /**\n116:    * Gets currency pair of the base currency and counter currency.\n117:    * <p>\n118:    * This currency pair is conventional, thus indifferent to the direction of FX.\n119:    *\n120:    * @return the currency pair\n121:    */\n122:   @Override\n123:   public CurrencyPair getCurrencyPair() {\n124:     return underlyingOption.getCurrencyPair();\n125:   }\n126: \n127:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n128:   /**\n129:    * Gets the underlying Fx vanilla option's expiry.\n130:    * @return the expiry\n131:    */\n132:   @Override\n133:   public ZonedDateTime getExpiry() {\n134:     return underlyingOption.getExpiry();\n135:   }\n136: \n137:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n138:   @Override\n139:   public ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n140:     if (rebate != null) {\n141:       return ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(underlyingOption.resolve(refData), barrier, rebate);\n142:     }\n143:     return ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(underlyingOption.resolve(refData), barrier);\n144:   }\n145: \n146:   //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n147:   /**\n148:    * The meta-bean for {@code FxSingleBarrierOption}.\n149:    * @return the meta-bean, not null\n150:    */\n151:   public static FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta meta() {\n152:     return FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n153:   }\n154: \n155:   static {\n156:     MetaBean.register(FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta.INSTANCE);\n157:   }\n158: \n159:   /**\n160:    * The serialization version id.\n161:    */\n162:   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n163: \n164:   /**\n165:    * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n166:    * @return the builder, not null\n167:    */\n168:   public static FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder builder() {\n169:     return new FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder();\n170:   }\n171: \n172:   private FxSingleBarrierOption(\n173:       FxVanillaOption underlyingOption,\n174:       Barrier barrier,\n175:       CurrencyAmount rebate) {\n176:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(underlyingOption, \"underlyingOption\");\n177:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(barrier, \"barrier\");\n178:     this.underlyingOption = underlyingOption;\n179:     this.barrier = barrier;\n180:     this.rebate = rebate;\n181:     validate();\n182:   }\n183: \n184:   @Override\n185:   public FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta metaBean() {\n186:     return FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n187:   }\n188: \n189:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n190:   /**\n191:    * Gets the underlying FX vanilla option.\n192:    * @return the value of the property, not null\n193:    */\n194:   public FxVanillaOption getUnderlyingOption() {\n195:     return underlyingOption;\n196:   }\n197: \n198:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n199:   /**\n200:    * Gets the barrier description.\n201:    * <p>\n202:    * The barrier level stored in this field must be represented based on the direction of the currency pair in the\n203:    * underlying FX transaction.\n204:    * <p>\n205:    * For example, if the underlying option is an option on EUR/GBP, the barrier should be a certain level of EUR/GBP rate.\n206:    * @return the value of the property, not null\n207:    */\n208:   public Barrier getBarrier() {\n209:     return barrier;\n210:   }\n211: \n212:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n213:   /**\n214:    * Gets for a 'out' option, the amount is paid when the barrier is reached;\n215:    * for a 'in' option, the amount is paid at expiry if the barrier is not reached.\n216:    * <p>\n217:    * This is the notional amount represented in one of the currency pair.\n218:    * The amount should be positive.\n219:    * @return the optional value of the property, not null\n220:    */\n221:   public Optional<CurrencyAmount> getRebate() {\n222:     return Optional.ofNullable(rebate);\n223:   }\n224: \n225:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n226:   /**\n227:    * Returns a builder that allows this bean to be mutated.\n228:    * @return the mutable builder, not null\n229:    */\n230:   public Builder toBuilder() {\n231:     return new Builder(this);\n232:   }\n233: \n234:   @Override\n235:   public boolean equals(Object obj) {\n236:     if (obj == this) {\n237:       return true;\n238:     }\n239:     if (obj != null && obj.getClass() == this.getClass()) {\n240:       FxSingleBarrierOption other = (FxSingleBarrierOption) obj;\n241:    }\n245:     return false;\n246:   }\n247: \n248:   @Override\n249:   public int hashCode() {\n250:     int hash = getClass().hashCode();\n251:     hash = hash * 31 +
