  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\\n7: \\n8: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\n9: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.value.ValueDerivatives;\\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOption;\\n21: \\n22: /**\\n23:  * Pricer for foreign exchange vanilla option transaction products with a lognormal model.\\n24:  * <p>\\n25:  * This function provides the ability to price an {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOption}.\\n26:  * <p>\\n27:  * All of the computation is be based on the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\\n28:  * For example, price, PV and risk measures of the product will be expressed in USD for an option on EUR/USD.\\n29:  */\\n30: public class BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer {\\n31: \\n32:   /**\\n33:    * Default implementation.\\n34:    */\\n35:   public static final BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer DEFAULT =\\n36:       new BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer(DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer.DEFAULT);\\n37: \\n38:   /**\\n39:    * Underlying FX pricer.\\n40:    */\\n41:   private final DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer;\\n42: \\n43:   /**\\n44:    * Creates an instance.\\n45:    * \\n46:    * @param fxPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingle}\\n47:    */\\n48:   public BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer(\\n49:       DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer) {\\n50:     this.fxPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(fxPricer, \\\"fxPricer\\\");\\n51:   }\\n52: \\n53:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n54:   /**\\n55:    * Returns the pricer used to price the underlying FX product.\\n56:    * \\n57:    * @return the pricer\\n58:    */\\n59:   DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer getDiscountingFxSingleProductPricer() {\\n60:     return fxPricer;\\n61:   }\\n62: \\n63:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n64:   /**\\n65:    * Calculates the price of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n66:    * <p>\\n67:    * The price of the product is the value on the valuation date for one unit of the base currency \\n68:    * and is expressed in the counter currency. The price does not take into account the long/short flag.\\n69:    * See {@link #presentValue} for scaling and currency.\\n70:    * \\n71:    * @param option  the option product\\n72:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n73:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n74:    * @return the price of the product\\n75:    */\\n76:   public double price(\\n77:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n78:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n79:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n80: \\n81:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\\n82:     double forwardPrice = undiscountedPrice(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n83:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\\n84:     return discountFactor * forwardPrice;\\n85:   }\\n86: \\n87:   /**\\n88:    * Calculates the present value of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n89:    * <p>\\n90:    * The present value of the product is the value on the valuation date.\\n91:    * It is expressed in the counter currency.\\n92:    * \\n93:    * @param option  the option product\\n94:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n95:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n96:    * @return the present value of the product\\n97:    */\\n98:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\\n99:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n100:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n101:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n102: \\n103:     double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n104:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * price);\\n105:   }\\n106: \\n107:   // the price without discounting\\n108:   private double undiscountedPrice(\\n109:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n110:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n111:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n112: \\n113:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n114:     if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\\n115:       return 0d;\\n116:     }\\n117:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\\n118:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\\n119:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\\n120:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\\n121:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n122:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\\n123:     if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\\n124:       return isCall ? Math.max(forwardRate - strikeRate, 0d) : Math.max(0d, strikeRate - forwardRate);\\n125:     }\\n126:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\\n127:     return BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\\n128:   }\\n129: \\n130:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n131:   /**\\n132:    * Calculates the delta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n133:    * <p>\\n134:    * The delta is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\\n135:    * \\n136:    * @param option  the option product\\n137:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n138:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n139:    * @return the delta of the product\\n140:    */\\n141:   public double delta(\\n142:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n143:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n144:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n145: \\n146:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\\n147:     double fwdDelta = undiscountedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n148:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\\n149:     double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\\n150:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider);\\n151:     return fwdDelta * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\\n152:   }\\n153: \\n154:   /**\\n155:    * Calculates the present value delta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n156:    * <p>\\n157:    * The present value delta is the first derivative of {@link #presentValue} with respect to spot.\\n158:    * \\n159:    * @param option  the option product\\n160:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n161:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n162:    * @return the present value delta of the product\\n163:    */\\n164:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueDelta(\\n165:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n166:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n167:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n168: \\n169:     double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n170:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * delta);\\n171:   }\\n172: \\n173:   /**\\n174:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n175:    * <p>\\n176:    * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of {@link #presentValue} to\\n177:    * the underlying curves.\\n178:    * <p>\\n179:    * The volatility is fixed in this sensitivity computation.\\n180:    * \\n181:    * @param option  the option product\\n182:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n183:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n184:    * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\\n185:    */\\n186:   public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\\n187:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n188:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n189:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n190: \\n191:     if (volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\\n192:       return PointSensitivities.empty();\\n193:     }\\n194:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\\n195:     double fwdDelta = undiscountedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n196:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\\n197:     double notional = signedNotional(option);\\n198:     PointSensitivityBuilder fwdSensi = fxPricer.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\\n199:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider)\\n200:         .multipliedBy(notional * discountFactor * fwdDelta);\\n201:     double fwdPrice = undiscountedPrice(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n202:     PointSensitivityBuilder dscSensi = ratesProvider.discountFactors(option.getCounterCurrency())\\n203:         .zeroRatePointSensitivity(underlying.getPaymentDate()).multipliedBy(notional * fwdPrice);\\n204:     return fwdSensi.combinedWith(dscSensi).build().convertedTo(option.getCounterCurrency(), ratesProvider);\\n205:   }\\n206: \\n207:   // the delta without discounting\\n208:   private double undiscountedDelta(\\n209:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n210:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n211:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n212: \\n213:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n214:     if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\\n215:       return 0d;\\n216:     }\\n217:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\\n218:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\\n219:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\\n220:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\\n221:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n222:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\\n223:     if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\\n224:       return isCall ? (forwardRate > strikeRate ? 1d : 0d) : (strikeRate > forwardRate ? -1d : 0d);\\n225:     }\\n226:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\\n227:     return BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\\n228:   }\\n229: \\n230:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n231:   /**\\n232:    * Calculates the smile adjusted delta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n233:    * <p>\\n234:    * The delta is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\\n235:    * The sensitivity of the volatility to spot is also included in this method,\\n236:    * that is based on how FX option volatility surface is constructed in {@code BlackFxOptionVolatilities}.\\n237:    *\\n238:    * @param option  the option product\\n239:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n240:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n241:    * @return the delta of the product\\n242:    */\\n243:   public double smileAdjustedDelta(\\n244:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n245:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n246:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n247: \\n248:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n249:     if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\\n250:       return 0d;\\n251:     }\\n252:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\\n253:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\\n254:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\\n255:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\\n256:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n257:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\\n258:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\\n259:     double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\\n260:         isCall ? underlying : underlying.inverse(),\\n261:         ratesProvider);\\n262:     if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\\n263:       double forwardDelta = isCall ? (forwardRate > strikeRate ? 1d : 0d) : (strikeRate > forwardRate ? -1d : 0d);\\n264:       return discountFactor * forwardDelta * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\\n265:     }\\n266:     ValueDerivatives volatilityDerivatives = volatilities.firstPartialDerivatives(\\n267:         strikePair,\\n268:         timeToExpiry,\\n269:         strikeRate,\\n270:         forwardRate);\\n271:     double fwdVega = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(\\n272:         forwardRate,\\n273:         strikeRate,\\n274:         timeToExpiry,\\n275:         volatilityDerivatives.getValue());\\n276:     double fwdDelta = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(\\n277:         forwardRate,\\n278:         strikeRate,\\n279:         timeToExpiry,\\n280:         volatilityDerivatives.getValue(),\\n281:         isCall);\\n282:     return (fwdDelta + fwdVega * volatilityDerivatives.getDerivative(2)) * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\\n283:   }\\n284: \\n285:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n286:   /**\\n287:    * Calculates the gamma of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n288:    * <p>\\n289:    * The gamma is the second derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\\n290:    * \\n291:    * @param option  the option product\\n292:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n293:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n294:    * @return the gamma of the product\\n295:    */\\n296:   public double gamma(\\n297:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n298:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n299:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n300: \\n301:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n302:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n303:       return 0d;\\n304:     }\\n305:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\\n306:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\\n307:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\\n308:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\\n309:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n310:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(\\n311:         strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\\n312:     double forwardGamma = BlackFormulaRepository.gamma(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\\n313:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\\n314:     double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\\n315:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider);\\n316:     return forwardGamma * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\\n317:   }\\n318: \\n319:   /**\\n320:    * Calculates the present value delta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n321:    * <p>\\n322:    * The present value gamma is the second derivative of the {@link #presentValue} with respect to spot.\\n323:    * \\n324:    * @param option  the option product\\n325:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n326:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n327:    * @return the present value gamma of the product\\n328:    */\\n329:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueGamma(\\n330:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n331:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n332:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n333: \\n334:     double gamma = gamma(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n335:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * gamma);\\n336:   }\\n337: \\n338:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n339:   /**\\n340:    * Calculates the vega of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n341:    * <p>\\n342:    * The vega is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to volatility.\\n343:    * \\n344:    * @param option  the option product\\n345:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n346:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n347:    * @return the vega of the product\\n348:    */\\n349:   public double vega(\\n350:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n351:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n352:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n353: \\n354:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n355:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n356:       return 0d;\\n357:     }\\n358:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\\n359:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\\n360:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\\n361:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\\n362:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n363:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\\n364:     double fwdVega = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\\n365:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\\n366:     return discountFactor * fwdVega;\\n367:   }\\n368: \\n369:   /**\\n370:    * Calculates the present value vega of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n371:    * <p>\\n372:    * The present value vega is the first derivative of the {@link #presentValue} with respect to volatility.\\n373:    * \\n374:    * @param option  the option product\\n375:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n376:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n377:    * @return the present value vega of the product\\n378:    */\\n379:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueVega(\\n380:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n381:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n382:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n383: \\n384:     double vega = vega(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n385:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * vega);\\n386:   }\\n387: \\n388:   /**\\n389:    * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\\n390:    * <p>\\n391:    * The result is a single sensitivity to the volatility used.\\n392:    * \\n393:    * @param option  the option product\\n394:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n395:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n396:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\n397:    */\\n398:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\\n399:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n400:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n401:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n402: \\n403:     if (volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\\n404:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n405:     }\\n406:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\\n407:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\\n408:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\\n409:     CurrencyAmount valueVega = presentValueVega(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n410:     return FxOptionSensitivity.of(\\n411:         volatilities.getName(),\\n412:         strikePair,\\n413:         volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()),\\n414:         option.getStrike(),\\n415:         forward.fxRate(strikePair),\\n416:         valueVega.getCurrency(),\\n417:         valueVega.getAmount());\\n418:   }\\n419: \\n420:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n421:   /**\\n422:    * Calculates the Black theta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n423:    * <p>\\n424:    * The theta is the negative of the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to time parameter\\n425:    * in Black formula (the discounted driftless theta).\\n426:    * \\n427:    * @param option  the option product\\n428:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n429:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n430:    * @return the theta of the product\\n431:    */\\n432:   public double theta(\\n433:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n434:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n435:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n436: \\n437:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n438:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n439:       return 0d;\\n440:     }\\n441:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\\n442:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\\n443:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\\n444:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\\n445:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n446:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(\\n447:         strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\\n448:     double fwdTheta = BlackFormulaRepository.driftlessTheta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\\n449:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\\n450:     return discountFactor * fwdTheta;\\n451:   }\\n452: \\n453:   /**\\n454:    * Calculates the present value theta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n455:    * <p>\\n456:    * The present value theta is the negative of the first derivative of {@link #presentValue} with time parameter\\n457:    * in Black formula, i.e., the driftless theta of the present value.\\n458:    * \\n459:    * @param option  the option product\\n460:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n461:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n462:    * @return the present value vega of the product\\n463:    */\\n464:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueTheta(\\n465:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n466:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n467:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n468: \\n469:     double theta = theta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n470:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * theta);\\n471:   }\\n472: \\n473:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n474:   /**\\n475:    * Calculates the forward exchange rate.\\n476:    *\\n477:    * @param option  the option product\\n478:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n479:    * @return the forward rate\\n480:    */\\n481:   public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxVanillaOption option, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\\n482:     return fxPricer.forwardFxRate(option.getUnderlying(), ratesProvider);\\n483:   }\\n484: \\n485:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n486:   /**\\n487:    * Calculates the implied Black volatility of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n488:    * \\n489:    * @param option  the option product\\n490:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n491:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n492:    * @return the implied volatility of the product\\n493:    * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the option has expired\\n494:    */\\n495:   public double impliedVolatility(\\n496:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n497:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n498:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n499: \\n500:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n501:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n502:       throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"valuation is after option's expiry.\\\");\\n503:     }\\n504:     FxRate forward = forwardFxRate(option, ratesProvider);\\n505:     CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\\n506:     return volatilities.volatility(\\n507:         strikePair, option.getExpiry(), option.getStrike(), forward.fxRate(strikePair));\\n508:   }\\n509: \\n510:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n511:   /**\\n512:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n513:    * \\n514:    * @param option  the option product\\n515:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n516:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n517:    * @return the currency exposure\\n518:    */\\n519:   public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\\n520:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n521:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n522:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n523: \\n524:     double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n525:     return currencyExposureFromDelta(delta, option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n526:   }\\n527: \\n528:   /**\\n529:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange vanilla option product, with smile adjustment included.\\n530:    * <p>\\n531:    * The smile adjustment is based on {@link BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer#smileAdjustedDelta}.\\n532:    *\\n533:    * @param option  the option product\\n534:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n535:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n536:    * @return the currency exposure\\n537:    */\\n538:   public MultiCurrencyAmount smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(\\n539:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n540:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n541:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n542: \\n543:     double delta = smileAdjustedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n544:     return currencyExposureFromDelta(delta, option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n545:   }\\n546: \\n547:   private MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposureFromDelta(\\n548:       double delta,\\n549:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n550:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n551:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n552: \\n553:     CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\\n554:     double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n555:     double spot = ratesProvider.fxRate(strikePair);\\n556:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\\n557:     CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(strikePair.getCounter(), (price - delta * spot) * signedNotional);\\n558:     CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(strikePair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\\n559:     return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\\n560:   }\\n561: \\n562:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n563:   // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\\n564:   private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxVanillaOption option) {\\n565:     return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\\n566:         Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\\n567:   }\\n568: \\n569: }\\n570: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n7: \n8: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\n9: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.value.ValueDerivatives;\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer;\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOption;\n21: \n22: /**\n23:  * Pricer for foreign exchange vanilla option transaction products with a lognormal model.\n24:  * <p>\n25:  * This function provides the ability to price an {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOption}.\n26:  * <p>\n27:  * All of the computation is be based on the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\n28:  * For example, price, PV and risk measures of the product will be expressed in USD for an option on EUR/USD.\n29:  */\n30: public class BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer {\n31: \n32:   /**\n33:    * Default implementation.\n34:    */\n35:   public static final BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer DEFAULT =\n36:       new BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer(DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer.DEFAULT);\n37: \n38:   /**\n39:    * Underlying FX pricer.\n40:    */\n41:   private final DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer;\n42: \n43:   /**\n44:    * Creates an instance.\n45:    * \n46:    * @param fxPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingle}\n47:    */\n48:   public BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer(\n49:       DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer) {\n50:     this.fxPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(fxPricer, \"fxPricer\");\n51:   }\n52: \n53:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n54:   /**\n55:    * Returns the pricer used to price the underlying FX product.\n56:    * \n57:    * @return the pricer\n58:    */\n59:   DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer getDiscountingFxSingleProductPricer() {\n60:     return fxPricer;\n61:   }\n62: \n63:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n64:   /**\n65:    * Calculates the price of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n66:    * <p>\n67:    * The price of the product is the value on the valuation date for one unit of the base currency \n68:    * and is expressed in the counter currency. The price does not take into account the long/short flag.\n69:    * See {@link #presentValue} for scaling and currency.\n70:    * \n71:    * @param option  the option product\n72:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n73:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n74:    * @return the price of the product\n75:    */\n76:   public double price(\n77:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n78:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n79:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n80: \n81:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n82:     double forwardPrice = undiscountedPrice(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n83:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n84:     return discountFactor * forwardPrice;\n85:   }\n86: \n87:   /**\n88:    * Calculates the present value of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n89:    * <p>\n90:    * The present value of the product is the value on the valuation date.\n91:    * It is expressed in the counter currency.\n92:    * \n93:    * @param option  the option product\n94:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n95:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n96:    * @return the present value of the product\n97:    */\n98:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n99:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n100:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n101:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n102: \n103:     double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n104:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * price);\n105:   }\n106: \n107:   // the price without discounting\n108:   private double undiscountedPrice(\n109:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n110:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n111:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n112: \n113:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n114:     if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n115:       return 0d;\n116:     }\n117:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n118:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n119:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n120:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n121:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n122:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n123:     if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n124:       return isCall ? Math.max(forwardRate - strikeRate, 0d) : Math.max(0d, strikeRate - forwardRate);\n125:     }\n126:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n127:     return BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n128:   }\n129: \n130:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n131:   /**\n132:    * Calculates the delta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n133:    * <p>\n134:    * The delta is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\n135:    * \n136:    * @param option  the option product\n137:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n138:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n139:    * @return the delta of the product\n140:    */\n141:   public double delta(\n142:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n143:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n144:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n145: \n146:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n147:     double fwdDelta = undiscountedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n148:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n149:     double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n150:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n151:     return fwdDelta * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n152:   }\n153: \n154:   /**\n155:    * Calculates the present value delta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n156:    * <p>\n157:    * The present value delta is the first derivative of {@link #presentValue} with respect to spot.\n158:    * \n159:    * @param option  the option product\n160:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n161:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n162:    * @return the present value delta of the product\n163:    */\n164:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueDelta(\n165:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n166:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n167:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n168: \n169:     double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n170:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * delta);\n171:   }\n172: \n173:   /**\n174:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n175:    * <p>\n176:    * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of {@link #presentValue} to\n177:    * the underlying curves.\n178:    * <p>\n179:    * The volatility is fixed in this sensitivity computation.\n180:    * \n181:    * @param option  the option product\n182:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n183:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n184:    * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\n185:    */\n186:   public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n187:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n188:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n189:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n190: \n191:     if (volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\n192:       return PointSensitivities.empty();\n193:     }\n194:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n195:     double fwdDelta = undiscountedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n196:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n197:     double notional = signedNotional(option);\n198:     PointSensitivityBuilder fwdSensi = fxPricer.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\n199:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider)\n200:         .multipliedBy(notional * discountFactor * fwdDelta);\n201:     double fwdPrice = undiscountedPrice(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n202:     PointSensitivityBuilder dscSensi = ratesProvider.discountFactors(option.getCounterCurrency())\n203:         .zeroRatePointSensitivity(underlying.getPaymentDate()).multipliedBy(notional * fwdPrice);\n204:     return fwdSensi.combinedWith(dscSensi).build().convertedTo(option.getCounterCurrency(), ratesProvider);\n205:   }\n206: \n207:   // the delta without discounting\n208:   private double undiscountedDelta(\n209:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n210:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n211:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n212: \n213:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n214:     if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n215:       return 0d;\n216:     }\n217:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n218:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n219:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n220:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n221:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n222:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n223:     if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n224:       return isCall ? (forwardRate > strikeRate ? 1d : 0d) : (strikeRate > forwardRate ? -1d : 0d);\n225:     }\n226:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n227:     return BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n228:   }\n229: \n230:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n231:   /**\n232:    * Calculates the smile adjusted delta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n233:    * <p>\n234:    * The delta is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\n235:    * The sensitivity of the volatility to spot is also included in this method,\n236:    * that is based on how FX option volatility surface is constructed in {@code BlackFxOptionVolatilities}.\n237:    *\n238:    * @param option  the option product\n239:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n240:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n241:    * @return the delta of the product\n242:    */\n243:   public double smileAdjustedDelta(\n244:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n245:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n246:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n247: \n248:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n249:     if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n250:       return 0d;\n251:     }\n252:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n253:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n254:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n255:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n256:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n257:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n258:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n259:     double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n260:         isCall ? underlying : underlying.inverse(),\n261:         ratesProvider);\n262:     if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n263:       double forwardDelta = isCall ? (forwardRate > strikeRate ? 1d : 0d) : (strikeRate > forwardRate ? -1d : 0d);\n264:       return discountFactor * forwardDelta * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n265:     }\n266:     ValueDerivatives volatilityDerivatives = volatilities.firstPartialDerivatives(\n267:         strikePair,\n268:         timeToExpiry,\n269:         strikeRate,\n270:         forwardRate);\n271:     double fwdVega = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(\n272:         forwardRate,\n273:         strikeRate,\n274:         timeToExpiry,\n275:         volatilityDerivatives.getValue());\n276:     double fwdDelta = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(\n277:         forwardRate,\n278:         strikeRate,\n279:         timeToExpiry,\n280:         volatilityDerivatives.getValue(),\n281:         isCall);\n282:     return (fwdDelta + fwdVega * volatilityDerivatives.getDerivative(2)) * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n283:   }\n284: \n285:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n286:   /**\n287:    * Calculates the gamma of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n288:    * <p>\n289:    * The gamma is the second derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\n290:    * \n291:    * @param option  the option product\n292:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n293:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n294:    * @return the gamma of the product\n295:    */\n296:   public double gamma(\n297:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n298:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n299:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n300: \n301:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n302:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n303:       return 0d;\n304:     }\n305:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n306:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n307:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n308:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n309:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n310:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(\n311:         strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n312:     double forwardGamma = BlackFormulaRepository.gamma(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n313:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n314:     double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n315:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n316:     return forwardGamma * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n317:   }\n318: \n319:   /**\n320:    * Calculates the present value delta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n321:    * <p>\n322:    * The present value gamma is the second derivative of the {@link #presentValue} with respect to spot.\n323:    * \n324:    * @param option  the option product\n325:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n326:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n327:    * @return the present value gamma of the product\n328:    */\n329:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueGamma(\n330:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n331:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n332:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n333: \n334:     double gamma = gamma(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n335:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * gamma);\n336:   }\n337: \n338:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n339:   /**\n340:    * Calculates the vega of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n341:    * <p>\n342:    * The vega is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to volatility.\n343:    * \n344:    * @param option  the option product\n345:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n346:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n347:    * @return the vega of the product\n348:    */\n349:   public double vega(\n350:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n351:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n352:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n353: \n354:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n355:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n356:       return 0d;\n357:     }\n358:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n359:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n360:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n361:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n362:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n363:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n364:     double fwdVega = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n365:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n366:     return discountFactor * fwdVega;\n367:   }\n368: \n369:   /**\n370:    * Calculates the present value vega of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n371:    * <p>\n372:    * The present value vega is the first derivative of the {@link #presentValue} with respect to volatility.\n373:    * \n374:    * @param option  the option product\n375:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n376:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n377:    * @return the present value vega of the product\n378:    */\n379:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueVega(\n380:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n381:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n382:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n383: \n384:     double vega = vega(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n385:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * vega);\n386:   }\n387: \n388:   /**\n389:    * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n390:    * <p>\n391:    * The result is a single sensitivity to the volatility used.\n392:    * \n393:    * @param option  the option product\n394:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n395:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n396:    * @return the present value sensitivity\n397:    */\n398:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n399:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n400:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n401:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n402: \n403:     if (volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\n404:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n405:     }\n406:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n407:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n408:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n409:     CurrencyAmount valueVega = presentValueVega(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n410:     return FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n411:         volatilities.getName(),\n412:         strikePair,\n413:         volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()),\n414:         option.getStrike(),\n415:         forward.fxRate(strikePair),\n416:         valueVega.getCurrency(),\n417:         valueVega.getAmount());\n418:   }\n419: \n420:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n421:   /**\n422:    * Calculates the Black theta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n423:    * <p>\n424:    * The theta is the negative of the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to time parameter\n425:    * in Black formula (the discounted driftless theta).\n426:    * \n427:    * @param option  the option product\n428:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n429:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n430:    * @return the theta of the product\n431:    */\n432:   public double theta(\n433:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n434:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n435:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n436: \n437:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n438:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n439:       return 0d;\n440:     }\n441:     ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n442:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n443:     CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n444:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n445:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n446:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(\n447:         strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n448:     double fwdTheta = BlackFormulaRepository.driftlessTheta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n449:     double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n450:     return discountFactor * fwdTheta;\n451:   }\n452: \n453:   /**\n454:    * Calculates the present value theta of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n455:    * <p>\n456:    * The present value theta is the negative of the first derivative of {@link #presentValue} with time parameter\n457:    * in Black formula, i.e., the driftless theta of the present value.\n458:    * \n459:    * @param option  the option product\n460:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n461:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n462:    * @return the present value vega of the product\n463:    */\n464:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueTheta(\n465:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n466:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n467:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n468: \n469:     double theta = theta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n470:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * theta);\n471:   }\n472: \n473:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n474:   /**\n475:    * Calculates the forward exchange rate.\n476:    *\n477:    * @param option  the option product\n478:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n479:    * @return the forward rate\n480:    */\n481:   public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxVanillaOption option, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n482:     return fxPricer.forwardFxRate(option.getUnderlying(), ratesProvider);\n483:   }\n484: \n485:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n486:   /**\n487:    * Calculates the implied Black volatility of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n488:    * \n489:    * @param option  the option product\n490:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n491:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n492:    * @return the implied volatility of the product\n493:    * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the option has expired\n494:    */\n495:   public double impliedVolatility(\n496:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n497:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n498:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n499: \n500:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n501:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n502:       throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"valuation is after option's expiry.\");\n503:     }\n504:     FxRate forward = forwardFxRate(option, ratesProvider);\n505:     CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\n506:     return volatilities.volatility(\n507:         strikePair, option.getExpiry(), option.getStrike(), forward.fxRate(strikePair));\n508:   }\n509: \n510:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n511:   /**\n512:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n513:    * \n514:    * @param option  the option product\n515:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n516:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n517:    * @return the currency exposure\n518:    */\n519:   public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n520:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n521:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n522:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n523: \n524:     double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n525:     return currencyExposureFromDelta(delta, option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n526:   }\n527: \n528:   /**\n529:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange vanilla option product, with smile adjustment included.\n530:    * <p>\n531:    * The smile adjustment is based on {@link BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer#smileAdjustedDelta}.\n532:    *\n533:    * @param option  the option product\n534:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n535:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n536:    * @return the currency exposure\n537:    */\n538:   public MultiCurrencyAmount smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(\n539:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n540:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n541:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n542: \n543:     double delta = smileAdjustedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n544:     return currencyExposureFromDelta(delta, option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n545:   }\n546: \n547:   private MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposureFromDelta(\n548:       double delta,\n549:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n550:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n551:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n552: \n553:     CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\n554:     double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n555:     double spot = ratesProvider.fxRate(strikePair);\n556:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n557:     CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(strikePair.getCounter(), (price - delta * spot) * signedNotional);\n558:     CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(strikePair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\n559:     return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\n560:   }\n561: \n562:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n563:   // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\n564:   private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxVanillaOption option) {\n565:     return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\n566:         Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n567:   }\n568: \n569: }\n570: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java"
  }
}

  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\\n7: \\n8: import java.time.LocalDate;\\n9: \\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOption;\\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade;\\n22: \\n23: /**\\n24:  * Pricer for FX vanilla option trades with a lognormal model.\\n25:  * <p>\\n26:  * This function provides the ability to price an {@link FxVanillaOptionTrade}.\\n27:  */\\n28: public class BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer {\\n29: \\n30:   /**\\n31:    * Default implementation.\\n32:    */\\n33:   public static final BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer DEFAULT = new BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer(\\n34:       BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT,\\n35:       DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT);\\n36: \\n37:   /**\\n38:    * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\\n39:    */\\n40:   private final BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer productPricer;\\n41:   /**\\n42:    * Pricer for {@link Payment}.\\n43:    */\\n44:   private final DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer;\\n45: \\n46:   /**\\n47:    * Creates an instance.\\n48:    * \\n49:    * @param productPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOption}\\n50:    * @param paymentPricer  the pricer for {@link Payment}\\n51:    */\\n52:   public BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer(\\n53:       BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer productPricer,\\n54:       DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer) {\\n55:     this.productPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(productPricer, \\\"productPricer\\\");\\n56:     this.paymentPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(paymentPricer, \\\"paymentPricer\\\");\\n57:   }\\n58: \\n59:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n60:   /**\\n61:    * Calculates the present value of the FX vanilla option trade.\\n62:    * <p>\\n63:    * The present value of the trade is the value on the valuation date.\\n64:    * \\n65:    * @param trade  the option trade\\n66:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n67:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n68:    * @return the present value of the trade\\n69:    */\\n70:   public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\\n71:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n72:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n73:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n74: \\n75:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\\n76:     CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n77:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\\n78:     CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\\n79:     return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(pvProduct).plus(pvPremium);\\n80:   }\\n81: \\n82:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n83:   /**\\n84:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX vanilla option trade.\\n85:    * <p>\\n86:    * The present value sensitivity of the trade is the sensitivity of the present value to\\n87:    * the underlying curves.\\n88:    * <p>\\n89:    * The volatility is fixed in this sensitivity computation.\\n90:    * \\n91:    * @param trade  the option trade\\n92:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n93:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n94:    * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the trade\\n95:    */\\n96:   public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\\n97:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n98:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n99:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n100: \\n101:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\\n102:     PointSensitivities pvcsProduct =\\n103:         productPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n104:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\\n105:     PointSensitivities pvcsPremium = paymentPricer.presentValueSensitivity(premium, ratesProvider).build();\\n106:     return pvcsProduct.combinedWith(pvcsPremium);\\n107:   }\\n108: \\n109:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n110:   /**\\n111:    * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\\n112:    * <p>\\n113:    * The result is a single sensitivity to the volatility used.\\n114:    * \\n115:    * @param trade  the option trade\\n116:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n117:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n118:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\n119:    */\\n120:   public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\\n121:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n122:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n123:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n124: \\n125:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\\n126:     return productPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\\n127:   }\\n128: \\n129:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n130:   /**\\n131:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX vanilla option trade.\\n132:    * \\n133:    * @param trade  the option trade\\n134:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n135:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n136:    * @return the currency exposure\\n137:    */\\n138:   public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\\n139:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n140:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n141:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n142: \\n143:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\\n144:     CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\\n145:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\\n146:     return productPricer.currencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\\n147:   }\\n148: \\n149:   /**\\n150:    * Calculates the smile adjusted currency exposure of the FX vanilla option trade.\\n151:    *\\n152:    * @param trade  the option trade\\n153:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n154:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n155:    * @return the currency exposure\\n156:    */\\n157:   public MultiCurrencyAmount smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(\\n158:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n159:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n160:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n161: \\n162:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\\n163:     CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\\n164:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\\n165:     return productPricer.smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\\n166:   }\\n167: \\n168:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n169:   /**\\n170:    * Calculates the delta of the FX vanilla option trade.\\n171:    *\\n172:    * @param trade  the option trade\\n173:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n174:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n175:    * @return the delta\\n176:    */\\n177:   public double delta(\\n178:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n179:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n180:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n181: \\n182:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\\n183:     return productPricer.delta(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n184:   }\\n185: \\n186:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n187:   /**\\n188:    * Calculates the current of the FX vanilla option trade.\\n189:    * \\n190:    * @param trade  the option trade\\n191:    * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\\n192:    * @return the current cash amount\\n193:    */\\n194:   public CurrencyAmount currentCash(ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade, LocalDate valuationDate) {\\n195:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\\n196:     if (premium.getDate().equals(valuationDate)) {\\n197:       return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), premium.getAmount());\\n198:     }\\n199:     return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), 0d);\\n200:   }\\n201: \\n202:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n203:   /**\\n204:    * Calculates the forward exchange rate.\\n205:    *\\n206:    * @param trade  the option trade\\n207:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n208:    * @return the forward rate\\n209:    */\\n210:   public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\\n211:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\\n212:     return productPricer.forwardFxRate(product, ratesProvider);\\n213:   }\\n214: \\n215:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n216:   /**\\n217:    * Calculates the implied Black volatility of the foreign exchange vanilla option trade.\\n218:    *\\n219:    * @param trade  the option trade\\n220:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n221:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n222:    * @return the implied volatility of the product\\n223:    * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the option has expired\\n224:    */\\n225:   public double impliedVolatility(\\n226:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n227:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n228:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n229: \\n230:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption option = trade.getProduct();\\n231:     return productPricer.impliedVolatility(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n232:   }\\n233: \\n234: }\\n235: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n7: \n8: import java.time.LocalDate;\n9: \n10: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOption;\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade;\n22: \n23: /**\n24:  * Pricer for FX vanilla option trades with a lognormal model.\n25:  * <p>\n26:  * This function provides the ability to price an {@link FxVanillaOptionTrade}.\n27:  */\n28: public class BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer {\n29: \n30:   /**\n31:    * Default implementation.\n32:    */\n33:   public static final BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer DEFAULT = new BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer(\n34:       BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT,\n35:       DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT);\n36: \n37:   /**\n38:    * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\n39:    */\n40:   private final BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer productPricer;\n41:   /**\n42:    * Pricer for {@link Payment}.\n43:    */\n44:   private final DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer;\n45: \n46:   /**\n47:    * Creates an instance.\n48:    * \n49:    * @param productPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOption}\n50:    * @param paymentPricer  the pricer for {@link Payment}\n51:    */\n52:   public BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer(\n53:       BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer productPricer,\n54:       DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer) {\n55:     this.productPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(productPricer, \"productPricer\");\n56:     this.paymentPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(paymentPricer, \"paymentPricer\");\n57:   }\n58: \n59:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n60:   /**\n61:    * Calculates the present value of the FX vanilla option trade.\n62:    * <p>\n63:    * The present value of the trade is the value on the valuation date.\n64:    * \n65:    * @param trade  the option trade\n66:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n67:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n68:    * @return the present value of the trade\n69:    */\n70:   public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n71:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n72:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n73:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n74: \n75:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n76:     CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n77:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n78:     CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n79:     return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(pvProduct).plus(pvPremium);\n80:   }\n81: \n82:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n83:   /**\n84:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX vanilla option trade.\n85:    * <p>\n86:    * The present value sensitivity of the trade is the sensitivity of the present value to\n87:    * the underlying curves.\n88:    * <p>\n89:    * The volatility is fixed in this sensitivity computation.\n90:    * \n91:    * @param trade  the option trade\n92:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n93:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n94:    * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the trade\n95:    */\n96:   public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n97:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n98:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n99:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n100: \n101:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n102:     PointSensitivities pvcsProduct =\n103:         productPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n104:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n105:     PointSensitivities pvcsPremium = paymentPricer.presentValueSensitivity(premium, ratesProvider).build();\n106:     return pvcsProduct.combinedWith(pvcsPremium);\n107:   }\n108: \n109:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n110:   /**\n111:    * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n112:    * <p>\n113:    * The result is a single sensitivity to the volatility used.\n114:    * \n115:    * @param trade  the option trade\n116:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n117:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n118:    * @return the present value sensitivity\n119:    */\n120:   public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n121:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n122:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n123:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n124: \n125:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n126:     return productPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\n127:   }\n128: \n129:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n130:   /**\n131:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX vanilla option trade.\n132:    * \n133:    * @param trade  the option trade\n134:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n135:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n136:    * @return the currency exposure\n137:    */\n138:   public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n139:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n140:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n141:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n142: \n143:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n144:     CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n145:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n146:     return productPricer.currencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\n147:   }\n148: \n149:   /**\n150:    * Calculates the smile adjusted currency exposure of the FX vanilla option trade.\n151:    *\n152:    * @param trade  the option trade\n153:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n154:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n155:    * @return the currency exposure\n156:    */\n157:   public MultiCurrencyAmount smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(\n158:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n159:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n160:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n161: \n162:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n163:     CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n164:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n165:     return productPricer.smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\n166:   }\n167: \n168:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n169:   /**\n170:    * Calculates the delta of the FX vanilla option trade.\n171:    *\n172:    * @param trade  the option trade\n173:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n174:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n175:    * @return the delta\n176:    */\n177:   public double delta(\n178:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n179:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n180:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n181: \n182:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n183:     return productPricer.delta(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n184:   }\n185: \n186:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n187:   /**\n188:    * Calculates the current of the FX vanilla option trade.\n189:    * \n190:    * @param trade  the option trade\n191:    * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\n192:    * @return the current cash amount\n193:    */\n194:   public CurrencyAmount currentCash(ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade, LocalDate valuationDate) {\n195:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n196:     if (premium.getDate().equals(valuationDate)) {\n197:       return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), premium.getAmount());\n198:     }\n199:     return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), 0d);\n200:   }\n201: \n202:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n203:   /**\n204:    * Calculates the forward exchange rate.\n205:    *\n206:    * @param trade  the option trade\n207:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n208:    * @return the forward rate\n209:    */\n210:   public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n211:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n212:     return productPricer.forwardFxRate(product, ratesProvider);\n213:   }\n214: \n215:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n216:   /**\n217:    * Calculates the implied Black volatility of the foreign exchange vanilla option trade.\n218:    *\n219:    * @param trade  the option trade\n220:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n221:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n222:    * @return the implied volatility of the product\n223:    * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the option has expired\n224:    */\n225:   public double impliedVolatility(\n226:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n227:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n228:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n229: \n230:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption option = trade.getProduct();\n231:     return productPricer.impliedVolatility(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n232:   }\n233: \n234: }\n235: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java"
  }
}
23. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file @ -

{
  "path": "modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java",
