Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\\n7: \\n8: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\\n9: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOption;\\n20: \\n21: /**\\n22:  * Pricing method for vanilla Forex option transactions with Vanna-Volga method.\\n23:  * <p>\\n24:  * The volatilities are expressed using {@code BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}. \\n25:  * Each smile of the term structure consists of 3 data points, where the middle point corresponds to ATM volatility.\\n26:  * <p>\\n27:  * Reference: The vanna-volga method for implied volatilities (2007), A. Castagna and F. Mercurio, Risk, 106-111, January 2007.\\n28:  * OG implementation: Vanna-volga method for Forex options, version 1.0, June 2012.\\n29:  */\\n30: public class VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer {\\n31: \\n32:   /**\\n33:    * Default implementation.\\n34:    */\\n35:   public static final VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer DEFAULT = new VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer(\\n36:       DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer.DEFAULT);\\n37: \\n38:   /**\\n39:    * Underlying FX pricer.\\n40:    */\\n41:   private final DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer;\\n42: \\n43:   /**\\n44:    * Creates an instance.\\n45:    * \\n46:    * @param fxPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingle}\\n47:    */\\n48:   public VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer(DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer) {\\n49:     this.fxPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(fxPricer, \\\"fxPricer\\\");\\n50:   }\\n51: \\n52:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n53:   /**\\n54:    * Calculates the price of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n55:    * <p>\\n56:    * The price of the product is the value on the valuation date for one unit of the base currency \\n57:    * and is expressed in the counter currency. The price does not take into account the long/short flag.\\n58:    * See {@link #presentValue} for scaling and currency.\\n59:    * \\n60:    * @param option  the option product\\n61:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n62:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n63:    * @return the price of the product\\n64:    */\\n65:   public double price(\\n66:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n67:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n68:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n69: \\n70:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n71:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n72:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n73:       return 0d;\\n74:     }\\n75:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\\n76:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\\n77:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n78:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\\n79:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n80:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n81:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n82:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\\n83:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\\n84:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\\n85:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\\n86:     double volAtm = vols[1];\\n87:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\\n88:     double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n89:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\\n90:       double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n91:       double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\\n92:       priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\\n93:     }\\n94:     return df * priceFwd;\\n95:   }\\n96: \\n97:   /**\\n98:    * Calculates the present value of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n99:    * <p>\\n100:    * The present value of the product is the value on the valuation date.\\n101:    * It is expressed in the counter currency.\\n102:    * \\n103:    * @param option  the option product\\n104:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n105:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n106:    * @return the present value of the product\\n107:    */\\n108:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\\n109:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n110:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n111:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n112: \\n113:     double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n114:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * price);\\n115:   }\\n116: \\n117:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n118:   /**\\n119:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n120:    * <p>\\n121:    * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of {@link #presentValue} to\\n122:    * the underlying curves.\\n123:    * <p>\\n124:    * The implied strikes and weights are fixed in this sensitivity computation.\\n125:    * \\n126:    * @param option  the option product\\n127:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n128:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n129:    * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\\n130:    */\\n131:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\\n132:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n133:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n134:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n135: \\n136:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n137:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n138:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n139:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n140:     }\\n141:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\\n142:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\\n143:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n144:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\\n145:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n146:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n147:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n148:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\\n149:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\\n150:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\\n151:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\\n152:     double volAtm = vols[1];\\n153:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\\n154:     double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n155:     double deltaFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n156:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\\n157:       double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n158:       double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\\n159:       priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\\n160:       double deltaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n161:       double deltaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\\n162:       deltaFwd += x[i] * (deltaFwdSmile - deltaFwdAtm);\\n163:     }\\n164:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\\n165:     PointSensitivityBuilder dfSensi = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter)\\n166:         .zeroRatePointSensitivity(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate()).multipliedBy(priceFwd * signedNotional);\\n167:     PointSensitivityBuilder fwdSensi = fxPricer.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\\n168:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlyingFx : underlyingFx.inverse(), ratesProvider)\\n169:         .multipliedBy(df * deltaFwd * signedNotional);\\n170:     return dfSensi.combinedWith(fwdSensi);\\n171:   }\\n172: \\n173:   /**\\n174:    * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatilities used in the pricing.\\n175:    * <p>\\n176:    * The implied strikes and weights are fixed in this sensitivity computation.\\n177:    * \\n178:    * @param option  the option product\\n179:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n180:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n181:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\n182:    */\\n183:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\\n184:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n185:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n186:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n187: \\n188:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n189:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n190:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n191:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n192:     }\\n193:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\\n194:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\\n195:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n196:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\\n197:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n198:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n199:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n200:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\\n201:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\\n202:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\\n203:     double volAtm = vols[1];\\n204:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\\n205:     double vegaAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm);\\n206:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\\n207:     PointSensitivityBuilder sensiSmile = PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n208:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\\n209:       double vegaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm);\\n210:       vegaAtm -= x[i] * vegaFwdAtm;\\n211:       double vegaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i]);\\n212:       sensiSmile = sensiSmile.combinedWith(\\n213:           FxOptionSensitivity.of(\\n214:               volatilities.getName(),\\n215:               currencyPair,\\n216:               timeToExpiry,\\n217:               strikes[i],\\n218:               forwardRate,\\n219:               ccyCounter,\\n220:               df * signedNotional * x[i] * vegaFwdSmile));\\n221:     }\\n222:     FxOptionSensitivity sensiAtm = FxOptionSensitivity.of(\\n223:         volatilities.getName(),\\n224:         currencyPair,\\n225:         timeToExpiry,\\n226:         strikes[1],\\n227:         forwardRate,\\n228:         ccyCounter,\\n229:         df * signedNotional * vegaAtm);\\n230:     return sensiAtm.combinedWith(sensiSmile);\\n231:   }\\n232: \\n233:   /**\\n234:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\\n235:    * \\n236:    * @param option  the option product\\n237:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n238:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n239:    * @return the currency exposure\\n240:    */\\n241:   public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\\n242:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\\n243:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n244:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n245: \\n246:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n247:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\\n248:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n249:       return MultiCurrencyAmount.empty();\\n250:     }\\n251:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\\n252:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\\n253:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n254:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\\n255:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n256:     double spot = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n257:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n258:     double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\\n259:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlyingFx : underlyingFx.inverse(), ratesProvider);\\n260:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\\n261:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\\n262:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\\n263:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\\n264:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\\n265:     double volAtm = vols[1];\\n266:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\\n267:     double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n268:     double deltaFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n269:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\\n270:       double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n271:       double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\\n272:       priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\\n273:       double deltaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\\n274:       double deltaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\\n275:       deltaFwd += x[i] * (deltaFwdSmile - deltaFwdAtm);\\n276:     }\\n277:     double price = df * priceFwd;\\n278:     double delta = df * deltaFwd * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\\n279:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\\n280:     CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), (price - delta * spot) * signedNotional);\\n281:     CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\\n282:     return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\\n283:   }\\n284: \\n285:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n286:   // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\\n287:   private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxVanillaOption option) {\\n288:     return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\\n289:         Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\\n290:   }\\n291: \\n292:   private double[] vannaVolgaWeights(\\n293:       double forward,\\n294:       double strike,\\n295:       double timeToExpiry,\\n296:       double volATM,\\n297:       double[] strikesReference) {\\n298: \\n299:     double lnk21 = Math.log(strikesReference[1] / strikesReference[0]);\\n300:     double lnk31 = Math.log(strikesReference[2] / strikesReference[0]);\\n301:     double lnk32 = Math.log(strikesReference[2] / strikesReference[1]);\\n302:     double[] lnk = new double[3];\\n303:     for (int loopvv = 0; loopvv < 3; loopvv++) {\\n304:       lnk[loopvv] = Math.log(strikesReference[loopvv] / strike);\\n305:     }\\n306:     double[] x = new double[3];\\n307:     double vega0 = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strikesReference[0], timeToExpiry, volATM);\\n308:     double vegaFlat = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volATM);\\n309:     double vega2 = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strikesReference[2], timeToExpiry, volATM);\\n310:     x[0] = vegaFlat * lnk[1] * lnk[2] / (vega0 * lnk21 * lnk31);\\n311:     x[2] = vegaFlat * lnk[0] * lnk[1] / (vega2 * lnk31 * lnk32);\\n312:     return x;\\n313:   }\\n314: \\n315:   private void validate(RatesProvider ratesProvider, BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n316:     ArgChecker.isTrue(volatilities.getValuationDateTime().toLocalDate().equals(ratesProvider.getValuationDate()),\\n317:         \\\"volatility and rate data must be for the same date\\\");\\n318:     ArgChecker.isTrue(volatilities.getSmile().getStrikeCount() == 3, \\\"the number of data points must be 3\\\");\\n319:   }\\n320: }\\n321: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n7: \n8: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\n9: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer;\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOption;\n20: \n21: /**\n22:  * Pricing method for vanilla Forex option transactions with Vanna-Volga method.\n23:  * <p>\n24:  * The volatilities are expressed using {@code BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}. \n25:  * Each smile of the term structure consists of 3 data points, where the middle point corresponds to ATM volatility.\n26:  * <p>\n27:  * Reference: The vanna-volga method for implied volatilities (2007), A. Castagna and F. Mercurio, Risk, 106-111, January 2007.\n28:  * OG implementation: Vanna-volga method for Forex options, version 1.0, June 2012.\n29:  */\n30: public class VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer {\n31: \n32:   /**\n33:    * Default implementation.\n34:    */\n35:   public static final VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer DEFAULT = new VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer(\n36:       DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer.DEFAULT);\n37: \n38:   /**\n39:    * Underlying FX pricer.\n40:    */\n41:   private final DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer;\n42: \n43:   /**\n44:    * Creates an instance.\n45:    * \n46:    * @param fxPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingle}\n47:    */\n48:   public VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer(DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer) {\n49:     this.fxPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(fxPricer, \"fxPricer\");\n50:   }\n51: \n52:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n53:   /**\n54:    * Calculates the price of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n55:    * <p>\n56:    * The price of the product is the value on the valuation date for one unit of the base currency \n57:    * and is expressed in the counter currency. The price does not take into account the long/short flag.\n58:    * See {@link #presentValue} for scaling and currency.\n59:    * \n60:    * @param option  the option product\n61:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n62:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n63:    * @return the price of the product\n64:    */\n65:   public double price(\n66:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n67:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n68:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n69: \n70:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n71:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n72:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n73:       return 0d;\n74:     }\n75:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\n76:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\n77:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n78:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\n79:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n80:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\n81:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n82:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n83:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n84:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n85:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n86:     double volAtm = vols[1];\n87:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n88:     double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n89:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n90:       double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n91:       double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n92:       priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\n93:     }\n94:     return df * priceFwd;\n95:   }\n96: \n97:   /**\n98:    * Calculates the present value of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n99:    * <p>\n100:    * The present value of the product is the value on the valuation date.\n101:    * It is expressed in the counter currency.\n102:    * \n103:    * @param option  the option product\n104:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n105:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n106:    * @return the present value of the product\n107:    */\n108:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n109:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n110:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n111:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n112: \n113:     double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n114:     return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * price);\n115:   }\n116: \n117:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n118:   /**\n119:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n120:    * <p>\n121:    * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of {@link #presentValue} to\n122:    * the underlying curves.\n123:    * <p>\n124:    * The implied strikes and weights are fixed in this sensitivity computation.\n125:    * \n126:    * @param option  the option product\n127:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n128:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n129:    * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\n130:    */\n131:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n132:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n133:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n134:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n135: \n136:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n137:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n138:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n139:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n140:     }\n141:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\n142:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\n143:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n144:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\n145:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n146:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\n147:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n148:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n149:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n150:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n151:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n152:     double volAtm = vols[1];\n153:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n154:     double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n155:     double deltaFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n156:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n157:       double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n158:       double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n159:       priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\n160:       double deltaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n161:       double deltaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n162:       deltaFwd += x[i] * (deltaFwdSmile - deltaFwdAtm);\n163:     }\n164:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n165:     PointSensitivityBuilder dfSensi = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter)\n166:         .zeroRatePointSensitivity(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate()).multipliedBy(priceFwd * signedNotional);\n167:     PointSensitivityBuilder fwdSensi = fxPricer.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\n168:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlyingFx : underlyingFx.inverse(), ratesProvider)\n169:         .multipliedBy(df * deltaFwd * signedNotional);\n170:     return dfSensi.combinedWith(fwdSensi);\n171:   }\n172: \n173:   /**\n174:    * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatilities used in the pricing.\n175:    * <p>\n176:    * The implied strikes and weights are fixed in this sensitivity computation.\n177:    * \n178:    * @param option  the option product\n179:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n180:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n181:    * @return the present value sensitivity\n182:    */\n183:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n184:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n185:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n186:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n187: \n188:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n189:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n190:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n191:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n192:     }\n193:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\n194:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\n195:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n196:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\n197:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n198:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\n199:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n200:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n201:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n202:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n203:     double volAtm = vols[1];\n204:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n205:     double vegaAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm);\n206:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n207:     PointSensitivityBuilder sensiSmile = PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n208:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n209:       double vegaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm);\n210:       vegaAtm -= x[i] * vegaFwdAtm;\n211:       double vegaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i]);\n212:       sensiSmile = sensiSmile.combinedWith(\n213:           FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n214:               volatilities.getName(),\n215:               currencyPair,\n216:               timeToExpiry,\n217:               strikes[i],\n218:               forwardRate,\n219:               ccyCounter,\n220:               df * signedNotional * x[i] * vegaFwdSmile));\n221:     }\n222:     FxOptionSensitivity sensiAtm = FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n223:         volatilities.getName(),\n224:         currencyPair,\n225:         timeToExpiry,\n226:         strikes[1],\n227:         forwardRate,\n228:         ccyCounter,\n229:         df * signedNotional * vegaAtm);\n230:     return sensiAtm.combinedWith(sensiSmile);\n231:   }\n232: \n233:   /**\n234:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange vanilla option product.\n235:    * \n236:    * @param option  the option product\n237:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n238:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n239:    * @return the currency exposure\n240:    */\n241:   public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n242:       ResolvedFxVanillaOption option,\n243:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n244:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n245: \n246:     validate(ratesProvider, volatilities);\n247:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n248:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n249:       return MultiCurrencyAmount.empty();\n250:     }\n251:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = option.getUnderlying();\n252:     Currency ccyCounter = option.getCounterCurrency();\n253:     double df = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n254:     FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlyingFx, ratesProvider);\n255:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n256:     double spot = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n257:     double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(currencyPair);\n258:     double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n259:         option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlyingFx : underlyingFx.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n260:     double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n261:     boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n262:     SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = volatilities.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n263:     double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n264:     double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n265:     double volAtm = vols[1];\n266:     double[] x = vannaVolgaWeights(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, strikes);\n267:     double priceFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n268:     double deltaFwd = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n269:     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i += 2) {\n270:       double priceFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n271:       double priceFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n272:       priceFwd += x[i] * (priceFwdSmile - priceFwdAtm);\n273:       double deltaFwdAtm = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, volAtm, isCall);\n274:       double deltaFwdSmile = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, vols[i], isCall);\n275:       deltaFwd += x[i] * (deltaFwdSmile - deltaFwdAtm);\n276:     }\n277:     double price = df * priceFwd;\n278:     double delta = df * deltaFwd * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n279:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n280:     CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), (price - delta * spot) * signedNotional);\n281:     CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\n282:     return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\n283:   }\n284: \n285:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n286:   // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\n287:   private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxVanillaOption option) {\n288:     return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\n289:         Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n290:   }\n291: \n292:   private double[] vannaVolgaWeights(\n293:       double forward,\n294:       double strike,\n295:       double timeToExpiry,\n296:       double volATM,\n297:       double[] strikesReference) {\n298: \n299:     double lnk21 = Math.log(strikesReference[1] / strikesReference[0]);\n300:     double lnk31 = Math.log(strikesReference[2] / strikesReference[0]);\n301:     double lnk32 = Math.log(strikesReference[2] / strikesReference[1]);\n302:     double[] lnk = new double[3];\n303:     for (int loopvv = 0; loopvv < 3; loopvv++) {\n304:       lnk[loopvv] = Math.log(strikesReference[loopvv] / strike);\n305:     }\n306:     double[] x = new double[3];\n307:     double vega0 = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strikesReference[0], timeToExpiry, volATM);\n308:     double vegaFlat = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volATM);\n309:     double vega2 = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strikesReference[2], timeToExpiry, volATM);\n310:     x[0] = vegaFlat * lnk[1] * lnk[2] / (vega0 * lnk21 * lnk31);\n311:     x[2] = vegaFlat * lnk[0] * lnk[1] / (vega2 * lnk31 * lnk32);\n312:     return x;\n313:   }\n314: \n315:   private void validate(RatesProvider ratesProvider, BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n316:     ArgChecker.isTrue(volatilities.getValuationDateTime().toLocalDate().equals(ratesProvider.getValuationDate()),\n317:         \"volatility and rate data must be for the same date\");\n318:     ArgChecker.isTrue(volatilities.getSmile().getStrikeCount() == 3, \"the number of data points must be 3\");\n319:   }\n320: }\n321: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java"
  }
}
24. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file @ -
Input
{
  "path": "modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java",

Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\\n7: \\n8: import java.time.LocalDate;\\n9: \\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOption;\\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade;\\n20: \\n21: /**\\n22:  * Pricer for FX vanilla option trades with a Vanna-Volga method.\\n23:  * <p>\\n24:  * The volatilities are expressed using {@code BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}. \\n25:  * Each smile of the term structure consists of 3 data points, where the middle point corresponds to ATM volatility.\\n26:  */\\n27: public class VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer {\\n28: \\n29:   /**\\n30:    * Default implementation.\\n31:    */\\n32:   public static final VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer DEFAULT = new VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer(\\n33:       VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT,\\n34:       DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT);\\n35: \\n36:   /**\\n37:    * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\\n38:    */\\n39:   private final VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer productPricer;\\n40:   /**\\n41:    * Pricer for {@link Payment}.\\n42:    */\\n43:   private final DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer;\\n44: \\n45:   /**\\n46:    * Creates an instance.\\n47:    * \\n48:    * @param productPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOption}\\n49:    * @param paymentPricer  the pricer for {@link Payment}\\n50:    */\\n51:   public VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer(\\n52:       VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer productPricer,\\n53:       DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer) {\\n54:     this.productPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(productPricer, \\\"productPricer\\\");\\n55:     this.paymentPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(paymentPricer, \\\"paymentPricer\\\");\\n56:   }\\n57: \\n58:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n59:   /**\\n60:    * Calculates the present value of the FX vanilla option trade.\\n61:    * <p>\\n62:    * The present value of the trade is the value on the valuation date.\\n63:    * \\n64:    * @param trade  the option trade\\n65:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n66:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n67:    * @return the present value of the trade\\n68:    */\\n69:   public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\\n70:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n71:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n72:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n73: \\n74:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\\n75:     CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n76:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\\n77:     CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\\n78:     return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(pvProduct, pvPremium);\\n79:   }\\n80: \\n81:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n82:   /**\\n83:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX vanilla option trade.\\n84:    * <p>\\n85:    * The present value sensitivity of the trade is the sensitivity of the present value to\\n86:    * the underlying curves.\\n87:    * <p>\\n88:    * The volatility is fixed in this sensitivity computation.\\n89:    * \\n90:    * @param trade  the option trade\\n91:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n92:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n93:    * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the trade\\n94:    */\\n95:   public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\\n96:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n97:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n98:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n99: \\n100:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\\n101:     PointSensitivities pvcsProduct =\\n102:         productPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\\n103:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\\n104:     PointSensitivities pvcsPremium = paymentPricer.presentValueSensitivity(premium, ratesProvider).build();\\n105:     return pvcsProduct.combinedWith(pvcsPremium);\\n106:   }\\n107: \\n108:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n109:   /**\\n110:    * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\\n111:    * <p>\\n112:    * The result is a single sensitivity to the volatility used.\\n113:    * \\n114:    * @param trade  the option trade\\n115:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n116:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n117:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\n118:    */\\n119:   public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\\n120:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n121:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n122:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n123: \\n124:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\\n125:     return productPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\\n126:   }\\n127: \\n128:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n129:   /**\\n130:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX vanilla option trade.\\n131:    * \\n132:    * @param trade  the option trade\\n133:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n134:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n135:    * @return the currency exposure\\n136:    */\\n137:   public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\\n138:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n139:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n140:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\\n141: \\n142:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\\n143:     CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\\n144:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\\n145:     return productPricer.currencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\\n146:   }\\n147: \\n148:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n149:   /**\\n150:    * Calculates the current of the FX vanilla option trade.\\n151:    * \\n152:    * @param trade  the option trade\\n153:    * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\\n154:    * @return the current cash amount\\n155:    */\\n156:   public CurrencyAmount currentCash(ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade, LocalDate valuationDate) {\\n157:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\\n158:     if (premium.getDate().equals(valuationDate)) {\\n159:       return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), premium.getAmount());\\n160:     }\\n161:     return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), 0d);\\n162:   }\\n163: \\n164: }\\n165: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n7: \n8: import java.time.LocalDate;\n9: \n10: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOption;\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade;\n20: \n21: /**\n22:  * Pricer for FX vanilla option trades with a Vanna-Volga method.\n23:  * <p>\n24:  * The volatilities are expressed using {@code BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}. \n25:  * Each smile of the term structure consists of 3 data points, where the middle point corresponds to ATM volatility.\n26:  */\n27: public class VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer {\n28: \n29:   /**\n30:    * Default implementation.\n31:    */\n32:   public static final VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer DEFAULT = new VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer(\n33:       VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT,\n34:       DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT);\n35: \n36:   /**\n37:    * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\n38:    */\n39:   private final VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer productPricer;\n40:   /**\n41:    * Pricer for {@link Payment}.\n42:    */\n43:   private final DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer;\n44: \n45:   /**\n46:    * Creates an instance.\n47:    * \n48:    * @param productPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOption}\n49:    * @param paymentPricer  the pricer for {@link Payment}\n50:    */\n51:   public VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer(\n52:       VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer productPricer,\n53:       DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer) {\n54:     this.productPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(productPricer, \"productPricer\");\n55:     this.paymentPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(paymentPricer, \"paymentPricer\");\n56:   }\n57: \n58:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n59:   /**\n60:    * Calculates the present value of the FX vanilla option trade.\n61:    * <p>\n62:    * The present value of the trade is the value on the valuation date.\n63:    * \n64:    * @param trade  the option trade\n65:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n66:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n67:    * @return the present value of the trade\n68:    */\n69:   public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n70:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n71:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n72:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n73: \n74:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n75:     CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n76:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n77:     CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n78:     return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(pvProduct, pvPremium);\n79:   }\n80: \n81:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n82:   /**\n83:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX vanilla option trade.\n84:    * <p>\n85:    * The present value sensitivity of the trade is the sensitivity of the present value to\n86:    * the underlying curves.\n87:    * <p>\n88:    * The volatility is fixed in this sensitivity computation.\n89:    * \n90:    * @param trade  the option trade\n91:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n92:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n93:    * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the trade\n94:    */\n95:   public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n96:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n97:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n98:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n99: \n100:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n101:     PointSensitivities pvcsProduct =\n102:         productPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\n103:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n104:     PointSensitivities pvcsPremium = paymentPricer.presentValueSensitivity(premium, ratesProvider).build();\n105:     return pvcsProduct.combinedWith(pvcsPremium);\n106:   }\n107: \n108:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n109:   /**\n110:    * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n111:    * <p>\n112:    * The result is a single sensitivity to the volatility used.\n113:    * \n114:    * @param trade  the option trade\n115:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n116:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n117:    * @return the present value sensitivity\n118:    */\n119:   public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n120:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n121:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n122:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n123: \n124:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n125:     return productPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\n126:   }\n127: \n128:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n129:   /**\n130:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX vanilla option trade.\n131:    * \n132:    * @param trade  the option trade\n133:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n134:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n135:    * @return the currency exposure\n136:    */\n137:   public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n138:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n139:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n140:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n141: \n142:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n143:     CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n144:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n145:     return productPricer.currencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\n146:   }\n147: \n148:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n149:   /**\n150:    * Calculates the current of the FX vanilla option trade.\n151:    * \n152:    * @param trade  the option trade\n153:    * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\n154:    * @return the current cash amount\n155:    */\n156:   public CurrencyAmount currentCash(ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade, LocalDate valuationDate) {\n157:     Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n158:     if (premium.getDate().equals(valuationDate)) {\n159:       return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), premium.getAmount());\n160:     }\n161:     return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), 0d);\n162:   }\n163: \n164: }\n165: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java"
  }
}
