  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\\n7: \\n8: import static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkBlackVolatilities;\\n9: import static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkVannaVolgaVolatilities;\\n10: \\n11: import java.time.LocalDate;\\n12: \\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\\n22: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\\n23: import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\\n24: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer;\\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer;\\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade;\\n32: \\n33: /**\\n34:  * Multi-scenario measure calculations for FX vanilla option trades.\\n35:  * <p>\\n36:  * Each method corresponds to a measure, typically calculated by one or more calls to the pricer.\\n37:  */\\n38: final class FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations {\\n39: \\n40:   /**\\n41:    * Default implementation.\\n42:    */\\n43:   public static final FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations DEFAULT = new FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations(\\n44:       BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\\n45:       VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\\n46:   /**\\n47:    * The market quote sensitivity calculator.\\n48:    */\\n49:   private static final MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator MARKET_QUOTE_SENS = MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator.DEFAULT;\\n50:   /**\\n51:    * One basis point, expressed as a {@code double}.\\n52:    */\\n53:   private static final double ONE_BASIS_POINT = 1e-4;\\n54: \\n55:   /**\\n56:    * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade}.\\n57:    */\\n58:   private final BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer blackPricer;\\n59:   /**\\n60:    * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade}.\\n61:    */\\n62:   private final VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer;\\n63: \\n64:   /**\\n65:    * Creates an instance.\\n66:    * \\n67:    * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade} using Black\\n68:    * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade} using Vanna-Volga\\n69:    */\\n70:   FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations(\\n71:       BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer blackPricer,\\n72:       VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\\n73:     this.blackPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(blackPricer, \\\"blackPricer\\\");\\n74:     this.vannaVolgaPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(vannaVolgaPricer, \\\"vannaVolgaPricer\\\");\\n75:   }\\n76: \\n77:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n78:   // calculates present value for all scenarios\\n79:   MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\\n80:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n81:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\\n82:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\\n83:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n84: \\n85:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\\n86:     return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\\n87:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n88:         i -> presentValue(\\n89:             trade,\\n90:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\\n91:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\\n92:             method));\\n93:   }\\n94: \\n95:   // present value for one scenario\\n96:   MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\\n97:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n98:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n99:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\\n100:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n101: \\n102:     if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\\n103:       return vannaVolgaPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\\n104:     } else {\\n105:       return blackPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\\n106:     }\\n107:   }\\n108: \\n109:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n110:   // calculates calibrated sum PV01 for all scenarios\\n111:   MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\\n112:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n113:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\\n114:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\\n115:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n116: \\n117:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\\n118:     return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\\n119:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n120:         i -> pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\\n121:             trade,\\n122:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\\n123:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\\n124:             method));\\n125:   }\\n126: \\n127:   // calibrated sum PV01 for one scenario\\n128:   MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\\n129:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n130:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n131:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\\n132:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n133: \\n134:     CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\\n135:     return paramSens.total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\\n136:   }\\n137: \\n138:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n139:   // calculates calibrated bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\\n140:   ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\\n141:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n142:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\\n143:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\\n144:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n145: \\n146:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\\n147:     return ScenarioArray.of(\\n148:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n149:         i -> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\\n150:             trade,\\n151:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\\n152:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\\n153:             method));\\n154:   }\\n155: \\n156:   // calibrated bucketed PV01 for one scenario\\n157:   CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\\n158:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n159:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n160:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\\n161:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n162: \\n163:     CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\\n164:     return paramSens.multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\\n165:   }\\n166: \\n167:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n168:   // calculates market quote sum PV01 for all scenarios\\n169:   MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\\n170:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n171:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\\n172:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\\n173:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n174: \\n175:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\\n176:     return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\\n177:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n178:         i -> pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\\n179:             trade,\\n180:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\\n181:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\\n182:             method));\\n183:   }\\n184: \\n185:   // market quote sum PV01 for one scenario\\n186:   MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\\n187:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n188:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n189:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\\n190:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n191: \\n192:     CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\\n193:     return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\\n194:   }\\n195: \\n196:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n197:   // calculates market quote bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\\n198:   ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\\n199:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n200:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\\n201:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\\n202:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n203: \\n204:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\\n205:     return ScenarioArray.of(\\n206:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n207:         i -> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\\n208:             trade,\\n209:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\\n210:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\\n211:             method));\\n212:   }\\n213: \\n214:   // market quote bucketed PV01 for one scenario\\n215:   CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\\n216:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n217:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n218:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\\n219:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n220: \\n221:     CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\\n222:     return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\\n223:   }\\n224: \\n225:   // point sensitivity\\n226:   private CurrencyParameterSensitivities pointSensitivity(\\n227:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n228:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n229:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\\n230:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n231: \\n232:     PointSensitivities pointSens;\\n233:     if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\\n234:       pointSens = vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\\n235:           trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\\n236:     } else {\\n237:       pointSens = blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\\n238:           trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\\n239:     }\\n240:     return ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\\n241:   }\\n242: \\n243:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n244:   // calculates vega (present value volatility sensitivities) for all scenarios\\n245:   ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\\n246:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n247:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\\n248:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\\n249:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n250: \\n251:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\\n252:     return ScenarioArray.of(\\n253:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n254:         i -> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\\n255:             trade,\\n256:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\\n257:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\\n258:             method));\\n259:   }\\n260: \\n261:   // vega for one scenario\\n262:   CurrencyParameterSensitivities vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\\n263:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n264:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n265:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\\n266:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n267: \\n268:     if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\\n269:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities blackSmileVols = checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities);\\n270:       PointSensitivities pointSens =\\n271:           vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackSmileVols);\\n272:       return blackSmileVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\\n273:     } else {\\n274:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities blackVols = checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities);\\n275:       PointSensitivities pointSens =\\n276:           blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackVols);\\n277:       return blackVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\\n278:     }\\n279:   }\\n280: \\n281:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n282:   // calculates currency exposure for all scenarios\\n283:   MultiCurrencyScenarioArray currencyExposure(\\n284:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n285:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\\n286:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\\n287:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n288: \\n289:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\\n290:     return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\\n291:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n292:         i -> currencyExposure(\\n293:             trade,\\n294:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\\n295:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\\n296:             method));\\n297:   }\\n298: \\n299:   // currency exposure for one scenario\\n300:   MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\\n301:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n302:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n303:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\\n304:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n305: \\n306:     if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\\n307:       return vannaVolgaPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\\n308:     } else {\\n309:       return blackPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\\n310:     }\\n311:   }\\n312: \\n313:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n314:   // calculates delta for all scenarios\\n315:   DoubleScenarioArray delta(\\n316:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n317:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\\n318:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\\n319:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n320: \\n321:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\\n322:     return DoubleScenarioArray.of(\\n323:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n324:         i -> delta(\\n325:             trade,\\n326:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\\n327:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\\n328:             method));\\n329:   }\\n330: \\n331:   // delta for one scenario\\n332:   double delta(\\n333:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n334:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n335:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\\n336:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n337: \\n338:     if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\\n339:       throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\n340:           \\\"FX vanilla option Vanna Volga pricer does not currently support delta calculation\\\");\\n341:     } else {\\n342:       return blackPricer.delta(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\\n343:     }\\n344:   }\\n345: \\n346:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n347:   // calculates current cash for all scenarios\\n348:   CurrencyScenarioArray currentCash(\\n349:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n350:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\\n351:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\\n352:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n353: \\n354:     return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\\n355:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n356:         i -> currentCash(\\n357:             trade,\\n358:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).getValuationDate(),\\n359:             method));\\n360:   }\\n361: \\n362:   // current cash for one scenario\\n363:   CurrencyAmount currentCash(\\n364:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n365:       LocalDate valuationDate,\\n366:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n367: \\n368:     if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\\n369:       return vannaVolgaPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\\n370:     } else {\\n371:       return blackPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\\n372:     }\\n373:   }\\n374: \\n375: }\\n376: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.java\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n7: \n8: import static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkBlackVolatilities;\n9: import static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkVannaVolgaVolatilities;\n10: \n11: import java.time.LocalDate;\n12: \n13: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\n22: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\n23: import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\n24: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer;\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer;\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade;\n32: \n33: /**\n34:  * Multi-scenario measure calculations for FX vanilla option trades.\n35:  * <p>\n36:  * Each method corresponds to a measure, typically calculated by one or more calls to the pricer.\n37:  */\n38: final class FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations {\n39: \n40:   /**\n41:    * Default implementation.\n42:    */\n43:   public static final FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations DEFAULT = new FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations(\n44:       BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n45:       VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n46:   /**\n47:    * The market quote sensitivity calculator.\n48:    */\n49:   private static final MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator MARKET_QUOTE_SENS = MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator.DEFAULT;\n50:   /**\n51:    * One basis point, expressed as a {@code double}.\n52:    */\n53:   private static final double ONE_BASIS_POINT = 1e-4;\n54: \n55:   /**\n56:    * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade}.\n57:    */\n58:   private final BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer blackPricer;\n59:   /**\n60:    * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade}.\n61:    */\n62:   private final VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer;\n63: \n64:   /**\n65:    * Creates an instance.\n66:    * \n67:    * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade} using Black\n68:    * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade} using Vanna-Volga\n69:    */\n70:   FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations(\n71:       BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer blackPricer,\n72:       VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\n73:     this.blackPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(blackPricer, \"blackPricer\");\n74:     this.vannaVolgaPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(vannaVolgaPricer, \"vannaVolgaPricer\");\n75:   }\n76: \n77:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n78:   // calculates present value for all scenarios\n79:   MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n80:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n81:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n82:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n83:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n84: \n85:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n86:     return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n87:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n88:         i -> presentValue(\n89:             trade,\n90:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n91:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n92:             method));\n93:   }\n94: \n95:   // present value for one scenario\n96:   MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n97:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n98:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n99:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n100:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n101: \n102:     if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n103:       return vannaVolgaPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n104:     } else {\n105:       return blackPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n106:     }\n107:   }\n108: \n109:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n110:   // calculates calibrated sum PV01 for all scenarios\n111:   MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n112:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n113:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n114:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n115:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n116: \n117:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n118:     return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n119:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n120:         i -> pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n121:             trade,\n122:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n123:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n124:             method));\n125:   }\n126: \n127:   // calibrated sum PV01 for one scenario\n128:   MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n129:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n130:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n131:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n132:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n133: \n134:     CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n135:     return paramSens.total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n136:   }\n137: \n138:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n139:   // calculates calibrated bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n140:   ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n141:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n142:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n143:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n144:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n145: \n146:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n147:     return ScenarioArray.of(\n148:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n149:         i -> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n150:             trade,\n151:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n152:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n153:             method));\n154:   }\n155: \n156:   // calibrated bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n157:   CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n158:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n159:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n160:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n161:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n162: \n163:     CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n164:     return paramSens.multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n165:   }\n166: \n167:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n168:   // calculates market quote sum PV01 for all scenarios\n169:   MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n170:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n171:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n172:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n173:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n174: \n175:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n176:     return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n177:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n178:         i -> pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n179:             trade,\n180:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n181:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n182:             method));\n183:   }\n184: \n185:   // market quote sum PV01 for one scenario\n186:   MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n187:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n188:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n189:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n190:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n191: \n192:     CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n193:     return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n194:   }\n195: \n196:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n197:   // calculates market quote bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n198:   ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n199:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n200:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n201:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n202:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n203: \n204:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n205:     return ScenarioArray.of(\n206:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n207:         i -> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n208:             trade,\n209:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n210:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n211:             method));\n212:   }\n213: \n214:   // market quote bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n215:   CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n216:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n217:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n218:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n219:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n220: \n221:     CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n222:     return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n223:   }\n224: \n225:   // point sensitivity\n226:   private CurrencyParameterSensitivities pointSensitivity(\n227:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n228:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n229:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n230:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n231: \n232:     PointSensitivities pointSens;\n233:     if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n234:       pointSens = vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n235:           trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n236:     } else {\n237:       pointSens = blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n238:           trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n239:     }\n240:     return ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n241:   }\n242: \n243:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n244:   // calculates vega (present value volatility sensitivities) for all scenarios\n245:   ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n246:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n247:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n248:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n249:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n250: \n251:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n252:     return ScenarioArray.of(\n253:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n254:         i -> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n255:             trade,\n256:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n257:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n258:             method));\n259:   }\n260: \n261:   // vega for one scenario\n262:   CurrencyParameterSensitivities vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n263:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n264:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n265:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n266:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n267: \n268:     if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n269:       BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities blackSmileVols = checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities);\n270:       PointSensitivities pointSens =\n271:           vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackSmileVols);\n272:       return blackSmileVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n273:     } else {\n274:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities blackVols = checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities);\n275:       PointSensitivities pointSens =\n276:           blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackVols);\n277:       return blackVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n278:     }\n279:   }\n280: \n281:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n282:   // calculates currency exposure for all scenarios\n283:   MultiCurrencyScenarioArray currencyExposure(\n284:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n285:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n286:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n287:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n288: \n289:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n290:     return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n291:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n292:         i -> currencyExposure(\n293:             trade,\n294:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n295:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n296:             method));\n297:   }\n298: \n299:   // currency exposure for one scenario\n300:   MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n301:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n302:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n303:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n304:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n305: \n306:     if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n307:       return vannaVolgaPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n308:     } else {\n309:       return blackPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n310:     }\n311:   }\n312: \n313:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n314:   // calculates delta for all scenarios\n315:   DoubleScenarioArray delta(\n316:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n317:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n318:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n319:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n320: \n321:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n322:     return DoubleScenarioArray.of(\n323:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n324:         i -> delta(\n325:             trade,\n326:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n327:             optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n328:             method));\n329:   }\n330: \n331:   // delta for one scenario\n332:   double delta(\n333:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n334:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n335:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n336:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n337: \n338:     if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n339:       throw new IllegalArgumentException(\n340:           \"FX vanilla option Vanna Volga pricer does not currently support delta calculation\");\n341:     } else {\n342:       return blackPricer.delta(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n343:     }\n344:   }\n345: \n346:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n347:   // calculates current cash for all scenarios\n348:   CurrencyScenarioArray currentCash(\n349:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n350:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n351:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n352:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n353: \n354:     return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n355:         ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n356:         i -> currentCash(\n357:             trade,\n358:             ratesMarketData.scenario(i).getValuationDate(),\n359:             method));\n360:   }\n361: \n362:   // current cash for one scenario\n363:   CurrencyAmount currentCash(\n364:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n365:       LocalDate valuationDate,\n366:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n367: \n368:     if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n369:       return vannaVolgaPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\n370:     } else {\n371:       return blackPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\n372:     }\n373:   }\n374: \n375: }\n376: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.java"
  }
}
26. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file @ -
Input
{
  "path": "modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMethod.java",

Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\\n7: \\n8: import java.util.Optional;\\n9: \\n10: import org.joda.convert.FromString;\\n11: import org.joda.convert.ToString;\\n12: \\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.CalculationTarget;\\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.CalculationRules;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationParameter;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.named.EnumNames;\\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.named.NamedEnum;\\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\\n22: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\\n23: \\n24: /**\\n25:  * The method to use for pricing FX vanilla options.\\n26:  * <p>\\n27:  * This provides the ability to use different methods for pricing FX options.\\n28:  * The Black and Vanna-Volga methods are supported.\\n29:  * <p>\\n30:  * This enum implements {@link CalculationParameter} and is used by passing it\\n31:  * as an argument to {@link CalculationRules}. It provides the link between the\\n32:  * data that the function needs and the data that is available in {@link ScenarioMarketData}.\\n33:  * <p>\\n34:  * Implementations of this interface must be immutable.\\n35:  */\\n36: public enum FxVanillaOptionMethod implements NamedEnum, CalculationParameter {\\n37: \\n38:   /**\\n39:    * The Black (lognormal) model.\\n40:    * This uses Black volatilities - {@link BlackFxOptionVolatilities}.\\n41:    */\\n42:   BLACK,\\n43:   /**\\n44:    * The Vanna-Volga model.\\n45:    * This uses Black volatilities based on a smile - {@link BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}.\\n46:    */\\n47:   VANNA_VOLGA;\\n48: \\n49:   // helper for name conversions\\n50:   private static final EnumNames<FxVanillaOptionMethod> NAMES = EnumNames.of(FxVanillaOptionMethod.class);\\n51: \\n52:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n53:   /**\\n54:    * Obtains an instance from the specified name.\\n55:    * <p>\\n56:    * Parsing handles the mixed case form produced by {@link #toString()} and\\n57:    * the upper and lower case variants of the enum constant name.\\n58:    * \\n59:    * @param name  the name to parse\\n60:    * @return the type\\n61:    * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the name is not known\\n62:    */\\n63:   @FromString\\n64:   public static FxVanillaOptionMethod of(String name) {\\n65:     return NAMES.parse(name);\\n66:   }\\n67: \\n68:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n69:   @Override\\n70:   public Optional<CalculationParameter> filter(CalculationTarget target, Measure measure) {\\n71:     if (target instanceof FxVanillaOptionTrade) {\\n72:       return Optional.of(this);\\n73:     }\\n74:     return Optional.empty();\\n75:   };\\n76: \\n77:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n78:   /**\\n79:    * Returns the formatted name of the type.\\n80:    * \\n81:    * @return the formatted string representing the type\\n82:    */\\n83:   @ToString\\n84:   @Override\\n85:   public String toString() {\\n86:     return NAMES.format(this);\\n87:   }\\n88: \\n89: }\\n90: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMethod.java\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n7: \n8: import java.util.Optional;\n9: \n10: import org.joda.convert.FromString;\n11: import org.joda.convert.ToString;\n12: \n13: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.CalculationTarget;\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.CalculationRules;\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationParameter;\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.named.EnumNames;\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.named.NamedEnum;\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\n22: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\n23: \n24: /**\n25:  * The method to use for pricing FX vanilla options.\n26:  * <p>\n27:  * This provides the ability to use different methods for pricing FX options.\n28:  * The Black and Vanna-Volga methods are supported.\n29:  * <p>\n30:  * This enum implements {@link CalculationParameter} and is used by passing it\n31:  * as an argument to {@link CalculationRules}. It provides the link between the\n32:  * data that the function needs and the data that is available in {@link ScenarioMarketData}.\n33:  * <p>\n34:  * Implementations of this interface must be immutable.\n35:  */\n36: public enum FxVanillaOptionMethod implements NamedEnum, CalculationParameter {\n37: \n38:   /**\n39:    * The Black (lognormal) model.\n40:    * This uses Black volatilities - {@link BlackFxOptionVolatilities}.\n41:    */\n42:   BLACK,\n43:   /**\n44:    * The Vanna-Volga model.\n45:    * This uses Black volatilities based on a smile - {@link BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}.\n46:    */\n47:   VANNA_VOLGA;\n48: \n49:   // helper for name conversions\n50:   private static final EnumNames<FxVanillaOptionMethod> NAMES = EnumNames.of(FxVanillaOptionMethod.class);\n51: \n52:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n53:   /**\n54:    * Obtains an instance from the specified name.\n55:    * <p>\n56:    * Parsing handles the mixed case form produced by {@link #toString()} and\n57:    * the upper and lower case variants of the enum constant name.\n58:    * \n59:    * @param name  the name to parse\n60:    * @return the type\n61:    * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the name is not known\n62:    */\n63:   @FromString\n64:   public static FxVanillaOptionMethod of(String name) {\n65:     return NAMES.parse(name);\n66:   }\n67: \n68:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n69:   @Override\n70:   public Optional<CalculationParameter> filter(CalculationTarget target, Measure measure) {\n71:     if (target instanceof FxVanillaOptionTrade) {\n72:       return Optional.of(this);\n73:     }\n74:     return Optional.empty();\n75:   };\n76: \n77:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n78:   /**\n79:    * Returns the formatted name of the type.\n80:    * \n81:    * @return the formatted string representing the type\n82:    */\n83:   @ToString\n84:   @Override\n85:   public String toString() {\n86:     return NAMES.format(this);\n87:   }\n88: \n89: }\n90: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMethod.java"
  }
}

  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\\n7: \\n8: import java.util.HashMap;\\n9: import java.util.Map;\\n10: import java.util.Optional;\\n11: import java.util.Set;\\n12: \\n13: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableMap;\\n14: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationFunction;\\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationParameters;\\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.FunctionRequirements;\\n22: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.FailureReason;\\n23: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.Result;\\n24: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.measure.Measures;\\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;\\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade;\\n31: \\n32: /**\\n33:  * Perform calculations on an FX vanilla option trade for each of a set of scenarios.\\n34:  * <p>\\n35:  * This uses Black FX option volatilities, which must be specified using {@link FxOptionMarketDataLookup}.\\n36:  * An instance of {@link RatesMarketDataLookup} must also be specified.\\n37:  * <p>\\n38:  * Two pricing methods are available, 'Black' and 'VannaVolga'.\\n39:  * By default, 'Black' will be used. To control the method, pass an instance of\\n40:  * {@link FxVanillaOptionMethod} in the calculation parameters.\\n41:  * <p>\\n42:  * The supported built-in measures are:\\n43:  * <ul>\\n44:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\\n45:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM PV01 calibrated sum on rate curves}\\n46:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED PV01 calibrated bucketed on rate curves}\\n47:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM PV01 market quote sum on rate curves}\\n48:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED PV01 market quote bucketed on rate curves}\\n49:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENCY_EXPOSURE Currency exposure}\\n50:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENT_CASH Current cash}\\n51:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED Vega market quote bucketed on volatility curves/surfaces}\\n52:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved trade}\\n53:  * </ul>\\n54:  * <p>\\n55:  * The \\\"natural\\\" currency is the market convention base currency of the underlying FX.\\n56:  */\\n57: public class FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction\\n58:     implements CalculationFunction<FxVanillaOptionTrade> {\\n59: \\n60:   /**\\n61:    * The calculations by measure.\\n62:    */\\n63:   private static final ImmutableMap<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation> CALCULATORS =\\n64:       ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\\n65:           .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::presentValue)\\n66:           .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedSum)\\n67:           .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed)\\n68:           .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum)\\n69:           .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed)\\n70:           .put(Measures.CURRENCY_EXPOSURE, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currencyExposure)\\n71:           .put(Measures.OPTION_DELTA, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::delta)\\n72:           .put(Measures.CURRENT_CASH, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currentCash)\\n73:           .put(Measures.VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::vegaMarketQuoteBucketed)\\n74:           .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, m, meth) -> rt)\\n75:           .build();\\n76: \\n77:   private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\\n78: \\n79:   /**\\n80:    * Creates an instance.\\n81:    */\\n82:   public FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction() {\\n83:   }\\n84: \\n85:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n86:   @Override\\n87:   public Class<FxVanillaOptionTrade> targetType() {\\n88:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.class;\\n89:   }\\n90: \\n91:   @Override\\n92:   public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\\n93:     return MEASURES;\\n94:   }\\n95: \\n96:   @Override\\n97:   public Optional<String> identifier(FxVanillaOptionTrade target) {\\n98:     return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\\n99:   }\\n100: \\n101:   @Override\\n102:   public Currency naturalCurrency(FxVanillaOptionTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\\n103:     return trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair().getBase();\\n104:   }\\n105: \\n106:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n107:   @Override\\n108:   public FunctionRequirements requirements(\\n109:       FxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n110:       Set<Measure> measures,\\n111:       CalculationParameters parameters,\\n112:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n113: \\n114:     // extract data from product\\n115:     FxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\\n116:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = product.getCurrencyPair();\\n117: \\n118:     // use lookup to build requirements\\n119:     RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\\n120:     FunctionRequirements ratesReqs = ratesLookup.requirements(\\n121:         ImmutableSet.of(currencyPair.getBase(), currencyPair.getCounter()));\\n122:     FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\\n123:     FunctionRequirements optionReqs = optionLookup.requirements(currencyPair);\\n124:     return ratesReqs.combinedWith(optionReqs);\\n125:   }\\n126: \\n127:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n128:   @Override\\n129:   public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\\n130:       FxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n131:       Set<Measure> measures,\\n132:       CalculationParameters parameters,\\n133:       ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\\n134:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n135: \\n136:     // expand the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\\n137:     ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\\n138:     RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\\n139:     RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData = ratesLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\\n140:     FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\\n141:     FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData = optionLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\\n142:     FxVanillaOptionMethod method = parameters.findParameter(FxVanillaOptionMethod.class).orElse(FxVanillaOptionMethod.BLACK);\\n143: \\n144:     // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\\n145:     Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\\n146:     for (Measure measure : measures) {\\n147:       results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\\n148:     }\\n149:     return results;\\n150:   }\\n151: \\n152:   // calculate one measure\\n153:   private Result<?> calculate(\\n154:       Measure measure,\\n155:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n156:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\\n157:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\\n158:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n159: \\n160:     SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\\n161:     if (calculator == null) {\\n162:       return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \\\"Unsupported measure for FxVanillaOptionTrade: {}\\\", measure);\\n163:     }\\n164:     return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\\n165:   }\\n166: \\n167:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n168:   @FunctionalInterface\\n169:   interface SingleMeasureCalculation {\\n170:     public abstract Object calculate(\\n171:         ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n172:         RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\\n173:         FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\\n174:         FxVanillaOptionMethod method);\\n175:   }\\n176: \\n177: }\\n178: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n7: \n8: import java.util.HashMap;\n9: import java.util.Map;\n10: import java.util.Optional;\n11: import java.util.Set;\n12: \n13: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableMap;\n14: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationFunction;\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationParameters;\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.FunctionRequirements;\n22: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.FailureReason;\n23: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.Result;\n24: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.measure.Measures;\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade;\n31: \n32: /**\n33:  * Perform calculations on an FX vanilla option trade for each of a set of scenarios.\n34:  * <p>\n35:  * This uses Black FX option volatilities, which must be specified using {@link FxOptionMarketDataLookup}.\n36:  * An instance of {@link RatesMarketDataLookup} must also be specified.\n37:  * <p>\n38:  * Two pricing methods are available, 'Black' and 'VannaVolga'.\n39:  * By default, 'Black' will be used. To control the method, pass an instance of\n40:  * {@link FxVanillaOptionMethod} in the calculation parameters.\n41:  * <p>\n42:  * The supported built-in measures are:\n43:  * <ul>\n44:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\n45:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM PV01 calibrated sum on rate curves}\n46:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED PV01 calibrated bucketed on rate curves}\n47:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM PV01 market quote sum on rate curves}\n48:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED PV01 market quote bucketed on rate curves}\n49:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENCY_EXPOSURE Currency exposure}\n50:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENT_CASH Current cash}\n51:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED Vega market quote bucketed on volatility curves/surfaces}\n52:  *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved trade}\n53:  * </ul>\n54:  * <p>\n55:  * The \"natural\" currency is the market convention base currency of the underlying FX.\n56:  */\n57: public class FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction\n58:     implements CalculationFunction<FxVanillaOptionTrade> {\n59: \n60:   /**\n61:    * The calculations by measure.\n62:    */\n63:   private static final ImmutableMap<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation> CALCULATORS =\n64:       ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\n65:           .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::presentValue)\n66:           .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedSum)\n67:           .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed)\n68:           .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum)\n69:           .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed)\n70:           .put(Measures.CURRENCY_EXPOSURE, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currencyExposure)\n71:           .put(Measures.OPTION_DELTA, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::delta)\n72:           .put(Measures.CURRENT_CASH, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currentCash)\n73:           .put(Measures.VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::vegaMarketQuoteBucketed)\n74:           .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, m, meth) -> rt)\n75:           .build();\n76: \n77:   private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\n78: \n79:   /**\n80:    * Creates an instance.\n81:    */\n82:   public FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction() {\n83:   }\n84: \n85:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n86:   @Override\n87:   public Class<FxVanillaOptionTrade> targetType() {\n88:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.class;\n89:   }\n90: \n91:   @Override\n92:   public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n93:     return MEASURES;\n94:   }\n95: \n96:   @Override\n97:   public Optional<String> identifier(FxVanillaOptionTrade target) {\n98:     return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n99:   }\n100: \n101:   @Override\n102:   public Currency naturalCurrency(FxVanillaOptionTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n103:     return trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair().getBase();\n104:   }\n105: \n106:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n107:   @Override\n108:   public FunctionRequirements requirements(\n109:       FxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n110:       Set<Measure> measures,\n111:       CalculationParameters parameters,\n112:       ReferenceData refData) {\n113: \n114:     // extract data from product\n115:     FxVanillaOption product = trade.getProduct();\n116:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = product.getCurrencyPair();\n117: \n118:     // use lookup to build requirements\n119:     RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n120:     FunctionRequirements ratesReqs = ratesLookup.requirements(\n121:         ImmutableSet.of(currencyPair.getBase(), currencyPair.getCounter()));\n122:     FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\n123:     FunctionRequirements optionReqs = optionLookup.requirements(currencyPair);\n124:     return ratesReqs.combinedWith(optionReqs);\n125:   }\n126: \n127:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n128:   @Override\n129:   public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n130:       FxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n131:       Set<Measure> measures,\n132:       CalculationParameters parameters,\n133:       ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n134:       ReferenceData refData) {\n135: \n136:     // expand the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n137:     ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n138:     RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n139:     RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData = ratesLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n140:     FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\n141:     FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData = optionLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n142:     FxVanillaOptionMethod method = parameters.findParameter(FxVanillaOptionMethod.class).orElse(FxVanillaOptionMethod.BLACK);\n143: \n144:     // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n145:     Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n146:     for (Measure measure : measures) {\n147:       results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\n148:     }\n149:     return results;\n150:   }\n151: \n152:   // calculate one measure\n153:   private Result<?> calculate(\n154:       Measure measure,\n155:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n156:       RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n157:       FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n158:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n159: \n160:     SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\n161:     if (calculator == null) {\n162:       return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for FxVanillaOptionTrade: {}\", measure);\n163:     }\n164:     return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\n165:   }\n166: \n167:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n168:   @FunctionalInterface\n169:   interface SingleMeasureCalculation {\n170:     public abstract Object calculate(\n171:         ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n172:         RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n173:         FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n174:         FxVanillaOptionMethod method);\n175:   }\n176: \n177: }\n178: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java"
  }
}

  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\\n7: \\n8: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\n9: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer;\\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade;\\n22: \\n23: /**\\n24:  * Calculates pricing and risk measures for FX vanilla option trades.\\n25:  * <p>\\n26:  * This provides a high-level entry point for FX vanilla option pricing and risk measures.\\n27:  * Pricing is performed using the Black method.\\n28:  * <p>\\n29:  * Each method takes a {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade}, whereas application code will\\n30:  * typically work with {@link FxVanillaOptionTrade}. Call\\n31:  * {@link FxVanillaOptionTrade#resolve(com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData) FxVanillaOptionTrade::resolve(ReferenceData)}\\n32:  * to convert {@code FxVanillaOptionTrade} to {@code ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade}.\\n33:  */\\n34: public class FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations {\\n35: \\n36:   /**\\n37:    * Default implementation.\\n38:    */\\n39:   public static final FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations DEFAULT = new FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations(\\n40:       BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\\n41:       VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\\n42: \\n43:   /**\\n44:    * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade}.\\n45:    */\\n46:   private final FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations calc;\\n47: \\n48:   /**\\n49:    * Creates an instance.\\n50:    * <p>\\n51:    * In most cases, applications should use the {@link #DEFAULT} instance.\\n52:    * \\n53:    * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade} using Black\\n54:    * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade} using Vanna-Volga\\n55:    */\\n56:   public FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations(\\n57:       BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer blackPricer,\\n58:       VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\\n59:     this.calc = new FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations(blackPricer, vannaVolgaPricer);\\n60:   }\\n61: \\n62:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n63:   /**\\n64:    * Calculates present value across one or more scenarios.\\n65:    * \\n66:    * @param trade  the trade\\n67:    * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\\n68:    * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\\n69:    * @param marketData  the market data\\n70:    * @param method  the pricing method\\n71:    * @return the present value, one entry per scenario\\n72:    */\\n73:   public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\\n74:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n75:       RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\\n76:       FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\\n77:       ScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n78:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n79: \\n80:     return calc.presentValue(\\n81:         trade,\\n82:         ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\\n83:         fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\\n84:         method);\\n85:   }\\n86: \\n87:   /**\\n88:    * Calculates present value for a single set of market data.\\n89:    * \\n90:    * @param trade  the trade\\n91:    * @param ratesProvider  the market data\\n92:    * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\\n93:    * @param method  the pricing method\\n94:    * @return the present value\\n95:    */\\n96:   public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\\n97:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n98:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n99:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\\n100:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n101: \\n102:     return calc.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\\n103:   }\\n104: \\n105:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n106:   /**\\n107:    * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\\n108:    * <p>\\n109:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\\n110:    * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\\n111:    * \\n112:    * @param trade  the trade\\n113:    * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\\n114:    * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\\n115:    * @param marketData  the market data\\n116:    * @param method  the pricing method\\n117:    * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\\n118:    */\\n119:   public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\\n120:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n121:       RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\\n122:       FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\\n123:       ScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n124:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n125: \\n126:     return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\\n127:         trade,\\n128:         ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\\n129:         fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\\n130:         method);\\n131:   }\\n132: \\n133:   /**\\n134:    * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\\n135:    * <p>\\n136:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\\n137:    * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\\n138:    * \\n139:    * @param trade  the trade\\n140:    * @param ratesProvider  the market data\\n141:    * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\\n142:    * @param method  the pricing method\\n143:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\n144:    */\\n145:   public MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\\n146:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n147:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n148:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\\n149:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\\n150: \\n151:     return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\\n152:   }\\n153: \\n154:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n155:   /**\\n156:    * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\\n157:    * <p>\\n158:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\\n159:    * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\\n160:    * \\n161:    * @param trade  the trade\\n162:    * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\\n163:    * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\\n164:    * @param marketData  the market data\\n165:    * @param method  the pricing method\\n166:    * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\\n167:    */\\n168:   public value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\\n184:    * <p>\\n185:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\\n186:    * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\\n187:    * \\n188:    * @param trade  the trade\\n189:    * @param ratesProvider  the market data\\n190:    * @param is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\\n208:    * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\\n209:    * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n306:   /**\\n307:    * Calculates present value vega sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\\n308:    * <p>\\n309:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to the implied volatilities\\n310:    * used to calibrate the curves.\\n311:    *\\n312:    * @param trade  the trade\\n313:    * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\\n314:    * @param marketData  the market data\\n315:    * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\\n316:    * @param method  the pricing //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n355:   /**\\n356:    * Calculates currency exposure across one or more scenarios.\\n357:    * <p>\\n358:    * The currency risk, expressed as the equivalent amount in each currency.\\n359:    * \\n360:    * @param trade  the trade\\n361:    * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\\n362:    * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\\n363:    * @param marketData  the market data\\n364:    * @param method  the pricing method\\n365:    * @return the currency exposure, one entry per scenario\\n366:    */\\n367:   public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray currencyExposure(\\n368:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\\n369:       RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\\n370:     "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n7: \n8: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\n9: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer;\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer;\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade;\n22: \n23: /**\n24:  * Calculates pricing and risk measures for FX vanilla option trades.\n25:  * <p>\n26:  * This provides a high-level entry point for FX vanilla option pricing and risk measures.\n27:  * Pricing is performed using the Black method.\n28:  * <p>\n29:  * Each method takes a {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade}, whereas application code will\n30:  * typically work with {@link FxVanillaOptionTrade}. Call\n31:  * {@link FxVanillaOptionTrade#resolve(com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData) FxVanillaOptionTrade::resolve(ReferenceData)}\n32:  * to convert {@code FxVanillaOptionTrade} to {@code ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade}.\n33:  */\n34: public class FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations {\n35: \n36:   /**\n37:    * Default implementation.\n38:    */\n39:   public static final FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations DEFAULT = new FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations(\n40:       BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n41:       VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n42: \n43:   /**\n44:    * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade}.\n45:    */\n46:   private final FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations calc;\n47: \n48:   /**\n49:    * Creates an instance.\n50:    * <p>\n51:    * In most cases, applications should use the {@link #DEFAULT} instance.\n52:    * \n53:    * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade} using Black\n54:    * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade} using Vanna-Volga\n55:    */\n56:   public FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations(\n57:       BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer blackPricer,\n58:       VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\n59:     this.calc = new FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations(blackPricer, vannaVolgaPricer);\n60:   }\n61: \n62:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n63:   /**\n64:    * Calculates present value across one or more scenarios.\n65:    * \n66:    * @param trade  the trade\n67:    * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n68:    * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n69:    * @param marketData  the market data\n70:    * @param method  the pricing method\n71:    * @return the present value, one entry per scenario\n72:    */\n73:   public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n74:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n75:       RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n76:       FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n77:       ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n78:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n79: \n80:     return calc.presentValue(\n81:         trade,\n82:         ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n83:         fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n84:
