data\n92:    * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n93:    * @param method  the pricing method\n94:    * @return the present value\n95:    */\n96:   public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n97:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n98:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n99:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n100:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n101: \n102:     return calc.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n103:   }\n104: \n105:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n106:   /**\n107:    * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n108:    * <p>\n109:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n110:    * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n111:    * \n112:    * @param trade  the trade\n113:    * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n114:    * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n115:    * @param marketData  the market data\n116:    * @param method  the pricing method\n117:    * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n118:    */\n119:   public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n120:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n121:       RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n122:       FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n123:       ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n124:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n125: \n126:     return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n127:         trade,\n128:         ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n129:         fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n130:         method);\n131:   }\n132: \n133:   /**\n134:    * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n135:    * <p>\n136:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n137:    * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n138:    * \n139:    * @param trade  the trade\n140:    * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n141:    * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n142:    * @param method  the pricing method\n143:    * @return the present value sensitivity\n144:    */\n145:   public MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n146:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n147:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n148:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n149:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n150: \n151:     return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n152:   }\n153: \n154:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n155:   /**\n156:    * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n157:    * <p>\n158:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n159:    * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n160:    * \n161:    * @param trade  the trade\n162:    * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n163:    * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n164:    * @param marketData  the market data\n165:    * @param method  the pricing method\n166:    * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n167:    */\n168:   public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n169:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n170:       RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n171:       FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n172:       ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n173:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n174: \n175:     return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n176:         trade,\n177:         ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n178:         fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n179:         method);\n180:   }\n181: \n182:   /**\n183:    * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n184:    * <p>\n185:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n186:    * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n187:    * \n188:    * @param trade  the trade\n189:    * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n190:    * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n191:    * @param method  the pricing method\n192:    * @return the present value sensitivity\n193:    */\n194:   public CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n195:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n196:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n197:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n198:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n199: \n200:     return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n201:   }\n202: \n203:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n204:   /**\n205:    * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n206:    * <p>\n207:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n208:    * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n209:    * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n210:    * \n211:    * @param trade  the trade\n212:    * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n213:    * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n214:    * @param marketData  the market data\n215:    * @param method  the pricing method\n216:    * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n217:    */\n218:   public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n219:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n220:       RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n221:       FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n222:       ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n223:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n224: \n225:     return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n226:         trade,\n227:         ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n228:         fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n229:         method);\n230:   }\n231: \n232:   /**\n233:    * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n234:    * <p>\n235:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n236:    * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n237:    * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n238:    * \n239:    * @param trade  the trade\n240:    * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n241:    * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n242:    * @param method  the pricing method\n243:    * @return the present value sensitivity\n244:    */\n245:   public MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n246:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n247:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n248:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n249:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n250: \n251:     return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n252:   }\n253: \n254:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n255:   /**\n256:    * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n257:    * <p>\n258:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n259:    * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n260:    * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n261:    * \n262:    * @param trade  the trade\n263:    * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n264:    * @param marketData  the market data\n265:    * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n266:    * @param method  the pricing method\n267:    * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n268:    */\n269:   public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n270:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n271:       RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n272:       FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n273:       ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n274:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n275: \n276:     return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n277:         trade,\n278:         ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n279:         fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n280:         method);\n281:   }\n282: \n283:   /**\n284:    * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n285:    * <p>\n286:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n287:    * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n288:    * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n289:    * \n290:    * @param trade  the trade\n291:    * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n292:    * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n293:    * @param method  the pricing method\n294:    * @return the present value sensitivity\n295:    */\n296:   public CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n297:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n298:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n299:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n300:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n301: \n302:     return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n303:   }\n304: \n305:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n306:   /**\n307:    * Calculates present value vega sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n308:    * <p>\n309:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to the implied volatilities\n310:    * used to calibrate the curves.\n311:    *\n312:    * @param trade  the trade\n313:    * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n314:    * @param marketData  the market data\n315:    * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n316:    * @param method  the pricing method\n317:    * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n318:    */\n319:   public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n320:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n321:       RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n322:       FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n323:       ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n324:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n325: \n326:     return calc.vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n327:         trade,\n328:         ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n329:         fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n330:         method);\n331:   }\n332: \n333:   /**\n334:    * Calculates present value vega sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n335:    * <p>\n336:    * This is the sensitivity of present value of the implied volatilities\n337:    * used to calibrate the curves.\n338:    *\n339:    * @param trade  the trade\n340:    * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n341:    * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n342:    * @param method  the pricing method\n343:    * @return the present value sensitivity\n344:    */\n345:   public CurrencyParameterSensitivities vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n346:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n347:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n348:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n349:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n350: \n351:     return calc.vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n352:   }\n353: \n354:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n355:   /**\n356:    * Calculates currency exposure across one or more scenarios.\n357:    * <p>\n358:    * The currency risk, expressed as the equivalent amount in each currency.\n359:    * \n360:    * @param trade  the trade\n361:    * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n362:    * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n363:    * @param marketData  the market data\n364:    * @param method  the pricing method\n365:    * @return the currency exposure, one entry per scenario\n366:    */\n367:   public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray currencyExposure(\n368:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n369:       RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n370:       FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n371:       ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n372:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n373: \n374:     return calc.currencyExposure(\n375:         trade,\n376:         ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n377:         fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n378:         method);\n379:   }\n380: \n381:   /**\n382:    * Calculates currency exposure for a single set of market data.\n383:    * <p>\n384:    * The currency risk, expressed as the equivalent amount in each currency.\n385:    * \n386:    * @param trade  the trade\n387:    * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n388:    * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n389:    * @param method  the pricing method\n390:    * @return the currency exposure\n391:    */\n392:   public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n393:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n394:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n395:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n396:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n397: \n398:     return calc.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n399:   }\n400: \n401:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n402:   /**\n403:    * Calculates current cash across one or more scenarios.\n404:    * <p>\n405:    * The sum of all cash flows paid on the valuation date.\n406:    * \n407:    * @param trade  the trade\n408:    * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n409:    * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n410:    * @param marketData  the market data\n411:    * @param method  the pricing method\n412:    * @return the current cash, one entry per scenario\n413:    */\n414:   public CurrencyScenarioArray currentCash(\n415:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n416:       RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n417:       FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n418:       ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n419:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n420: \n421:     return calc.currentCash(\n422:         trade,\n423:         ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n424:         fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n425:         method);\n426:   }\n427: \n428:   /**\n429:    * Calculates current cash for a single set of market data.\n430:    * <p>\n431:    * The sum of all cash flows paid on the valuation date.\n432:    * \n433:    * @param trade  the trade\n434:    * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n435:    * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n436:    * @param method  the pricing method\n437:    * @return the current cash\n438:    */\n439:   public CurrencyAmount currentCash(\n440:       ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n441:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n442:       FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n443:       FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n444: \n445:     return calc.currentCash(trade, ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), method);\n446:   }\n447: \n448: }\n449: ",

  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2019 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\\n7: \\n8: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD;\\n9: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD;\\n10: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD;\\n11: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD;\\n12: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD;\\n13: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD;\\n14: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_2_NOTIONAL_FIELD;\\n15: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LONG_SHORT_FIELD;\\n16: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD;\\n17: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD;\\n18: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD;\\n19: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD;\\n20: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD;\\n21: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD;\\n22: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD;\\n23: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD;\\n24: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD;\\n25: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PUT_CALL_FIELD;\\n26: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.STRIKE_FIELD;\\n27: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\\n28: \\n29: import java.time.LocalDate;\\n30: import java.time.LocalTime;\\n31: import java.time.ZoneId;\\n32: import java.time.ZonedDateTime;\\n33: import java.util.List;\\n34: import java.util.Optional;\\n35: import java.util.Set;\\n36: \\n37: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\\n38: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\\n39: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\\n40: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\\n41: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.BusinessDayAdjustment;\\n42: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\\n43: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders;\\n44: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\\n45: import com.opengamma.strata.loader.LoaderUtils;\\n46: import com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\\n47: import com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\\n48: import com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort;\\n49: import com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PutCall;\\n50: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\\n51: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingleTrade;\\n52: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;\\n53: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\\n54: \\n55: /**\\n56:  * Handles the CSV file format for FX vanilla option trades.\\n57:  */\\n58: class FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxVanillaOptionTrade> {\\n59: \\n60:   /**\\n61:    * The singleton instance of the plugin.\\n62:    */\\n63:   public static final FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\\n64: \\n65:   /** The headers. */\\n66:   private static final ImmutableSet<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.of(\\n67:       LONG_SHORT_FIELD,\\n68:       PUT_CALL_FIELD,\\n69:       STRIKE_FIELD,\\n70:       EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD,\\n71:       EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD,\\n72:       EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD,\\n73:       PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD,\\n74:       PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\\n75:       PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD,\\n76:       PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD,\\n77:       PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD,\\n78:       PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD,\\n79:       LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD,\\n80:       LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD,\\n81:       LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD,\\n82:       PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD,\\n83:       PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\\n84:       PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD);\\n85: \\n86:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n87:   @Override\\n88:   public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\\n89:     return ImmutableSet.of(\\\"FXVANILLAOPTION\\\", \\\"FX VANILLA OPTION\\\");\\n90:   }\\n91: \\n92:   @Override\\n93:   public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\\n94:       Class<?> requiredJavaType,\\n95:       CsvRow baseRow,\\n96:       List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\\n97:       TradeInfo info,\\n98:       TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\\n99: \\n100:     if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxVanillaOptionTrade.class)) {\\n101:       return Optional.of(resolver.parseFxVanillaOptionTrade(baseRow, info));\\n102:     }\\n103:     return Optional.empty();\\n104:   }\\n105: \\n106:   @Override\\n107:   public String getName() {\\n108:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\\n109:   }\\n110: \\n111:   @Override\\n112:   public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\\n113:     return ImmutableSet.of(FxVanillaOptionTrade.class);\\n114:   }\\n115: \\n116:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n117:   /**\\n118:    * Parses the data from a CSV row.\\n119:    *\\n120:    * @param row  the CSV row object\\n121:    * @param info  the trade info object\\n122:    * @param resolver  the resolver used to parse additional information\\n123:    * @return the parsed trade\\n124:    */\\n125:   static FxVanillaOptionTrade parse(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\\n126:     if (row.findValue(PUT_CALL_FIELD).isPresent()) {\\n127:       FxVanillaOptionTrade trade = parseRow(row, info);\\n128:       return resolver.completeTrade(row, trade);\\n129:     }\\n130:     FxSingleTrade singleTrade = FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.parseRow(row, info);\\n131:     FxVanillaOptionTrade trade = parseRow(row, info, singleTrade.getProduct());\\n132:     return resolver.completeTrade(row, trade);\\n133:   }\\n134: \\n135:   // parses the trade from the underlying FX single\\n136:   private static FxVanillaOptionTrade parseRow(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, FxSingle underlying) {\\n137:     LongShort longShort = row.getValue(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseLongShort);\\n138:     LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\\n139:     LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseTime);\\n140:     ZoneId expiryZone = row.getValue(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseZoneId);\\n141: \\n142:     FxVanillaOption option = FxVanillaOption.builder()\\n143:         .longShort(longShort)\\n144:         .expiryDate(expiryDate)\\n145:         .expiryTime(expiryTime)\\n146:         .expiryZone(expiryZone)\\n147:         .underlying(underlying)\\n148:         .build();\\n149:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.builder()\\n150:         .info(info)\\n151:         .product(option)\\n152:         .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\\n153:             .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, expiryDate)))\\n154:         .build();\\n155:   }\\n156: \\n157:   // parse the trade from the currency pairs, base currency notional, and put/call\\n158:   private static FxVanillaOptionTrade parseRow(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\\n159:     LongShort longShort = row.getValue(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseLongShort);\\n160:     LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\\n161:     LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseTime);\\n162:     ZoneId expiryZone = row.getValue(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseZoneId);\\n163:     PutCall putCall = row.getValue(PUT_CALL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parsePutCall);\\n164:     Currency ccy1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\\n165:     Currency ccy2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\\n166:     LocalDate paymentDate = row.getValue(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\\n167:     double notional1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\\n168: \\n169:     double strike = parseStrike(row, notional1);\\n170: \\n171:     Optional<BusinessDayAdjustment> paymentAdj = CsvLoaderUtils\\n172:         .parseBusinessDayAdjustment(row, PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD)\\n173:         .filter(adj -> !adj.equals(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE));\\n174: \\n175:     ZonedDateTime expiry = expiryDate.atTime(expiryTime).atZone(expiryZone);\\n176:     CurrencyPair ccyPair = CurrencyPair.of(ccy1, ccy2);\\n177:     FxVanillaOption option = paymentAdj\\n178:         .map(adj -> FxVanillaOption.of(longShort, expiry, ccyPair, putCall, strike, notional1, paymentDate, adj))\\n179:         .orElseGet(() -> FxVanillaOption.of(longShort, expiry, ccyPair, putCall, strike, notional1, paymentDate));\\n180:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.builder()\\n181:         .info(info)\\n182:         .product(option)\\n183:         .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\\n184:             .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, expiryDate)))\\n185:         .build();\\n186:   }\\n187: \\n188:   private static double parseStrike(CsvRow row, double notional1) {\\n189:     Optional<Double> strikeOpt = row.findValue(STRIKE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\\n190:     if (strikeOpt.isPresent()) {\\n191:       return strikeOpt.get();\\n192:     } else {\\n193:       double notional2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_NOTIONAL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\\n194:       return Math.abs(notional2 / notional1);\\n195:     }\\n196:   }\\n197: \\n198:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n199:   @Override\\n200:   public Set<String> headers(List<FxVanillaOptionTrade> trades) {\\n201:     return HEADERS;\\n202:   }\\n203: \\n204:   @Override\\n205:   public void writeCsv(CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxVanillaOptionTrade trade) {\\n206:     csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \\\"FxVanillaOption\\\");\\n207:     writeFxVanillaOption(csv, trade.getProduct());\\n208:     CsvWriterUtils.writePremiumFields(csv, trade.getPremium());\\n209:     csv.writeNewLine();\\n210:   }\\n211: \\n212:   protected void writeFxVanillaOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxVanillaOption product) {\\n213:     FxSingle underlying = product.getUnderlying();\\n214:     PutCall putCall = underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() > 0d ? PutCall.PUT : PutCall.CALL;\\n215:     double strike = Math.abs(underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() /\\n216:         underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\\n217:     csv.writeCell(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, product.getLongShort());\\n218:     csv.writeCell(PUT_CALL_FIELD, putCall);\\n219:     csv.writeCell(STRIKE_FIELD, strike);\\n220:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, product.getExpiryDate());\\n221:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, product.getExpiryTime());\\n222:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, product.getExpiryZone());\\n223:     csv.writeCell(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\\n224:     csv.writeCell(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, Math.abs(underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount()));\\n225:     csv.writeCell(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\\n226:     csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getDate());\\n227:     underlying.getPaymentDateAdjustment().ifPresent(bda -> {\\n228:       csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD, bda.getCalendar());\\n229:       csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, bda.getConvention());\\n230:     });\\n231:   }\\n232: \\n233:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n234:   // Restricted constructor.\\n235:   private FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\\n236:   }\\n237: \\n238: }\\n239: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2019 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n7: \n8: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD;\n9: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD;\n10: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD;\n11: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD;\n12: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD;\n13: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD;\n14: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_2_NOTIONAL_FIELD;\n15: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LONG_SHORT_FIELD;\n16: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD;\n17: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD;\n18: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD;\n19: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD;\n20: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD;\n21: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD;\n22: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD;\n23: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD;\n24: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD;\n25: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PUT_CALL_FIELD;\n26: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.STRIKE_FIELD;\n27: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\n28: \n29: import java.time.LocalDate;\n30: import java.time.LocalTime;\n31: import java.time.ZoneId;\n32: import java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n33: import java.util.List;\n34: import java.util.Optional;\n35: import java.util.Set;\n36: \n37: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\n38: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\n39: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\n40: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\n41: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.BusinessDayAdjustment;\n42: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\n43: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders;\n44: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\n45: import com.opengamma.strata.loader.LoaderUtils;\n46: import com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\n47: import com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\n48: import com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort;\n49: import com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PutCall;\n50: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\n51: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingleTrade;\n52: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;\n53: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\n54: \n55: /**\n56:  * Handles the CSV file format for FX vanilla option trades.\n57:  */\n58: class FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxVanillaOptionTrade> {\n59: \n60:   /**\n61:    * The singleton instance of the plugin.\n62:    */\n63:   public static final FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\n64: \n65:   /** The headers. */\n66:   private static final ImmutableSet<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.of(\n67:       LONG_SHORT_FIELD,\n68:       PUT_CALL_FIELD,\n69:       STRIKE_FIELD,\n70:       EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD,\n71:       EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD,\n72:       EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD,\n73:       PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD,\n74:       PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n75:       PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD,\n76:       PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD,\n77:       PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n78:       PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n79:       LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n80:       LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD,\n81:       LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n82:       PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD,\n83:       PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n84:       PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD);\n85: \n86:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n87:   @Override\n88:   public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\n89:     return ImmutableSet.of(\"FXVANILLAOPTION\", \"FX VANILLA OPTION\");\n90:   }\n91: \n92:   @Override\n93:   public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\n94:       Class<?> requiredJavaType,\n95:       CsvRow baseRow,\n96:       List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\n97:       TradeInfo info,\n98:       TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n99: \n100:     if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxVanillaOptionTrade.class)) {\n101:       return Optional.of(resolver.parseFxVanillaOptionTrade(baseRow, info));\n102:     }\n103:     return Optional.empty();\n104:   }\n105: \n106:   @Override\n107:   public String getName() {\n108:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\n109:   }\n110: \n111:   @Override\n112:   public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\n113:     return ImmutableSet.of(FxVanillaOptionTrade.class);\n114:   }\n115: \n116:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n117:   /**\n118:    * Parses the data from a CSV row.\n119:    *\n120:    * @param row  the CSV row object\n121:    * @param info  the trade info object\n122:    * @param resolver  the resolver used to parse additional information\n123:    * @return the parsed trade\n124:    */\n125:   static FxVanillaOptionTrade parse(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n126:     if (row.findValue(PUT_CALL_FIELD).isPresent()) {\n127:       FxVanillaOptionTrade trade = parseRow(row, info);\n128:       return resolver.completeTrade(row, trade);\n129:     }\n130:     FxSingleTrade singleTrade = FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.parseRow(row, info);\n131:     FxVanillaOptionTrade trade = parseRow(row, info, singleTrade.getProduct());\n132:     return resolver.completeTrade(row, trade);\n133:   }\n134: \n135:   // parses the trade from the underlying FX single\n136:   private static FxVanillaOptionTrade parseRow(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, FxSingle underlying) {\n137:     LongShort longShort = row.getValue(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseLongShort);\n138:     LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n139:     LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseTime);\n140:     ZoneId expiryZone = row.getValue(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseZoneId);\n141: \n142:     FxVanillaOption option = FxVanillaOption.builder()\n143:         .longShort(longShort)\n144:         .expiryDate(expiryDate)\n145:         .expiryTime(expiryTime)\n146:         .expiryZone(expiryZone)\n147:         .underlying(underlying)\n148:         .build();\n149:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.builder()\n150:         .info(info)\n151:         .product(option)\n152:         .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\n153:             .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, expiryDate)))\n154:         .build();\n155:   }\n156: \n157:   // parse the trade from the currency pairs, base currency notional, and put/call\n158:   private static FxVanillaOptionTrade parseRow(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n159:     LongShort longShort = row.getValue(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseLongShort);\n160:     LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n161:     LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseTime);\n162:     ZoneId expiryZone = row.getValue(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseZoneId);\n163:     PutCall putCall = row.getValue(PUT_CALL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parsePutCall);\n164:     Currency ccy1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\n165:     Currency ccy2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\n166:     LocalDate paymentDate = row.getValue(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n167:     double notional1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n168: \n169:     double strike = parseStrike(row, notional1);\n170: \n171:     Optional<BusinessDayAdjustment> paymentAdj = CsvLoaderUtils\n172:         .parseBusinessDayAdjustment(row, PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD)\n173:         .filter(adj -> !adj.equals(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE));\n174: \n175:     ZonedDateTime expiry = expiryDate.atTime(expiryTime).atZone(expiryZone);\n176:     CurrencyPair ccyPair = CurrencyPair.of(ccy1, ccy2);\n177:     FxVanillaOption option = paymentAdj\n178:         .map(adj -> FxVanillaOption.of(longShort, expiry, ccyPair, putCall, strike, notional1, paymentDate, adj))\n179:         .orElseGet(() -> FxVanillaOption.of(longShort, expiry, ccyPair, putCall, strike, notional1, paymentDate));\n180:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.builder()\n181:         .info(info)\n182:         .product(option)\n183:         .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\n184:             .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, expiryDate)))\n185:         .build();\n186:   }\n187: \n188:   private static double parseStrike(CsvRow row, double notional1) {\n189:     Optional<Double> strikeOpt = row.findValue(STRIKE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n190:     if (strikeOpt.isPresent()) {\n191:       return strikeOpt.get();\n192:     } else {\n193:       double notional2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_NOTIONAL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n194:       return Math.abs(notional2 / notional1);\n195:     }\n196:   }\n197: \n198:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n199:   @Override\n200:   public Set<String> headers(List<FxVanillaOptionTrade> trades) {\n201:     return HEADERS;\n202:   }\n203: \n204:   @Override\n205:   public void writeCsv(CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxVanillaOptionTrade trade) {\n206:     csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"FxVanillaOption\");\n207:     writeFxVanillaOption(csv, trade.getProduct());\n208:     CsvWriterUtils.writePremiumFields(csv, trade.getPremium());\n209:     csv.writeNewLine();\n210:   }\n211: \n212:   protected void writeFxVanillaOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxVanillaOption product) {\n213:     FxSingle underlying = product.getUnderlying();\n214:     PutCall putCall = underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() > 0d ? PutCall.PUT : PutCall.CALL;\n215:     double strike = Math.abs(underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() /\n216:         underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n217:     csv.writeCell(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, product.getLongShort());\n218:     csv.writeCell(PUT_CALL_FIELD, putCall);\n219:     csv.writeCell(STRIKE_FIELD, strike);\n220:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, product.getExpiryDate());\n221:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, product.getExpiryTime());\n222:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, product.getExpiryZone());\n223:     csv.writeCell(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\n224:     csv.writeCell(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, Math.abs(underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount()));\n225:     csv.writeCell(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\n226:     csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getDate());\n227:     underlying.getPaymentDateAdjustment().ifPresent(bda -> {\n228:       csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD, bda.getCalendar());\n229:       csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, bda.getConvention());\n230:     });\n231:   }\n232: \n233:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n234:   // Restricted constructor.\n235:   private FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\n236:   }\n237: \n238: }\n239: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java"
  }
}

com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD;\\n10: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD;\\n11: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD;\\n12: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD;\\n13: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD;\\n14: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\\n15: \\n16: import java.time.LocalDate;\\n17: import java.time.ZoneId;\\n18: import java.util.List;\\n19: import java.util.Optional;\\n20: import java.util.Set;\\n21: \\n22: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\\n23: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\\n24: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;\\n32: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\\n34: \\n35: /**\\n36:  * Handles the CSV files format for FX Single Barrier Option trades.\\n37:  */\\n38: public class FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> {\\n39: \\n40:   /**\\n41:    * The singleton instance of the plugin.\\n42:    */\\n43:   public static final FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\\n44: \\n45:   /**\\n46:    * The CSV headers.\\n47:    */\\n48:   public static final Set<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.<String>builder()\\n49:       .addAll(FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.headers(ImmutableList.of()))\\n50:       .add(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD)\\n51:       .add(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD)\\n52:       .add(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD)\\n53:       .add(REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD)\\n54:       .add(REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD)\\n55:       .add(REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD)\\n56:       .build();\\n57: \\n58:   /**\\n59:    * Restricted constructor\\n60:    */\\n61:   private FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\\n62:   }\\n63: \\n64:   @Override\\n65:   public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\\n66:     return ImmutableSet.of(\\\"FXSINGLEBARRIEROPTION\\\", \\\"FX SINGLE BARRIER OPTION\\\");\\n67:   }\\n68: \\n69:   @Override\\n70:   public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\\n71:       Class<?> requiredJavaType,\\n72:       CsvRow baseRow,\\n73:       List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\\n74:       TradeInfo info,\\n75:       TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\\n76: \\n77:     if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class)) {\\n78:       return Optional.of(parse(baseRow, info, resolver));\\n79:     }\\n80:     return Optional.empty();\\n81:   }\\n82: \\n83:   private FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade parse(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\\n84:     FxVanillaOptionTrade vanillaOptionTrade = resolver.parseFxVanillaOptionTrade(row, info);\\n85:     Barrier barrier = CsvLoaderUtils.parseBarrierFromDefaultFields(row);\\n86: \\n87:     FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder productBuilder = FxSingleBarrierOption.builder()\\n88:         .underlyingOption(vanillaOptionTrade.getProduct())\\n89:         .barrier(barrier);\\n90: \\n91:     CsvLoaderUtils.tryParseCurrencyAmountWithDirection(\\n92:         row,\\n93:         REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\\n94:         REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\\n95:         REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD\\n96:     ).ifPresent(productBuilder::rebate);\\n97: \\n98:     FxVanillaOption option = vanillaOptionTrade.getProduct();\\n99:     return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.builder()\\n100:         .product(productBuilder.build())\\n101:         .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\\n102:             .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, option.getExpiryDate())))\\n103:         .info(info)\\n104:         .build();\\n105:   }\\n106: \\n107:   @Override\\n108:   public String getName() {\\n109:     return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\\n110:   }\\n111: \\n112:   @Override\\n113:   public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\\n114:     return ImmutableSet.of(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class);\\n115:   }\\n116: \\n117:   @Override\\n118:   public Set<String> headers(List<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> trades) {\\n119:     return HEADERS;\\n120:   }\\n121: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java%3FL1-120\"}",

com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD;\n10: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD;\n11: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD;\n12: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD;\n13: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD;\n14: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\n15: \n16: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\n23: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\n24: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;\n32: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\n34: \n35: /**\n36:  * Handles the CSV files format for FX Single Barrier Option trades.\n37:  */\n38: public class FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> {\n39: \n40:   /**\n41:    * The singleton instance of the plugin.\n42:    */\n43:   public static final FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\n44: \n45:   /**\n46:    * The CSV headers.\n47:    */\n48:   public static final Set<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.<String>builder()\n49:       .addAll(FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.headers(ImmutableList.of()))\n50:       .add(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD)\n51:       .add(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD)\n52:       .add(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD)\n53:       .add(REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD)\n54:       .add(REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD)\n55:       .add(REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD)\n56:       .build();\n57: \n58:   /**\n59:    * Restricted constructor\n60:    */\n61:   private FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\n62:   }\n63: \n64:   @Override\n65:   public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\n66:     return ImmutableSet.of(\"FXSINGLEBARRIEROPTION\", \"FX SINGLE BARRIER OPTION\");\n67:   }\n68: \n69:   @Override\n70:   public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\n71:       Class<?> requiredJavaType,\n72:       CsvRow baseRow,\n73:       List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\n74:       TradeInfo info,\n75:       TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n76: \n77:     if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class)) {\n78:       return Optional.of(parse(baseRow, info, resolver));\n79:     }\n80:     return Optional.empty();\n81:   }\n82: \n83:   private FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade parse(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n84:     FxVanillaOptionTrade vanillaOptionTrade = resolver.parseFxVanillaOptionTrade(row, info);\n85:     Barrier barrier = CsvLoaderUtils.parseBarrierFromDefaultFields(row);\n86: \n87:     FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder productBuilder = FxSingleBarrierOption.builder()\n88:         .underlyingOption(vanillaOptionTrade.getProduct())\n89:         .barrier(barrier);\n90: \n91:     CsvLoaderUtils.tryParseCurrencyAmountWithDirection(\n92:         row,\n93:         REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n94:         REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n95:         REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD\n96:     ).ifPresent(productBuilder::rebate);\n97: \n98:     FxVanillaOption option = vanillaOptionTrade.getProduct();\n99:     return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.builder()\n100:         .product(productBuilder.build())\n101: headers(List<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> trades) {\n119:     return HEADERS;\n120:   }\n121: ",

  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\\n7: \\n8: import java.time.LocalDate;\\n9: import java.time.ZonedDateTime;\\n10: \\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DaysAdjustment;\\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.HolidayCalendarId;\\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.HolidayCalendarIds;\\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.index.FxIndex;\\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.value.ValueDerivatives;\\n22: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\\n23: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.array.DoubleArray;\\n24: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountFactors;\\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.ZeroRateSensitivity;\\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackBarrierPriceFormulaRepository;\\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackOneTouchAssetPriceFormulaRepository;\\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackOneTouchCashPriceFormulaRepository;\\n32: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\\n34: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\\n35: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOption;\\n36: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier;\\n37: \\n38: /**\\n39:  * Pricer for FX barrier option products in Black-Scholes world.\\n40:  * <p>\\n41:  * This function provides the ability to price an {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\\n42:  * <p>\\n43:  * All the computation is based on the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\\n44:  * For example, price, PV and risk measures of the product will be expressed in USD for an option on EUR/USD.\\n45:  */\\n46: public class BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer {\\n47: \\n48:   /**\\n49:    * Default implementation.\\n50:    */\\n51:   public static final BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer DEFAULT = new BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer();\\n52: \\n53:   /**\\n54:    * Pricer for barrier option without rebate.\\n55:    */\\n56:   private static final BlackBarrierPriceFormulaRepository BARRIER_PRICER = new BlackBarrierPriceFormulaRepository();\\n57:   /**\\n58:    * Pricer for rebate.\\n59:    */\\n60:   private static final BlackOneTouchAssetPriceFormulaRepository ASSET_REBATE_PRICER =\\n61:       new BlackOneTouchAssetPriceFormulaRepository();\\n62:   /**\\n63:    * Pricer for rebate.\\n64:    */\\n65:   private static final BlackOneTouchCashPriceFormulaRepository CASH_REBATE_PRICER =\\n66:       new BlackOneTouchCashPriceFormulaRepository();\\n67:   /**\\n68:    * Pricer for underlying vanilla option.\\n69:    */\\n70:   private static final BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER =\\n71:       BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT;\\n72: \\n73:   /**\\n74:    * Creates an instance.\\n75:    */\\n76:   public BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer() {\\n77:   }\\n78: \\n79:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n80:   /**\\n81: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java%3FL1-80\"}",

    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DaysAdjustment;\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.HolidayCalendarId;\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.HolidayCalendarIds;\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.index.FxIndex;\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountFactors;\n27: com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackOneTouchAssetPriceFormulaRepository;\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOption;\n36: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier;\n37: \n38: /**\n39:  * Pricer for FX barrier option products in Black-Scholes world.\n40:  * <p>\n41:  * This function provides the ability to price an {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\n42:  * <p>\n43:  * All the computation is based on the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\n44:  * For example, price, PV and risk measures of the product will be expressed in USD for an option on EUR/USD.\n45:  */\n46: public class BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer {\n47: \n48:   /**\n49:    * Default implementation.\n50:    */\n51:   public static final BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer DEFAULT = new BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer();\n52: \n53:   /**\n54:    * Pricer for barrier option without rebate.\n55:    */\n56:   private static final BlackBarrierPriceFormulaRepository BARRIER_PRICER BlackOneTouchCashPriceFormulaRepository();\n67:   /**\n68:    * Pricer for underlying vanilla option.\n69:    */\n70:   private static final BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker.inOrderOrEqual;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.LocalTime;\nimport java.time.ZoneId;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.NoSuchElementException;\n\nimport org.joda.beans.Bean;\nimport org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableValidator;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.Resolvable;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.BusinessDayAdjustment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PutCall;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxOptionProduct;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\n\n/**\n * A European FX option.\n * <p>\n * An FX option is a financial instrument that provides an option based on the future value of a foreign exchange. The\n * option is European, exercised only on the exercise date.\n * <p>\n * For example, a call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange is the option to perform a foreign exchange on the expiry\n * date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class FxEuropeanOption\n    implements FxOptionProduct, Resolvable<ResolvedFxEuropeanOption>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the option is long or short.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, the long party will have the option to enter in this transaction; the short party will, at the option of\n   * the long party, potentially enter into the inverse transaction.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LongShort longShort;\n  /**\n   * The expiry date of the option.\n   * <p>\n   * The option is European, and can only be exercised on the expiry date.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LocalDate expiryDate;\n  /**\n   * The expiry time of the option.\n   * <p>\n   * The expiry time is related to the expiry date and time-zone.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LocalTime expiryTime;\n  /**\n   * The time-zone of the expiry time.\n   * <p>\n   * The expiry time-zone is related to the expiry date and time.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ZoneId expiryZone;\n  /**\n   * The underlying foreign exchange transaction.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, if the option is in the money, this foreign exchange will occur.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final FxSingle underlying;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an equivalent {@code FxEuropeanOption} using currency pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\n   * currency notional, and underlying payment date.\n   * <p>\n   * No payment date adjustments apply.\n   *\n   * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\n   * @param expiry the option expiry\n   * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\n   * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\n   * @param strike the FX strike\n   * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\n   * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\n   * @return an equivalent fx european option\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption of(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      ZonedDateTime expiry,\n      CurrencyPair currencyPair,\n      PutCall putCall,\n      double strike,\n      double baseNotional,\n      LocalDate paymentDate) {\n\n    return of(longShort, expiry, currencyPair, putCall, strike, baseNotional, paymentDate, null);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an equivalent {@code FxEuropeanOption} using currency pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\n   * currency notional, underlying payment date, and payment date adjustment.\n   *\n   * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\n   * @param expiry the option expiry\n   * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\n   * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\n   * @param strike the FX strike\n   * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\n   * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\n   * @param paymentDateAdjustment the adjustment to apply to the payment date\n   * @return an equivalent fx european option\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption of(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      ZonedDateTime expiry,\n      CurrencyPair currencyPair,\n      PutCall putCall,\n      double strike,\n      double baseNotional,\n      LocalDate paymentDate,\n      BusinessDayAdjustment paymentDateAdjustment) {\n\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(baseNotional > 0, \"Base notional must be positive\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(strike > 0, \"FX strike must be positive\");\n\n    // for a european call, will be long the base currency and short the counter currency\n    // for a european put, will be short the base currency and long the counter currency\n    double baseAmount = putCall.isCall() ? baseNotional : -baseNotional;\n    double counterNotional = strike * baseNotional;\n    double counterAmount = putCall.isCall() ? -counterNotional : counterNotional;\n    CurrencyAmount baseCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), baseAmount);\n    CurrencyAmount counterCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), counterAmount);\n    FxSingle equivalentUnderlying = paymentDateAdjustment == null ?\n        FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate) :\n        FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate, paymentDateAdjustment);\n\n    return FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n        .longShort(longShort)\n        .expiryDate(expiry.toLocalDate())\n        .expiryTime(expiry.toLocalTime())\n        .expiryZone(expiry.getZone())\n        .underlying(equivalentUnderlying)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableValidator\n  private void validate() {\n    inOrderOrEqual(expiryDate, underlying.getPaymentDate(), \"expiryDate\", \"underlying.paymentDate\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  /**\n   * Gets currency pair of the base currency and counter currency.\n   * <p>\n   * This currency pair is conventional, thus indifferent to the direction of FX.\n   *\n   * @return the currency pair\n   */\n  @Override\n  public CurrencyPair getCurrencyPair() {\n    return underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Gets the expiry date-time.\n   * <p>\n   * The option expires at this date and time.\n   * <p>\n   * The result is returned by combining the expiry date, time and time-zone.\n   *\n   * @return the expiry date and time\n   */\n  @Override\n  public ZonedDateTime getExpiry() {\n    return expiryDate.atTime(expiryTime).atZone(expiryZone);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedFxEuropeanOption resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    return ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.builder()\n        .longShort(longShort)\n        .expiry(getExpiry())\n        .underlying(underlying.resolve(refData))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code FxEuropeanOption}.\n   * @return the meta-bean, not null\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption.Meta meta() {\n    return FxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  static {\n    MetaBean.register(FxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * The serialization version id.\n   */\n  private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n   * @return the builder, not null\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption.Builder builder() {\n    return new FxEuropeanOption.Builder();\n  }\n\n  private FxEuropeanOption(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      LocalDate expiryDate,\n      LocalTime expiryTime,\n      ZoneId expiryZone,\n      FxSingle underlying) {\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(longShort, \"longShort\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(expiryDate, \"expiryDate\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(expiryTime, \"expiryTime\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(expiryZone, \"expiryZone\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(underlying, \"underlying\");\n    this.longShort = longShort;\n    this.expiryDate = expiryDate;\n    this.expiryTime = expiryTime;\n    this.expiryZone = expiryZone;\n    this.underlying = underlying;\n    validate();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public FxEuropeanOption.Meta metaBean() {\n    return FxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets whether the option is long or short.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, the long party will have the option to enter in this transaction; the short party will, at the option of\n   * the long party, potentially enter into the inverse transaction.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public LongShort getLongShort() {\n    return longShort;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the expiry date of the option.\n   * <p>\n   * The option is European, and can only be exercised on the expiry date.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public LocalDate getExpiryDate() {\n    return expiryDate;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the expiry time of the option.\n   * <p>\n   * The expiry time is related to the expiry date and time-zone.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public LocalTime getExpiryTime() {\n    return expiryTime;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the time-zone of the expiry time.\n   * <p>\n   * The expiry time-zone is related to the expiry date and time.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public ZoneId getExpiryZone() {\n    return expiryZone;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the underlying foreign exchange transaction.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, if the option is in the money, this foreign exchange will occur.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public FxSingle getUnderlying() {\n    return underlying;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder that allows this bean to be mutated.\n   * @return the mutable builder, not null\n   */\n  public Builder toBuilder() {\n    return new Builder(this);\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public boolean equals(Object obj) {\n    if (obj == this) {\n      return true;\n    }\n    if (obj != null && obj.getClass() == this.getClass()) {\n      FxEuropeanOption other = (FxEuropeanOption) obj;\n      return JodaBeanUtils.equal(longShort, other.longShort) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(expiryDate, other.expiryDate) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(expiryTime, other.expiryTime) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(expiryZone, other.expiryZone) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(underlying, other.underlying);\n    }\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public int hashCode() {\n    int hash = getClass().hashCode();\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(longShort);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(expiryDate);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(expiryTime);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(expiryZone);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(underlying);\n    return hash;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String toString() {\n    StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(192);\n    buf.append(\"FxEuropeanOption{\");\n    buf.append(\"longShort\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(longShort)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"expiryDate\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(expiryDate)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"expiryTime\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(expiryTime)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"expiryZone\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(expiryZone)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"underlying\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(underlying));\n    buf.append('}');\n    return buf.toString();\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code FxEuropeanOption}.\n   */\n  public static final class Meta extends DirectMetaBean {\n    /**\n     * The singleton instance of the meta-bean.\n     */\n    static final Meta INSTANCE = new Meta();\n\n    /**\n     * The meta-property for the {@code longShort} property.\n     */\n    private final MetaProperty<LongShort> longShort = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"longShort\", FxEuropeanOption.class, LongShort.class);\n    /**\n     * The meta-property for the {@code expiryDate} property.\n     */\n    private final MetaProperty<LocalDate> expiryDate = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"expiryDate\", FxEuropeanOption.class, LocalDate.class);\n    /**\n     * The meta-property for the {@code expiryTime} property.\n     */\n    private final MetaProperty<LocalTime> expiryTime = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"expiryTime\", FxEuropeanOption.class, LocalTime.class);\n    /**\n     * The meta-property for the {@code expiryZone} property.\n     */\n    private final MetaProperty<ZoneId> expiryZone = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"expiryZone\", FxEuropeanOption.class, ZoneId.class);\n    /**\n     * The meta-property for the {@code underlying} property.\n     */\n    private final MetaProperty<FxSingle> underlying = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"underlying\", FxEuropeanOption.class, FxSingle.class);\n    /**\n     * The meta-properties.\n     */\n    private final Map<String, MetaProperty<?>> metaPropertyMap$ = new DirectMetaPropertyMap(\n        this, null,\n        \"longShort\",\n        \"expiryDate\",\n        \"expiryTime\",\n        \"expiryZone\",\n        \"underlying\");\n\n    /**\n     * Restricted constructor.\n     */\n    private Meta() {\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    protected MetaProperty<?> metaPropertyGet(String propertyName) {\n      switch (propertyName.hashCode()) {\n        case 116685664:  // longShort\n          return longShort;\n        case -816738431:  // expiryDate\n          return expiryDate;\n        case -816254304:  // expiryTime\n          return expiryTime;\n        case -816069761:  // expiryZone\n          return expiryZone;\n        case -1770633379:  // underlying\n          return underlying;\n      }\n      return super.metaPropertyGet(propertyName);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public FxEuropeanOption.Builder builder() {\n      return new FxEuropeanOption.Builder();\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Class<? extends FxEuropeanOption> beanType() {\n      return FxEuropeanOption.class;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Map<String, MetaProperty<?>> metaPropertyMap() {\n      return metaPropertyMap$;\n    }\n\n    //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n    /**\n     * The meta-property for the {@code longShort} property.\n     * @return the meta-property, not null\n     */\n    public MetaProperty<LongShort> longShort() {\n      return longShort;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * The meta-property for the {@code expiryDate} property.\n     * @return the meta-property, not null\n     */\n    public MetaProperty<LocalDate> expiryDate() {\n      return expiryDate;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * The meta-property for the {@code expiryTime} property.\n     * @return the meta-property, not null\n     */\n    public MetaProperty<LocalTime> expiryTime() {\n      return expiryTime;\n expiryZone;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * The meta-property for the {@code underlying} property.\n     * @return the meta-property, not null\n     */\n    public MetaProperty<FxSingle> underlying() {\n quiet) {\n      switch (propertyName.hashCode()) {\n        case 116685664:  // longShort\n          return ((FxEuropeanOption) bean).getLongShort();\n        case -816738431:  // expiryDate\n
