  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker.inOrderOrEqual;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.LocalTime;\nimport java.time.ZoneId;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.NoSuchElementException;\n\nimport org.joda.beans.Bean;\nimport org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableValidator;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.Resolvable;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.BusinessDayAdjustment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PutCall;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxOptionProduct;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\n\n/**\n * A European FX option.\n * <p>\n * An FX option is a financial instrument that provides an option based on the future value of a foreign exchange. The\n * option is European, exercised only on the exercise date.\n * <p>\n * For example, a call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange is the option to perform a foreign exchange on the expiry\n * date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class FxEuropeanOption\n    implements FxOptionProduct, Resolvable<ResolvedFxEuropeanOption>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the option is long or short.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, the long party will have the option to enter in this transaction; the short party will, at the option of\n   * the long party, potentially enter into the inverse transaction.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LongShort longShort;\n  /**\n   * The expiry date of the option.\n   * <p>\n   * The option is European, and can only be exercised on the expiry date.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LocalDate expiryDate;\n  /**\n   * The expiry time of the option.\n   * <p>\n   * The expiry time is related to the expiry date and time-zone.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LocalTime expiryTime;\n  /**\n   * The time-zone of the expiry time.\n   * <p>\n   * The expiry time-zone is related to the expiry date and time.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ZoneId expiryZone;\n  /**\n   * The underlying foreign exchange transaction.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, if the option is in the money, this foreign exchange will occur.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final FxSingle underlying;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an equivalent {@code FxEuropeanOption} using currency pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\n   * currency notional, and underlying payment date.\n   * <p>\n   * No payment date adjustments apply.\n   *\n   * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\n   * @param expiry the option expiry\n   * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\n   * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\n   * @param strike the FX strike\n   * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\n   * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\n   * @return an equivalent fx european option\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption of(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      ZonedDateTime expiry,\n      CurrencyPair currencyPair,\n      PutCall putCall,\n      double strike,\n      double baseNotional,\n      LocalDate paymentDate) {\n\n    return of(longShort, expiry, currencyPair, putCall, strike, baseNotional, paymentDate, null);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an equivalent {@code FxEuropeanOption} using currency pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\n   * currency notional, underlying payment date, and payment date adjustment.\n   *\n   * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\n   * @param expiry the option expiry\n   * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\n   * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\n   * @param strike the FX strike\n   * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\n   * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\n   * @param paymentDateAdjustment the adjustment to apply to the payment date\n   * @return an equivalent fx european option\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption of(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      ZonedDateTime expiry,\n      CurrencyPair currencyPair,\n      PutCall putCall,\n      double strike,\n      double baseNotional,\n      LocalDate paymentDate,\n      BusinessDayAdjustment paymentDateAdjustment) {\n\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(baseNotional > 0, \"Base notional must be positive\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(strike > 0, \"FX strike must be positive\");\n\n    double baseAmount = putCall.isCall() ? baseNotional : -baseNotional;\n    double counterNotional = strike * baseNotional;\n    double counterAmount = putCall.isCall() ? -counterNotional : counterNotional;\n    CurrencyAmount baseCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), baseAmount);\n    CurrencyAmount counterCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), counterAmount);\n    FxSingle equivalentUnderlying = paymentDateAdjustment == null ?\n        FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate) :\n        FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate, paymentDateAdjustment);\n\n    return FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n        .longShort(longShort)\n        .expiryDate(expiry.toLocalDate())\n        .expiryTime(expiry.toLocalTime())\n        .expiryZone(expiry.getZone())\n        .underlying(equivalentUnderlying)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableValidator\n  private void validate() {\n    inOrderOrEqual(expiryDate, underlying.getPaymentDate(), \"expiryDate\", \"underlying.paymentDate\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  /**\n   * Gets currency pair of the base currency and counter currency.\n   * <p>\n   * This currency pair is conventional, thus indifferent to the direction of FX.\n   *\n   * @return the currency pair\n   */\n  @Override\n  public CurrencyPair getCurrencyPair() {\n    return underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Gets the expiry date-time.\n   * <p>\n   * The option expires at this date and time.\n   * <p>\n   * The result is returned by combining the expiry date, time and time-zone.\n   *\n   * @return the expiry date and time\n   */\n  @Override\n  public ZonedDateTime getExpiry() {\n    return expiryDate.atTime(expiryTime).atZone(expiryZone);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedFxEuropeanOption resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    return ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.builder()\n        .longShort(longShort)\n        .expiry(getExpiry())\n        .underlying(underlying.resolve(refData))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code FxEuropeanOption}.\n   * @return the meta-bean, not null\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption.Meta meta() {\n    return FxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  static {\n    MetaBean.register(FxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * The serialization version id.\n   */\n  private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n   * @return the builder, not null\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption.Builder builder() {\n    return new FxEuropeanOption.Builder();\n  }\n\n  private FxEuropeanOption(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      LocalDate expiryDate,\n      LocalTime expiryTime,\n      ZoneId expiryZone,\n      FxSingle underlying) {\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(longShort, \"longShort\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(expiryDate, \"expiryDate\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(expiryTime, \"expiryTime\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(expiryZone, \"expiryZone\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(underlying, \"underlying\");\n    this.longShort = longShort;\n    this.expiryDate = expiryDate;\n    this.expiryTime = expiryTime;\n    this.expiryZone = expiryZone;\n    this.underlying = underlying;\n    validate();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public FxEuropeanOption.Meta metaBean() {\n    return FxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets whether the option is long or short.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public LongShort getLongShort() {\n    return longShort;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the expiry date of the option.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public LocalDate getExpiryDate() {\n    return expiryDate;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the expiry time of the option.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public LocalTime getExpiryTime() {\n    return expiryTime;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the time-zone of the expiry time.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public ZoneId getExpiryZone() {\n    return expiryZone;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the underlying foreign exchange transaction.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public FxSingle getUnderlying() {\n    return underlying;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder that allows this bean to be mutated.\n   * @return the mutable builder, not null\n   */\n  public Builder toBuilder() {\n    return new Builder(this);\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public boolean equals(Object obj) {\n    if (obj == this) {\n      return true;\n    }\n    if (obj != null && obj.getClass() == this.getClass()) {\n      FxEuropeanOption other = (FxEuropeanOption) obj;\n      return JodaBeanUtils.equal(longShort, other.longShort) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(expiryDate, other.expiryDate) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(expiryTime, other.expiryTime) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(expiryZone, other.expiryZone) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(underlying, other.underlying);\n    }\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public int hashCode() {\n    int hash = getClass().hashCode();\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(longShort);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(expiryDate);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(expiryTime);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(expiryZone);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(underlying);\n    return hash;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String toString() {\n    StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(192);\n    buf.append(\"FxEuropeanOption{\");\n    buf.append(\"longShort\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(longShort)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"expiryDate\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(expiryDate)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"expiryTime\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(expiryTime)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"expiryZone\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(expiryZone)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"underlying\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(underlying));\n    buf.append('}');\n    return buf.toString();\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code FxEuropeanOption}.\n   */\n  public static final class Meta extends DirectMetaBean {\n    /**\n     * The singleton instance of the meta-bean.\n     */\n    static final Meta INSTANCE = new Meta();\n\n    private final FxEuropeanOption.class, ZoneId.class);\n    private final MetaProperty<FxSingle> underlying = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"underlying\", FxEuropeanOption.class, FxSingle.class);\n   "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker.inOrderOrEqual;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.LocalTime;\nimport java.time.ZoneId;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.NoSuchElementException;\n\nimport org.joda.beans.Bean;\nimport org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableValidator;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.Resolvable;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.BusinessDayAdjustment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PutCall;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxOptionProduct;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\n\n/**\n * A European FX option.\n * <p>\n * An FX option is a financial instrument that provides an option based on the future value of a foreign exchange. The\n * option is European, exercised only on the exercise date.\n * <p>\n * For example, a call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange is the option to perform a foreign exchange on the expiry\n * date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class FxEuropeanOption\n    implements FxOptionProduct, Resolvable<ResolvedFxEuropeanOption>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the option is long or short.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, the long party will have the option to enter in this transaction; the short party will, at the option of\n   * the long party, potentially enter into the inverse transaction.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LongShort longShort;\n  /**\n   * The expiry date of the option.\n   * <p>\n   * The option is European, and can only be exercised on the expiry date.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LocalDate expiryDate;\n  /**\n   * The expiry time of the option.\n   * <p>\n   * The expiry time is related to the expiry date and time-zone.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LocalTime expiryTime;\n  /**\n   * The time-zone of the expiry time.\n   * <p>\n   * The expiry time-zone is related to the expiry date and time.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ZoneId expiryZone;\n  /**\n   * The underlying foreign exchange transaction.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, if the option is in the money, this foreign exchange will occur.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final FxSingle underlying;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an equivalent {@code FxEuropeanOption} using currency pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\n   * currency notional, and underlying payment date.\n   * <p>\n   * No payment date adjustments apply.\n   *\n   * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\n   * @param expiry the option expiry\n   * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\n   * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\n   * @param strike the FX strike\n   * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\n   * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\n   * @return an equivalent fx european option\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption of(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      ZonedDateTime expiry,\n      CurrencyPair currencyPair,\n      PutCall putCall,\n      double strike,\n      double baseNotional,\n      LocalDate paymentDate) {\n\n    return of(longShort, expiry, currencyPair, putCall, strike, baseNotional, paymentDate, null);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an equivalent {@code FxEuropeanOption} using currency pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\n   * currency notional, underlying payment date, and payment date adjustment.\n   *\n   * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\n   * @param expiry the option expiry\n   * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\n   * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\n   * @param strike the FX strike\n   * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\n   * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\n   * @param paymentDateAdjustment the adjustment to apply to the payment date\n   * @return an equivalent fx european option\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption of(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      ZonedDateTime expiry,\n      CurrencyPair currencyPair,\n      PutCall putCall,\n      double strike,\n      double baseNotional,\n      LocalDate paymentDate,\n      BusinessDayAdjustment paymentDateAdjustment) {\n\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(baseNotional > 0, \"Base notional must be positive\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(strike > 0, \"FX strike must be positive\");\n\n    double baseAmount = putCall.isCall() ? baseNotional : -baseNotional;\n    double counterNotional = strike * baseNotional;\n    double counterAmount = putCall.isCall() ? -counterNotional : counterNotional;\n    CurrencyAmount baseCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), baseAmount);\n    CurrencyAmount counterCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), counterAmount);\n    FxSingle equivalentUnderlying = paymentDateAdjustment == null ?\n        FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate) :\n        FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate, paymentDateAdjustment);\n\n    return FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n        .longShort(longShort)\n        .expiryDate(expiry.toLocalDate())\n        .expiryTime(expiry.toLocalTime())\n        .expiryZone(expiry.getZone())\n        .underlying(equivalentUnderlying)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableValidator\n  private void validate() {\n    inOrderOrEqual(expiryDate, underlying.getPaymentDate(), \"expiryDate\", \"underlying.paymentDate\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  /**\n   * Gets currency pair of the base currency and counter currency.\n   * <p>\n   * This currency pair is conventional, thus indifferent to the direction of FX.\n   *\n   * @return the currency pair\n   */\n  @Override\n  public CurrencyPair getCurrencyPair() {\n    return underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Gets the expiry date-time.\n   * <p>\n   * The option expires at this date and time.\n   * <p>\n   * The result is returned by combining the expiry date, time and time-zone.\n   *\n   * @return the expiry date and time\n   */\n  @Override\n  public ZonedDateTime getExpiry() {\n    return expiryDate.atTime(expiryTime).atZone(expiryZone);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedFxEuropeanOption resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    return ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.builder()\n        .longShort(longShort)\n        .expiry(getExpiry())\n        .underlying(underlying.resolve(refData))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code FxEuropeanOption}.\n   * @return the meta-bean, not null\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption.Meta meta() {\n    return FxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  static {\n    MetaBean.register(FxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * The serialization version id.\n   */\n  private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n   * @return the builder, not null\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOption.Builder builder() {\n    return new FxEuropeanOption.Builder();\n  }\n\n  private FxEuropeanOption(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      LocalDate expiryDate,\n      LocalTime expiryTime,\n      ZoneId expiryZone,\n      FxSingle underlying) {\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(longShort, \"longShort\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(expiryDate, \"expiryDate\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(expiryTime, \"expiryTime\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(expiryZone, \"expiryZone\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(underlying, \"underlying\");\n    this.longShort = longShort;\n    this.expiryDate = expiryDate;\n    this.expiryTime = expiryTime;\n    this.expiryZone = expiryZone;\n    this.underlying = underlying;\n    validate();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public FxEuropeanOption.Meta metaBean() {\n    return FxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets whether the option is long or short.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public LongShort getLongShort() {\n    return longShort;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the expiry date of the option.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public LocalDate getExpiryDate() {\n    return expiryDate;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the expiry time of the option.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public LocalTime getExpiryTime() {\n    return expiryTime;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the time-zone of the expiry time.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public ZoneId getExpiryZone() {\n    return expiryZone;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the underlying foreign exchange transaction.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public FxSingle getUnderlying() {\n    return underlying;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder that allows this bean to be mutated.\n   * @return the mutable builder, not null\n   */\n  public Builder toBuilder() {\n    return new Builder(this);\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public boolean equals(Object obj) {\n    if (obj == this) {\n      return true;\n    }\n    if (obj != null && obj.getClass() == this.getClass()) {\n      FxEuropeanOption other = (FxEuropeanOption) obj;\n      return JodaBeanUtils.equal(longShort, other.longShort) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(expiryDate, other.expiryDate) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(expiryTime, other.expiryTime) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(expiryZone, other.expiryZone) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(underlying, other.underlying);\n    }\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public int hashCode() {\n    int hash = getClass().hashCode();\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(longShort);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(expiryDate);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(expiryTime);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(expiryZone);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(underlying);\n    return hash;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String toString() {\n    StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(192);\n    buf.append(\"FxEuropeanOption{\");\n    buf.append(\"longShort\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(longShort)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"expiryDate\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(expiryDate)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"expiryTime\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(expiryTime)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"expiryZone\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(expiryZone)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"underlying\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(underlying));\n    buf.append('}');\n    return buf.toString();\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code FxEuropeanOption}.\n   */\n  public static final class Meta extends DirectMetaBean {\n    /**\n     * The singleton instance of the meta-bean.\n     */\n    static final Meta INSTANCE = new Meta();\n\n    private final MetaProperty<LongShort> longShort = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"longShort\", FxEuropeanOption.class, LongShort.class);\n    private final MetaProperty<LocalDate> expiryDate = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"expiryDate\", FxEuropeanOption.class, LocalDate.class);\n    private final MetaProperty<LocalTime> expiryTime = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"expiryTime\", FxEuropeanOption.class, LocalTime.class);\n    private final MetaProperty<ZoneId> expiryZone = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"expiryZone\", FxEuropeanOption.class, ZoneId.class);\n    private final MetaProperty<FxSingle> underlying = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"underlying\", FxEuropeanOption.class, FxSingle.class);\n    private final Map<String, MetaProperty<?>> metaPropertyMap$ = new DirectMetaPropertyMap(\n        this, null,\n        \"longShort\",\n        \"expiryDate\",\n        \"expiryTime\",\n        \"expiryZone\",\n        \"underlying\");\n\n    private Meta() {\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    protected MetaProperty<?> metaPropertyGet(String propertyName) {\n      switch (propertyName.hashCode()) {\n        case 116685664:  // longShort\n          return longShort;\n        case -816738431:  // expiryDate\n          return expiryDate;\n        case -816254304:  // expiryTime\n          return expiryTime;\n        case -816069761:  // expiryZone\n          return expiryZone;\n        case -1770633379:  // underlying\n          return underlying;\n      }\n      return super.metaPropertyGet(propertyName);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public FxEuropeanOption.Builder builder() {\n      return new FxEuropeanOption.Builder();\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Class<? extends FxEuropeanOption> beanType() {\n      return FxEuropeanOption.class;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Map<String, MetaProperty<?>> metaPropertyMap() {\n      return metaPropertyMap$;\n    }\n\n    public MetaProperty<LongShort> longShort() {\n      return longShort;\n    }\n\n    public MetaProperty<LocalDate> expiryDate() {\n      return expiryDate;\n    }\n\n    public MetaProperty<LocalTime> expiryTime() {\n      return expiryTime;\n    }\n\n    public MetaProperty<ZoneId> expiryZone() {\n      return expiryZone;\n    }\n\n    public MetaProperty<FxSingle> underlying() {\n      return underlying;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    protected Object propertyGet(Bean bean, String propertyName, boolean quiet) {\n      switch (propertyName.hashCode()) {\n        case 116685664:  // longShort\n          return ((FxEuropeanOption) bean).getLongShort();\n        case -816738431:  // expiryDate\n          return ((FxEuropeanOption) bean).getExpiryDate();\n        case -816254304:  // expiryTime\n          return ((FxEuropeanOption) bean).getExpiryTime();\n        case -816069761:  // expiryZone\n          return ((FxEuropeanOption) bean).getExpiryZone();\n protected void propertySet(Bean bean, String propertyName, Object newValue, boolean quiet) {\n      metaProperty(propertyName);\n      if (quiet) {\n        return;\n      }\n      throw new UnsupportedOperationException(\"Property cannot be written: \" + propertyName);\n    }\n\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * The bean-builder for {@code FxEuropeanOption}.\n   */\n  public static final class Builder extends DirectFieldsBeanBuilder<FxEuropeanOption> {\n\n    private LongShort longShort;\n    private LocalDate expiryDate;\n    private LocalTime expiryTime;\n    private ZoneId expiryZone;\n    private FxSingle underlying;\n\n    private Builder() {\n    }\n\n    private Builder(FxEuropeanOption beanToCopy) {\n      this.longShort = beanToCopy.getLongShort();\n      this.expiryDate = beanToCopy.getExpiryDate();\n      this.expiryTime = beanToCopy.getExpiryTime();\n      this.expiryZone = beanToCopy.getExpiryZone();\n      this.underlying = beanToCopy.getUnderlying();\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Object get(String propertyName) {\n      switch (propertyName.hashCode()) {\n expiryTime;\n        case -816069761:  // expiryZone\n          return expiryZone;\n        case -1770633379:  // underlying\n          return underlying;\n        default:\n          throw new newValue;\n          break;\n        case -816254304:  // expiryTime\n          this.expiryTime = (LocalTime) newValue;\n          break;\n        case -816069761:  // expiryZone\n 45. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.NoSuchElementException;\n\nimport org.joda.beans.Bean;\nimport org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableDefaults;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.PortfolioItemInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.PortfolioItemSummary;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.ProductType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.ResolvableTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.SummarizerUtils;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * A trade in a European FX option.\n * <p>\n * An Over-The-Counter (OTC) trade in an {@link FxEuropeanOption}.\n * <p>\n * An FX option is a financial instrument that provides an option based on the future value of\n * a foreign exchange. The option is European, exercised only on the exercise date.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class FxEuropeanOptionTrade\n    implements FxOptionTrade, ResolvableTrade<ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * The additional trade information, defaulted to an empty instance.\n   * <p>\n   * This allows additional information to be attached to the trade.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\", overrideGet = true)\n  private final TradeInfo info;\n  /**\n   * The FX option product that was agreed when the trade occurred.\n   * <p>\n   * The product captures the contracted financial details of the trade.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\", overrideGet = true)\n  private final FxEuropeanOption product;\n  /**\n   * The premium of the FX option.\n   * <p>\n   * The premium sign should be compatible with the product Long/Short flag.\n   * This means that the premium is negative for long and positive for short.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final AdjustablePayment premium;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableDefaults\n  private static void applyDefaults(Builder builder) {\n    builder.info = TradeInfo.empty();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTrade withInfo(PortfolioItemInfo info) {\n    return new FxEuropeanOptionTrade(TradeInfo.from(info), product, premium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public PortfolioItemSummary summarize() {\n    // Long Pay USD 1mm @ GBP/USD 1.32 Premium USD 100k : 21Jan18\n    StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(96);\n    CurrencyAmount base = product.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyAmount();\n    CurrencyAmount counter = product.getUnderlying().getCounterCurrencyAmount();\n    buf.append(product.getLongShort());\n    buf.append(' ');\n    buf.append(SummarizerUtils.fx(base, counter));\n    buf.append(\" Premium \");\n    buf.append(SummarizerUtils.amount(premium.getValue().mapAmount(v -> Math.abs(v))));\n    buf.append(\" : \");\n    buf.append(SummarizerUtils.date(product.getExpiryDate()));\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = product.getCurrencyPair();\n    return SummarizerUtils.summary(\n        this, ProductType.FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION, buf.toString(), currencyPair.getBase(), currencyPair.getCounter());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    return ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n        .info(info)\n        .product(product.resolve(refData))\n        .premium(premium.resolve(refData))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code FxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   * @return the meta-bean, not null\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta meta() {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  static {\n    MetaBean.register(FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * The serialization version id.\n   */\n  private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n   * @return the builder, not null\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Builder builder() {\n    return new FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Builder();\n  }\n\n  private FxEuropeanOptionTrade(\n      TradeInfo info,\n      FxEuropeanOption product,\n      AdjustablePayment premium) {\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(info, \"info\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(product, \"product\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(premium, \"premium\");\n    this.info = info;\n    this.product = product;\n    this.premium = premium;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta metaBean() {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public TradeInfo getInfo() {\n    return info;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FxEuropeanOption getProduct() {\n    return product;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public AdjustablePayment getPremium() {\n    return premium;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public Builder toBuilder() {\n    return new Builder(this);\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public boolean equals(Object obj) {\n    if (obj == this) {\n      return true;\n    }\n    if (obj != null && obj.getClass() == this.getClass()) {\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade other = (FxEuropeanOptionTrade) obj;\n      return JodaBeanUtils.equal(info, other.info) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(product, other.product) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(premium, other.premium);\n    }\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public int hashCode() {\n    int hash = getClass().hashCode();\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(info);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(product);\n    hash = {
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.NoSuchElementException;\n\nimport org.joda.beans.Bean;\nimport org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableDefaults;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.PortfolioItemInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.PortfolioItemSummary;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.ProductType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.ResolvableTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.SummarizerUtils;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * A trade in a European FX option.\n * <p>\n * An Over-The-Counter (OTC) trade in an {@link FxEuropeanOption}.\n * <p>\n * An FX option is a financial instrument that provides an option based on the future value of\n * a foreign exchange. The option is European, exercised only on the exercise date.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class FxEuropeanOptionTrade\n    implements FxOptionTrade, ResolvableTrade<ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * The additional trade information, defaulted to an empty instance.\n   * <p>\n   * This allows additional information to be attached to the trade.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\", overrideGet = true)\n  private final TradeInfo info;\n  /**\n   * The FX option product that was agreed when the trade occurred.\n   * <p>\n   * The product captures the contracted financial details of the trade.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\", overrideGet = true)\n  private final FxEuropeanOption product;\n  /**\n   * The premium of the FX option.\n   * <p>\n   * The premium sign should be compatible with the product Long/Short flag.\n   * This means that the premium is negative for long and positive for short.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final AdjustablePayment premium;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableDefaults\n  private static void applyDefaults(Builder builder) {\n    builder.info = TradeInfo.empty();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTrade withInfo(PortfolioItemInfo info) {\n    return new FxEuropeanOptionTrade(TradeInfo.from(info), product, premium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public PortfolioItemSummary summarize() {\n    // Long Pay USD 1mm @ GBP/USD 1.32 Premium USD 100k : 21Jan18\n    StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(96);\n    CurrencyAmount base = product.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyAmount();\n    CurrencyAmount counter = product.getUnderlying().getCounterCurrencyAmount();\n    buf.append(product.getLongShort());\n    buf.append(' ');\n    buf.append(SummarizerUtils.fx(base, counter));\n    buf.append(\" Premium \");\n    buf.append(SummarizerUtils.amount(premium.getValue().mapAmount(v -> Math.abs(v))));\n    buf.append(\" : \");\n    buf.append(SummarizerUtils.date(product.getExpiryDate()));\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = product.getCurrencyPair();\n    return SummarizerUtils.summary(\n        this, ProductType.FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION, buf.toString(), currencyPair.getBase(), currencyPair.getCounter());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    return ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n        .info(info)\n        .product(product.resolve(refData))\n        .premium(premium.resolve(refData))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code FxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   * @return the meta-bean, not null\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta meta() {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  static {\n    MetaBean.register(FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * The serialization version id.\n   */\n  private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n   * @return the builder, not null\n   */\n  public static FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Builder builder() {\n    return new FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Builder();\n  }\n\n  private FxEuropeanOptionTrade(\n      TradeInfo info,\n      FxEuropeanOption product,\n      AdjustablePayment premium) {\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(info, \"info\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(product, \"product\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(premium, \"premium\");\n    this.info = info;\n    this.product = product;\n    this.premium = premium;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta metaBean() {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public TradeInfo getInfo() {\n    return info;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FxEuropeanOption getProduct() {\n    return product;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public AdjustablePayment getPremium() {\n    return premium;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public Builder toBuilder() {\n    return new Builder(this);\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public boolean equals(Object obj) {\n    if (obj == this) {\n      return true;\n    }\n    if (obj != null && obj.getClass() == this.getClass()) {\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade other = (FxEuropeanOptionTrade) obj;\n      return JodaBeanUtils.equal(info, other.info) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(product, other.product) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(premium, other.premium);\n    }\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public int hashCode() {\n    int hash = getClass().hashCode();\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(info);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(product);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(premium);\n    return hash;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String toString() {\n    StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(128);\n    buf.append(\"FxEuropeanOptionTrade{\");\n    buf.append(\"info\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(info)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"product\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(product)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"premium\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(premium));\n    buf.append('}');\n    return buf.toString();\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code FxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  public static final class Meta extends DirectMetaBean {\n    static final Meta INSTANCE = new Meta();\n\n    private final MetaProperty<TradeInfo> info = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"info\", FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class, TradeInfo.class);\n    private final MetaProperty<FxEuropeanOption> product = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"product\", FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class, FxEuropeanOption.class);\n    private final MetaProperty<AdjustablePayment> premium = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"premium\", FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class, AdjustablePayment.class);\n    private final Map<String, MetaProperty<?>> metaPropertyMap$ = new DirectMetaPropertyMap(\n        this, null,\n        \"info\",\n        \"product\",\n        \"premium\");\n\n    private Meta() {\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    protected MetaProperty<?> metaPropertyGet(String propertyName) {\n      switch (propertyName.hashCode()) {\n        case 3237038:  // info\n          return info;\n        case -309474065:  // product\n          return product;\n        case -318452137:  // premium\n          return premium;\n      }\n      return super.metaPropertyGet(propertyName);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Builder builder() {\n      return new FxEuropeanOptionTrade.Builder();\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Class<? extends FxEuropeanOptionTrade> beanType() {\n      return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Map<String, MetaProperty<?>> metaPropertyMap() {\n public MetaProperty<AdjustablePayment> premium() {\n      return premium;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    protected Object propertyGet(Bean bean, String propertyName, boolean quiet) {\n      switch (propertyName.hashCode()) {\n        case 3237038:  // info\n          return ((FxEuropeanOptionTrade) bean).getInfo();\n        case -309474065:  // product\n          return ((FxEuropeanOptionTrade) bean).getProduct();\n        case -318452137:  // premium\n          return ((FxEuropeanOptionTrade) bean).getPremium();\n      }\n      return super.propertyGet(bean, propertyName, quiet);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    protected void propertySet(Bean bean, String propertyName, Object newValue, boolean quiet) {\n      metaProperty(propertyName);\n      if (quiet) {\n        return;\n      }\n      throw new UnsupportedOperationException(\"Property cannot be written: \" + propertyName);\n    }\n\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * The bean-builder for {@code FxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  public static final class Builder extends DirectFieldsBeanBuilder<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> {\n\n    private TradeInfo info;\n    private FxEuropeanOption product;\n    private AdjustablePayment premium;\n\n    private Builder() {\n      applyDefaults(this);\n    }\n\n    private Builder(FxEuropeanOptionTrade beanToCopy) {\n      this.info = beanToCopy.getInfo();\n      this.product = beanToCopy.getProduct();\n      this.premium = beanToCopy.getPremium();\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Object get(String propertyName) {\n      switch (propertyName.hashCode()) {\n        case 3237038:  // info\n          return info;\n        case -309474065:  // product\n          return product;\n        case -318452137:  // premium\n propertyName, Object newValue) {\n      switch (propertyName.hashCode()) {\n        case 3237038:  // info\n          this.info = (TradeInfo) newValue;\n          break;\n        case -309474065:  // Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker.inOrderOrEqual;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.NoSuchElementException;\n\nimport org.joda.beans.Bean;\nimport org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableValidator;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.ResolvedProduct;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PutCall;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\n\n/**\n * A European FX option, resolved for pricing.\n * <p>\n * This is the resolved form of {@link FxEuropeanOption} and is an input to the pricers.\n * Applications will typically create a {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOption} from a {@code FxEuropeanOption}\n * using {@link FxEuropeanOption#resolve(ReferenceData)}.\n * <p>\n * A {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOption} is bound to data that changes over time, such as holiday calendars.\n * If the data changes, such as the addition of a new holiday, the resolved form will not be updated.\n * Care must be taken when placing the resolved form in a cache or persistence layer.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class ResolvedFxEuropeanOption\n    implements ResolvedProduct, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the option is long or short.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, the long party will have the option to enter in this transaction;\n   * the short party will, at the option of the long party, potentially enter into the inverse transaction.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LongShort longShort;\n  /**\n   * The expiry date-time of the option.\n   * <p>\n   * The option is European, and can only be exercised on the expiry date.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ZonedDateTime expiry;\n  /**\n   * The underlying foreign exchange transaction.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, if the option is in the money, this foreign exchange will occur.\n   * A call option permits the transaction as specified to occur.\n   * A put option permits the inverse transaction to occur.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ResolvedFxSingle underlying;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableValidator\n  private void validate() {\n    inOrderOrEqual(expiry.toLocalDate(), underlying.getPaymentDate(), \"expiry.date\", \"underlying.paymentDate\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets currency pair of the base currency and counter currency.\n   * <p>\n   * This currency pair is conventional, thus indifferent to the direction of FX.\n   *\n   * @return the currency pair\n   */\n  public CurrencyPair getCurrencyPair() {\n    return underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Gets the expiry date of the option.\n   *\n   * @return the expiry date\n   */\n  public LocalDate getExpiryDate() {\n    return expiry.toLocalDate();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Gets the strike rate.\n   *\n   * @return the strike\n   */\n  public double getStrike() {\n    return Math.abs(underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() /\n        underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Returns the put/call flag.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the put/call for the base currency.\n   * If the amount for the base currency is positive, the option is a call on the base currency (put on counter currency).\n   * If the amount for the base currency is negative, the option is a put on the base currency (call on counter currency).\n   *\n   * @return the put or call\n   */\n  public PutCall getPutCall() {\n    return underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() > 0d ? PutCall.PUT : PutCall.CALL;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Get the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\n   *\n   * @return the counter currency\n   */\n  public Currency getCounterCurrency() {\n    return underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOption}.\n   * @return the meta-bean, not null\n   */\n  public static ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.Meta meta() {\n    return ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  static {\n    MetaBean.register(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * The serialization version id.\n   */\n  private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n   * @return the builder, not null\n   */\n  public static ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.Builder builder() {\n    return new ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.Builder();\n  }\n\n  private ResolvedFxEuropeanOption(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      ZonedDateTime expiry,\n      ResolvedFxSingle underlying) {\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(longShort, \"longShort\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(expiry, \"expiry\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(underlying, \"underlying\");\n    this.longShort = longShort;\n    this.expiry = expiry;\n    this.underlying = underlying;\n    validate();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.Meta metaBean() {\n    return ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public LongShort getLongShort() {\n    return longShort;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public ZonedDateTime getExpiry() {\n    return expiry;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public ResolvedFxSingle getUnderlying() {\n    return underlying;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public Builder toBuilder() {\n    return new Builder(this);\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public boolean equals(Object obj) {\n    if (obj == this) {\n      return true;\n    }\n    if (obj != null && obj.getClass() == this.getClass()) {\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption other = (ResolvedFxEuropeanOption) obj;\n      return JodaBeanUtils.equal(longShort, other.longShort) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(expiry, other.expiry) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(underlying, other.underlying);\n    }\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public int hashCode() {\n    int hash = getClass().hashCode();\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(longShort);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(expiry);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(underlying);\n    return hash;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String toString() {\n    StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(128);\n   "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker.inOrderOrEqual;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.NoSuchElementException;\n\nimport org.joda.beans.Bean;\nimport org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableValidator;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.ResolvedProduct;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PutCall;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\n\n/**\n * A European FX option, resolved for pricing.\n * <p>\n * This is the resolved form of {@link FxEuropeanOption} and is an input to the pricers.\n * Applications will typically create a {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOption} from a {@code FxEuropeanOption}\n * using {@link FxEuropeanOption#resolve(ReferenceData)}.\n * <p>\n * A {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOption} is bound to data that changes over time, such as holiday calendars.\n * If the data changes, such as the addition of a new holiday, the resolved form will not be updated.\n * Care must be taken when placing the resolved form in a cache or persistence layer.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class ResolvedFxEuropeanOption\n    implements ResolvedProduct, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the option is long or short.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, the long party will have the option to enter in this transaction;\n   * the short party will, at the option of the long party, potentially enter into the inverse transaction.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LongShort longShort;\n  /**\n   * The expiry date-time of the option.\n   * <p>\n   * The option is European, and can only be exercised on the expiry date.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ZonedDateTime expiry;\n  /**\n   * The underlying foreign exchange transaction.\n   * <p>\n   * At expiry, if the option is in the money, this foreign exchange will occur.\n   * A call option permits the transaction as specified to occur.\n   * A put option permits the inverse transaction to occur.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ResolvedFxSingle underlying;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableValidator\n  private void validate() {\n    inOrderOrEqual(expiry.toLocalDate(), underlying.getPaymentDate(), \"expiry.date\", \"underlying.paymentDate\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets currency pair of the base currency and counter currency.\n   * <p>\n   * This currency pair is conventional, thus indifferent to the direction of FX.\n   *\n   * @return the currency pair\n   */\n  public CurrencyPair getCurrencyPair() {\n    return underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Gets the expiry date of the option.\n   *\n   * @return the expiry date\n   */\n  public LocalDate getExpiryDate() {\n    return expiry.toLocalDate();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Gets the strike rate.\n   *\n   * @return the strike\n   */\n  public double getStrike() {\n    return Math.abs(underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() /\n        underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Returns the put/call flag.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the put/call for the base currency.\n   * If the amount for the base currency is positive, the option is a call on the base currency (put on counter currency).\n   * If the amount for the base currency is negative, the option is a put on the base currency (call on counter currency).\n   *\n   * @return the put or call\n   */\n  public PutCall getPutCall() {\n    return underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() > 0d ? PutCall.PUT : PutCall.CALL;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Get the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\n   *\n   * @return the counter currency\n   */\n  public Currency getCounterCurrency() {\n    return underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOption}.\n   * @return the meta-bean, not null\n   */\n  public static ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.Meta meta() {\n    return ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  static {\n    MetaBean.register(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * The serialization version id.\n   */\n  private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n   * @return the builder, not null\n   */\n  public static ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.Builder builder() {\n    return new ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.Builder();\n  }\n\n  private ResolvedFxEuropeanOption(\n      LongShort longShort,\n      ZonedDateTime expiry,\n      ResolvedFxSingle underlying) {\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(longShort, \"longShort\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(expiry, \"expiry\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(underlying, \"underlying\");\n    this.longShort = longShort;\n    this.expiry = expiry;\n    this.underlying = underlying;\n    validate();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.Meta metaBean() {\n    return ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public LongShort getLongShort() {\n    return longShort;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public ZonedDateTime getExpiry() {\n    return expiry;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public ResolvedFxSingle getUnderlying() {\n    return underlying;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public Builder toBuilder() {\n    return new Builder(this);\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public boolean equals(Object obj) {\n    if (obj == this) {\n      return true;\n    }\n    if (obj != null && obj.getClass() == this.getClass()) {\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption other = (ResolvedFxEuropeanOption) obj;\n      return JodaBeanUtils.equal(longShort, other.longShort) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(expiry, other.expiry) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(underlying, other.underlying);\n    }\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public int hashCode() {\n    int hash = getClass().hashCode();\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(longShort);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(expiry);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(underlying);\n    return hash;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String toString() {\n    StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(128);\n    buf.append(\"ResolvedFxEuropeanOption{\");\n    buf.append(\"longShort\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(longShort)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"expiry\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(expiry)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"underlying\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(underlying));\n    buf.append('}');\n    return buf.toString();\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOption}.\n {
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.NoSuchElementException;\n\nimport org.joda.beans.Bean;\nimport org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableDefaults;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.ResolvedTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\n\n/**\n * A trade in a European FX option, resolved for pricing.\n * <p>\n * This is the resolved form of {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade} and is the primary input to the pricers.\n * Applications will typically create a {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} from a {@code FxEuropeanOptionTrade}\n * using {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade#resolve(ReferenceData)}.\n * <p>\n * A {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} is bound to data that changes over time, such as holiday calendars.\n * If the data changes, such as the addition of a new holiday, the resolved form will not be updated.\n * Care must be taken when placing the resolved form in a cache or persistence layer.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade\n    implements ResolvedTrade, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * The additional trade information, defaulted to an empty instance.\n   * <p>\n   * This allows additional information to be attached to the trade.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\", overrideGet = true)\n  private final TradeInfo info;\n  /**\n   * The resolved European FX option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The product captures the contracted financial details of the trade.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\", overrideGet = true)\n  private final ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product;\n  /**\n   * The premium of the FX option.\n   * <p>\n   * The premium sign should be compatible with the product Long/Short flag.\n   * This means that the premium is negative for long and positive for short.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final Payment premium;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableDefaults\n  private static void applyDefaults(Builder builder) {\n    builder.info = TradeInfo.empty();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   * @return the meta-bean, not null\n   */\n  public static ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta meta() {\n    return ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  static {\n    MetaBean.register(ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * The serialization version id.\n   */\n  private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n   * @return the builder, not null\n   */\n  public static ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Builder builder() {\n    return new ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Builder();\n  }\n\n  private ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade(\n      TradeInfo info,\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product,\n      Payment premium) {\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(info, \"info\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(product, \"product\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(premium, \"premium\");\n    this.info = info;\n    this.product = product;\n    this.premium = premium;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta metaBean() {\n    return ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public TradeInfo getInfo() {\n    return info;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedFxEuropeanOption getProduct() {\n    return product;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public Payment getPremium() {\n    return premium;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public Builder toBuilder() {\n    return new Builder(this);\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public boolean equals(Object obj) {\n    if (obj == this) {\n      return true;\n    }\n    if (obj != null && obj.getClass() == this.getClass()) {\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade other = (ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade) obj;\n      return JodaBeanUtils.equal(info, other.info) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(product, other.product) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(premium, other.premium);\n    }\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public int hashCode() {\n    int hash = getClass().hashCode();\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(info);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(product);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(premium);\n    return hash;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String toString() {\n    StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(128);\n    buf.append(\"ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade{\");\n    buf.append(\"info\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(info)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"product\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(product)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"premium\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(premium));\n    buf.append('}');\n    return buf.toString();\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  public static final class Meta extends DirectMetaBean {\n    static final Meta INSTANCE = new Meta();\n\n    private final MetaProperty<TradeInfo> info = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"info\", ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.class, TradeInfo.class);\n    private final MetaProperty<ResolvedFxEuropeanOption> product = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"product\", ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.class, ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.class);\n    private final MetaProperty<Payment> premium = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"premium\",
