  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.NoSuchElementException;\n\nimport org.joda.beans.Bean;\nimport org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableDefaults;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.ResolvedTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\n\n/**\n * A trade in a European FX option, resolved for pricing.\n * <p>\n * This is the resolved form of {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade} and is the primary input to the pricers.\n * Applications will typically create a {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} from a {@code FxEuropeanOptionTrade}\n * using {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade#resolve(ReferenceData)}.\n * <p>\n * A {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} is bound to data that changes over time, such as holiday calendars.\n * If the data changes, such as the addition of a new holiday, the resolved form will not be updated.\n * Care must be taken when placing the resolved form in a cache or persistence layer.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade\n    implements ResolvedTrade, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * The additional trade information, defaulted to an empty instance.\n   * <p>\n   * This allows additional information to be attached to the trade.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\", overrideGet = true)\n  private final TradeInfo info;\n  /**\n   * The resolved European FX option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The product captures the contracted financial details of the trade.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\", overrideGet = true)\n  private final ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product;\n  /**\n   * The premium of the FX option.\n   * <p>\n   * The premium sign should be compatible with the product Long/Short flag.\n   * This means that the premium is negative for long and positive for short.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final Payment premium;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableDefaults\n  private static void applyDefaults(Builder builder) {\n    builder.info = TradeInfo.empty();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   * @return the meta-bean, not null\n   */\n  public static ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta meta() {\n    return ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  static {\n    MetaBean.register(ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * The serialization version id.\n   */\n  private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n   * @return the builder, not null\n   */\n  public static ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Builder builder() {\n    return new ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Builder();\n  }\n\n  private ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade(\n      TradeInfo info,\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product,\n      Payment premium) {\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(info, \"info\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(product, \"product\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(premium, \"premium\");\n    this.info = info;\n    this.product = product;\n    this.premium = premium;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta metaBean() {\n    return ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public TradeInfo getInfo() {\n    return info;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedFxEuropeanOption getProduct() {\n    return product;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public Payment getPremium() {\n    return premium;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  public Builder toBuilder() {\n    return new Builder(this);\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public boolean equals(Object obj) {\n    if (obj == this) {\n      return true;\n    }\n    if (obj != null && obj.getClass() == this.getClass()) {\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade other = (ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade) obj;\n      return JodaBeanUtils.equal(info, other.info) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(product, other.product) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(premium, other.premium);\n    }\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public int hashCode() {\n    int hash = getClass().hashCode();\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(info);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(product);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(premium);\n    return hash;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String toString() {\n    StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(128);\n    buf.append(\"ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade{\");\n    buf.append(\"info\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(info)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"product\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(product)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"premium\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(premium));\n    buf.append('}');\n    return buf.toString();\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  public static final class Meta extends DirectMetaBean {\n    static final Meta INSTANCE = new Meta();\n\n    private final MetaProperty<TradeInfo> info = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"info\", ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.class, TradeInfo.class);\n    private final MetaProperty<ResolvedFxEuropeanOption> product = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"product\", ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.class, ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.class);\n    private final MetaProperty<Payment> premium = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"premium\", ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.class, Payment.class);\n    private final Map<String, MetaProperty<?>> metaPropertyMap$ = new DirectMetaPropertyMap(\n        this, null,\n        \"info\",\n        \"product\",\n        \"premium\");\n\n    private Meta() {\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    protected MetaProperty<?> metaPropertyGet(String propertyName) {\n      switch (propertyName.hashCode()) {\n        case 3237038:  // info\n          return info;\n        case -309474065:  // product\n          return product;\n        case -318452137:  // premium\n          return premium;\n      }\n      return super.metaPropertyGet(propertyName);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Builder builder() {\n      return new ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Builder();\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Class<? extends ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade> beanType() {\n      return ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.class;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Map<String, MetaProperty<?>> metaPropertyMap() {\n      return metaPropertyMap$;\n    }\n\n    public MetaProperty<TradeInfo> info() {\n      return info;\n    }\n\n    public MetaProperty<ResolvedFxEuropeanOption> product() {\n      return product;\n    }\n\n    public MetaProperty<Payment> premium() {\n      return premium;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    protected Object propertyGet(Bean bean, String propertyName, boolean quiet) {\n      switch (propertyName.hashCode()) {\n        case 3237038:  // info\n          return ((ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade) bean).getInfo();\n        case -309474065:  // product\n          return ((ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade) bean).getProduct();\n        case -318452137:  // premium\n          return ((ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade) bean).getPremium();\n      }\n      return super.propertyGet(bean, propertyName, quiet);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    protected void propertySet(Bean bean, String propertyName, Object newValue, boolean quiet) {\n      metaProperty(propertyName);\n      if (quiet) {\n        return;\n      }\n      throw new UnsupportedOperationException(\"Property cannot be written: \" + propertyName);\n    }\n\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * The bean-builder for {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  public static final class Builder extends DirectFieldsBeanBuilder<ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade> {\n\n    private TradeInfo info;\n    private ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product;\n    private Payment premium;\n\n    private Builder() {\n      applyDefaults(this);\n    }\n\n    private Builder(ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade beanToCopy) {\n      this.info = beanToCopy.getInfo();\n      this.product = beanToCopy.getProduct();\n      this.premium = beanToCopy.getPremium();\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Object get(String propertyName) {\n      switch (propertyName.hashCode()) {\n        case 3237038:  // info\n          return info;\n        case -309474065:  // product\n          return product;\n        case -318452137:  // premium\n          return premium;\n        default:\n          throw new NoSuchElementException(\"Unknown property: \" + propertyName);\n      }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Builder set(String propertyName, Object newValue) {\n      switch (propertyName.hashCode()) {\n        case 3237038:  // info\n          this.info = (TradeInfo) newValue;\n          break;\n        case -309474065:  // product\n          this.product = (ResolvedFxEuropeanOption) newValue;\n          break;\n        case -318452137:  // premium\n          this.premium = (Payment) newValue;\n          break;\n        default:\n          throw new NoSuchElementException(\"Unknown property: \" + propertyName);\n      }\n      return this;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Builder set(MetaProperty<?> property, Object value) {\n      super.set(property, value);\n      return this;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade build() {\n      return new ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade(\n          info,\n          product,\n          premium);\n    }\n\n    public Builder info(TradeInfo info) {\n      JodaBeanUtils.notNull(info, \"info\");\n      this.info = info;\n      return this;\n    }\n\n    public Builder product(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product) {\n      JodaBeanUtils.notNull(product, \"product\");\n      this.product = product;\n      return this;\n    }\n\n    public Builder premium(Payment premium) {\n      JodaBeanUtils.notNull(premium, \"premium\");\n      this.premium = premium;\n      return this;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public String toString() {\n      StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(128);\n      buf.append(\"ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.Builder{\");\n      buf.append(\"info\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(info)).append(',').append(' ');\n 48. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.value.ValueDerivatives;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for foreign exchange European option transaction products with a lognormal model.\n * <p>\n * This function provides the ability to price an {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOption}.\n * <p>\n * All of the computation is be based on the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\n * For example, price, PV and risk measures of the product will be expressed in USD for an option on EUR/USD.\n */\npublic class BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer DEFAULT =\n      new BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer(DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Underlying FX pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param fxPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingle}\n   */\n  public BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer(\n      DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer) {\n    this.fxPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(fxPricer, \"fxPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Returns the pricer used to price the underlying FX product.\n   *\n   * @return the pricer\n   */\n  DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer getDiscountingFxSingleProductPricer() {\n    return fxPricer;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the price of the product\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    double forwardPrice = undiscountedPrice(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    return discountFactor * forwardPrice;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * price);\n  }\n\n  // the price without discounting\n  private double undiscountedPrice(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n      return isCall ? Math.max(forwardRate - strikeRate, 0d) : Math.max(0d, strikeRate - forwardRate);\n    }\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    return BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the delta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the delta of the product\n   */\n  public double delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    double fwdDelta = undiscountedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n    return fwdDelta * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value delta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value delta of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueDelta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * delta);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivities.empty();\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    double fwdDelta = undiscountedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double notional = signedNotional(option);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder fwdSensi = fxPricer.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider)\n        .multipliedBy(notional * discountFactor * fwdDelta);\n    double fwdPrice = undiscountedPrice(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder dscSensi = ratesProvider.discountFactors(option.getCounterCurrency())\n        .zeroRatePointSensitivity(underlying.getPaymentDate()).multipliedBy(notional * fwdPrice);\n    return fwdSensi.combinedWith(dscSensi).build().convertedTo(option.getCounterCurrency(), ratesProvider);\n  }\n\n  // the delta without discounting\n  private double undiscountedDelta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n      return isCall ? (forwardRate > strikeRate ? 1d : 0d) : (strikeRate > forwardRate ? -1d : 0d);\n    }\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    return BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the smile adjusted delta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the delta of the product\n   */\n  public double smileAdjustedDelta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        isCall ? underlying : underlying.inverse(),\n        ratesProvider);\n    if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n      double forwardDelta = isCall ? (forwardRate > strikeRate ? 1d : 0d) : (strikeRate > forwardRate ? -1d : 0d);\n      return discountFactor * forwardDelta * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives volatilityDerivatives = volatilities.firstPartialDerivatives(\n        strikePair,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        strikeRate,\n        forwardRate);\n    double fwdVega = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(\n        forwardRate,\n        strikeRate,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        volatilityDerivatives.getValue());\n    double fwdDelta = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(\n        forwardRate,\n        strikeRate,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        volatilityDerivatives.getValue(),\n        isCall);\n    return (fwdDelta + fwdVega * volatilityDerivatives.getDerivative(2)) * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the gamma of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the gamma of the product\n   */\n  public double gamma(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(\n        strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    double forwardGamma = BlackFormulaRepository.gamma(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n    return forwardGamma * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value gamma of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value gamma of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueGamma(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double gamma = gamma(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * gamma);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the vega of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the vega of the product\n   */\n  public double vega(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    double fwdVega = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    return discountFactor * fwdVega;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value vega of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value vega of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueVega(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double vega = vega(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * vega);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    CurrencyAmount valueVega = presentValueVega(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n        volatilities.getName(),\n        strikePair,\n        volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()),\n        option.getStrike(),\n        forward.fxRate(strikePair),\n        valueVega.getCurrency(),\n        valueVega.getAmount());\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the Black theta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the theta of the product\n   */\n  public double theta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(\n        strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    double fwdTheta = BlackFormulaRepository.driftlessTheta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    return discountFactor * fwdTheta;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value theta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value theta of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueTheta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double theta = theta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * theta);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the forward exchange rate.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @return the forward rate\n   */\n  public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n    return fxPricer.forwardFxRate(option.getUnderlying(), ratesProvider);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the implied Black volatility of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the implied volatility of the product\n   * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the option has expired\n   */\n  public double impliedVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"valuation is after option's expiry.\");\n    }\n    FxRate forward = forwardFxRate(option, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\n    return volatilities.volatility(\n        strikePair, option.getExpiry(), option.getStrike(), forward.fxRate(strikePair));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return currencyExposureFromDelta(delta, option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange European option product, with smile adjustment included.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double delta = smileAdjustedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return currencyExposureFromDelta(delta, option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n  }\n\n  private MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposureFromDelta(\n      double delta,\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\n    double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double spot = ratesProvider.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n    CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(strikePair.getCounter(), (price - delta * spot) * signedNotional);\n    CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(strikePair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\n  private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option) {\n    return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\n        Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java"
}
Output
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.value.ValueDerivatives;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for foreign exchange European option transaction products with a lognormal model.\n * <p>\n * This function provides the ability to price an {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOption}.\n * <p>\n * All of the computation is be based on the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\n * For example, price, PV and risk measures of the product will be expressed in USD for an option on EUR/USD.\n */\npublic class BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer DEFAULT =\n      new BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer(DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Underlying FX pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param fxPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingle}\n   */\n  public BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer(\n      DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer fxPricer) {\n    this.fxPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(fxPricer, \"fxPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Returns the pricer used to price the underlying FX product.\n   *\n   * @return the pricer\n   */\n  DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer getDiscountingFxSingleProductPricer() {\n    return fxPricer;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the price of the product\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    double forwardPrice = undiscountedPrice(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    return discountFactor * forwardPrice;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * price);\n  }\n\n  // the price without discounting\n  private double undiscountedPrice(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n      return isCall ? Math.max(forwardRate - strikeRate, 0d) : Math.max(0d, strikeRate - forwardRate);\n    }\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    return BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the delta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the delta of the product\n   */\n  public double delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    double fwdDelta = undiscountedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n    return fwdDelta * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value delta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value delta of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueDelta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * delta);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivities.empty();\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    double fwdDelta = undiscountedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double notional = signedNotional(option);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder fwdSensi = fxPricer.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider)\n        .multipliedBy(notional * discountFactor * fwdDelta);\n    double fwdPrice = undiscountedPrice(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder dscSensi = ratesProvider.discountFactors(option.getCounterCurrency())\n        .zeroRatePointSensitivity(underlying.getPaymentDate()).multipliedBy(notional * fwdPrice);\n    return fwdSensi.combinedWith(dscSensi).build().convertedTo(option.getCounterCurrency(), ratesProvider);\n  }\n\n  // the delta without discounting\n  private double undiscountedDelta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n      return isCall ? (forwardRate > strikeRate ? 1d : 0d) : (strikeRate > forwardRate ? -1d : 0d);\n    }\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    return BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the smile adjusted delta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the delta of the product\n   */\n  public double smileAdjustedDelta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    boolean isCall = option.getPutCall().isCall();\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        isCall ? underlying : underlying.inverse(),\n        ratesProvider);\n    if (timeToExpiry == 0d) {\n      double forwardDelta = isCall ? (forwardRate > strikeRate ? 1d : 0d) : (strikeRate > forwardRate ? -1d : 0d);\n      return discountFactor * forwardDelta * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives volatilityDerivatives = volatilities.firstPartialDerivatives(\n        strikePair,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        strikeRate,\n        forwardRate);\n    double fwdVega = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(\n        forwardRate,\n        strikeRate,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        volatilityDerivatives.getValue());\n    double fwdDelta = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(\n        forwardRate,\n        strikeRate,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        volatilityDerivatives.getValue(),\n        isCall);\n    return (fwdDelta + fwdVega * volatilityDerivatives.getDerivative(2)) * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the gamma of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the gamma of the product\n   */\n  public double gamma(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(\n        strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    double forwardGamma = BlackFormulaRepository.gamma(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    double fwdRateSpotSensitivity = fxPricer.forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        option.getPutCall().isCall() ? underlying : underlying.inverse(), ratesProvider);\n    return forwardGamma * discountFactor * fwdRateSpotSensitivity * fwdRateSpotSensitivity;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value gamma of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value gamma of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueGamma(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double gamma = gamma(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * gamma);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the vega of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the vega of the product\n   */\n  public double vega(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    double fwdVega = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    return discountFactor * fwdVega;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value vega of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value vega of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueVega(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double vega = vega(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * vega);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    CurrencyAmount valueVega = presentValueVega(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n        volatilities.getName(),\n        strikePair,\n        volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry()),\n        option.getStrike(),\n        forward.fxRate(strikePair),\n        valueVega.getCurrency(),\n        valueVega.getAmount());\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the Black theta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the theta of the product\n   */\n  public double theta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlying = option.getUnderlying();\n    FxRate forward = fxPricer.forwardFxRate(underlying, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = underlying.getCurrencyPair();\n    double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(\n        strikePair, option.getExpiry(), strikeRate, forwardRate);\n    double fwdTheta = BlackFormulaRepository.driftlessTheta(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n    double discountFactor = ratesProvider.discountFactor(option.getCounterCurrency(), underlying.getPaymentDate());\n    return discountFactor * fwdTheta;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value theta of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value theta of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueTheta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double theta = theta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(option.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(option) * theta);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the forward exchange rate.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @return the forward rate\n   */\n  public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n    return fxPricer.forwardFxRate(option.getUnderlying(), ratesProvider);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the implied Black volatility of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the implied volatility of the product\n   * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the option has expired\n   */\n  public double impliedVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(option.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"valuation is after option's expiry.\");\n    }\n    FxRate forward = forwardFxRate(option, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\n    return volatilities.volatility(\n        strikePair, option.getExpiry(), option.getStrike(), forward.fxRate(strikePair));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange European option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return currencyExposureFromDelta(delta, option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the foreign exchange European option product, with smile adjustment included.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double delta = smileAdjustedDelta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return currencyExposureFromDelta(delta, option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n  }\n\n  private MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposureFromDelta(\n      double delta,\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\n    double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double spot = ratesProvider.fxRate(strikePair);\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(option);\n    CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(strikePair.getCounter(), (price - delta * spot) * signedNotional);\n    CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(strikePair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\n  private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option) {\n    return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\n        Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}
49. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for FX European option trades with a lognormal model.\n * <p>\n * This function provides the ability to price an {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n */\npublic class BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer DEFAULT = new BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT,\n      DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\n   */\n  private final BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer productPricer;\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link Payment}.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param productPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOption}\n   * @param paymentPricer  the pricer for {@link Payment}\n   */\n  public BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer productPricer,\n      DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer) {\n    this.productPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(productPricer, \"productPricer\");\n    this.paymentPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(paymentPricer, \"paymentPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the trade\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(pvProduct).plus(pvPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the trade\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    PointSensitivities pvcsProduct =\n        productPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    PointSensitivities pvcsPremium = paymentPricer.presentValueSensitivity(premium, ratesProvider).build();\n    return pvcsProduct.combinedWith(pvcsPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.currencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the smile adjusted currency exposure of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the delta of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the delta\n   */\n  public double delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.delta(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the current cash of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\n   * @return the current cash amount\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount currentCash(ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade, LocalDate valuationDate) {\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    if (premium.getDate().equals(valuationDate)) {\n      return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), premium.getAmount());\n    }\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), 0d);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the forward exchange rate.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @return the forward rate\n   */\n  public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.forwardFxRate(product, ratesProvider);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the implied Black volatility of the foreign exchange European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the implied volatility of the product\n   * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the option has expired\n   */\n  public double impliedVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.impliedVolatility(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.java"
}
Output
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for FX European option trades with a lognormal model.\n * <p>\n * This function provides the ability to price an {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n */\npublic class BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer DEFAULT = new BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT,\n      DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\n   */\n  private final BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer productPricer;\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link Payment}.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param productPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOption}\n   * @param paymentPricer  the pricer for {@link Payment}\n   */\n  public BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer productPricer,\n      DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer) {\n    this.productPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(productPricer, \"productPricer\");\n    this.paymentPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(paymentPricer, \"paymentPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the trade\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(pvProduct).plus(pvPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the trade\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    PointSensitivities pvcsProduct =\n        productPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    PointSensitivities pvcsPremium = paymentPricer.presentValueSensitivity(premium, ratesProvider).build();\n    return pvcsProduct.combinedWith(pvcsPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.currencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the smile adjusted currency exposure of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the delta of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the delta\n   */\n  public double delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.delta(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the current cash of the FX European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\n   * @return the current cash amount\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount currentCash(ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade, LocalDate valuationDate) {\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    if (premium.getDate().equals(valuationDate)) {\n      return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), premium.getAmount());\n    }\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), 0d);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the forward exchange rate.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @return the forward rate\n   */\n  public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.forwardFxRate(product, ratesProvider);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the implied Black volatility of the foreign exchange European option trade.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the implied volatility of the product\n   * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the option has expired\n   */\n  public double impliedVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.impliedVolatility(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.java",
  "originalFile": null,
