52. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport java.util.Optional;\n\nimport org.joda.convert.FromString;\nimport org.joda.convert.ToString;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.CalculationTarget;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.CalculationRules;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationParameter;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.named.EnumNames;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.named.NamedEnum;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * The method to use for pricing FX European options.\n * <p>\n * This provides the ability to use different methods for pricing FX options.\n * The Black and Vanna-Volga methods are supported.\n * <p>\n * This enum implements {@link CalculationParameter} and is used by passing it\n * as an argument to {@link CalculationRules}. It provides the link between the\n * data that the function needs and the data that is available in {@link ScenarioMarketData}.\n * <p>\n * Implementations of this interface must be immutable.\n */\npublic enum FxEuropeanOptionMethod implements NamedEnum, CalculationParameter {\n\n  /**\n   * The Black (lognormal) model.\n   * This uses Black volatilities - {@link BlackFxOptionVolatilities}.\n   */\n  BLACK,\n  /**\n   * The Vanna-Volga model.\n   * This uses Black volatilities based on a smile - {@link BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}.\n   */\n  VANNA_VOLGA;\n\n  // helper for name conversions\n  private static final EnumNames<FxEuropeanOptionMethod> NAMES = EnumNames.of(FxEuropeanOptionMethod.class);\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance from the specified name.\n   * <p>\n   * Parsing handles the mixed case form produced by {@link #toString()} and\n   * the upper and lower case variants of the enum constant name.\n   *\n   * @param name  the name to parse\n   * @return the type\n   * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the name is not known\n   */\n  @FromString\n  public static FxEuropeanOptionMethod of(String name) {\n    return NAMES.parse(name);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Optional<CalculationParameter> filter(CalculationTarget target, Measure measure) {\n    if (target instanceof FxEuropeanOptionTrade) {\n      return Optional.of(this);\n    }\n    return Optional.empty();\n  };\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Returns the formatted name of the type.\n   *\n   * @return the formatted string representing the type\n   */\n  @ToString\n  @Override\n  public String toString() {\n    return NAMES.format(this);\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionMethod.java"
}
Output
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport java.util.Optional;\n\nimport org.joda.convert.FromString;\nimport org.joda.convert.ToString;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.CalculationTarget;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.CalculationRules;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationParameter;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.named.EnumNames;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.named.NamedEnum;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * The method to use for pricing FX European options.\n * <p>\n * This provides the ability to use different methods for pricing FX options.\n * The Black and Vanna-Volga methods are supported.\n * <p>\n * This enum implements {@link CalculationParameter} and is used by passing it\n * as an argument to {@link CalculationRules}. It provides the link between the\n * data that the function needs and the data that is available in {@link ScenarioMarketData}.\n * <p>\n * Implementations of this interface must be immutable.\n */\npublic enum FxEuropeanOptionMethod implements NamedEnum, CalculationParameter {\n\n  /**\n   * The Black (lognormal) model.\n   * This uses Black volatilities - {@link BlackFxOptionVolatilities}.\n   */\n  BLACK,\n  /**\n   * The Vanna-Volga model.\n   * This uses Black volatilities based on a smile - {@link BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}.\n   */\n  VANNA_VOLGA;\n\n  // helper for name conversions\n  private static final EnumNames<FxEuropeanOptionMethod> NAMES = EnumNames.of(FxEuropeanOptionMethod.class);\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance from the specified name.\n   * <p>\n   * Parsing handles the mixed case form produced by {@link #toString()} and\n   * the upper and lower case variants of the enum constant name.\n   *\n   * @param name  the name to parse\n   * @return the type\n   * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the name is not known\n   */\n  @FromString\n  public static FxEuropeanOptionMethod of(String name) {\n    return NAMES.parse(name);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Optional<CalculationParameter> filter(CalculationTarget target, Measure measure) {\n    if (target instanceof FxEuropeanOptionTrade) {\n      return Optional.of(this);\n    }\n    return Optional.empty();\n  };\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Returns the formatted name of the type.\n   *\n   * @return the formatted string representing the type\n   */\n  @ToString\n  @Override\n  public String toString() {\n    return NAMES.format(this);\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionMethod.java",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}
53. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkBlackVolatilities;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkVannaVolgaVolatilities;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Multi-scenario measure calculations for FX European option trades.\n * <p>\n * Each method corresponds to a measure, typically calculated by one or more calls to the pricer.\n */\nfinal class FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations DEFAULT = new FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n  /**\n   * The market quote sensitivity calculator.\n   */\n  private static final MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator MARKET_QUOTE_SENS = MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator.DEFAULT;\n  /**\n   * One basis point, expressed as a {@code double}.\n   */\n  private static final double ONE_BASIS_POINT = 1e-4;\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer;\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Black\n   * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Vanna-Volga\n   */\n  FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\n    this.blackPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(blackPricer, \"blackPricer\");\n    this.vannaVolgaPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(vannaVolgaPricer, \"vannaVolgaPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates present value for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> presentValue(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // present value for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated sum PV01 for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // calibrated sum PV01 for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return paramSens.total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // calibrated bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return paramSens.multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates market quote sum PV01 for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // market quote sum PV01 for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates market quote bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // market quote bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  // point sensitivity\n  private CurrencyParameterSensitivities pointSensitivity(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    PointSensitivities pointSens;\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      pointSens = vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n          trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      pointSens = blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n          trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n    return ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates vega (present value volatility sensitivities) for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // vega for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities blackSmileVols = checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities);\n      PointSensitivities pointSens =\n          vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackSmileVols);\n      return blackSmileVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n    } else {\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities blackVols = checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities);\n      PointSensitivities pointSens =\n          blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackVols);\n      return blackVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates currency exposure for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> currencyExposure(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // currency exposure for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates delta for all scenarios\n  DoubleScenarioArray delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return DoubleScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> delta(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // delta for one scenario\n  double delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      throw new IllegalArgumentException(\n          \"FX European option Vanna Volga pricer does not currently support delta calculation\");\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.delta(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates current cash for all scenarios\n  CurrencyScenarioArray currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> currentCash(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).getValuationDate(),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // current cash for one scenario\n  CurrencyAmount currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      LocalDate valuationDate,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\n    }\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.java"
}
Output
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkBlackVolatilities;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkVannaVolgaVolatilities;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Multi-scenario measure calculations for FX European option trades.\n * <p>\n * Each method corresponds to a measure, typically calculated by one or more calls to the pricer.\n */\nfinal class FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations DEFAULT = new FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n  /**\n   * The market quote sensitivity calculator.\n   */\n  private static final MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator MARKET_QUOTE_SENS = MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator.DEFAULT;\n  /**\n   * One basis point, expressed as a {@code double}.\n   */\n  private static final double ONE_BASIS_POINT = 1e-4;\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer;\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Black\n   * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Vanna-Volga\n   */\n  FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\n    this.blackPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(blackPricer, \"blackPricer\");\n    this.vannaVolgaPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(vannaVolgaPricer, \"vannaVolgaPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates present value for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> presentValue(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // present value for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated sum PV01 for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // calibrated sum PV01 for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return paramSens.total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // calibrated bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return paramSens.multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates market quote sum PV01 for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // market quote sum PV01 for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates market quote bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // market quote bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  // point sensitivity\n  private CurrencyParameterSensitivities pointSensitivity(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    PointSensitivities pointSens;\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      pointSens = vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n          trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      pointSens = blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n          trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n    return ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates vega (present value volatility sensitivities) for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // vega for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities blackSmileVols = checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities);\n      PointSensitivities pointSens =\n          vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackSmileVols);\n      return blackSmileVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n    } else {\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities blackVols = checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities);\n      PointSensitivities pointSens =\n          blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackVols);\n      return blackVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates currency exposure for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> currencyExposure(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // currency exposure for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates delta for all scenarios\n  DoubleScenarioArray delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return DoubleScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> delta(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // delta for one scenario\n  double delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      throw new IllegalArgumentException(\n          \"FX European option Vanna Volga pricer does not currently support delta calculation\");\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.delta(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates current cash for all scenarios\n  CurrencyScenarioArray currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> currentCash(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).getValuationDate(),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // current cash for one scenario\n  CurrencyAmount currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      LocalDate valuationDate,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\n    }\n  }\n\n}\n",

  "originalFile": null,

54. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport java.util.HashMap;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableMap;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationFunction;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationParameters;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.FunctionRequirements;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.FailureReason;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.Result;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.Measures;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Perform calculations on an FX European option trade for each of a set of scenarios.\n * <p>\n * This uses Black FX option volatilities, which must be specified using {@link FxOptionMarketDataLookup}.\n * An instance of {@link RatesMarketDataLookup} must also be specified.\n * <p>\n * Two pricing methods are available, 'Black' and 'VannaVolga'.\n * By default, 'Black' will be used. To control the method, pass an instance of\n * {@link FxEuropeanOptionMethod} in the calculation parameters.\n * <p>\n * The supported built-in measures are:\n * <ul>\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM PV01 calibrated sum on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED PV01 calibrated bucketed on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM PV01 market quote sum on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED PV01 market quote bucketed on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENCY_EXPOSURE Currency exposure}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENT_CASH Current cash}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED Vega market quote bucketed on volatility curves/surfaces}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved trade}\n * </ul>\n * <p>\n * The \"natural\" currency is the market convention base currency of the underlying FX.\n */\npublic class FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction\n    implements CalculationFunction<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The calculations by measure.\n   */\n  private static final ImmutableMap<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation> CALCULATORS =\n      ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\n          .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::presentValue)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.CURRENCY_EXPOSURE, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currencyExposure)\n          .put(Measures.OPTION_DELTA, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::delta)\n          .put(Measures.CURRENT_CASH, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currentCash)\n          .put(Measures.VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::vegaMarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, m, meth) -> rt)\n          .build();\n\n  private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   */\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Class<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> targetType() {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(FxEuropeanOptionTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair().getBase();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FunctionRequirements requirements(\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // extract data from product\n    FxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = product.getCurrencyPair();\n\n    // use lookup to build requirements\n    RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FunctionRequirements ratesReqs = ratesLookup.requirements(\n        ImmutableSet.of(currencyPair.getBase(), currencyPair.getCounter()));\n    FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FunctionRequirements optionReqs = optionLookup.requirements(currencyPair);\n    return ratesReqs.combinedWith(optionReqs);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // expand the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n    RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData = ratesLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n    FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData = optionLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n    FxEuropeanOptionMethod method = parameters.findParameter(FxEuropeanOptionMethod.class).orElse(FxEuropeanOptionMethod.BLACK);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // calculate one measure\n  private Result<?> calculate(\n      Measure measure,\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\n    if (calculator == null) {\n      return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for FxEuropeanOptionTrade: {}\", measure);\n    }\n    return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @FunctionalInterface\n  interface SingleMeasureCalculation {\n    public abstract Object calculate(\n        ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n        RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n        FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n        FxEuropeanOptionMethod method);\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java"
}
Output
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport java.util.HashMap;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableMap;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationFunction;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationParameters;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.FunctionRequirements;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.FailureReason;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.Result;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.Measures;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Perform calculations on an FX European option trade for each of a set of scenarios.\n * <p>\n * This uses Black FX option volatilities, which must be specified using {@link FxOptionMarketDataLookup}.\n * An instance of {@link RatesMarketDataLookup} must also be specified.\n * <p>\n * Two pricing methods are available, 'Black' and 'VannaVolga'.\n * By default, 'Black' will be used. To control the method, pass an instance of\n * {@link FxEuropeanOptionMethod} in the calculation parameters.\n * <p>\n * The supported built-in measures are:\n * <ul>\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM PV01 calibrated sum on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED PV01 calibrated bucketed on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM PV01 market quote sum on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED PV01 market quote bucketed on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENCY_EXPOSURE Currency exposure}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENT_CASH Current cash}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED Vega market quote bucketed on volatility curves/surfaces}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved trade}\n * </ul>\n * <p>\n * The \"natural\" currency is the market convention base currency of the underlying FX.\n */\npublic class FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction\n    implements CalculationFunction<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The calculations by measure.\n   */\n  private static final ImmutableMap<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation> CALCULATORS =\n      ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\n          .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::presentValue)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.CURRENCY_EXPOSURE, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currencyExposure)\n          .put(Measures.OPTION_DELTA, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::delta)\n          .put(Measures.CURRENT_CASH, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currentCash)\n          .put(Measures.VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::vegaMarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, m, meth) -> rt)\n          .build();\n\n  private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   */\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Class<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> targetType() {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(FxEuropeanOptionTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair().getBase();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FunctionRequirements requirements(\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // extract data from product\n    FxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = product.getCurrencyPair();\n\n    // use lookup to build requirements\n    RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FunctionRequirements ratesReqs = ratesLookup.requirements(\n        ImmutableSet.of(currencyPair.getBase(), currencyPair.getCounter()));\n    FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FunctionRequirements optionReqs = optionLookup.requirements(currencyPair);\n    return ratesReqs.combinedWith(optionReqs);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // expand the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n    RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData = ratesLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n    FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData = optionLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n    FxEuropeanOptionMethod method = parameters.findParameter(FxEuropeanOptionMethod.class).orElse(FxEuropeanOptionMethod.BLACK);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // calculate one measure\n  private Result<?> calculate(\n      Measure measure,\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\n    if (calculator == null) {\n      return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for FxEuropeanOptionTrade: {}\", measure);\n    }\n    return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @FunctionalInterface\n  interface SingleMeasureCalculation {\n    public abstract Object calculate(\n        ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n        RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n        FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n        FxEuropeanOptionMethod method);\n  }\n\n}\n",

Input
{
  "path": "modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations.java",
