  buf.append(\\\"FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder{\\\");\\n506:       buf.append(\\\"underlyingOption\\\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(underlyingOption)).append(',').append(' ');\\n507:       buf.append(\\\"barrier\\\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(barrier)).append(',').append(' ');\\n508:       buf.append(\\\"rebate\\\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(rebate));\\n509:       buf.append('}');\\n510:       return buf.toString();\\n511:     }\\n512: \\n513:   }\\n514: \\n515:   //-------------------------- AUTOGENERATED END --------------------------\\n516: }\\n517: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxSingleBarrierOption.java\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\n7: \n8: import java.io.Serializable;\n9: import java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n10: import java.util.Map;\n11: import java.util.NoSuchElementException;\n12: import java.util.Optional;\n13: \n14: import org.joda.beans.Bean;\n15: import org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\n16: import org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\n17: import org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\n18: import org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\n19: import org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\n20: import org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableValidator;\n21: import org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\n22: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\n23: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\n24: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\n25: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n26: \n27: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.Resolvable;\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\n32: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxOptionProduct;\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\n34: \n35: /**\n36:  * FX (European) single barrier option.\n37:  * <p>\n38:  * An FX option is a financial instrument that provides an option to exchange two currencies at a specified future time\n39:  * only when barrier event occurs (knock-in option) or does not occur (knock-out option).\n40:  * <p>\n41:  * Depending on the barrier defined in {@link Barrier}, the options are classified into four types: up-and-in,\n42:  * down-and-in, up-and-out and down-and-out.\n43:  * <p>\n44:  * For example, an up-and-out call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange with barrier of 1.5 is the option to\n45:  * perform a foreign exchange on the expiry date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00, only when EUR/USD rate does\n46:  * not exceed 1.5 during the barrier event observation period.\n47:  * <p>\n48:  * In case of the occurrence (non-occurrence for knock-in options) of the barrier event, the option becomes worthless,\n49:  * or alternatively, a rebate is made.\n50:  */\n51: @BeanDefinition\n52: public final class FxSingleBarrierOption\n53:     implements FxOptionProduct, Resolvable<ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n54: \n55:   /**\n56:    * The underlying FX vanilla option.\n57:    */\n58:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n59:   private final FxVanillaOption underlyingOption;\n60:   /**\n61:    * The barrier description.\n62:    * <p>\n63:    * The barrier level stored in this field must be represented based on the direction of the currency pair in the\n64:    * underlying FX transaction.\n65:    * <p>\n66:    * For example, if the underlying option is an option on EUR/GBP, the barrier should be a certain level of EUR/GBP rate.\n67:    */\n68:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n69:   private final Barrier barrier;\n70:   /**\n71:    * For a 'out' option, the amount is paid when the barrier is reached;\n72:    * for a 'in' option, the amount is paid at expiry if the barrier is not reached.\n73:    * <p>\n74:    * This is the notional amount represented in one of the currency pair.\n75:    * The amount should be positive.\n76:    */\n77:   @PropertyDefinition(get = \"optional\")\n78:   private final CurrencyAmount rebate;\n79: \n80:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n81:   /**\n82:    * Obtains FX single barrier option with rebate.\n83:    *\n84:    * @param underlyingOption  the underlying FX vanilla option\n85:    * @param barrier  the barrier\n86:    * @param rebate  the rebate\n87:    * @return the instance\n88:    */\n89:   public static FxSingleBarrierOption of(FxVanillaOption underlyingOption, Barrier barrier, CurrencyAmount rebate) {\n90:     return new FxSingleBarrierOption(underlyingOption, barrier, rebate);\n91:   }\n92: \n93:   /**\n94:    * Obtains FX single barrier option without rebate.\n95:    *\n96:    * @param underlyingOption  the underlying FX vanilla option\n97:    * @param barrier  the barrier\n98:    * @return the instance\n99:    */\n100:   public static FxSingleBarrierOption of(FxVanillaOption underlyingOption, Barrier barrier) {\n101:     return new FxSingleBarrierOption(underlyingOption, barrier, null);\n102:   }\n103: \n104:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n105:   @ImmutableValidator\n106:   private void validate() {\n107:     if (rebate != null) {\n108:       ArgChecker.isTrue(rebate.getAmount() > 0d, \"rebate must be positive\");\n109:       ArgChecker.isTrue(underlyingOption.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair().contains(rebate.getCurrency()),\n110:           \"The rebate currency must be one of underlying currency pair\");\n111:     }\n112:   }\n113: \n114:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n115:   /**\n116:    * Gets currency pair of the base currency and counter currency.\n117:    * <p>\n118:    * This currency pair is conventional, thus indifferent to the direction of FX.\n119:    *\n120:    * @return the currency pair\n121:    */\n122:   @Override\n123:   public CurrencyPair getCurrencyPair() {\n124:     return underlyingOption.getCurrencyPair();\n125:   }\n126: \n127:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n128:   /**\n129:    * Gets the underlying Fx vanilla option's expiry.\n130:    * @return the expiry\n131:    */\n132:   @Override\n133:   public ZonedDateTime getExpiry() {\n134:     return underlyingOption.getExpiry();\n135:   }\n136: \n137:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n138:   @Override\n139:   public ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n140:     if (rebate != null) {\n141:       return ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(underlyingOption.resolve(refData), barrier, rebate);\n142:     }\n143:     return ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(underlyingOption.resolve(refData), barrier);\n144:   }\n145: \n146:   //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n147:   /**\n148:    * The meta-bean for {@code FxSingleBarrierOption}.\n149:    * @return the meta-bean, not null\n150:    */\n151:   public static FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta meta() {\n152:     return FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n153:   }\n154: \n155:   static {\n156:     MetaBean.register(FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta.INSTANCE);\n157:   }\n158: \n159:   /**\n160:    * The serialization version id.\n161:    */\n162:   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n163: \n164:   /**\n165:    * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n166:    * @return the builder, not null\n167:    */\n168:   public static FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder builder() {\n169:     return new FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder();\n170:   }\n171: \n172:   private FxSingleBarrierOption(\n173:       FxVanillaOption underlyingOption,\n174:       Barrier barrier,\n175:       CurrencyAmount rebate) {\n176:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(underlyingOption, \"underlyingOption\");\n177:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(barrier, \"barrier\");\n178:     this.underlyingOption = underlyingOption;\n179:     this.barrier = barrier;\n180:     this.rebate = rebate;\n181:     validate();\n182:   }\n183: \n184:   @Override\n185:   public FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta metaBean() {\n186:     return FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n187:   }\n188: \n189:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n190:   /**\n191:    * Gets the underlying FX vanilla option.\n192:    * @return the value of the property, not null\n193:    */\n194:   public FxVanillaOption getUnderlyingOption() {\n195:     return underlyingOption;\n196:   }\n197: \n198:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n199:   /**\n200:    * Gets the barrier description.\n201:    * <p>\n202:    * The barrier level stored in this field must be represented based on the direction of the currency pair in the\n203:    * underlying FX transaction.\n204:    * <p>\n205:    * For example, if the underlying option is an option on EUR/GBP, the barrier should be a certain level of EUR/GBP rate.\n206:    * @return the value of the property, not null\n207:    */\n208:   public Barrier getBarrier() {\n209:     return barrier;\n210:   }\n211: \n212:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n213:   /**\n214:    * Gets for a 'out' option, the amount is paid when the barrier is reached;\n215:    * for a 'in' option, the amount is paid at expiry if the barrier is not reached.\n216:    * <p>\n217:    * This is the notional amount represented in one of the currency pair.\n218:    * The amount should be positive.\n219:    * @return the optional value of the property, not null\n220:    */\n221:   public Optional<CurrencyAmount> getRebate() {\n222:     return Optional.ofNullable(rebate);\n223:   }\n224: \n225:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n226:   /**\n227:    * Returns a builder that allows this bean to be mutated.\n228:    * @return the mutable builder, not null\n229:    */\n230:   public Builder toBuilder() {\n231:     return new Builder(this);\n232:   }\n233: \n234:   @Override\n235:   public boolean equals(Object obj) {\n236:     if (obj == this) {\n237:       return true;\n238:     }\n239:     if (obj != null && obj.getClass() == this.getClass()) {\n240:       FxSingleBarrierOption other = (FxSingleBarrierOption) obj;\n241:       return JodaBeanUtils.equal(underlyingOption, other.underlyingOption) &&\n242:           JodaBeanUtils.equal(barrier, other.barrier) &&\n243:           JodaBeanUtils.equal(rebate, other.rebate);\n244:     }\n245:     return false;\n246:   }\n247: \n248:   @Override\n249:   public int hashCode() {\n250:     int hash = getClass().hashCode();\n251:     hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(underlyingOption);\n252:     hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(barrier);\n253:     hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(rebate);\n254:     return hash;\n255:   }\n256: \n257:   @Override\n258:   public String toString() {\n259:     StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(128);\n260:     buf.append(\"FxSingleBarrierOption{\");\n261:     buf.append(\"underlyingOption\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(underlyingOption)).append(',').append(' ');\n262:     buf.append(\"barrier\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(barrier)).append(',').append(' ');\n263:     buf.append(\"rebate\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(rebate));\n264:     buf.append('}');\n265:     return buf.toString();\n266:   }\n267: \n268:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n269:   /**\n270:    * The meta-bean for {@code FxSingleBarrierOption}.\n271:    */\n272:   public static final class Meta extends DirectMetaBean {\n273:     /**\n274:      * The singleton instance of the meta-bean.\n275:      */\n276:     static final Meta INSTANCE = new Meta();\n277: \n278:     /**\n279:      * The meta-property for the {@code underlyingOption} property.\n280:      */\n281:     private final MetaProperty<FxVanillaOption> underlyingOption = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n282:         this, \"underlyingOption\", FxSingleBarrierOption.class, FxVanillaOption.class);\n283:     /**\n284:      * The meta-property for the {@code barrier} property.\n285:      */\n286:     private final MetaProperty<Barrier> barrier = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n287:         this, \"barrier\", FxSingleBarrierOption.class, Barrier.class);\n288:     /**\n289:      * The meta-property for the {@code rebate} property.\n290:      */\n291:     private final MetaProperty<CurrencyAmount> rebate = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n292:         this, \"rebate\", FxSingleBarrierOption.class, CurrencyAmount.class);\n293:     /**\n294:      * The meta-properties.\n295:      */\n296:     private final Map<String, MetaProperty<?>> metaPropertyMap$ = new DirectMetaPropertyMap(\n297:         this, null,\n298:         \"underlyingOption\",\n299:         \"barrier\",\n300:   "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2017 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.product;\\n7: \\n8: import org.joda.convert.FromString;\\n9: \\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.TypedString;\\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.named.Described;\\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.Bill;\\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.BondFuture;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.BondFutureOption;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.CapitalIndexedBond;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.FixedCouponBond;\\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.IborCapFloor;\\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.OvernightInArrearsCapFloor;\\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.product.cms.Cms;\\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.Cds;\\n22: import com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsIndex;\\n23: import com.opengamma.strata.product.deposit.TermDeposit;\\n24: import com.opengamma.strata.product.dsf.Dsf;\\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.product.etd.EtdFutureSecurity;\\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.product.etd.EtdOptionSecurity;\\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fra.Fra;\\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxNdf;\\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSwap;\\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\\n32: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;\\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.product.index.IborFuture;\\n34: import com.opengamma.strata.product.index.IborFutureOption;\\n35: import com.opengamma.strata.product.index.OvernightFuture;\\n36: import com.opengamma.strata.product.index.OvernightFutureOption;\\n37: import com.opengamma.strata.product.payment.BulletPayment;\\n38: import com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.Swap;\\n39: import com.opengamma.strata.product.swaption.Swaption;\\n40: \\n41: /**\\n42:  * The type of a portfolio item.\\n43:  * <p>\\n44:  * This provides a classification of the trade or position.\\n45:  */\\n46: public final class ProductType\\n47:     extends TypedString<ProductType>\\n48:     implements Described {\\n49: \\n50:   /**\\n51:    * A {@link BulletPayment}.\\n52:    */\\n53:   public static final ProductType BULLET_PAYMENT = ProductType.of(\\\"BulletPayment\\\", \\\"Payment\\\");\\n54:   /**\\n55:    * A {@link Bill}.\\n56:    */\\n57:   public static final ProductType BILL = ProductType.of(\\\"Bill\\\");\\n58:   /**\\n59:    * A {@link FixedCouponBond} or {@link CapitalIndexedBond}.\\n60:    */\\n61:   public static final ProductType BOND = ProductType.of(\\\"Bond\\\");\\n62:   /**\\n63:    * A {@link BondFuture}.\\n64:    */\\n65:   public static final ProductType BOND_FUTURE = ProductType.of(\\\"BondFuture\\\", \\\"Bond Future\\\");\\n66:   /**\\n67:    * A {@link BondFutureOption}.\\n68:    */\\n69:   public static final ProductType BOND_FUTURE_OPTION = ProductType.of(\\\"BondFutureOption\\\", \\\"Bond com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;\\n32: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\\n34: \\n35: /**\\n36:  * Handles the CSV files format for FX Single Barrier Option trades.\\n37:  */\\n38: public class FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> {\\n39: \\n40:   /**\\n41:    * The singleton instance of the plugin.\\n42:    */\\n43:   public static final FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\\n44: \\n45:   /**\\n46:    * The CSV headers.\\n47:    */\\n48:   public static final Set<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.<String>builder()\\n49:       .addAll(FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.headers(ImmutableList.of()))\\n50:       .add(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD)\\n51:       .add(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD)\\n52:       .add(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD)\\n53:       .add(REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD)\\n54:       .add(REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD)\\n55:       .add(REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD)\\n56:       .build();\\n57: \\n58:   /**\\n59:    * Restricted constructor\\n60:    */\\n61:   private FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\\n62:   }\\n63: \\n64:   @Override\\n65:   public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\\n66:     return ImmutableSet.of(\\\"FXSINGLEBARRIEROPTION\\\", \\\"FX SINGLE BARRIER OPTION\\\");\\n67:   }\\n68: \\n69:   @Override\\n70:   public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\\n71:       Class<?> requiredJavaType,\\n72:       CsvRow baseRow,\\n73:       List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\\n74:       TradeInfo info,\\n75:       TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\\n76: \\n77:     if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class)) {\\n78:       return Optional.of(parse(baseRow, info, resolver));\\n79:     }\\n80:     return Optional.empty();\\n81:   }\\n82: \\n83:   private FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade parse(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\\n84:     FxVanillaOptionTrade vanillaOptionTrade = resolver.parseFxVanillaOptionTrade(row, info);\\n85:     Barrier barrier = CsvLoaderUtils.parseBarrierFromDefaultFields(row);\\n86: \\n87:     FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder productBuilder = FxSingleBarrierOption.builder()\\n88:         .underlyingOption(vanillaOptionTrade.getProduct())\\n89:         .barrier(barrier);\\n90: \\n91:     CsvLoaderUtils.tryParseCurrencyAmountWithDirection(\\n92:         row,\\n93:         REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\\n94:         REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\\n95:         REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD\\n96:     ).ifPresent(productBuilder::rebate);\\n97: \\n98:     FxVanillaOption option = vanillaOptionTrade.getProduct();\\n99:     return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.builder()\\n100:         .product(productBuilder.build())\\n101:         .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\\n102:             .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, option.getExpiryDate())))\\n103:         .info(info)\\n104:         .build();\\n105:   }\\n106: \\n107:   @Override\\n108:   public String getName() {\\n109:     return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\\n110:   }\\n111: \\n112:   @Override\\n113:   public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\\n114:     return ImmutableSet.of(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class);\\n115:   }\\n116: \\n117:   @Override\\n118:   public Set<String> headers(List<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> trades) {\\n119:     return HEADERS;\\n120:   }\\n121: \\n122:   @Override\\n123:   public void writeCsv(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade trade) {\\n124:     csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \\\"FxSingleBarrierOption\\\");\\n125:     writeSingleBarrierOption(csv, trade.getProduct());\\n126:     CsvWriterUtils.writePremiumFields(csv, trade.getPremium());\\n127:     csv.writeNewLine();\\n128:   }\\n129: \\n130:   void writeSingleBarrierOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxSingleBarrierOption product) {\\n131:     CsvWriterUtils.writeFxVanillaOption(csv, product.getUnderlyingOption());\\n132:     CsvWriterUtils.writeBarrier(csv, product.getBarrier(), LocalDate.now(ZoneId.systemDefault()));\\n133:     product.getRebate().ifPresent(ccyAmount -> CsvWriterUtils.writeCurrencyAmount(\\n134:         csv,\\n135:         ccyAmount,\\n136:         REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\\n137:         REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\\n138:         REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD));\\n139:   }\\n140: }\\n141: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java\"}",

    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2021 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n7: \n8: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD;\n9: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD;\n10: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD;\n11: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD;\n12: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD;\n13: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD;\n14: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\n15: \n16: import java.time.LocalDate;\n17: import java.time.ZoneId;\n18: import java.util.List;\n19: import java.util.Optional;\n20: import java.util.Set;\n21: \n22: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\n23: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\n24: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;\n32: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\n34: \n35: /**\n36:  * Handles the CSV files format for FX Single Barrier Option trades.\n37:  */\n38: public class FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> {\n39: \n40:   /**\n41:    * The singleton instance of the plugin.\n42:    */\n43:   public static final FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\n44: \n45:   /**\n46:    * The CSV headers.\n47:    */\n48:   public static final Set<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.<String>builder()\n49:       .addAll(FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.headers(ImmutableList.of()))\n50:       .add(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD)\n51:       .add(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD)\n52:       .add(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD)\n53:       .add(REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD)\n54:       .add(REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD)\n55:       .add(REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD)\n56:       .build();\n57: \n58:   /**\n59:    * Restricted constructor\n60:    */\n61:   private FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\n62:   }\n63: \n64:   @Override\n65:   public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\n66:     return ImmutableSet.of(\"FXSINGLEBARRIEROPTION\", \"FX SINGLE BARRIER OPTION\");\n67:   }\n68: \n69:   @Override\n70:   public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\n71:       Class<?> requiredJavaType,\n72:       CsvRow baseRow,\n73:       List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\n74:       TradeInfo info,\n75:       TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n76: \n77:     if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class)) {\n78:       return Optional.of(parse(baseRow, info, resolver));\n79:     }\n80:     return Optional.empty();\n81:   }\n82: \n83:   private FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade parse(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n84:     FxVanillaOptionTrade vanillaOptionTrade = resolver.parseFxVanillaOptionTrade(row, info);\n85:     Barrier barrier = CsvLoaderUtils.parseBarrierFromDefaultFields(row);\n86: \n87:     FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder productBuilder = FxSingleBarrierOption.builder()\n88:         .underlyingOption(vanillaOptionTrade.getProduct())\n89:         .barrier(barrier);\n90: \n91:     CsvLoaderUtils.tryParseCurrencyAmountWithDirection(\n92:         row,\n93:         REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n94:         REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n95:         REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD\n96:     ).ifPresent(productBuilder::rebate);\n97: \n98:     FxVanillaOption option = vanillaOptionTrade.getProduct();\n99:     return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.builder()\n100:         .product(productBuilder.build())\n101:         .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\n102:             .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, option.getExpiryDate())))\n103:         .info(info)\n104:         .build();\n105:   }\n106: \n107:   @Override\n108:   public String getName() {\n109:     return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\n110:   }\n111: \n112:   @Override\n113:   public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\n114:     return ImmutableSet.of(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class);\n115:   }\n116: \n117:   @Override\n118:   public Set<String> headers(List<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> trades) {\n119:     return HEADERS;\n120:   }\n121: \n122:   @Override\n123:   public void writeCsv(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade trade) {\n124:     csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"FxSingleBarrierOption\");\n125:     writeSingleBarrierOption(csv, trade.getProduct());\n126:     CsvWriterUtils.writePremiumFields(csv, trade.getPremium());\n127:     csv.writeNewLine();\n128:   }\n129: \n130:   void writeSingleBarrierOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxSingleBarrierOption product) {\n131:     CsvWriterUtils.writeFxVanillaOption(csv, product.getUnderlyingOption());\n132:     CsvWriterUtils.writeBarrier(csv, product.getBarrier(), LocalDate.now(ZoneId.systemDefault()));\n133:     product.getRebate().ifPresent(ccyAmount -> CsvWriterUtils.writeCurrencyAmount(\n134:         csv,\n135:         ccyAmount,\n136:         REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n137:         REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n138:         REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD));\n139:   }\n140: }\n141: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java"
  }
}

  "content": "{\"content\":\"150:   }\\n151: \\n152:   /**\\n153:    * Write the FxSingle to CSV\\n154:    *\\n155:    * @param csv  the csv row output\\n156:    * @param prefix  a prefix to use on leg headers (often far / near)\\n157:    * @param product  the fx single\\n158:    */\\n159:   public static void writeFxSingle(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, String prefix, FxSingle product) {\\n160:     FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxSingle(csv, prefix, product);\\n161:   }\\n162: \\n163:   /**\\n164:    * Write a FxVanillaOption to CSV\\n165:    *\\n166:    * @param csv  the csv row output\\n167:    * @param product  the product\\n168:    */\\n169:   public static void writeFxVanillaOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxVanillaOption product) {\\n170:     FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxVanillaOption(csv, product);\\n171:   }\\n172: \\n173:   /**\\n174:    * Write a Swap to CSV\\n175:    *\\n176:    * @param csv  the csv row output\\n177:    * @param product  the swap to write\\n178:    */\\n179:   public static void writeSwap(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Swap product) {\\n180:     FullSwapTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeProduct(csv, product);\\n181:   }\\n182: \\n183:   /**\\n184:    * Write a SecurityQuantityTrade to CSV\\n185:    *\\n186:    * @param csv  the csv row output\\n187:    * @param trade  the security quantity trade\\n188:    */\\n189:   public static void writeSecurityQuantityTrade(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, SecurityQuantityTrade trade) {\\n190:     csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \\\"Security\\\");\\n191:     csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_SCHEME_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getScheme());\\n192:     csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getValue());\\n193:     csv.writeCell(BUY_SELL_FIELD, trade.getQuantity() < 0 ? BuySell.SELL : BuySell.BUY);\\n194:     csv.writeCell(QUANTITY_FIELD, Math.abs(trade.getQuantity()));\\n195:     csv.writeCell(PRICE_FIELD, trade.getPrice());\\n196:   }\\n197: \\n198: }\\n199: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/CsvWriterUtils.java%3FL150-210\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "150:   }\n151: \n152:   /**\n153:    * Write the FxSingle to CSV\n154:    *\n155:    * @param csv  the csv row output\n156:    * @param prefix  a prefix to use on leg headers (often far / near)\n157:    * @param product  the fx single\n158:    */\n159:   public static void writeFxSingle(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, String prefix, FxSingle product) {\n160:     FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxSingle(csv, prefix, product);\n161:   }\n162: \n163:   /**\n164:    * Write a FxVanillaOption to CSV\n165:    *\n166:    * @param csv  the csv row output\n167:    * @param product  the product\n168:    */\n169:   public static void writeFxVanillaOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxVanillaOption product) {\n170:     FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxVanillaOption(csv, product);\n171:   }\n172: \n173:   /**\n174:    * Write a Swap to CSV\n175:    *\n176:    * @param csv  the csv row output\n177:    * @param product  the swap to write\n178:    */\n179:   public static void writeSwap(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Swap product) {\n180:     FullSwapTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeProduct(csv, product);\n181:   }\n182: \n183:   /**\n184:    * Write a SecurityQuantityTrade to CSV\n185:    *\n186:    * @param csv  the csv row output\n187:    * @param trade  the security quantity trade\n188:    */\n189:   public static void writeSecurityQuantityTrade(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, SecurityQuantityTrade trade) {\n190:     csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"Security\");\n191:     csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_SCHEME_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getScheme());\n192:     csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getValue());\n193:     csv.writeCell(BUY_SELL_FIELD, trade.getQuantity() < 0 ? BuySell.SELL : BuySell.BUY);\n194:     csv.writeCell(QUANTITY_FIELD, Math.abs(trade.getQuantity()));\n195:     csv.writeCell(PRICE_FIELD, trade.getPrice());\n196:   }\n197: \n198: }\n199: ",

com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DaysAdjustment;\\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.HolidayCalendarId;\\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.HolidayCalendarIds;\\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.index.FxIndex;\\n21: import import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOption;\\n36: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier;\\n37: \\n38: /**\\n39:  * Pricer for FX barrier option products in Black-Scholes world.\\n40:  * <p>\\n41:  * This function provides the ability to price an {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\\n42:  * <p>\\n43:  * All the computation is based on the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\\n44:  * For example, price, PV and risk measures of the product will be expressed in USD for an option on EUR/USD.\\n45:  */\\n46: public class BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer {\\n47: \\n48:   /**\\n49:    * Default implementation.\\n50:    */\\n51:   public static final BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer DEFAULT = new BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer();\\n52: \\n53:   /**\\n54:    * Pricer for barrier option without rebate.\\n55:    */\\n56:   private static final BlackBarrierPriceFormulaRepository BARRIER_PRICER = new BlackBarrierPriceFormulaRepository();\\n57:   /**\\n58:    * Pricer for rebate.\\n59:    */\\n60:   private static final BlackOneTouchAssetPriceFormulaRepository ASSET_REBATE_PRICER =\\n61:       new BlackOneTouchAssetPriceFormulaRepository();\\n62:   /**\\n63:    * Pricer for rebate.\\n64:    */\\n65:   private static final BlackOneTouchCashPriceFormulaRepository CASH_REBATE_PRICER =\\n66:       new BlackOneTouchCashPriceFormulaRepository();\\n67:   /**\\n68:    * Pricer for underlying vanilla option.\\n69:    */\\n70:   private static final BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER =\\n71:       BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT;\\n72: \\n73:   /**\\n74:    * Creates an instance.\\n75:    */\\n76:   public BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer() {\\n77:   }\\n78: \\n79:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n80:   /**\\n81: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java%3FL1-80\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n7: \n8: import java.time.LocalDate;\n9: import java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n10: \n11: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DaysAdjustment;\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.HolidayCalendarId;\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.HolidayCalendarIds;\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.index.FxIndex;\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.value.ValueDerivatives;\n22: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\n23: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.array.DoubleArray;\n24: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountFactors;\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.ZeroRateSensitivity;\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackBarrierPriceFormulaRepository;\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackOneTouchAssetPriceFormulaRepository;\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackOneTouchCashPriceFormulaRepository;\n32: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\n34: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\n35: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxVanillaOption;\n36: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier;\n37: \n38: /**\n39:  * Pricer for FX barrier option products in Black-Scholes world.\n40:  * <p>\n41:  * This function provides the ability to price an {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\n42:  * <p>\n43:  * All the computation is based on the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\n44:  * For example, price, PV and risk measures of the product will be expressed in USD for an option on EUR/USD.\n45:  */\n46: public class BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer {\n47: \n48:   /**\n49:    * Default implementation.\n50:    */\n51:   public static final BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer DEFAULT = new BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer();\n52: \n53:   /**\n54:    * Pricer for barrier option without rebate.\n55:    */\n56:   private static final BlackBarrierPriceFormulaRepository BARRIER_PRICER = new BlackBarrierPriceFormulaRepository();\n57:   /**\n58:    * Pricer for rebate.\n59:    */\n60:   private static final BlackOneTouchAssetPriceFormulaRepository ASSET_REBATE_PRICER =\n61:       new BlackOneTouchAssetPriceFormulaRepository();\n62:   /**\n63:    * Pricer for rebate.\n64:    */\n65:   private static final BlackOneTouchCashPriceFormulaRepository CASH_REBATE_PRICER =\n66:       new BlackOneTouchCashPriceFormulaRepository();\n67:   /**\n68:    * Pricer for underlying vanilla option.\n69:    */\n70:   private static final BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER =\n71:       BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT;\n72: \n73:   /**\n74:    * Creates an instance.\n75:    */\n76:   public BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer() {\n77:   }\n78: \n79:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n80:   /**\n81: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java%3FL1-80"
  }
}

66. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Calculates pricing and risk measures for FX European option trades.\n * <p>\n * This provides a high-level entry point for FX European option pricing and risk measures.\n * Pricing is performed using the Black method.\n * <p>\n * Each method takes a {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}, whereas application code will\n * typically work with {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade}. Call\n * {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade#resolve(com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData) FxEuropeanOptionTrade::resolve(ReferenceData)}\n * to convert {@code FxEuropeanOptionTrade} to {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n */\npublic class FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations DEFAULT = new FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations calc;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   * <p>\n   * In most cases, applications should use the {@link #DEFAULT} instance.\n   *\n   * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Black\n   * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Vanna-Volga\n   */\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\n    this.calc = new FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(blackPricer, vannaVolgaPricer);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value across one or more scenarios.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.presentValue(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value for a single set of market data.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value vega sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to the implied volatilities\n   * used to calibrate the curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value vega sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value of the implied volatilities\n   * used to calibrate the curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public CurrencyParameterSensitivities vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates currency exposure across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * The currency risk, expressed as the equivalent amount in each currency.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the currency exposure, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.currencyExposure(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates currency exposure for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * The currency risk, expressed as the equivalent amount in each currency.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates current cash across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * The sum of all cash flows paid on the valuation date.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the current cash, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public CurrencyScenarioArray currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.currentCash(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates current cash for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * The sum of all cash flows paid on the valuation date.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the current cash\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.currentCash(trade, ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), method);\n  }\n\n}\n",

{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Calculates pricing and risk measures for FX European option trades.\n * <p>\n * This provides a high-level entry point for FX European option pricing and risk measures.\n * Pricing is performed using the Black method.\n * <p>\n * Each method takes a {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}, whereas application code will\n * typically work with {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade}. Call\n * {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade#resolve(com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData) FxEuropeanOptionTrade::resolve(ReferenceData)}\n * to convert {@code FxEuropeanOptionTrade} to {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n */\npublic class FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations DEFAULT = new FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations calc;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   * <p>\n   * In most cases, applications should use the {@link #DEFAULT} instance.\n   *\n   * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Black\n   * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Vanna-Volga\n   */\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\n    this.calc = new FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(blackPricer, vannaVolgaPricer);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value across one or more scenarios.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.presentValue(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value for a single set of market data.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value vega sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to the implied volatilities\n   * used to calibrate the curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value vega sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value of the implied volatilities\n   * used to calibrate the curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public CurrencyParameterSensitivities vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates currency exposure across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * The currency risk, expressed as the equivalent amount in each currency.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the currency exposure, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.currencyExposure(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates current cash across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * The sum of all cash flows paid on the valuation date.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the entry per scenario\n   */\n  public CurrencyScenarioArray currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n date.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the current cash\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n
