67. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2019 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_2_NOTIONAL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LONG_SHORT_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PUT_CALL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.STRIKE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.LocalTime;\nimport java.time.ZoneId;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.BusinessDayAdjustment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.loader.LoaderUtils;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PutCall;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingleTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Handles the CSV file format for FX European option trades.\n */\nclass FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The singleton instance of the plugin.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\n\n  /** The headers. */\n  private static final ImmutableSet<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.of(\n      LONG_SHORT_FIELD,\n      PUT_CALL_FIELD,\n      STRIKE_FIELD,\n      EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD,\n      EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD,\n      EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD,\n      PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD,\n      PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n      PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD,\n      PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD,\n      PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n      PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n      LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n      LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD,\n      LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n      PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD,\n      PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n      PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD);\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(\"FXEUROPEANOPTION\", \"FX EUROPEAN OPTION\");\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\n      Class<?> requiredJavaType,\n      CsvRow baseRow,\n      List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\n      TradeInfo info,\n      TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n\n    if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class)) {\n      return Optional.of(resolver.parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(baseRow, info));\n    }\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String getName() {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Parses the data from a CSV row.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row object\n   * @param info  the trade info object\n   * @param resolver  the resolver used to parse additional information\n   * @return the parsed trade\n   */\n  static FxEuropeanOptionTrade parse(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n    if (row.findValue(PUT_CALL_FIELD).isPresent()) {\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade = parseRow(row, info);\n      return resolver.completeTrade(row, trade);\n    }\n    FxSingleTrade singleTrade = FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.parseRow(row, info);\n    FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade = parseRow(row, info, singleTrade.getProduct());\n    return resolver.completeTrade(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  // parses the trade from the underlying FX single\n  private static FxEuropeanOptionTrade parseRow(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, FxSingle underlying) {\n    LongShort longShort = row.getValue(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseLongShort);\n    LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n    LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseTime);\n    ZoneId expiryZone = row.getValue(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseZoneId);\n\n    FxEuropeanOption option = FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n        .longShort(longShort)\n        .expiryDate(expiryDate)\n        .expiryTime(expiryTime)\n        .expiryZone(expiryZone)\n        .underlying(underlying)\n        .build();\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n        .info(info)\n        .product(option)\n        .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\n            .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, expiryDate)))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  // parse the trade from the currency pairs, base currency notional, and put/call\n  private static FxEuropeanOptionTrade parseRow(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    LongShort longShort = row.getValue(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseLongShort);\n    LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n    LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseTime);\n    ZoneId expiryZone = row.getValue(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseZoneId);\n    PutCall putCall = row.getValue(PUT_CALL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parsePutCall);\n    Currency ccy1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\n    Currency ccy2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\n    LocalDate paymentDate = row.getValue(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n    double notional1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n\n    double strike = parseStrike(row, notional1);\n\n    Optional<BusinessDayAdjustment> paymentAdj = CsvLoaderUtils\n        .parseBusinessDayAdjustment(row, PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD)\n        .filter(adj -> !adj.equals(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE));\n\n    ZonedDateTime expiry = expiryDate.atTime(expiryTime).atZone(expiryZone);\n    CurrencyPair ccyPair = CurrencyPair.of(ccy1, ccy2);\n    FxEuropeanOption option = paymentAdj\n        .map(adj -> FxEuropeanOption.of(longShort, expiry, ccyPair, putCall, strike, notional1, paymentDate, adj))\n        .orElseGet(() -> FxEuropeanOption.of(longShort, expiry, ccyPair, putCall, strike, notional1, paymentDate));\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n        .info(info)\n        .product(option)\n        .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\n            .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, expiryDate)))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  private static double parseStrike(CsvRow row, double notional1) {\n    Optional<Double> strikeOpt = row.findValue(STRIKE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n    if (strikeOpt.isPresent()) {\n      return strikeOpt.get();\n    } else {\n      double notional2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_NOTIONAL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n      return Math.abs(notional2 / notional1);\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Set<String> headers(List<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> trades) {\n    return HEADERS;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public void writeCsv(CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade) {\n    csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"FxEuropeanOption\");\n    writeFxEuropeanOption(csv, trade.getProduct());\n    CsvWriterUtils.writePremiumFields(csv, trade.getPremium());\n    csv.writeNewLine();\n  }\n\n  protected void writeFxEuropeanOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxEuropeanOption product) {\n    FxSingle underlying = product.getUnderlying();\n    PutCall putCall = underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() > 0d ? PutCall.PUT : PutCall.CALL;\n    double strike = Math.abs(underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() /\n        underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, product.getLongShort());\n    csv.writeCell(PUT_CALL_FIELD, putCall);\n    csv.writeCell(STRIKE_FIELD, strike);\n    csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, product.getExpiryDate());\n    csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, product.getExpiryTime());\n    csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, product.getExpiryZone());\n    csv.writeCell(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, Math.abs(underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount()));\n    csv.writeCell(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getDate());\n    underlying.getPaymentDateAdjustment().ifPresent(bda -> {\n      csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD, bda.getCalendar());\n      csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, bda.getConvention());\n    });\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Restricted constructor.\n  private FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java"
}

{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2019 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LEG_2_NOTIONAL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.LONG_SHORT_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PUT_CALL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.STRIKE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.LocalTime;\nimport java.time.ZoneId;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.BusinessDayAdjustment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.loader.LoaderUtils;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PutCall;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingleTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Handles the CSV file format for FX European option trades.\n */\nclass FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The singleton instance of the plugin.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\n\n  /** The headers. */\n  private static final ImmutableSet<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.of(\n      LONG_SHORT_FIELD,\n      PUT_CALL_FIELD,\n      STRIKE_FIELD,\n      EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD,\n      EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD,\n      EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD,\n      PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD,\n      PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n      PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD,\n      PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD,\n      PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n      PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n      LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n      LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD,\n      LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n      PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD,\n      PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n      PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD);\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(\"FXEUROPEANOPTION\", \"FX EUROPEAN OPTION\");\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\n      Class<?> requiredJavaType,\n      CsvRow baseRow,\n      List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\n      TradeInfo info,\n      TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n\n    if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class)) {\n      return Optional.of(resolver.parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(baseRow, info));\n    }\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String getName() {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Parses the data from a CSV row.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row object\n   * @param info  the trade info object\n   * @param resolver  the resolver used to parse additional information\n   * @return the parsed trade\n   */\n  static FxEuropeanOptionTrade parse(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n    if (row.findValue(PUT_CALL_FIELD).isPresent()) {\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade = parseRow(row, info);\n      return resolver.completeTrade(row, trade);\n    }\n    FxSingleTrade singleTrade = FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.parseRow(row, info);\n    FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade = parseRow(row, info, singleTrade.getProduct());\n    return resolver.completeTrade(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  // parses the trade from the underlying FX single\n  private static FxEuropeanOptionTrade parseRow(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, FxSingle underlying) {\n    LongShort longShort = row.getValue(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseLongShort);\n    LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n    LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseTime);\n    ZoneId expiryZone = row.getValue(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseZoneId);\n\n    FxEuropeanOption option = FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n        .longShort(longShort)\n        .expiryDate(expiryDate)\n        .expiryTime(expiryTime)\n        .expiryZone(expiryZone)\n        .underlying(underlying)\n        .build();\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n        .info(info)\n        .product(option)\n        .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\n            .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, expiryDate)))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  // parse the trade from the currency pairs, base currency notional, and put/call\n  private static FxEuropeanOptionTrade parseRow(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    LongShort longShort = row.getValue(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseLongShort);\n    LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n    LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseTime);\n    ZoneId expiryZone = row.getValue(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseZoneId);\n    PutCall putCall = row.getValue(PUT_CALL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parsePutCall);\n    Currency ccy1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\n    Currency ccy2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\n    LocalDate paymentDate = row.getValue(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n    double notional1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n\n    double strike = parseStrike(row, notional1);\n\n    Optional<BusinessDayAdjustment> paymentAdj = CsvLoaderUtils\n        .parseBusinessDayAdjustment(row, PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD)\n        .filter(adj -> !adj.equals(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE));\n\n    ZonedDateTime expiry = expiryDate.atTime(expiryTime).atZone(expiryZone);\n    CurrencyPair ccyPair = CurrencyPair.of(ccy1, ccy2);\n    FxEuropeanOption option = paymentAdj\n        .map(adj -> FxEuropeanOption.of(longShort, expiry, ccyPair, putCall, strike, notional1, paymentDate, adj))\n        .orElseGet(() -> FxEuropeanOption.of(longShort, expiry, ccyPair, putCall, strike, notional1, paymentDate));\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n        .info(info)\n        .product(option)\n        .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\n            .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, expiryDate)))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  private static double parseStrike(CsvRow row, double notional1) {\n    Optional<Double> strikeOpt = row.findValue(STRIKE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n    if (strikeOpt.isPresent()) {\n      return strikeOpt.get();\n    } else {\n      double notional2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_NOTIONAL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n      return Math.abs(notional2 / notional1);\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Set<String> headers(List<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> trades) {\n    return HEADERS;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public void writeCsv(CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade) {\n    csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"FxEuropeanOption\");\n    writeFxEuropeanOption(csv, trade.getProduct());\n    CsvWriterUtils.writePremiumFields(csv, trade.getPremium());\n    csv.writeNewLine();\n  }\n\n  protected void writeFxEuropeanOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxEuropeanOption product) {\n    FxSingle underlying = product.getUnderlying();\n    PutCall putCall = underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() > 0d ? PutCall.PUT : PutCall.CALL;\n    double strike = Math.abs(underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() /\n        underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, product.getLongShort());\n    csv.writeCell(PUT_CALL_FIELD, putCall);\n    csv.writeCell(STRIKE_FIELD, strike);\n    csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, product.getExpiryDate());\n    csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, product.getExpiryTime());\n    csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, product.getExpiryZone());\n    csv.writeCell(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, Math.abs(underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount()));\n    csv.writeCell(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getDate());\n    underlying.getPaymentDateAdjustment().ifPresent(bda -> {\n      csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD, bda.getCalendar());\n      csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, bda.getConvention());\n    });\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Restricted constructor.\n  private FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\n  }\n\n}\n",

68. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.NoSuchElementException;\nimport java.util.Optional;\n\nimport org.joda.beans.Bean;\nimport org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableValidator;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.Resolvable;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxOptionProduct;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\n\n/**\n * FX (European) single barrier option.\n * <p>\n * An FX option is a financial instrument that provides an option to exchange two currencies at a specified future time\n * only when barrier event occurs (knock-in option) or does not occur (knock-out option).\n * <p>\n * Depending on the barrier defined in {@link Barrier}, the options are classified into four types: up-and-in,\n * down-and-in, up-and-out and down-and-out.\n * <p>\n * For example, an up-and-out call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange with barrier of 1.5 is the option to\n * perform a foreign exchange on the expiry date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00, only when EUR/USD rate does\n * not exceed 1.5 during the barrier event observation period.\n * <p>\n * In case of the occurrence (non-occurrence for knock-in options) of the barrier event, the option becomes worthless,\n * or alternatively, a rebate is made.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class FxSingleBarrierOption\n    implements FxOptionProduct, Resolvable<ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * The underlying FX European option.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final FxEuropeanOption underlyingOption;\n  /**\n   * The barrier description.\n   * <p>\n   * The barrier level stored in this field must be represented based on the direction of the currency pair in the\n   * underlying FX transaction.\n   * <p>\n   * For example, if the underlying option is an option on EUR/GBP, the barrier should be a certain level of EUR/GBP rate.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final Barrier barrier;\n  /**\n   * For a 'out' option, the amount is paid when the barrier is reached;\n   * for a 'in' option, the amount is paid at expiry if the barrier is not reached.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the notional amount represented in one of the currency pair.\n   * The amount should be positive.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(get = \"optional\")\n  private final CurrencyAmount rebate;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Obtains FX single barrier option with rebate.\n   *\n   * @param underlyingOption  the underlying FX European option\n   * @param barrier  the barrier\n   * @param rebate  the rebate\n   * @return the instance\n   */\n  public static FxSingleBarrierOption of(FxEuropeanOption underlyingOption, Barrier barrier, CurrencyAmount rebate) {\n    return new FxSingleBarrierOption(underlyingOption, barrier, rebate);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains FX single barrier option without rebate.\n   *\n   * @param underlyingOption  the underlying FX European option\n   * @param barrier  the barrier\n   * @return the instance\n   */\n  public static FxSingleBarrierOption of(FxEuropeanOption underlyingOption, Barrier barrier) {\n    return new FxSingleBarrierOption(underlyingOption, barrier, null);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableValidator\n  private void validate() {\n    if (rebate != null) {\n      ArgChecker.isTrue(rebate.getAmount() > 0d, \"rebate must be positive\");\n      ArgChecker.isTrue(underlyingOption.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair().contains(rebate.getCurrency()),\n          \"The rebate currency must be one of underlying currency pair\");\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets currency pair of the base currency and counter currency.\n   * <p>\n   * This currency pair is conventional, thus indifferent to the direction of FX.\n   *\n   * @return the currency pair\n   */\n  @Override\n  public CurrencyPair getCurrencyPair() {\n    return underlyingOption.getCurrencyPair();\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the underlying Fx European option's expiry.\n   * @return the expiry\n   */\n  @Override\n  public ZonedDateTime getExpiry() {\n    return underlyingOption.getExpiry();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    if (rebate != null) {\n      return ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(underlyingOption.resolve(refData), barrier, {
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.NoSuchElementException;\nimport java.util.Optional;\n\nimport org.joda.beans.Bean;\nimport org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableValidator;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.Resolvable;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxOptionProduct;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\n\n/**\n * FX (European) single barrier option.\n * <p>\n * An FX option is a financial instrument that provides an option to exchange two currencies at a specified future time\n * only when barrier event occurs (knock-in option) or does not occur (knock-out option).\n * <p>\n * Depending on the barrier defined in {@link Barrier}, the options are classified into four types: up-and-in,\n * down-and-in, up-and-out and down-and-out.\n * <p>\n * For example, an up-and-out call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange with barrier of 1.5 is the option to\n * perform a foreign exchange on the expiry date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00, only when EUR/USD rate does\n * not exceed 1.5 during the barrier event observation period.\n * <p>\n * In case of the occurrence (non-occurrence for knock-in options) of the barrier event, the option becomes worthless,\n * or alternatively, a rebate is made.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class FxSingleBarrierOption\n    implements FxOptionProduct, Resolvable<ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * The underlying FX European option.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final FxEuropeanOption underlyingOption;\n  /**\n   * The barrier description.\n   * <p>\n   * The barrier level stored in this field must be represented based on the direction of the currency pair in the\n   * underlying FX transaction.\n   * <p>\n   * For example, if the underlying option is an option on EUR/GBP, the barrier should be a certain level of EUR/GBP rate.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final Barrier barrier;\n  /**\n   * For a 'out' option, the amount is paid when the barrier is reached;\n   * for a 'in' option, the amount is paid at expiry if the barrier is not reached.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the notional amount represented in one of the currency pair.\n   * The amount should be positive.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(get = \"optional\")\n  private final CurrencyAmount rebate;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Obtains FX single barrier option with rebate.\n   *\n   * @param underlyingOption  the underlying FX European option\n   * @param barrier  the barrier\n   * @param rebate  the rebate\n   * @return the instance\n   */\n  public static FxSingleBarrierOption of(FxEuropeanOption underlyingOption, Barrier barrier, CurrencyAmount rebate) {\n    return new FxSingleBarrierOption(underlyingOption, barrier, rebate);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains FX single barrier option without rebate.\n   *\n   * @param underlyingOption  the underlying FX European option\n   * @param barrier  the barrier\n   * @return the instance\n   */\n  public static FxSingleBarrierOption of(FxEuropeanOption underlyingOption, Barrier barrier) {\n    return new FxSingleBarrierOption(underlyingOption, barrier, null);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableValidator\n  private void validate() {\n    if (rebate != null) {\n      ArgChecker.isTrue(rebate.getAmount() > 0d, \"rebate must be positive\");\n      ArgChecker.isTrue(underlyingOption.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair().contains(rebate.getCurrency()),\n          \"The rebate currency must be one of underlying currency pair\");\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets currency pair of the base currency and counter currency.\n   * <p>\n   * This currency pair is conventional, thus indifferent to the direction of FX.\n   *\n   * @return the currency pair\n   */\n  @Override\n  public CurrencyPair getCurrencyPair() {\n    return underlyingOption.getCurrencyPair();\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the underlying Fx European option's expiry.\n   * @return the expiry\n   */\n  @Override\n  public ZonedDateTime getExpiry() {\n    return underlyingOption.getExpiry();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    if (rebate != null) {\n      return ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(underlyingOption.resolve(refData), barrier, rebate);\n    }\n    return ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(underlyingOption.resolve(refData), barrier);\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code FxSingleBarrierOption}.\n   * @return the meta-bean, not null\n   */\n  public static FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta meta() {\n    return FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  static {\n    MetaBean.register(FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta.INSTANCE);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * The serialization version id.\n   */\n  private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n   * @return the builder, not null\n   */\n  public static FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder builder() {\n    return new FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder();\n  }\n\n  private FxSingleBarrierOption(\n      FxEuropeanOption underlyingOption,\n      Barrier barrier,\n      CurrencyAmount rebate) {\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(underlyingOption, \"underlyingOption\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(barrier, \"barrier\");\n    this.underlyingOption = underlyingOption;\n    this.barrier = barrier;\n    this.rebate = rebate;\n    validate();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta metaBean() {\n    return FxSingleBarrierOption.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the underlying FX European option.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public FxEuropeanOption getUnderlyingOption() {\n    return underlyingOption;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the barrier description.\n   * <p>\n   * The barrier level stored in this field must be represented based on the direction of the currency pair in the\n   * underlying FX transaction.\n   * <p>\n   * For example, if the underlying option is an option on EUR/GBP, the barrier should be a certain level of EUR/GBP rate.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public Barrier getBarrier() {\n    return barrier;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets for a 'out' option, the amount is paid when the barrier is reached;\n   * for a 'in' option, the amount is paid at expiry if the barrier is not reached.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the notional amount represented in one of the currency pair.\n   * The amount should be positive.\n   * @return the optional value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public Optional<CurrencyAmount> getRebate() {\n    return Optional.ofNullable(rebate);\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder that allows this bean to be mutated.\n   * @return the mutable builder, not null\n   */\n  public Builder toBuilder() {\n    return new Builder(this);\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public boolean equals(Object obj) {\n    if (obj == this) {\n      return true;\n    }\n    if (obj != null && obj.getClass() == this.getClass()) {\n      FxSingleBarrierOption other = (FxSingleBarrierOption) obj;\n      return JodaBeanUtils.equal(underlyingOption, other.underlyingOption) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(barrier, other.barrier) &&\n          JodaBeanUtils.equal(rebate, other.rebate);\n    }\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public int hashCode() {\n    int hash = getClass().hashCode();\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(underlyingOption);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(barrier);\n    hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(rebate);\n    return hash;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String toString() {\n    StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(128);\n    buf.append(\"FxSingleBarrierOption{\");\n    buf.append(\"underlyingOption\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(underlyingOption)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"barrier\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(barrier)).append(',').append(' ');\n    buf.append(\"rebate\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(rebate));\n meta-property for the {@code underlyingOption} property.\n     */\n    private final MetaProperty<FxEuropeanOption> underlyingOption = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, barrier = DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable(\n        this, \"barrier\", FxSingleBarrierOption.class, Barrier.class);\n    /**\n     * The meta-property for the {@code rebate} property.\n     */\n        throw new NoSuchElementException(\"Unknown property: \" + propertyName);\n      }\n      return this;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Builder set(MetaProperty<?> property, Object value) {\n      super.set(property, value);\n      return this;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public FxSingleBarrierOption build() {\n      return new FxSingleBarrierOption(\n          underlyingOption,\n          barrier,\n          rebate);\n    }\n\n    //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n    /**\n     * Sets the underlying FX European option.\n     * @param underlyingOption  the new value, not null\n     * @return this, for chaining, not null\n     */\n    public Builder underlyingOption(FxEuropeanOption underlyingOption) {\n      JodaBeanUtils.notNull(underlyingOption, \"underlyingOption\");\n      this.underlyingOption = underlyingOption;\n      return this;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Sets the barrier description.\n     * <p>\n     * The barrier level stored in this field must be represented based on the direction of the currency pair in the\n     * underlying FX transaction.\n     * <p>\n     * For example, if the underlying option is an option on EUR/GBP, the barrier should be a certain level of EUR/GBP rate.\n     * @param barrier  the new value, not null\n     * @return this, for chaining, not null\n     */\n    public Builder barrier(Barrier barrier) {\n      JodaBeanUtils.notNull(barrier, \"barrier\");\n      this.barrier = barrier;\n      return this;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Sets for a 'out' option, the amount is paid when the barrier is reached;\n     * for a 'in' option, the amount is paid at expiry if the barrier is not reached.\n     * <p>\n     * This is the notional amount represented in one of the currency pair.\n     * The amount should be positive.\n     * @param rebate  the new value\n     * @return this, for chaining, not null\n     */\n    public Builder rebate(CurrencyAmount rebate) {\n      this.rebate = rebate;\n      return this;\n    }\n\n    //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n    @Override\n    public String toString() {\n      StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(128);\n      buf.append(\"FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder{\");\n      buf.append(\"underlyingOption\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(underlyingOption)).append(',').append(' ');\n      buf.append(\"barrier\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(barrier)).append(',').append(' ');\n      buf.append(\"rebate\").append('=').append(JodaBeanUtils.toString(rebate));\n      buf.append('}');\n      return buf.toString();\n    }\n\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------- AUTOGENERATED END --------------------------\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxSingleBarrierOption.java",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}

{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2017 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product;\n\nimport org.joda.convert.FromString;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.TypedString;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.named.Described;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.Bill;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.BondFuture;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.BondFutureOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.CapitalIndexedBond;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.FixedCouponBond;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.IborCapFloor;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.OvernightInArrearsCapFloor;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.cms.Cms;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.Cds;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsIndex;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.deposit.TermDeposit;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.dsf.Dsf;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.etd.EtdFutureSecurity;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.etd.EtdOptionSecurity;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fra.Fra;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxNdf;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSwap;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.index.IborFuture;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.index.IborFutureOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.index.OvernightFuture;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.index.OvernightFutureOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.payment.BulletPayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.Swap;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swaption.Swaption;\n\n/**\n * The type of a portfolio item.\n * <p>\n * This provides a classification of the trade or position.\n */\npublic final class ProductType\n    extends TypedString<ProductType>\n    implements Described {\n\n  /**\n   * A {@link BulletPayment}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType BULLET_PAYMENT = ProductType.of(\"BulletPayment\", \"Payment\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Bill}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType BILL = ProductType.of(\"Bill\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link FixedCouponBond} or {@link CapitalIndexedBond}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType BOND = ProductType.of(\"Bond\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link BondFuture}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType BOND_FUTURE = ProductType.of(\"BondFuture\", \"Bond Future\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link BondFutureOption}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType BOND_FUTURE_OPTION = ProductType.of(\"BondFutureOption\", \"Bond Future Option\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Cds}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType CDS = ProductType.of(\"Cds\", \"CDS\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link CdsIndex}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType CDS_INDEX = ProductType.of(\"Cds Index\", \"CDS Index\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Cms}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType CMS = ProductType.of(\"Cms\", \"CMS\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Dsf}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType DSF = ProductType.of(\"Dsf\", \"DSF\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Fra}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FRA = ProductType.of(\"Fra\", \"FRA\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link FxNdf}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FX_NDF = ProductType.of(\"FxNdf\", \"FX NDF\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link FxSingleBarrierOption}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FX_SINGLE_BARRIER_OPTION = ProductType.of(\"FxSingleBarrierOption\", \"FX Single Barrier Option\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link FxSingle}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FX_SINGLE = ProductType.of(\"FxSingle\", \"FX\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link FxSwap}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FX_SWAP = ProductType.of(\"FxSwap\", \"FX Swap\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link FxEuropeanOption}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION = ProductType.of(\"FxEuropeanOption\", \"FX European Option\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link IborCapFloor}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType IBOR_CAP_FLOOR = ProductType.of(\"IborCapFloor\", \"Cap/Floor\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link OvernightInArrearsCapFloor}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType OVERNIGHT_IN_ARREARS_CAP_FLOOR = ProductType.of(\n      \"OvernightInArrearsCapFloor\",\n      \"Overnight In Arrears Cap/Floor\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link IborFuture}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType IBOR_FUTURE = ProductType.of(\"IborFuture\", \"STIR Future\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link IborFutureOption}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType IBOR_FUTURE_OPTION = ProductType.of(\"IborFutureOption\", \"STIR Future Option\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link OvernightFuture}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType OVERNIGHT_FUTURE = ProductType.of(\"OvernightFuture\", \"Overnight Future\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link OvernightFutureOption}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType OVERNIGHT_FUTURE_OPTION = ProductType.of(\"OvernightFutureOption\", \"Overnight Future Option\");\n  /**\n   * A representation based on sensitivities.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType SENSITIVITIES = ProductType.of(\"Sensitivities\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Swap}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType SWAP = ProductType.of(\"Swap\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Swaption}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType SWAPTION = ProductType.of(\"Swaption\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link TermDeposit}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType TERM_DEPOSIT = ProductType.of(\"TermDeposit\", \"Deposit\");\n  /**\n   * An {@link EtdFutureSecurity}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType ETD_FUTURE = ProductType.of(\"EtdFuture\", \"ETD Future\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link EtdOptionSecurity}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType ETD_OPTION = ProductType.of(\"EtdOption\", \"ETD Option\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Security}, used where the kind of security is not known.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType SECURITY = ProductType.of(\"Security\");\n  /**\n   * A product only used for calibration.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType CALIBRATION = ProductType.of(\"Calibration\");\n  /**\n   * Another kind of product, details not known.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType OTHER = ProductType.of(\"Other\");\n\n  /** Serialization version. */\n  private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n  /**\n   * The description.\n   */\n  private final String description;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance from the specified name.\n   * <p>\n   * The name may contain any character, but must not be empty.\n   *\n   * @param name  the name\n   * @return a type instance with the specified name\n   */\n  @FromString\n  public static ProductType of(String name) {\n    return new ProductType(name, name);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance from the specified name.\n   * <p>\n   * The name may contain any character, but must not be empty.\n   *\n   * @param name  the name\n   * @param description  the description\n   * @return a type instance with the specified name\n   */\n  public static ProductType of(String name, String description) {\n    return new ProductType(name, description);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param name  the name\n   * @param description  the description\n   */\n  private ProductType(String name, String description) {\n    super(name);\n    this.description = ArgChecker.notBlank(description, \"description\");\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Gets the human-readable description of the type.\n   *\n   * @return the description\n   */\n  @Override\n  public String getDescription() {\n    return description;\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/ProductType.java"
}

Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"60:    */\\n61:   public static TradeCsvInfoResolver of(ReferenceData refData) {\\n62:     return StandardCsvInfoImpl.of(refData);\\n63:   }\\n64: \\n65:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n66:   /**\\n67:    * Gets the reference data being used.\\n68:    * \\n69:    * @return the reference data\\n70:    */\\n71:   public abstract ReferenceData getReferenceData();\\n72: \\n73:   /**\\n74:    * Parses standard attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\\n75:    * <p>\\n76:    * This parses the standard set of attributes, which are the three constants in {@link AttributeType}.\\n77:    * The column names are 'Description', 'Name' and 'CCP'.\\n78:    * \\n79:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\\n80:    * @param builder  the builder to update\\n81:    */\\n82:   public default void parseStandardAttributes(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\\n83:     row.findValue(DESCRIPTION_FIELD)\\n84:         .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.DESCRIPTION, str));\\n85:     row.findValue(NAME_FIELD)\\n86:         .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.NAME, str));\\n87:     row.findValue(CCP_FIELD)\\n88:         .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpId.of(str)));\\n89:   }\\n90: \\n91:   /**\\n92:    * Parses attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\\n93:    * <p>\\n94:    * If they are available, the trade ID, date, time and zone will have been set\\n95:    * before this method is called. They may be altered if necessary, although\\n96:    * this is not recommended.\\n97:    * \\n98:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\\n99:    * @param builder  the builder to update\\n100:    */\\n101:   public default void parseTradeInfo(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\\n102:     // do nothing\\n103:   }\\n104: \\n105:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n106:   /**\\n107:    * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\\n108:    * <p>\\n109:    * This is called by each of the {@code completeTrade} methods.\\n110:    *\\n111:    * @param <T> the trade type\\n112:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\\n113:    * @param trade  the parsed trade\\n114:    * @return the updated trade\\n115:    */\\n116:   public default <T extends Trade> T completeTradeCommon(CsvRow row, T trade) {\\n117:     //do nothing\\n118:     return trade;\\n119:   }\\n120: \\n121:   /**\\n122:    * Completes the FRA trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\\n123:    * <p>\\n124:    * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\\n125:    * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\\n126:    * <p>\\n127:    * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\\n128:    * \\n129:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\\n130:    * @param trade  the parsed trade\\n131:    * @return the updated trade\\n132:    */\\n133:   public default FraTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FraTrade trade) {\\n134:     // do nothing\\n135:     return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\\n136:   }\\n137: \\n138:   /**\\n139:    * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\\n140:    * <p>\\n141:    * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\\n142:    * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\\n143:    * <p>\\n144:    * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\\n145:    * \\n146:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\\n147:    * @param trade  the parsed trade\\n148:    * @return the updated trade\\n149:    */\\n150:   public default SecurityTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SecurityTrade trade) {\\n151:     // do nothing\\n152:     return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\\n153:   }\\n154: \\n155:   /**\\n156:    * Completes the Swap trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\\n157:    * <p>\\n158:    * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\\n159:    * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\\n160:    * <p>\\n161:    * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\\n162:    * \\n163:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\\n164:    * @param trade  the parsed trade\\n165:    * @return the updated trade\\n166:    */\\n167:   public default SwapTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwapTrade trade) {\\n168:     // do nothing\\n169:     return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\\n170:   }\\n171: \\n172:   /**\\n173:    * Completes the Swaption trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\\n174:    * <p>\\n175:    * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\\n176:    * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\\n177:    * <p>\\n178:    * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\\n179:    * \\n180:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\\n181:    * @param trade  the parsed trade\\n182:    * @return the updated trade\\n183:    */\\n184:   public default SwaptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwaptionTrade trade) {\\n185:     // do nothing\\n186:     return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\\n187:   }\\n188: \\n189:   /**\\n190:    * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\\n191:    * <p>\\n192:    * This \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/TradeCsvInfoResolver.java%3FL60-460\"}",

    "content": "60:    */\n61:   public static TradeCsvInfoResolver of(ReferenceData refData) {\n62:     return StandardCsvInfoImpl.of(refData);\n63:   }\n64: \n65:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n66:   /**\n67:    * Gets the reference data being used.\n68:    * \n69:    * @return the reference data\n70:    */\n71:   public abstract ReferenceData getReferenceData();\n72: \n73:   /**\n74:    * Parses standard attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n75:    * <p>\n76:    * This parses the standard set of attributes, which are the three constants in {@link AttributeType}.\n77:    * The column names are 'Description', 'Name' and 'CCP'.\n78:    * \n79:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n80:    * @param builder  the builder to update\n81:    */\n82:   public default void parseStandardAttributes(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n83:     row.findValue(DESCRIPTION_FIELD)\n84:         .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.DESCRIPTION, str));\n85:     row.findValue(NAME_FIELD)\n86:         .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.NAME, str));\n87:     row.findValue(CCP_FIELD)\n88:         .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpId.of(str)));\n89:   }\n90: \n91:   /**\n92:    * Parses attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n93:    * <p>\n94:    * If they are available, the trade ID, date, time and zone will have been set\n95:    * before this method is called. They may be altered if necessary, although\n96:    * this is not recommended.\n97:    * \n98:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n99:    * @param builder  the builder to update\n100:    */\n101:   public default void parseTradeInfo(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n102:     // do nothing\n103:   }\n104: \n105:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n106:   /**\n107:    * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n108:    * <p>\n109:    * This is called by each of the {@code completeTrade} methods.\n110:    *\n111:    * @param <T> the trade type\n112:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n113:    * @param trade  the parsed trade\n114:    * @return the updated trade\n115:    */\n116:   public default <T extends Trade> T completeTradeCommon(CsvRow row, T trade) {\n117:     //do nothing\n118:     return trade;\n119:   }\n120: \n121:   /**\n122:    * Completes the FRA trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n123:    * <p>\n124:    * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n125:    * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n126:    * <p>\n127:    * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n128:    * \n129:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n130:    * @param trade  the parsed trade\n131:    * @return the updated trade\n132:    */\n133:   public default FraTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FraTrade trade) {\n134:     // do nothing\n135:     return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n136:   }\n137: \n138:   /**\n139:    * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n140:    * <p>\n141:    * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n142:    * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n143:    * <p>\n144:    * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n145:    * \n146:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n147:    * @param trade  the parsed trade\n148:    * @return the updated trade\n149:    */\n150:   public default SecurityTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SecurityTrade trade) {\n151:     // do nothing\n152:     return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n153:   }\n154: \n155:   /**\n156:    * Completes the Swap trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n157:    * <p>\n158:    * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n159:    * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n160:    * <p>\n161:    * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n162:    * \n163:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n164:    * @param trade  the parsed trade\n165:    * @return the updated trade\n166:    */\n167:   public default SwapTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwapTrade trade) {\n168:     // do nothing\n169:     return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n170:   }\n171: \n172:   /**\n173:    * Completes the Swaption trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n174:    * <p>\n175:    * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n176:    * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n177: the updated trade\n183:    */\n184:   public default SwaptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwaptionTrade trade) {\n185:     // do nothing\n186:     return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n187: variableRows, TradeInfo info) {\n394:     return SwapTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, variableRows, info, this);\n395:   }\n396: \n397:   /**\n398:    * Parses a Swaption trade from CSV.\n399:    * \n400: trade\n404:    * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n405:    */\n406:   public default SwaptionTrade parseSwaptionTrade(CsvRow row, List<CsvRow> variableRows, TradeInfo info) {\n407:     return SwaptionTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, variableRows, info, this);\n408:   }\n409: \n410:   /**\n411:    * Parses a Bullet Payment trade from CSV.\n412:    * \n413:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n414:    * @param info  the trade info\n415:    * @return the Bullet Payment trade\n416:    * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n417:    */\n418:   public default BulletPaymentTrade parseBulletPaymentTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n419:     return BulletPaymentTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n420:   }\n421: \n422:   /**\n423:    * Parses a Term Deposit trade from CSV.\n424:    * \n425:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n426:    * @param info  the trade info\n427:    * @return the Term Deposit trade\n428:    * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n429:    */\n430:   public default TermDepositTrade parseTermDepositTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n431:     return TermDepositTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n432:   }\n433: \n434:   /**\n435:    * Parses a FX Single trade from CSV.\n436:    * \n437:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n438:    * @param info  the trade info\n439:    * @return the FX Single trade\n440:    * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n441:    */\n442:   public default FxSingleTrade parseFxSingleTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n443:     return FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n444:   }\n445: \n446:   /**\n447:    * Parses a FX Swap trade from CSV.\n448:    * \n449:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n450:    * @param info  the trade info\n451:    * @return the FX Swap trade\n452:    * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n453:    */\n454:   public default FxSwapTrade parseFxSwapTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n455:     return FxSwapTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n456:   }\n457: \n458:   /**\n459:    * Parses a FX Vanilla Option trade from CSV.\n460:    * \n461: ",

{
  "endLine": 200,

Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"80:   /**\\n81:    * Calculates the present value of the FX barrier option product.\\n82:    * <p>\\n83:    * The present value of the product is the value on the valuation date.\\n84:    * It is expressed in the counter currency.\\n85:    * <p>\\n86:    * The volatility used in this computation is the Black implied volatility at expiry time and strike.\\n87:    * \\n88:    * @param option  the option product\\n89:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n90:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n91:    * @return the present value of the product\\n92:    */\\n93:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\\n94:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n95:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n96:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n97: \\n98:     double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n99:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\\n100:     return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * price);\\n101:   }\\n102: \\n103:   /**\\n104:    * Calculates the price of the FX barrier option product.\\n105:    * <p>\\n106:    * The price of the product is the value on the valuation date for one unit of the base currency \\n107:    * and is expressed in the counter currency. The price does not take into account the long/short flag.\\n108:    * See {@link #presentValue} for scaling and currency.\\n109:    * <p>\\n110:    * The volatility used in this computation is the Black implied volatility at expiry time and strike.\\n111:    * \\n112:    * @param option  the option product\\n113:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n114:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n115:    * @return the price of the product\\n116:    */\\n117:   public double price(\\n118:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n119:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n120:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n121: \\n122:     validate(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n123:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\\n124:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\\n125:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\\n126:     if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\\n127:       return 0d;\\n128:     }\\n129:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\\n130:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n131:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n132:     Currency ccyBase = underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\\n133:     Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\\n134:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\\n135:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\\n136:         return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.price(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n137:       } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\\n138:         CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\\n139:         DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\\n140:         LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\\n141:         double rebatePrice = rebate.getAmount() * ratesProvider.discountFactor(rebate.getCurrency(), paymentDate) /\\n142:             Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\\n143:         return rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ? rebatePrice : todayFx * rebatePrice;\\n144:       }\\n145:       return 0d;\\n146:     }\\n147:     DiscountFactors baseDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyBase);\\n148:     DiscountFactors counterDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter);\\n149:     double rateBase = baseDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n150:     double rateCounter = counterDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n151:     double costOfCarry = rateCounter - rateBase;\\n152:     double dfBase = baseDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n153:     double dfCounter = counterDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n154:     double strike = underlyingOption.getStrike();\\n155:     double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\\n156:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(currencyPair, underlyingOption.getExpiry(), strike, forward);\\n157:     double price = BARRIER_PRICER.price(\\n158:         todayFx, strike, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, underlyingOption.getPutCall().isCall(), barrier);\\n159:     if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\\n160:       CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\\n161:       double priceRebate = rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ?\\n162:           CASH_REBATE_PRICER.price(todayFx, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, barrier.inverseKnockType()) :\\n163:           ASSET_REBATE_PRICER.price(todayFx, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, barrier.inverseKnockType());\\n164:       price += priceRebate * rebate.getAmount() / Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\\n165:     }\\n166:     return price;\\n167:   }\\n168: \\n169:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n170:   /**\\n171:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX barrier option product.\\n172:    * <p>\\n173:    * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of {@link #presentValue} to\\n174:    * the underlying curves.\\n175:    * <p>\\n176:    * The volatility is fixed in this sensitivity computation, i.e., sticky-strike.\\n177:    * \\n178:    * @param option  the option product\\n179:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n180:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n181:    * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\\n182:    */\\n183:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\\n184:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n185:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n186:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n187: \\n188:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\\n189:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\\n190:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n191:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n192:     }\\n193:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\\n194:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\\n195:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n196:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n197:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\\n198:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\\n199:         PointSensitivities underlyingOptionSensitivity = VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\\n200:             option.getUnderlyingOption(), ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n201: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java%3FL80-200\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "80:   /**\n81:    * Calculates the present value of the FX barrier option product.\n82:    * <p>\n83:    * The present value of the product is the value on the valuation date.\n84:    * It is expressed in the counter currency.\n85:    * <p>\n86:    * The volatility used in this computation is the Black implied volatility at expiry time and strike.\n87:    * \n88:    * @param option  the option product\n89:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n90:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n91:    * @return the present value of the product\n92:    */\n93:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n94:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n95:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n96:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n97: \n98:     double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n99:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n100:     return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * price);\n101:   }\n102: \n103:   /**\n104:    * Calculates the price of the FX barrier option product.\n105:    * <p>\n106:    * The price of the product is the value on the valuation date for one unit of the base currency \n107:    * and is expressed in the counter currency. The price does not take into account the long/short flag.\n108:    * See {@link #presentValue} for scaling and currency.\n109:    * <p>\n110:    * The volatility used in this computation is the Black implied volatility at expiry time and strike.\n111:    * \n112:    * @param option  the option product\n113:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n114:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n115:    * @return the price of the product\n116:    */\n117:   public double price(\n118:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n119:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n120:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n121: \n122:     validate(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n123:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n124:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n125:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\n126:     if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n127:       return 0d;\n128:     }\n129:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n130:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n131:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n132:     Currency ccyBase = underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n133:     Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n134:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n135:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n136:         return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.price(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n137:       } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n138:         CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n139:         DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\n140:         LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\n141:         double rebatePrice = rebate.getAmount() * ratesProvider.discountFactor(rebate.getCurrency(), paymentDate) /\n142:             Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n143:         return rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ? rebatePrice : todayFx * rebatePrice;\n144:       }\n145:       return 0d;\n146:     }\n147:     DiscountFactors baseDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyBase);\n148:     DiscountFactors counterDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter);\n149:     double rateBase = baseDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n150:     double rateCounter = counterDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n151:     double costOfCarry = rateCounter - rateBase;\n152:     double dfBase = baseDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n153:     double dfCounter = counterDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n154:     double strike = underlyingOption.getStrike();\n155:     double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\n156:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(currencyPair, underlyingOption.getExpiry(), strike, forward);\n157:     double price = BARRIER_PRICER.price(\n158:         todayFx, strike, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, underlyingOption.getPutCall().isCall(), barrier);\n159:     if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n160:       CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n161:       double priceRebate = rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ?\n162:           CASH_REBATE_PRICER.price(todayFx, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, barrier.inverseKnockType()) :\n163:           ASSET_REBATE_PRICER.price(todayFx, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, barrier.inverseKnockType());\n164:       price += priceRebate * rebate.getAmount() / Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n165:     }\n166:     return price;\n167:   }\n168: \n169:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n170:   /**\n171:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX barrier option product.\n172:    * <p>\n173:    * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of {@link #presentValue} to\n174:    * the underlying curves.\n175:    * <p>\n176:    * The volatility is fixed in this sensitivity computation, i.e., sticky-strike.\n177:    * \n178:    * @param option  the option product\n179:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n180:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n181:    * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\n182:    */\n183:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n184:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n185:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n186:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n187: \n188: {\n191:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n192:     }\n193:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n194:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n195:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n196:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n197:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n198:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n199:         PointSensitivities underlyingOptionSensitivity = VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n200:             option.getUnderlyingOption(), ratesProvider, volatilities);\n201: ",
