  "content": "{\"content\":\"200:             option.getUnderlyingOption(), ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n201:         return PointSensitivityBuilder.of(underlyingOptionSensitivity.getSensitivities());\\n202:       } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\\n203:         CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\\n204:         DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\\n205:         LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\\n206:         ZeroRateSensitivity rebaseSensitivity = ratesProvider.discountFactors(rebate.getCurrency())\\n207:             .zeroRatePointSensitivity(paymentDate);\\n208:         Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\\n209:         return rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ?\\n210:             rebaseSensitivity.multipliedBy(rebate.getAmount()) :\\n211:             rebaseSensitivity.multipliedBy(rebate.getAmount() * todayFx).withCurrency(ccyCounter);\\n212:       }\\n213:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n214:     }\\n215:     ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n216:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(underlyingOption);\\n217:     double counterYearFraction =\\n218:         ratesProvider.discountFactors(currencyPair.getCounter()).relativeYearFraction(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n219:     ZeroRateSensitivity counterSensi = ZeroRateSensitivity.of(\\n220:         currencyPair.getCounter(),\\n221:         counterYearFraction,\\n222:         signedNotional * (priceDerivatives.getDerivative(2) + priceDerivatives.getDerivative(3)));\\n223:     double baseYearFraction =\\n224:         ratesProvider.discountFactors(currencyPair.getBase()).relativeYearFraction(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n225:     ZeroRateSensitivity baseSensi = ZeroRateSensitivity.of(\\n226:         currencyPair.getBase(),\\n227:         baseYearFraction,\\n228:         currencyPair.getCounter(),\\n229:         -priceDerivatives.getDerivative(3) * signedNotional);\\n230:     return counterSensi.combinedWith(baseSensi);\\n231:   }\\n232: \\n233:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n234:   /**\\n235:    * Calculates the present value delta of the FX barrier option product.\\n236:    * <p>\\n237:    * The present value delta is the first derivative of {@link #presentValue} with respect to spot.\\n238:    * \\n239:    * @param option  the option product\\n240:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n241:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n242:    * @return the present value delta of the product\\n243:    */\\n244:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueDelta(\\n245:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n246:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n247:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n248: \\n249:     double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n250:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\\n251:     return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * delta);\\n252:   }\\n253: \\n254:   /**\\n255:    * Calculates the delta of the FX barrier option product.\\n256:    * <p>\\n257:    * The delta is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\\n258:    * \\n259:    * @param option  the option product\\n260:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n261:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n262:    * @return the delta of the product\\n263:    */\\n264:   public double delta(\\n265:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n266:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n267:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n268: \\n269:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\\n270:     if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\\n271:       return 0d;\\n272:     }\\n273:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\\n274:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\\n275:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n276:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n277:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\\n278:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\\n279:         return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.delta(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n280:       } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\\n281:         Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\\n282:         CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\\n283:         if (!rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter)) {\\n284:           DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\\n285:           LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\\n286:           return rebate.getAmount() * ratesProvider.discountFactor(rebate.getCurrency(), paymentDate) /\\n287:               Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\\n288:         }\\n289:       }\\n290:       return 0d;\\n291:     }\\n292:     ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n293:     return priceDerivatives.getDerivative(0);\\n294:   }\\n295: \\n296:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n297:   /**\\n298:    * Calculates the present value gamma of the FX barrier option product.\\n299:    * <p>\\n300:    * The present value gamma is the second derivative of {@link #presentValue} with respect to spot.\\n301:    * \\n302:    * @param option  the option product\\n303:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n304:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n305:    * @return the present value gamma of the product\\n306:    */\\n307:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueGamma(\\n308:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n309:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n310:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n311: \\n312:     double gamma = gamma(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n313:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\\n314:     return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * gamma);\\n315:   }\\n316: \\n317:   /**\\n318:    * Calculates the gamma of the FX barrier option product.\\n319:    * <p>\\n320:    * The delta is the second derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\\n321:    * \\n322:    * @param option  the option product\\n323:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n324:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n325:    * @return the gamma of the product\\n326:    */\\n327:   public double gamma(\\n328:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n329:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n330:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n331: \\n332:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\\n333:     if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\\n334:       return 0d;\\n335:     }\\n336:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\\n337:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\\n338:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n339:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n340:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\\n341:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\\n342:         return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.gamma(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n343:       }\\n344:       return 0d;\\n345:     }\\n346:     ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n347:     return priceDerivatives.getDerivative(6);\\n348:   }\\n349: \\n350:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n351:   /**\\n352:    * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\\n353:    * <p>\\n354:    * The result is a single sensitivity to the volatility used. This is also called Black vega.\\n355:    * \\n356:    * @param option  the option product\\n357:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n358:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n359:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\n360:    */\\n361:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\\n362:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n363:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n364:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n365: \\n366:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\\n367:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\\n368:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n369:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n370:     }\\n371:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\\n372:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\\n373:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n374:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n375:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\\n376:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\\n377:         return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\\n378:             option.getUnderlyingOption(), ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n379:       }\\n380:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\n381:     }\\n382:     ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n383:     Currency ccyBase = currencyPair.getBase();\\n384:     Currency ccyCounter = currencyPair.getCounter();\\n385:     double dfBase = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyBase, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n386:     double dfCounter = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n387:     double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\\n388:     return FxOptionSensitivity.of(\\n389:         volatilities.getName(),\\n390:         currencyPair,\\n391:         timeToExpiry,\\n392:         underlyingOption.getStrike(),\\n393:         forward,\\n394:         ccyCounter,\\n395:         priceDerivatives.getDerivative(4) * signedNotional(underlyingOption));\\n396:   }\\n397: \\n398:   /**\\n399:    * Calculates the vega of the FX barrier option product.\\n400:    * <p>\\n401:    * The delta is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to Black volatility.\\n402:    * \\n403:    * @param option  the option product\\n404:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n405:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n406:    * @return the vega of the product\\n407:    */\\n408:   public double vega(\\n409:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n410:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n411:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n412: \\n413:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\\n414:     if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\\n415:       return 0d;\\n416:     }\\n417:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\\n418:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\\n419:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n420:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n421:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\\n422:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\\n423:         return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.vega(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n424:       }\\n425:       return 0d;\\n426:     }\\n427:     ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n428:     return priceDerivatives.getDerivative(4);\\n429:   }\\n430: \\n431:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n432:   /**\\n433:    * Calculates the present value theta of the FX barrier option product.\\n434:    * <p>\\n435:    * The present value theta is the negative of the first derivative of {@link #presentValue} with time parameter.\\n436:    * \\n437:    * @param option  the option product\\n438:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n439:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n440:    * @return the present value theta of the product\\n441:    */\\n442:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueTheta(\\n443:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n444:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n445:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n446: \\n447:     double theta = theta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n448:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\\n449:     return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * theta);\\n450:   }\\n451: \\n452:   /**\\n453:    * Calculates the theta of the FX barrier option product.\\n454:    * <p>\\n455:    * The theta is the negative of the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to time parameter.\\n456:    * \\n457:    * @param option  the option product\\n458:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n459:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n460:    * @return the theta of the product\\n461:    */\\n462:   public double theta(\\n463:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n464:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n465:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n466: \\n467:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\\n468:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\\n469:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n470:       return 0d;\\n471:     }\\n472:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\\n473:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\\n474:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n475:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n476:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\\n477:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\\n478:         Currency ccyBase = underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\\n479:         Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\\n480:         DiscountFactors baseDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyBase);\\n481:         DiscountFactors counterDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter);\\n482:         double rateBase = baseDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n483:         double rateCounter = counterDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n484:         double costOfCarry = rateCounter - rateBase;\\n485:         double dfBase = baseDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n486:         double dfCounter = counterDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n487:         double strike = underlyingOption.getStrike();\\n488:         double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\\n489:         double volatility = volatilities.volatility(currencyPair, timeToExpiry, strike, forward);\\n490:         boolean isCall = underlyingOption.getPutCall().isCall();\\n491:         double fwdPrice = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\\n492:         double fwdTheta = BlackFormulaRepository.driftlessTheta(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volatility);\\n493:         double fwdDelta = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\\n494:         return dfCounter * (fwdTheta + rateCounter * fwdPrice - costOfCarry * forward * fwdDelta);\\n495:       } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\\n496:         CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\\n497:         Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\\n498:         DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\\n499:         LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\\n500:         DiscountFactors discountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(rebate.getCurrency());\\n501: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java%3FL200-500\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "200:             option.getUnderlyingOption(), ratesProvider, volatilities);\n201:         return PointSensitivityBuilder.of(underlyingOptionSensitivity.getSensitivities());\n202:       } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n203:         CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n204:         DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\n205:         LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\n206:         ZeroRateSensitivity rebaseSensitivity = ratesProvider.discountFactors(rebate.getCurrency())\n207:             .zeroRatePointSensitivity(paymentDate);\n208:         Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n209:         return rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ?\n210:             rebaseSensitivity.multipliedBy(rebate.getAmount()) :\n211:             rebaseSensitivity.multipliedBy(rebate.getAmount() * todayFx).withCurrency(ccyCounter);\n212:       }\n213:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n214:     }\n215:     ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n216:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(underlyingOption);\n217:     double counterYearFraction =\n218:         ratesProvider.discountFactors(currencyPair.getCounter()).relativeYearFraction(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n219:     ZeroRateSensitivity counterSensi = ZeroRateSensitivity.of(\n220:         currencyPair.getCounter(),\n221:         counterYearFraction,\n222:         signedNotional * (priceDerivatives.getDerivative(2) + priceDerivatives.getDerivative(3)));\n223:     double baseYearFraction =\n224:         ratesProvider.discountFactors(currencyPair.getBase()).relativeYearFraction(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n225:     ZeroRateSensitivity baseSensi = ZeroRateSensitivity.of(\n226:         currencyPair.getBase(),\n227:         baseYearFraction,\n228:         currencyPair.getCounter(),\n229:         -priceDerivatives.getDerivative(3) * signedNotional);\n230:     return counterSensi.combinedWith(baseSensi);\n231:   }\n232: \n233:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n234:   /**\n235:    * Calculates the present value delta of the FX barrier option product.\n236:    * <p>\n237:    * The present value delta is the first derivative of {@link #presentValue} with respect to spot.\n238:    * \n239:    * @param option  the option product\n240:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n241:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n242:    * @return the present value delta of the product\n243:    */\n244:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueDelta(\n245:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n246:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n247:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n248: \n249:     double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n250:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n251:     return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * delta);\n252:   }\n253: \n254:   /**\n255:    * Calculates the delta of the FX barrier option product.\n256:    * <p>\n257:    * The delta is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\n258:    * \n259:    * @param option  the option product\n260:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n261:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n262:    * @return the delta of the product\n263:    */\n264:   public double delta(\n265:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n266:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n267:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n268: \n269:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n270:     if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\n271:       return 0d;\n272:     }\n273:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n274:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n275:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n276:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n277:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n278:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n279:         return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.delta(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n280:       } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n281:         Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n282:         CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n283:         if (!rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter)) {\n284:           DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\n285:           LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\n286:           return rebate.getAmount() * ratesProvider.discountFactor(rebate.getCurrency(), paymentDate) /\n287:               Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n288:         }\n289:       }\n290:       return 0d;\n291:     }\n292:     ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n293:     return priceDerivatives.getDerivative(0);\n294:   }\n295: \n296:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n297:   /**\n298:    * Calculates the present value gamma of the FX barrier option product.\n299:    * <p>\n300:    * The present value gamma is the second derivative of {@link #presentValue} with respect to spot.\n301:    * \n302:    * @param option  the option product\n303:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n304:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n305:    * @return the present value gamma of the product\n306:    */\n307:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueGamma(\n308:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n309:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n310:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n311: \n312:     double gamma = gamma(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n313:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n314:     return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * gamma);\n315:   }\n316: \n317:   /**\n318:    * Calculates the gamma of the FX barrier option product.\n319:    * <p>\n320:    * The delta is the second derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\n321:    * \n322:    * @param option  the option product\n323:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n324:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n325:    * @return the gamma of the product\n326:    */\n327:   public double gamma(\n328:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n329:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n330:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n331: \n332:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n333:     if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\n334:       return 0d;\n335:     }\n336:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n337:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n338:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n339:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n340:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n341:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n342:         return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.gamma(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n343:       }\n344:       return 0d;\n345:     }\n346:     ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n347:     return priceDerivatives.getDerivative(6);\n348:   }\n349: \n350:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n351:   /**\n352:    * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n353:    * <p>\n354:    * The result is a single sensitivity to the volatility used. This is also called Black vega.\n355:    * \n356:    * @param option  the option product\n357:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n358:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n359:    * @return the present value sensitivity\n360:    */\n361:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n362:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n363:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n364:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n365: \n366:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n367:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\n368:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n369:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n370:     }\n371:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n372:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n373:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n374:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n375:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n376:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n377:         return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n378:             option.getUnderlyingOption(), ratesProvider, volatilities);\n379:       }\n380:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n381:     }\n382:     ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n383:     Currency ccyBase = currencyPair.getBase();\n384:     Currency ccyCounter = currencyPair.getCounter();\n385:     double dfBase = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyBase, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n386:     double dfCounter = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n387:     double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\n388:     return FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n389:         volatilities.getName(),\n390:         currencyPair,\n391:         timeToExpiry,\n392:         underlyingOption.getStrike(),\n393:         forward,\n394:         ccyCounter,\n395:         priceDerivatives.getDerivative(4) * signedNotional(underlyingOption));\n396:   }\n397: \n398:   /**\n399:    * Calculates the vega of the FX barrier option product.\n400:    * <p>\n401:    * The delta is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to Black volatility.\n402:    * \n403:    * @param option  the option product\n404:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n405:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n406:    * @return the vega of the product\n407:    */\n408:   public double vega(\n409:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n410:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n411:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n412: \n413:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n414:     if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\n415:       return 0d;\n416:     }\n417:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n418:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n419:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n420:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n421:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n422:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n423:         return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.vega(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n424:       }\n425:       return 0d;\n426:     }\n427:     ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n428:     return priceDerivatives.getDerivative(4);\n429:   }\n430: \n431:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n432:   /**\n433:    * Calculates the present value theta of the FX barrier option product.\n434:    * <p>\n435:    * The present value theta is the negative of the first derivative of {@link #presentValue} with time parameter.\n436:    * \n437:    * @param option  the option product\n438:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n439:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n440:    * @return the present value theta of the product\n441:    */\n442:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueTheta(\n443:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n444:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n445:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n446: \n447:     double theta = theta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n448:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n449:     return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * theta);\n450:   }\n451: \n452:   /**\n453:    * Calculates the theta of the FX barrier option product.\n454:    * <p>\n455:    * The theta is the negative of the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to time parameter.\n456:    * \n457:    * @param option  the option product\n458:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n459:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n460:    * @return the theta of the product\n461:    */\n462:   public double theta(\n463:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n464:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n465:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n466: \n467:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n468:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\n469:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n470:       return 0d;\n471:     }\n472:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n473:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n474:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n475:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n476:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n477:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n478:         Currency ccyBase = underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n479:         Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n480:         DiscountFactors baseDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyBase);\n481:         DiscountFactors counterDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter);\n482:         double rateBase = baseDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n483:         double rateCounter = counterDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n484:         double costOfCarry = rateCounter - rateBase;\n485:         double dfBase = baseDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n486:         double dfCounter = counterDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n487:         double strike = underlyingOption.getStrike();\n488:         double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\n489:         double volatility = volatilities.volatility(currencyPair, timeToExpiry, strike, forward);\n490:         boolean isCall = underlyingOption.getPutCall().isCall();\n491:         double fwdPrice = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n492:         double fwdTheta = BlackFormulaRepository.driftlessTheta(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n493:         double fwdDelta = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n494:         return dfCounter * (fwdTheta + rateCounter * fwdPrice - costOfCarry * forward * fwdDelta);\n495:       } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n496:         CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n497:         Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n498:         DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\n499:         LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\n500:         DiscountFactors discountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(rebate.getCurrency());\n501: ",

  "content": "{\"content\":\"510:    * @param info the trade info\\n511:    * @return the IBOR CapFloor trade\\n512:    * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\\n513:    */\\n514:   public default IborCapFloorTrade parseIborCapFloorTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\\n515:     return IborCapFloorTradeCsvPlugin.parseCapFloor(row, info, this);\\n516:   }\\n517: \\n518:   /**\\n519:    * Parses an overnight CapFloor trade from CSV.\\n520:    *\\n521:    * @param row the CSV row to parse\\n522:    * @param info the trade info\\n523:    * @return the overnight CapFloor trade\\n524:    * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\\n525:    */\\n526:   public default OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade parseOvernightCapFloorTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\\n527:     return OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTradeCsvPlugin.parseCapFloor(row, info, this);\\n528:   }\\n529: \\n530:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n531:   /**\\n532:    * Parses any kind of trade from CSV before standard matching.\\n533:    * <p>\\n534:    * This is called before the standard matching on the 'Product Type' column.\\n535:    * As such, it allows the standard parsing to be replaced for a given type.\\n536:    * \\n537:    * @param typeUpper  the upper case product type column\\n538:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\\n539:    * @param info  the trade info\\n540:    * @return the trade, empty if the product type is not known, or if standard parsing should occur\\n541:    * @throws RuntimeException if the product type is known but the row contains invalid data\\n542:    */\\n543:   public default Optional<Trade> overrideParseTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\\n544:     return Optional.empty();\\n545:   }\\n546: \\n547:   /**\\n548:    * Parses any kind of trade from CSV after standard matching.\\n549:    * <p>\\n550:    * This is called after the standard matching on the 'Product Type' column.\\n551:    * As such, it allows non-matched rows to be captured.\\n552:    * \\n553:    * @param typeUpper  the upper case product type column\\n554:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\\n555:    * @param info  the trade info\\n556:    * @return the trade, empty if the product type is not known\\n557:    * @throws RuntimeException if the product type is known but the row contains invalid data\\n558:    */\\n559:   public default Optional<Trade> parseOtherTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\\n560:     return Optional.empty();\\n561:   }\\n562: \\n563: }\\n564: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/TradeCsvInfoResolver.java%3FL510-600\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "510:    * @param info the trade info\n511:    * @return the IBOR CapFloor trade\n512:    * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n513:    */\n514:   public default IborCapFloorTrade parseIborCapFloorTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n515:     return IborCapFloorTradeCsvPlugin.parseCapFloor(row, info, this);\n516:   }\n517: \n518:   /**\n519:    * Parses an overnight CapFloor trade from CSV.\n520:    *\n521:    * @param row the CSV row to parse\n522:    * @param info the trade info\n523:    * @return the overnight CapFloor trade\n524:    * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n525:    */\n526:   public default OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade parseOvernightCapFloorTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n527:     return OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTradeCsvPlugin.parseCapFloor(row, info, this);\n528:   }\n529: \n530:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n531:   /**\n532:    * Parses any kind of trade from CSV before standard matching.\n533:    * <p>\n534:    * This is called before the standard matching on the 'Product Type' column.\n535:    * As such, it allows the standard parsing to be replaced for a given type.\n536:    * \n537:    * @param typeUpper  the upper case product type column\n538:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n539:    * @param info  the trade info\n540:    * @return the trade, empty if the product type is not known, or if standard parsing should occur\n541:    * @throws RuntimeException if the product type is known but the row contains invalid data\n542:    */\n543:   public default Optional<Trade> overrideParseTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n544:     return Optional.empty();\n545:   }\n546: \n547:   /**\n548:    * Parses any kind of trade from CSV after standard matching.\n549:    * <p>\n550:    * This is called after the standard matching on the 'Product Type' column.\n551:    * As such, it allows non-matched rows to be captured.\n552:    * \n553:    * @param typeUpper  the upper case product type column\n554:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n555:    * @param info  the trade info\n556:    * @return the trade, empty if the product type is not known\n557:    * @throws RuntimeException if the product type is known but the row contains invalid data\n558:    */\n559:   public default Optional<Trade> parseOtherTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n560:     return Optional.empty();\n561:   }\n562: \n563: }\n564: ",

  "content": "{\"content\":\"500:         DiscountFactors discountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(rebate.getCurrency());\\n501:         double rebateTheta = discountFactors.zeroRate(paymentDate) * rebate.getAmount() *\\n502:             discountFactors.discountFactor(paymentDate) / Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\\n503:         return rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ? rebateTheta : todayFx * rebateTheta;\\n504:       }\\n505:       return 0d;\\n506:     }\\n507:     ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n508:     return -priceDerivatives.getDerivative(5);\\n509:   }\\n510: \\n511:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n512:   /**\\n513:    * Calculates the forward exchange rate.\\n514:    *\\n515:    * @param option  the option product\\n516:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n517:    * @return the forward rate\\n518:    */\\n519:   public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\\n520:     CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getCurrencyPair();\\n521:     LocalDate paymentDate = option.getUnderlyingOption().getUnderlying().getPaymentDate();\\n522:     double forwardRate = ratesProvider.fxForwardRates(strikePair).rate(strikePair.getBase(), paymentDate);\\n523:     return FxRate.of(strikePair, forwardRate);\\n524:   }\\n525: \\n526:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n527:   /**\\n528:    * Calculates the implied Black volatility of the FX barrier option product.\\n529:    *\\n530:    * @param option  the option product\\n531:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n532:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n533:    * @return the implied volatility of the product\\n534:    * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the option has expired\\n535:    */\\n536:   public double impliedVolatility(\\n537:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n538:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n539:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n540: \\n541:     ZonedDateTime expiry = option.getUnderlyingOption().getExpiry();\\n542:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(expiry);\\n543:     if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\\n544:       throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"valuation is after option's expiry.\\\");\\n545:     }\\n546:     FxRate forward = forwardFxRate(option, ratesProvider);\\n547:     CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getCurrencyPair();\\n548:     double strike = option.getUnderlyingOption().getStrike();\\n549:     return volatilities.volatility(strikePair, expiry, strike, forward.fxRate(strikePair));\\n550:   }\\n551: \\n552:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n553:   /**\\n554:    * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX barrier option product.\\n555:    * \\n556:    * @param option  the option product\\n557:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n558:    * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\\n559:    * @return the currency exposure\\n560:    */\\n561:   public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\\n562:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n563:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n564:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n565: \\n566:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\\n567:     if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\\n568:       return MultiCurrencyAmount.empty();\\n569:     }\\n570:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\\n571:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\\n572:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n573:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n574:     if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\\n575:       if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\\n576:         return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.currencyExposure(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n577:       } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\\n578:         CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\\n579:         DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\\n580:         LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\\n581:         double pv = (option.getUnderlyingOption().getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) * rebate.getAmount() *\\n582:             ratesProvider.discountFactor(rebate.getCurrency(), paymentDate);\\n583:         Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\\n584:         double ceAmount = rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ? pv : todayFx * pv;\\n585:         return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(ccyCounter, ceAmount);\\n586:       }\\n587:       return MultiCurrencyAmount.empty();\\n588:     }\\n589:     ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n590:     double price = priceDerivatives.getValue();\\n591:     double delta = priceDerivatives.getDerivative(0);\\n592:     double signedNotional = signedNotional(underlyingOption);\\n593:     CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), (price - delta * todayFx) * signedNotional);\\n594:     CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\\n595:     return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\\n596:   }\\n597: \\n598:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n599:   //  The derivatives are [0] spot, [1] strike, [2] rate, [3] cost-of-carry, [4] volatility, [5] timeToExpiry, [6] spot twice\\n600:   private ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives(\\n601:       ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n602:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n603:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n604: \\n605:     validate(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\\n606:     SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\\n607:     ResolvedFxVanillaOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\\n608:     double[] derivatives = new double[7];\\n609:     if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\\n610:       return ValueDerivatives.of(0d, DoubleArray.ofUnsafe(derivatives));\\n611:     }\\n612:     ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\\n613:     CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\\n614:     Currency ccyBase = currencyPair.getBase();\\n615:     Currency ccyCounter = currencyPair.getCounter();\\n616:     DiscountFactors baseDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyBase);\\n617:     DiscountFactors counterDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter);\\n618: \\n619:     double rateBase = baseDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n620:     double rateCounter = counterDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n621:     double costOfCarry = rateCounter - rateBase;\\n622:     double dfBase = baseDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n623:     double dfCounter = counterDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\\n624:     double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\\n625:     double strike = underlyingOption.getStrike();\\n626:     double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\\n627:     double volatility = volatilities.volatility(currencyPair, underlyingOption.getExpiry(), strike, forward);\\n628:     double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\\n629:     ValueDerivatives valueDerivatives = BARRIER_PRICER.priceAdjoint(\\n630:         todayFx, strike, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, underlyingOption.getPutCall().isCall(), barrier);\\n631:     if (!option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\\n632:       return valueDerivatives;\\n633:     }\\n634:     CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\\n635:     ValueDerivatives valueDerivativesRebate = rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ?\\n636:         CASH_REBATE_PRICER.priceAdjoint(todayFx, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, barrier.inverseKnockType()) :\\n637:         ASSET_REBATE_PRICER.priceAdjoint(todayFx, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, barrier.inverseKnockType());\\n638:     double rebateRate = rebate.getAmount() / Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\\n639:     double price = valueDerivatives.getValue() + rebateRate * valueDerivativesRebate.getValue();\\n640:     derivatives[0] = valueDerivatives.getDerivative(0) + rebateRate * valueDerivativesRebate.getDerivative(0);\\n641:     derivatives[1] = valueDerivatives.getDerivative(1);\\n642:     for (int i = 2; i < 7; ++i) {\\n643:       derivatives[i] = valueDerivatives.getDerivative(i) + rebateRate * valueDerivativesRebate.getDerivative(i - 1);\\n644:     }\\n645:     return ValueDerivatives.of(price, DoubleArray.ofUnsafe(derivatives));\\n646:   }\\n647: \\n648:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n649:   // calculate spot lag for rebate\\n650:   private DaysAdjustment spotAdjustment(CurrencyPair currencyPair) {\\n651:     return FxIndex.extendedEnum().lookupAll().values().stream()\\n652:         .filter(index -> index.getCurrencyPair().equals(currencyPair))\\n653:         .findFirst()\\n654:         .map(FxIndex::getFixingDateOffset)\\n655:         .map(adjustment -> adjustment.toBuilder().days(-adjustment.getDays()).build())\\n656:         .orElseGet(() -> DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(2, calendarForPair(currencyPair)));\\n657:   }\\n658: \\n659:   private HolidayCalendarId calendarForPair(CurrencyPair pair) {\\n660:     return pair.toSet().stream()\\n661:         .map(currency -> defaultByCurrencyOrNoHolidays(currency))\\n662:         .reduce(HolidayCalendarIds.NO_HOLIDAYS, HolidayCalendarId::combinedWith);\\n663:   }\\n664: \\n665:   private HolidayCalendarId defaultByCurrencyOrNoHolidays(Currency currency) {\\n666:     try {\\n667:       return HolidayCalendarId.defaultByCurrency(currency);\\n668:     } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {\\n669:       return HolidayCalendarIds.NO_HOLIDAYS;\\n670:     }\\n671:   }\\n672: \\n673:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n674:   private void validate(ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\\n675:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n676:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\\n677: \\n678:     ArgChecker.isTrue(option.getBarrier() instanceof SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier,\\n679:         \\\"Barrier should be SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier\\\");\\n680:     ArgChecker.isTrue(ratesProvider.getValuationDate().isEqual(volatilities.getValuationDateTime().toLocalDate()),\\n681:         \\\"Volatility and rate data must be for the same date\\\");\\n682:   }\\n683: \\n684:   // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\\n685:   private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxVanillaOption option) {\\n686:     return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\\n687:         Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\\n688:   }\\n689: \\n690:   private boolean alreadyTouched(double fxRate, SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier) {\\n691:     if (barrier.getBarrierType().isDown()) {\\n692:       return fxRate <= barrier.getBarrierLevel();\\n693:     }\\n694:     return fxRate >= barrier.getBarrierLevel();\\n695:   }\\n696: \\n697: }\\n698: //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n649:   // calculate spot lag for rebate\n650:   private DaysAdjustment spotAdjustment(CurrencyPair currencyPair) {\n651:     return FxIndex.extendedEnum().lookupAll().values().stream()\n652:         .filter(index -> index.getCurrencyPair().equals(currencyPair))\n653:         .findFirst()\n654:         .map(FxIndex::getFixingDateOffset)\n655:         .map(adjustment -> adjustment.toBuilder().days(-adjustment.getDays()).build())\n656:         .orElseGet(() -> DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(2, calendarForPair(currencyPair)));\n657:   }\n658: \n659:   private HolidayCalendarId calendarForPair(CurrencyPair pair) {\n660:     return pair.toSet().stream()\n661:         .map(currency -> defaultByCurrencyOrNoHolidays(currency))\n662:         .reduce(HolidayCalendarIds.NO_HOLIDAYS, HolidayCalendarId::combinedWith);\n663:   }\n664: \n665:   private HolidayCalendarId defaultByCurrencyOrNoHolidays(Currency currency) {\n666:     try {\n667:       return HolidayCalendarId.defaultByCurrency(currency);\n668:     } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {\n669:       return HolidayCalendarIds.NO_HOLIDAYS;\n670:     }\n671:   }\n672: \n673:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n674:   private void validate(ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n675:       RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n676:       BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n677: \n678:     ArgChecker.isTrue(option.getBarrier() instanceof SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier,\n679:         \"Barrier should be SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier\");\n680:     ArgChecker.isTrue(ratesProvider.getValuationDate().isEqual(volatilities.getValuationDateTime().toLocalDate()),\n681:         \"Volatility and rate data must be for the same date\");\n682:   }\n683: \n684:   // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\n685:   private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxVanillaOption option) {\n686:     return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\n687:         Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n688:   }\n689: \n690:   private boolean alreadyTouched(double fxRate, SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier) {\n691:     if (barrier.getBarrierType().isDown()) {\n692:       return fxRate <= barrier.getBarrierLevel();\n693:     }\n694:     return fxRate >= barrier.getBarrierLevel();\n695:   }\n696: \n697: }\n698: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java%3FL500-700"
  }
}

76. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2021 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BUY_SELL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PRICE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.QUANTITY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.SECURITY_ID_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.SECURITY_ID_SCHEME_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityQuantityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.BuySell;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PayReceive;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.Swap;\n\n/**\n * Groups several utilities methods for CsvPlugins\n */\npublic final class CsvWriterUtils {\n\n  /**\n   * Restricted constructor\n   */\n  private CsvWriterUtils() {\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param premium  the premium\n   */\n  public static void writePremiumFields(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, AdjustablePayment premium) {\n    writeAdjustablePayment(\n        csv,\n        premium,\n        PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row\n   * @param adjustablePayment  the adjustable payment\n   * @param amountField  the amount field\n   * @param currencyField  the currency field\n   * @param directionField  the direction field\n   * @param dateField  the date field\n   * @param dateConventionField  the date convention field\n   * @param dateCalendarField  the date calendar field\n   */\n  public static void writeAdjustablePayment(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      AdjustablePayment adjustablePayment,\n      String amountField,\n      String currencyField,\n      String directionField,\n      String dateField,\n      String dateConventionField,\n      String dateCalendarField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(amountField, adjustablePayment.getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(currencyField, adjustablePayment.getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(adjustablePayment.getAmount()));\n    csv.writeCell(dateField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getUnadjusted());\n    csv.writeCell(dateConventionField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getConvention());\n    csv.writeCell(dateCalendarField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getCalendar());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a currency amount using the provided fields\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param ccyAmount  the currency amount to write\n   * @param amountField  the amount header\n   * @param currencyField  the currency header\n   * @param directionField  the direction header\n   */\n  public static void writeCurrencyAmount(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      CurrencyAmount ccyAmount,\n      String amountField,\n      String currencyField,\n      String directionField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(amountField, ccyAmount.getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(currencyField, ccyAmount.getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(ccyAmount.getAmount()));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a zoned date time using the provided field\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param zonedDateTime  the zoned date time object\n   * @param dateField  the date field\n   * @param timeField  the time field\n   * @param zoneField  the zone field\n   */\n  public static void writeZonedDateTime(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      ZonedDateTime zonedDateTime,\n      String dateField,\n      String timeField,\n      String zoneField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(dateField, zonedDateTime.toLocalDate());\n    csv.writeCell(timeField, zonedDateTime.toLocalTime());\n    csv.writeCell(zoneField, zonedDateTime.getZone());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a Barrier object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param barrier  the barrier\n   * @param obsDate  the barrier observation date\n   */\n  public static void writeBarrier(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Barrier barrier, LocalDate obsDate) {\n    csv.writeCell(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierType());\n    csv.writeCell(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getKnockType());\n    csv.writeCell(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierLevel(obsDate));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write the FxSingle to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param prefix  a prefix to use on leg headers (often far / near)\n   * @param product  the fx single\n   */\n  public static void writeFxSingle(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, String prefix, FxSingle product) {\n    FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxSingle(csv, prefix, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a FxEuropeanOption to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param product  the product\n   */\n  public static void writeFxEuropeanOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxEuropeanOption product) {\n    FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxEuropeanOption(csv, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a Swap to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param product  the swap to write\n   */\n  public static void writeSwap(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Swap product) {\n    FullSwapTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeProduct(csv, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a SecurityQuantityTrade to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param trade  the security quantity trade\n   */\n  public static void writeSecurityQuantityTrade(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, SecurityQuantityTrade trade) {\n    csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"Security\");\n    csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_SCHEME_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getScheme());\n    csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getValue());\n    csv.writeCell(BUY_SELL_FIELD, trade.getQuantity() < 0 ? BuySell.SELL : BuySell.BUY);\n    csv.writeCell(QUANTITY_FIELD, Math.abs(trade.getQuantity()));\n    csv.writeCell(PRICE_FIELD, trade.getPrice());\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/CsvWriterUtils.java"
}
Output
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2021 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BUY_SELL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PRICE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.QUANTITY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.SECURITY_ID_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.SECURITY_ID_SCHEME_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityQuantityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.BuySell;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PayReceive;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.Swap;\n\n/**\n * Groups several utilities methods for CsvPlugins\n */\npublic final class CsvWriterUtils {\n\n  /**\n   * Restricted constructor\n   */\n  private CsvWriterUtils() {\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param premium  the premium\n   */\n  public static void writePremiumFields(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, AdjustablePayment premium) {\n    writeAdjustablePayment(\n        csv,\n        premium,\n        PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row\n   * @param adjustablePayment  the adjustable payment\n   * @param amountField  the amount field\n   * @param currencyField  the currency field\n   * @param directionField  the direction field\n   * @param dateField  the date field\n   * @param dateConventionField  the date convention field\n   * @param dateCalendarField  the date calendar field\n   */\n  public static void writeAdjustablePayment(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      AdjustablePayment adjustablePayment,\n      String amountField,\n      String currencyField,\n      String directionField,\n      String dateField,\n      String dateConventionField,\n      String dateCalendarField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(amountField, adjustablePayment.getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(currencyField, adjustablePayment.getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(adjustablePayment.getAmount()));\n    csv.writeCell(dateField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getUnadjusted());\n    csv.writeCell(dateConventionField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getConvention());\n    csv.writeCell(dateCalendarField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getCalendar());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a currency amount using the provided fields\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param ccyAmount  the currency amount to write\n   * @param amountField  the amount header\n   * @param currencyField  the currency header\n   * @param directionField  the direction header\n   */\n  public static void writeCurrencyAmount(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      CurrencyAmount ccyAmount,\n      String amountField,\n      String currencyField,\n      String directionField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(amountField, ccyAmount.getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(currencyField, ccyAmount.getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(ccyAmount.getAmount()));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a zoned date time using the provided field\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param zonedDateTime  the zoned date time object\n   * @param dateField  the date field\n   * @param timeField  the time field\n   * @param zoneField  the zone field\n   */\n  public static void writeZonedDateTime(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      ZonedDateTime zonedDateTime,\n      String dateField,\n      String timeField,\n      String zoneField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(dateField, zonedDateTime.toLocalDate());\n    csv.writeCell(timeField, zonedDateTime.toLocalTime());\n    csv.writeCell(zoneField, zonedDateTime.getZone());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a Barrier object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param barrier  the barrier\n   * @param obsDate  the barrier observation date\n   */\n  public static void writeBarrier(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Barrier barrier, LocalDate obsDate) {\n    csv.writeCell(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierType());\n    csv.writeCell(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getKnockType());\n    csv.writeCell(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierLevel(obsDate));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write the FxSingle to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param prefix  a prefix to use on leg headers (often far / near)\n   * @param product  the fx single\n   */\n  public static void writeFxSingle(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, String prefix, FxSingle product) {\n    FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxSingle(csv, prefix, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a FxEuropeanOption to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param product  the product\n   */\n  public static void writeFxEuropeanOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxEuropeanOption product) {\n    FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxEuropeanOption(csv, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a Swap to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param product  the swap to write\n   */\n  public static void writeSwap(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Swap product) {\n    FullSwapTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeProduct(csv, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a SecurityQuantityTrade to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param trade  the security quantity trade\n   */\n  public static void writeSecurityQuantityTrade(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, SecurityQuantityTrade trade) {\n    csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"Security\");\n    csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_SCHEME_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getScheme());\n    csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getValue());\n    csv.writeCell(BUY_SELL_FIELD, trade.getQuantity() < 0 ? BuySell.SELL : BuySell.BUY);\n    csv.writeCell(QUANTITY_FIELD, Math.abs(trade.getQuantity()));\n    csv.writeCell(PRICE_FIELD, trade.getPrice());\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/CsvWriterUtils.java",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}
77. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2021 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.ZoneId;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\n\n/**\n * Handles the CSV files format for FX Single Barrier Option trades.\n */\npublic class FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The singleton instance of the plugin.\n   */\n  public static final FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\n\n  /**\n   * The CSV headers.\n   */\n  public static final Set<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.<String>builder()\n      .addAll(FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.headers(ImmutableList.of()))\n      .add(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD)\n      .add(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD)\n      .add(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD)\n      .add(REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD)\n      .add(REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD)\n      .add(REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD)\n      .build();\n\n  /**\n   * Restricted constructor\n   */\n  private FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(\"FXSINGLEBARRIEROPTION\", \"FX SINGLE BARRIER OPTION\");\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\n      Class<?> requiredJavaType,\n      CsvRow baseRow,\n      List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\n      TradeInfo info,\n      TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n\n    if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class)) {\n      return Optional.of(parse(baseRow, info, resolver));\n    }\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n  private FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade parse(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n    FxEuropeanOptionTrade europeanOptionTrade = resolver.parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(row, info);\n    Barrier barrier = CsvLoaderUtils.parseBarrierFromDefaultFields(row);\n\n    FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder productBuilder = FxSingleBarrierOption.builder()\n        .underlyingOption(europeanOptionTrade.getProduct())\n        .barrier(barrier);\n\n    CsvLoaderUtils.tryParseCurrencyAmountWithDirection(\n        row,\n        REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n        REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n        REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD\n    ).ifPresent(productBuilder::rebate);\n\n    FxEuropeanOption option = europeanOptionTrade.getProduct();\n    return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.builder()\n        .product(productBuilder.build())\n        .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\n            .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, option.getExpiryDate())))\n        .info(info)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String getName() {\n    return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class);\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<String> headers(List<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> trades) {\n    return HEADERS;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public void writeCsv(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade trade) {\n    csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"FxSingleBarrierOption\");\n    writeSingleBarrierOption(csv, trade.getProduct());\n    CsvWriterUtils.writePremiumFields(csv, trade.getPremium());\n    csv.writeNewLine();\n  }\n\n  void writeSingleBarrierOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxSingleBarrierOption product) {\n    CsvWriterUtils.writeFxEuropeanOption(csv, product.getUnderlyingOption());\n    CsvWriterUtils.writeBarrier(csv, product.getBarrier(), LocalDate.now(ZoneId.systemDefault()));\n    product.getRebate().ifPresent(ccyAmount -> CsvWriterUtils.writeCurrencyAmount(\n        csv,\n        ccyAmount,\n        REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n        REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n        REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD));\n  }\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java"
}
Output
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2021 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.ZoneId;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\n\n/**\n * Handles the CSV files format for FX Single Barrier Option trades.\n */\npublic class FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The singleton instance of the plugin.\n   */\n  public static final FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\n\n  /**\n   * The CSV headers.\n   */\n  public static final Set<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.<String>builder()\n      .addAll(FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.headers(ImmutableList.of()))\n      .add(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD)\n      .add(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD)\n      .add(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD)\n      .add(REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD)\n      .add(REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD)\n      .add(REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD)\n      .build();\n\n  /**\n   * Restricted constructor\n   */\n  private FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(\"FXSINGLEBARRIEROPTION\", \"FX SINGLE BARRIER OPTION\");\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\n      Class<?> requiredJavaType,\n      CsvRow baseRow,\n      List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\n      TradeInfo info,\n      TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n\n    if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class)) {\n      return Optional.of(parse(baseRow, info, resolver));\n    }\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n  private FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade parse(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n    FxEuropeanOptionTrade europeanOptionTrade = resolver.parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(row, info);\n    Barrier barrier = CsvLoaderUtils.parseBarrierFromDefaultFields(row);\n\n    FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder productBuilder = FxSingleBarrierOption.builder()\n        .underlyingOption(europeanOptionTrade.getProduct())\n        .barrier(barrier);\n\n    CsvLoaderUtils.tryParseCurrencyAmountWithDirection(\n        row,\n        REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n        REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n        REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD\n    ).ifPresent(productBuilder::rebate);\n\n    FxEuropeanOption option = europeanOptionTrade.getProduct();\n    return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.builder()\n        .product(productBuilder.build())\n        .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\n            .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, option.getExpiryDate())))\n        .info(info)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String getName() {\n    return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class);\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<String> headers(List<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> trades) {\n    return HEADERS;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public void writeCsv(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade trade) {\n    csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"FxSingleBarrierOption\");\n    writeSingleBarrierOption(csv, trade.getProduct());\n    CsvWriterUtils.writePremiumFields(csv, trade.getPremium());\n    csv.writeNewLine();\n  }\n\n  void writeSingleBarrierOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxSingleBarrierOption product) {\n    CsvWriterUtils.writeFxEuropeanOption(csv, product.getUnderlyingOption());\n    CsvWriterUtils.writeBarrier(csv, product.getBarrier(), LocalDate.now(ZoneId.systemDefault()));\n    product.getRebate().ifPresent(ccyAmount -> CsvWriterUtils.writeCurrencyAmount(\n        csv,\n        ccyAmount,\n        REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n        REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n        REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD));\n  }\n}\n",

78. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2017 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.CCP_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.DESCRIPTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.NAME_FIELD;\n\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Optional;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport
