underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    Currency ccyBase = underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n    Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.price(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n      } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n        CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n        DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\n        LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\n        double rebatePrice = rebate.getAmount() * ratesProvider.discountFactor(rebate.getCurrency(), paymentDate) /\n            Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n        return rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ? rebatePrice : todayFx * rebatePrice;\n      }\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    DiscountFactors baseDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyBase);\n    DiscountFactors counterDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter);\n    double rateBase = baseDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double rateCounter = counterDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double costOfCarry = rateCounter - rateBase;\n    double dfBase = baseDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double dfCounter = counterDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double strike = underlyingOption.getStrike();\n    double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(currencyPair, underlyingOption.getExpiry(), strike, forward);\n    double price = BARRIER_PRICER.price(\n        todayFx, strike, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, underlyingOption.getPutCall().isCall(), barrier);\n    if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n      CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n      double priceRebate = rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ?\n          CASH_REBATE_PRICER.price(todayFx, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, barrier.inverseKnockType()) :\n          ASSET_REBATE_PRICER.price(todayFx, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, barrier.inverseKnockType());\n      price += priceRebate * rebate.getAmount() / Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n    }\n    return price;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of {@link #presentValue} to\n   * the underlying curves.\n   * <p>\n   * The volatility is fixed in this sensitivity computation, i.e., sticky-strike.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\n   */\n  public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        PointSensitivities underlyingOptionSensitivity = VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n            option.getUnderlyingOption(), ratesProvider, volatilities);\n        return PointSensitivityBuilder.of(underlyingOptionSensitivity.getSensitivities());\n      } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n        CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n        DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\n        LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\n        ZeroRateSensitivity rebaseSensitivity = ratesProvider.discountFactors(rebate.getCurrency())\n            .zeroRatePointSensitivity(paymentDate);\n        Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n        return rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ?\n            rebaseSensitivity.multipliedBy(rebate.getAmount()) :\n            rebaseSensitivity.multipliedBy(rebate.getAmount() * todayFx).withCurrency(ccyCounter);\n      }\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(underlyingOption);\n    double counterYearFraction =\n        ratesProvider.discountFactors(currencyPair.getCounter()).relativeYearFraction(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    ZeroRateSensitivity counterSensi = ZeroRateSensitivity.of(\n        currencyPair.getCounter(),\n        counterYearFraction,\n        signedNotional * (priceDerivatives.getDerivative(2) + priceDerivatives.getDerivative(3)));\n    double baseYearFraction =\n        ratesProvider.discountFactors(currencyPair.getBase()).relativeYearFraction(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    ZeroRateSensitivity baseSensi = ZeroRateSensitivity.of(\n        currencyPair.getBase(),\n        baseYearFraction,\n        currencyPair.getCounter(),\n        -priceDerivatives.getDerivative(3) * signedNotional);\n    return counterSensi.combinedWith(baseSensi);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value delta of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value delta is the first derivative of {@link #presentValue} with respect to spot.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value delta of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueDelta(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * delta);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the delta of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The delta is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the delta of the product\n   */\n  public double delta(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.delta(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n      } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n        Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n        CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n        if (!rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter)) {\n          DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\n          LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\n          return rebate.getAmount() * ratesProvider.discountFactor(rebate.getCurrency(), paymentDate) /\n              Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n        }\n      }\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return priceDerivatives.getDerivative(0);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value gamma of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value gamma is the second derivative of {@link #presentValue} with respect to spot.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value gamma of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueGamma(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double gamma = gamma(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * gamma);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the gamma of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The delta is the second derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the gamma of the product\n   */\n  public double gamma(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.gamma(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n      }\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return priceDerivatives.getDerivative(6);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n   * <p>\n   * The result is a single sensitivity to the volatility used. This is also called Black vega.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n            option.getUnderlyingOption(), ratesProvider, volatilities);\n      }\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    Currency ccyBase = currencyPair.getBase();\n    Currency ccyCounter = currencyPair.getCounter();\n    double dfBase = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyBase, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double dfCounter = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\n    return FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n        volatilities.getName(),\n        currencyPair,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        underlyingOption.getStrike(),\n        forward,\n        ccyCounter,\n        priceDerivatives.getDerivative(4) * signedNotional(underlyingOption));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the vega of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The delta is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to Black volatility.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the vega of the product\n   */\n  public double vega(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.vega(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n      }\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return priceDerivatives.getDerivative(4);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value theta of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value theta is the negative of the first derivative of {@link #presentValue} with time parameter.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value theta of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueTheta(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double theta = theta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * theta);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the theta of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The theta is the negative of the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to time parameter.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the theta of the product\n   */\n  public double theta(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        Currency ccyBase = underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n        Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n        DiscountFactors baseDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyBase);\n        DiscountFactors counterDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter);\n        double rateBase = baseDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n        double rateCounter = counterDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n        double costOfCarry = rateCounter - rateBase;\n        double dfBase = baseDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n        double dfCounter = counterDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n        double strike = underlyingOption.getStrike();\n        double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\n        double volatility = volatilities.volatility(currencyPair, timeToExpiry, strike, forward);\n        boolean isCall = underlyingOption.getPutCall().isCall();\n        double fwdPrice = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n        double fwdTheta = BlackFormulaRepository.driftlessTheta(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n        double fwdDelta = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n        return dfCounter * (fwdTheta + rateCounter * fwdPrice - costOfCarry * forward * fwdDelta);\n      } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n        CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n        Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n        DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\n        LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\n        DiscountFactors discountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(rebate.getCurrency());\n        double rebateTheta = discountFactors.zeroRate(paymentDate) * rebate.getAmount() *\n            discountFactors.discountFactor(paymentDate) / Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n        return rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ? rebateTheta : todayFx * rebateTheta;\n      }\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return -priceDerivatives.getDerivative(5);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the forward exchange rate.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @return the forward rate\n   */\n  public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getCurrencyPair();\n    LocalDate paymentDate = option.getUnderlyingOption().getUnderlying().getPaymentDate();\n    double forwardRate = ratesProvider.fxForwardRates(strikePair).rate(strikePair.getBase(), paymentDate);\n    return FxRate.of(strikePair, forwardRate);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the implied Black volatility of the FX barrier option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the implied volatility of the product\n   * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the option has expired\n   */\n  public double impliedVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ZonedDateTime expiry = option.getUnderlyingOption().getExpiry();\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(expiry);\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"valuation is after option's expiry.\");\n    }\n    FxRate forward = forwardFxRate(option, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getCurrencyPair();\n    double strike = option.getUnderlyingOption().getStrike();\n    return volatilities.volatility(strikePair, expiry, strike, forward.fxRate(strikePair));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX barrier option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\n      return MultiCurrencyAmount.empty();\n    }\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.currencyExposure(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n      } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n        CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n        DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\n        LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\n        double pv = (option.getUnderlyingOption().getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) * rebate.getAmount() *\n            ratesProvider.discountFactor(rebate.getCurrency(), paymentDate);\n        Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n        double ceAmount = rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ? pv : todayFx * pv;\n        return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(ccyCounter, ceAmount);\n      }\n      return MultiCurrencyAmount.empty();\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double price = priceDerivatives.getValue();\n    double delta = priceDerivatives.getDerivative(0);\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(underlyingOption);\n    CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), (price - delta * todayFx) * signedNotional);\n    CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  //  The derivatives are [0] spot, [1] strike, [2] rate, [3] cost-of-carry, [4] volatility, [5] timeToExpiry, [6] spot twice\n  private ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    validate(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    double[] derivatives = new double[7];\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\n      return ValueDerivatives.of(0d, DoubleArray.ofUnsafe(derivatives));\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    Currency ccyBase = currencyPair.getBase();\n    Currency ccyCounter = currencyPair.getCounter();\n    DiscountFactors baseDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyBase);\n    DiscountFactors counterDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter);\n\n    double rateBase = baseDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double rateCounter = counterDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double costOfCarry = rateCounter - rateBase;\n    double dfBase = baseDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double dfCounter = counterDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    double strike = underlyingOption.getStrike();\n    double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(currencyPair, underlyingOption.getExpiry(), strike, forward);\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\n    ValueDerivatives valueDerivatives = BARRIER_PRICER.priceAdjoint(\n        todayFx, strike, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, underlyingOption.getPutCall().isCall(), barrier);\n    if (!option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n      return valueDerivatives;\n    }\n    CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n    ValueDerivatives valueDerivativesRebate = rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ?\n        CASH_REBATE_PRICER.priceAdjoint(todayFx, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, barrier.inverseKnockType()) :\n        ASSET_REBATE_PRICER.priceAdjoint(todayFx, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, barrier.inverseKnockType());\n    double rebateRate = rebate.getAmount() / Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n    double price = valueDerivatives.getValue() + rebateRate * valueDerivativesRebate.getValue();\n    derivatives[0] = valueDerivatives.getDerivative(0) + rebateRate * valueDerivativesRebate.getDerivative(0);\n    derivatives[1] = valueDerivatives.getDerivative(1);\n    for (int i = 2; i < 7; ++i) {\n      derivatives[i] = valueDerivatives.getDerivative(i) + rebateRate * valueDerivativesRebate.getDerivative(i - 1);\n    }\n    return ValueDerivatives.of(price, DoubleArray.ofUnsafe(derivatives));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculate spot lag for rebate\n  private DaysAdjustment spotAdjustment(CurrencyPair currencyPair) {\n    return FxIndex.extendedEnum().lookupAll().values().stream()\n        .filter(index -> index.getCurrencyPair().equals(currencyPair))\n        .findFirst()\n        .map(FxIndex::getFixingDateOffset)\n        .map(adjustment -> adjustment.toBuilder().days(-adjustment.getDays()).build())\n        .orElseGet(() -> DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(2, calendarForPair(currencyPair)));\n  }\n\n  private HolidayCalendarId calendarForPair(CurrencyPair pair) {\n    return pair.toSet().stream()\n        .map(currency -> defaultByCurrencyOrNoHolidays(currency))\n        .reduce(HolidayCalendarIds.NO_HOLIDAYS, HolidayCalendarId::combinedWith);\n  }\n\n  private HolidayCalendarId defaultByCurrencyOrNoHolidays(Currency currency) {\n    try {\n      return HolidayCalendarId.defaultByCurrency(currency);\n    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {\n      return HolidayCalendarIds.NO_HOLIDAYS;\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  private void validate(ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(option.getBarrier() instanceof SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier,\n        \"Barrier should be SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(ratesProvider.getValuationDate().isEqual(volatilities.getValuationDateTime().toLocalDate()),\n        \"Volatility and rate data must be for the same date\");\n  }\n\n  // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\n  private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option) {\n    return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\n        Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n  }\n\n  private boolean alreadyTouched(double fxRate, SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier) {\n    if (barrier.getBarrierType().isDown()) {\n      return fxRate <= barrier.getBarrierLevel();\n    }\n    return fxRate >= barrier.getBarrierLevel();\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}

  "content": "{\"content\":\"55:   private static final CurrencyAmount REBATE = CurrencyAmount.of(USD, 5.0e4);\\n56: \\n57:   @Test\\n58:   public void test_of() {\\n59:     FxSingleBarrierOption test = FxSingleBarrierOption.of(VANILLA_OPTION, BARRIER, REBATE);\\n60:     assertThat(test.getBarrier()).isEqualTo(BARRIER);\\n61:     assertThat(test.getRebate().get()).isEqualTo(REBATE);\\n62:     assertThat(test.getUnderlyingOption()).isEqualTo(VANILLA_OPTION);\\n63:     assertThat(test.getCurrencyPair()).isEqualTo(VANILLA_OPTION.getCurrencyPair());\\n64:     assertThat(test.isCrossCurrency()).isTrue();\\n65:     assertThat(test.allPaymentCurrencies()).containsOnly(EUR, USD);\\n66:     assertThat(test.allCurrencies()).containsOnly(EUR, USD);\\n67:   }\\n68: \\n69:   @Test\\n70:   public void test_builder() {\\n71:     FxSingleBarrierOption test = FxSingleBarrierOption.builder()\\n72:         .underlyingOption(VANILLA_OPTION)\\n73: assertThat(test.getCurrencyPair()).isEqualTo(VANILLA_OPTION.getCurrencyPair());\\n80:   }\\n81: \\n82:   @Test\\n83:   public void test_of_noRebate() {\\n84:     FxSingleBarrierOption test = FxSingleBarrierOption.of(VANILLA_OPTION, BARRIER);\\n85:     assertThat(test.getBarrier()).isEqualTo(BARRIER);\\n86:     assertThat(test.getRebate().isPresent()).isFalse();\\n87: 104. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2017 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product;\n\nimport org.joda.convert.FromString;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.TypedString;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.named.Described;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.Bill;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.BondFuture;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.BondFutureOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.CapitalIndexedBond;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.FixedCouponBond;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.IborCapFloor;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.OvernightInArrearsCapFloor;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.cms.Cms;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.Cds;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsIndex;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.deposit.TermDeposit;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.dsf.Dsf;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.etd.EtdFutureSecurity;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.etd.EtdOptionSecurity;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fra.Fra;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxNdf;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSwap;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.index.IborFuture;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.index.IborFutureOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.index.OvernightFuture;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.index.OvernightFutureOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.payment.BulletPayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.Swap;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swaption.Swaption;\n\n/**\n * The type of a portfolio item.\n * <p>\n * This provides a classification of the trade or position.\n */\npublic final class ProductType\n    extends TypedString<ProductType>\n    implements Described {\n\n  /**\n   * A {@link BulletPayment}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType BULLET_PAYMENT = ProductType.of(\"BulletPayment\", \"Payment\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Bill}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType BILL = ProductType.of(\"Bill\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link FixedCouponBond} or {@link CapitalIndexedBond}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType BOND = ProductType.of(\"Bond\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link BondFuture}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType BOND_FUTURE = ProductType.of(\"BondFuture\", \"Bond Future\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link BondFutureOption}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType BOND_FUTURE_OPTION = ProductType.of(\"BondFutureOption\", \"Bond Future Option\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Cds}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType CDS = ProductType.of(\"Cds\", \"CDS\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link CdsIndex}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType CDS_INDEX = ProductType.of(\"Cds Index\", \"CDS Index\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Cms}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType CMS = ProductType.of(\"Cms\", \"CMS\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Dsf}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType DSF = ProductType.of(\"Dsf\", \"DSF\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Fra}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FRA = ProductType.of(\"Fra\", \"FRA\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link FxNdf}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FX_NDF = ProductType.of(\"FxNdf\", \"FX NDF\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link FxSingleBarrierOption}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FX_SINGLE_BARRIER_OPTION = ProductType.of(\"FxSingleBarrierOption\", \"FX Single Barrier Option\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link FxSingle}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FX_SINGLE = ProductType.of(\"FxSingle\", \"FX\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link FxSwap}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FX_SWAP = ProductType.of(\"FxSwap\", \"FX Swap\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link FxEuropeanOption}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION = ProductType.of(\"FxEuropeanOption\", \"FX European Option\");\n  /**\n   * A FX vanilla option (FX European option).\n   * @deprecated Use {@link #FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION} instead.\n   */\n  @Deprecated\n  public static final ProductType FX_VANILLA_OPTION = FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION;\n  /**\n   * A {@link IborCapFloor}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType IBOR_CAP_FLOOR = ProductType.of(\"IborCapFloor\", \"Cap/Floor\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link OvernightInArrearsCapFloor}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType OVERNIGHT_IN_ARREARS_CAP_FLOOR = ProductType.of(\n      \"OvernightInArrearsCapFloor\",\n      \"Overnight In Arrears Cap/Floor\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link IborFuture}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType IBOR_FUTURE = ProductType.of(\"IborFuture\", \"STIR Future\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link IborFutureOption}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType IBOR_FUTURE_OPTION = ProductType.of(\"IborFutureOption\", \"STIR Future Option\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link OvernightFuture}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType OVERNIGHT_FUTURE = ProductType.of(\"OvernightFuture\", \"Overnight Future\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link OvernightFutureOption}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType OVERNIGHT_FUTURE_OPTION = ProductType.of(\"OvernightFutureOption\", \"Overnight Future Option\");\n  /**\n   * A representation based on sensitivities.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType SENSITIVITIES = ProductType.of(\"Sensitivities\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Swap}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType SWAP = ProductType.of(\"Swap\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Swaption}.\n   */\n known.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType SECURITY = ProductType.of(\"Security\");\n  /**\n   * A product only used for calibration.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType CALIBRATION = be empty.\n   *\n   * @param name  the name\n   * @return a type instance with the specified name\n   */\n  @FromString\n  public static ProductType of(String name) {\n    return new ProductType(name, com.opengamma.strata.collect.named.Described;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.Bill;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.bond.BondFuture;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.dsf.Dsf;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.etd.EtdFutureSecurity;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.etd.EtdOptionSecurity;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.index.IborFuture;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.index.IborFutureOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.index.OvernightFuture;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.index.OvernightFutureOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.payment.BulletPayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.Swap;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swaption.Swaption;\n\n/**\n * The type of a portfolio item.\n * <p>\n * This provides a classification of the trade or position.\n */\npublic final class ProductType\n    extends TypedString<ProductType>\n    implements Described {\n\n  /**\n   * A {@link BulletPayment}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType BULLET_PAYMENT = ProductType.of(\"BulletPayment\", \"Payment\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Bill}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType BILL = {@link FxSingleBarrierOption}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FX_SINGLE_BARRIER_OPTION = ProductType.of(\"FxSingleBarrierOption\", \"FX Single Barrier Option\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link FxSingle}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FX_SINGLE = ProductType.of(\"FxSingle\", \"FX\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link FxSwap}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType FX_SWAP = description);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param name  the name\n   * @param description  the description\n   */\n  private ProductType(String name, String description) {\n BulletPayment}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType BULLET_PAYMENT = ProductType.of(\"BulletPayment\", \"Payment\");\n  /**\n   * A {@link Bill}.\n   */\n  public static final ProductType BILL =   "content": "{\"content\":\"40:   @Test\\n41:   public void test_builder() {\\n42:     FxVanillaOptionTrade test = sut();\\n43:     assertThat(test.getProduct()).isEqualTo(PRODUCT);\\n44:     assertThat(test.getProduct().getCurrencyPair()).isEqualTo(PRODUCT.getCurrencyPair());\\n45:     assertThat(test.getInfo()).isEqualTo(TRADE_INFO);\\n46:     assertThat(test.getPremium()).isEqualTo(PREMIUM);\\n47:     assertThat(test.withInfo(TRADE_INFO).getInfo()).isEqualTo(TRADE_INFO);\\n48:   }\\n49: \\n50:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n51:   @Test\\n52:   public void test_summarize() {\\n53:     FxVanillaOptionTrade trade = sut();\\n54:     PortfolioItemSummary expected = PortfolioItemSummary.builder()\\n55:         .portfolioItemType(PortfolioItemType.TRADE)\\n56:         .productType(ProductType.FX_VANILLA_OPTION)\\n57:         .currencies(Currency.USD, Currency.EUR)\\n58:         .description(\\\"Long Rec EUR 1mm @ EUR/USD 1.35 Premium EUR 50k : 14Feb15\\\")\\n59:         .build();\\n60:     assertThat(trade.summarize()).isEqualTo(expected);\\n61:   }\\n62: \\n63:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n64:   @Test\\n65:   public void test_resolve() {\\n66:     FxVanillaOptionTrade test = sut();\\n67:     ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade expected = ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.builder()\\n68:         .info(TRADE_INFO)\\n69:         .product(PRODUCT.resolve(REF_DATA))\\n70:         .premium(PREMIUM.resolve(REF_DATA))\\n71:         .build();\\n72:     assertThat(test.resolve(REF_DATA)).isEqualTo(expected);\\n73:   }\\n74: \\n75:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n76:   @Test\\n77:   public void coverage() {\\n78:     coverImmutableBean(sut());\\n79:     coverBeanEquals(sut(), sut2());\\n80:   }\\n81: \\n82:   @Test\\n83:   public void test_serialization() {\\n84:     assertSerialization(sut());\\n85:   }\\n86: \\n87:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n88:   static FxVanillaOptionTrade sut() {\\n89:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.builder()\\n90:         .info(TRADE_INFO)\\n91:         .product(PRODUCT)\\n92:         .premium(PREMIUM)\\n93:         .build();\\n94:   }\\n95: \\n96:   static FxVanillaOptionTrade sut2() {\\n97:     AdjustablePayment premium = AdjustablePayment.of(CurrencyAmount.of(EUR, NOTIONAL * 0.01), date(2014, 11, 13));\\n98:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.builder()\\n99:         .product(PRODUCT2)\\n100:         .premium(premium)\\n101: assertThat(test.getProduct().getCurrencyPair()).isEqualTo(PRODUCT.getCurrencyPair());\n45:     assertThat(test.getInfo()).isEqualTo(TRADE_INFO);\n46:     assertThat(test.getPremium()).isEqualTo(PREMIUM);\n47:     assertThat(test.withInfo(TRADE_INFO).getInfo()).isEqualTo(TRADE_INFO);\n48:   }\n49: \n50:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n51:   @Test\n52:   public void test_summarize() {\n53:     FxVanillaOptionTrade trade = sut();\n54:     PortfolioItemSummary expected = PortfolioItemSummary.builder()\n55:         .portfolioItemType(PortfolioItemType.TRADE)\n56:         .productType(ProductType.FX_VANILLA_OPTION)\n57:         .currencies(Currency.USD, Currency.EUR)\n58:         .description(\"Long Rec EUR 1mm @ EUR/USD 1.35 Premium EUR 50k : 14Feb15\")\n59:         .build();\n60:     assertThat(trade.summarize()).isEqualTo(expected);\n61:   }\n62: \n63:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n64:   @Test\n65:   public void test_resolve() {\n66:     FxVanillaOptionTrade test = sut();\n67:     ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade expected = ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.builder()\n68:         .info(TRADE_INFO)\n69:         .product(PRODUCT.resolve(REF_DATA))\n70:         .premium(PREMIUM.resolve(REF_DATA))\n71:         .build();\n72:     assertThat(test.resolve(REF_DATA)).isEqualTo(expected);\n73:   }\n74: \n75:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n76:   @Test\n77:   public void coverage() {\n78:     coverImmutableBean(sut());\n79:     coverBeanEquals(sut(), sut2());\n80:   }\n81: \n82:   @Test\n83:   public void test_serialization() {\n84:     assertSerialization(sut());\n85:   }\n86: \n87:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n88:   static FxVanillaOptionTrade sut() {\n89:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.builder()\n90:         .info(TRADE_INFO)\n91:         .product(PRODUCT)\n92:         .premium(PREMIUM)\n93:         .build();\n94:   }\n95: \n96:   static FxVanillaOptionTrade sut2() {\n97:     AdjustablePayment premium = AdjustablePayment.of(CurrencyAmount.of(EUR, NOTIONAL * 0.01), date(2014, 11, 13));\n98:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.builder()\n99:         .product(PRODUCT2)\n100:         .premium(premium)\n101: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/product/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeTest.java%3FL40-100"
  }
}

  "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2017 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.CCP_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.DESCRIPTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.NAME_FIELD;\n\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Optional;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.AttributeType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityQuantityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfoBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.IborCapFloorTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.CcpId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsIndexTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.deposit.TermDepositTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fra.FraTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxNdfTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingleTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSwapTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.payment.BulletPaymentTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.SwapTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swaption.SwaptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Resolves additional information when parsing trade CSV files.\n * <p>\n * Data loaded from a CSV may contain additional information that needs to be captured.\n * This plugin point allows the additional CSV columns to be parsed and captured.\n */\npublic interface TradeCsvInfoResolver {\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance that uses the standard set of reference data.\n   *\n   * @return the resolver\n   */\n  public static TradeCsvInfoResolver standard() {\n    return StandardCsvInfoImpl.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance that uses the specified set of reference data.\n   *\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the resolver\n   */\n  public static TradeCsvInfoResolver of(ReferenceData refData) {\n    return StandardCsvInfoImpl.of(refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the reference data being used.\n   *\n   * @return the reference data\n   */\n  public abstract ReferenceData getReferenceData();\n\n  /**\n   * Parses standard attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n   * <p>\n   * This parses the standard set of attributes, which are the three constants in {@link AttributeType}.\n   * The column names are 'Description', 'Name' and 'CCP'.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param builder  the builder to update\n   */\n  public default void parseStandardAttributes(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n    row.findValue(DESCRIPTION_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.DESCRIPTION, str));\n    row.findValue(NAME_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.NAME, str));\n    row.findValue(CCP_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpId.of(str)));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n   * <p>\n   * If they are available, the trade ID, date, time and zone will have been set\n   * before this method is called. They may be altered if necessary, although\n   * this is not recommended.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param builder  the builder to update\n   */\n  public default void parseTradeInfo(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n    // do nothing\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called by each of the {@code completeTrade} methods.\n   *\n   * @param <T> the trade type\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default <T extends Trade> T completeTradeCommon(CsvRow row, T trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return trade;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FRA trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FraTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FraTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SecurityTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SecurityTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the Swap trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SwapTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwapTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the Swaption trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SwaptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwaptionTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default BulletPaymentTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, BulletPaymentTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default TermDepositTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, TermDepositTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX Forward trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxSingleTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxSingleTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX Swap trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX European Option trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxEuropeanOptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX NDF trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CDS trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default CdsTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, CdsTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CDS Index trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default CdsIndexTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, CdsIndexTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CapFloor trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Parses a FRA trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FRA trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FraTrade parseFraTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FraTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Security trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Security trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SecurityQuantityTrade parseSecurityTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SecurityTradeCsvPlugin.parseTradeWithPriceInfo(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Swap trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param variableRows   the CSV rows representing variable notional/rate etc\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Swap trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SwapTrade parseSwapTrade(CsvRow row, List<CsvRow> variableRows, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SwapTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, variableRows, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Swaption trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param variableRows   the CSV rows representing variable notional/rate etc\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Swaption trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SwaptionTrade parseSwaptionTrade(CsvRow row, List<CsvRow> variableRows, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SwaptionTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, variableRows, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Bullet Payment trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Bullet Payment trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default BulletPaymentTrade parseBulletPaymentTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return BulletPaymentTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Term Deposit trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Term Deposit trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default TermDepositTrade parseTermDepositTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return TermDepositTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX Single trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX Single trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxSingleTrade parseFxSingleTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX Swap trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX Swap trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxSwapTrade parseFxSwapTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxSwapTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX European Option trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX European Option trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxEuropeanOptionTrade parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX Vanilla Option trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX European Option trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   * @deprecated Use {@link #parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(CsvRow, TradeInfo)} instead.\n   */\n  @Deprecated\n  public default FxEuropeanOptionTrade parseFxVanillaOptionTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(row, info);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX NDF trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX NDF trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxNdfTrade parseFxNdfTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxNdfTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a CDS trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the CDS trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default CdsTrade parseCdsTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return CdsTradeCsvPlugin.parseCds(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a CDS Index trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the CDS trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default CdsIndexTrade parseCdsIndexTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return CdsIndexTradeCsvPlugin.parseCdsIndex(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses an IBOR CapFloor trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info the trade info\n   * @return the IBOR CapFloor trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default IborCapFloorTrade parseIborCapFloorTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return IborCapFloorTradeCsvPlugin.parseCapFloor(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses an overnight CapFloor trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info the trade info\n   * @return the overnight CapFloor trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade parseOvernightCapFloorTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTradeCsvPlugin.parseCapFloor(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Parses any kind of trade from CSV before standard matching.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called before the standard matching on the 'Product Type' column.\n   * As such, it allows the standard parsing to be replaced for a given type.\n   *\n   * @param typeUpper  the upper case product type column\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the trade, empty if the product type is not known, or if standard parsing should occur\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the product type is known but the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default Optional<Trade> overrideParseTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses any kind of trade from CSV after standard matching.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the standard matching on the 'Product Type' column.\n   * As such, it allows non-matched rows to be captured.\n   *\n   * @param typeUpper  the upper case product type column\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the trade, empty if the product type is not known\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the product type is known but the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default Optional<Trade> parseOtherTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/TradeCsvInfoResolver.java"
}
