loaded from a CSV may contain additional information that needs to be captured.\n * This plugin point allows the additional CSV columns to be parsed and captured.\n */\npublic interface TradeCsvInfoResolver {\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance that uses the standard set of reference data.\n   *\n   * @return the resolver\n   */\n  public static TradeCsvInfoResolver standard() {\n    return StandardCsvInfoImpl.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance that uses the specified set of reference data.\n   *\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the resolver\n   */\n  public static TradeCsvInfoResolver of(ReferenceData refData) {\n    return StandardCsvInfoImpl.of(refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the reference data being used.\n   *\n   * @return the reference data\n   */\n  public abstract ReferenceData getReferenceData();\n\n  /**\n   * Parses standard attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n   * <p>\n   * This parses the standard set of attributes, which are the three constants in {@link AttributeType}.\n   * The column names are 'Description', 'Name' and 'CCP'.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param builder  the builder to update\n   */\n  public default void parseStandardAttributes(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n    row.findValue(DESCRIPTION_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.DESCRIPTION, str));\n    row.findValue(NAME_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.NAME, str));\n    row.findValue(CCP_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpId.of(str)));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n   * <p>\n   * If they are available, the trade ID, date, time and zone will have been set\n   * before this method is called. They may be altered if necessary, although\n   * this is not recommended.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param builder  the builder to update\n   */\n  public default void parseTradeInfo(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n    // do nothing\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called by each of the {@code completeTrade} methods.\n   *\n   * @param <T> the trade type\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default <T extends Trade> T completeTradeCommon(CsvRow row, T trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return trade;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FRA trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FraTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FraTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SecurityTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SecurityTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the Swap trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SwapTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwapTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the Swaption trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SwaptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwaptionTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default BulletPaymentTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, BulletPaymentTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default TermDepositTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, TermDepositTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX Forward trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxSingleTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxSingleTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX Swap trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxSwapTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxSwapTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX European Option trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxEuropeanOptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX NDF trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxNdfTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxNdfTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CDS trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default CdsTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, CdsTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CDS Index trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default CdsIndexTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, CdsIndexTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CapFloor trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default IborCapFloorTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, IborCapFloorTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CapFloor trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Parses a FRA trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FRA trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FraTrade parseFraTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FraTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Security trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Security trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SecurityQuantityTrade parseSecurityTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SecurityTradeCsvPlugin.parseTradeWithPriceInfo(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Swap trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param variableRows   the CSV rows representing variable notional/rate etc\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Swap trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SwapTrade parseSwapTrade(CsvRow row, List<CsvRow> variableRows, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SwapTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, variableRows, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Swaption trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param variableRows   the CSV rows representing variable notional/rate etc\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Swaption trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SwaptionTrade parseSwaptionTrade(CsvRow row, List<CsvRow> variableRows, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SwaptionTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, variableRows, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Bullet Payment trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Bullet Payment trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default BulletPaymentTrade parseBulletPaymentTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return BulletPaymentTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Term Deposit trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Term Deposit trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default TermDepositTrade parseTermDepositTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return TermDepositTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX Single trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX Single trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxSingleTrade parseFxSingleTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX Swap trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX Swap trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxSwapTrade parseFxSwapTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxSwapTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX European Option trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX European Option trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxEuropeanOptionTrade parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX NDF trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX NDF trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxNdfTrade parseFxNdfTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxNdfTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a CDS trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the CDS trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default CdsTrade parseCdsTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return CdsTradeCsvPlugin.parseCds(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a CDS Index trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the CDS trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default CdsIndexTrade parseCdsIndexTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return CdsIndexTradeCsvPlugin.parseCdsIndex(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses an IBOR CapFloor trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info the trade info\n   * @return the IBOR CapFloor trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default IborCapFloorTrade parseIborCapFloorTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return IborCapFloorTradeCsvPlugin.parseCapFloor(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses an overnight CapFloor trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info the trade info\n   * @return the overnight CapFloor trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade parseOvernightCapFloorTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTradeCsvPlugin.parseCapFloor(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Parses any kind of trade from CSV before standard matching.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called before the standard matching on the 'Product Type' column.\n   * As such, it allows the standard parsing to be replaced for a given type.\n   *\n   * @param typeUpper  the upper case product type column\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the trade, empty if the product type is not known, or if standard parsing should occur\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the product type is known but the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default Optional<Trade> overrideParseTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses any kind of trade from CSV after standard matching.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the standard matching on the 'Product Type' column.\n   * As such, it allows non-matched rows to be captured.\n   *\n   * @param typeUpper  the upper case product type column\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the trade, empty if the product type is not known\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the product type is known but the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default Optional<Trade> parseOtherTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n}\n",

  "file": {
    "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2021 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BUY_SELL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PRICE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.QUANTITY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.SECURITY_ID_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.SECURITY_ID_SCHEME_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityQuantityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.BuySell;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PayReceive;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.Swap;\n\n/**\n * Groups several utilities methods for CsvPlugins\n */\npublic final class CsvWriterUtils {\n\n  /**\n   * Restricted constructor\n   */\n  private CsvWriterUtils() {\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param premium  the premium\n   */\n  public static void writePremiumFields(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, AdjustablePayment premium) {\n    writeAdjustablePayment(\n        csv,\n        premium,\n        PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row\n   * @param adjustablePayment  the adjustable payment\n   * @param amountField  the amount field\n   * @param currencyField  the currency field\n   * @param directionField  the direction field\n   * @param dateField  the date field\n   * @param dateConventionField  the date convention field\n   * @param dateCalendarField  the date calendar field\n   */\n  public static void writeAdjustablePayment(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      AdjustablePayment adjustablePayment,\n      String amountField,\n      String currencyField,\n      String directionField,\n      String dateField,\n      String dateConventionField,\n      String dateCalendarField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(amountField, adjustablePayment.getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(currencyField, adjustablePayment.getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(adjustablePayment.getAmount()));\n    csv.writeCell(dateField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getUnadjusted());\n    csv.writeCell(dateConventionField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getConvention());\n    csv.writeCell(dateCalendarField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getCalendar());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a currency amount using the provided fields\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param ccyAmount  the currency amount to write\n   * @param amountField  the amount header\n   * @param currencyField  the currency header\n   * @param directionField  the direction header\n   */\n  public static void writeCurrencyAmount(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      CurrencyAmount ccyAmount,\n      String amountField,\n      String currencyField,\n      String directionField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(amountField, ccyAmount.getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(currencyField, ccyAmount.getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(ccyAmount.getAmount()));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a zoned date time using the provided field\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param zonedDateTime  the zoned date time object\n   * @param dateField  the date field\n   * @param timeField  the time field\n   * @param zoneField  the zone field\n   */\n  public static void writeZonedDateTime(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      ZonedDateTime zonedDateTime,\n      String dateField,\n      String timeField,\n      String zoneField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(dateField, zonedDateTime.toLocalDate());\n    csv.writeCell(timeField, zonedDateTime.toLocalTime());\n    csv.writeCell(zoneField, zonedDateTime.getZone());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a Barrier object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param barrier  the barrier\n   * @param obsDate  the barrier observation date\n   */\n  public static void writeBarrier(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Barrier barrier, LocalDate obsDate) {\n    csv.writeCell(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierType());\n    csv.writeCell(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getKnockType());\n    csv.writeCell(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierLevel(obsDate));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write the FxSingle to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param prefix  a prefix to use on leg headers (often far / near)\n   * @param product  the fx single\n   */\n  public static void writeFxSingle(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, String prefix, FxSingle product) {\n    FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxSingle(csv, prefix, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a FxEuropeanOption to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param product  the product\n   */\n  public static void writeFxEuropeanOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxEuropeanOption product) {\n    FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxEuropeanOption(csv, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a Swap to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param product  the swap to write\n   */\n  public static void writeSwap(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Swap product) {\n    FullSwapTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeProduct(csv, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a SecurityQuantityTrade to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param trade  the security quantity trade\n   */\n  public static void writeSecurityQuantityTrade(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, SecurityQuantityTrade trade) {\n    csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"Security\");\n    csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_SCHEME_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getScheme());\n    csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getValue());\n    csv.writeCell(BUY_SELL_FIELD, trade.getQuantity() < 0 ? BuySell.SELL : BuySell.BUY);\n    csv.writeCell(QUANTITY_FIELD, Math.abs(trade.getQuantity()));\n    csv.writeCell(PRICE_FIELD, trade.getPrice());\n  }\n\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/CsvWriterUtils.java",
    "numLines": 199,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 199
  },
  "type": "text"
}

/**\\n36:  * Handles the CSV files format for FX Single Barrier Option trades.\\n37:  */\\n38: public class FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> {\\n39: \\n40:   /**\\n41:    * The singleton instance of the plugin.\\n42:    */\\n43:   public static final FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\\n44: \\n45:   /**\\n46:    * The CSV headers.\\n47:    */\\n48:   public static final Set<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.<String>builder()\\n49:       .addAll(FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.headers(ImmutableList.of()))\\n50:       .add(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD)\\n51:       .add(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD)\\n52:       .add(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD)\\n53:       .add(REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD)\\n54:       .add(REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD)\\n55:       .add(REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD)\\n56:       .build();\\n57: \\n58:   /**\\n59:    * Restricted constructor\\n60:    */\\n61:   private FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\\n62:   }\\n63: \\n64:   @Override\\n65:   public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\\n66:     return ImmutableSet.of(\\\"FXSINGLEBARRIEROPTION\\\", \\\"FX SINGLE BARRIER OPTION\\\");\\n67:   }\\n68: \\n69:   @Override\\n70:   public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\\n71:       Class<?> requiredJavaType,\\n72:       CsvRow baseRow,\\n73:       List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\\n74:       TradeInfo info,\\n75:       TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\\n76: \\n77:     if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class)) {\\n78:       return Optional.of(parse(baseRow, info, resolver));\\n79:     }\\n80:     return Optional.empty();\\n81:   }\\n82: \\n83:   private FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade parse(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\\n84:     FxVanillaOptionTrade vanillaOptionTrade = resolver.parseFxVanillaOptionTrade(row, info);\\n85:     Barrier barrier = CsvLoaderUtils.parseBarrierFromDefaultFields(row);\\n86: \\n87:     FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder productBuilder = FxSingleBarrierOption.builder()\\n88:         .underlyingOption(vanillaOptionTrade.getProduct())\\n89:         .barrier(barrier);\\n90: \\n91:     CsvLoaderUtils.tryParseCurrencyAmountWithDirection(\\n92:         row,\\n93:         REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\\n94:         REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\\n95:         REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD\\n96:     ).ifPresent(productBuilder::rebate);\\n97: \\n98:     FxVanillaOption option = vanillaOptionTrade.getProduct();\\n99:     return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.builder()\\n100:         .product(productBuilder.build())\\n101:         .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\\n102:             .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, option.getExpiryDate())))\\n103:         .info(info)\\n104:         .build();\\n105:   }\\n106: \\n107:   @Override\\n108:   public String getName() {\\n109:     return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\\n110:   }\\n111: \\n112:   @Override\\n113:   public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\\n114:     return ImmutableSet.of(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class);\\n115:   }\\n116: \\n117:   @Override\\n118:   public Set<String> headers(List<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> trades) {\\n119:     return HEADERS;\\n120:   }\\n121: \\n122:   @Override\\n123:   public void writeCsv(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade trade) {\\n124:     csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \\\"FxSingleBarrierOption\\\");\\n125:     writeSingleBarrierOption(csv, trade.getProduct());\\n126:     CsvWriterUtils.writePremiumFields(csv, trade.getPremium());\\n127:     csv.writeNewLine();\\n128:   }\\n129: \\n130:   void writeSingleBarrierOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxSingleBarrierOption product) {\\n131:     CsvWriterUtils.writeFxVanillaOption(csv, product.getUnderlyingOption());\\n132:     CsvWriterUtils.writeBarrier(csv, product.getBarrier(), LocalDate.now(ZoneId.systemDefault()));\\n133:     product.getRebate().ifPresent(ccyAmount -> CsvWriterUtils.writeCurrencyAmount(\\n134:         csv,\\n135:         ccyAmount,\\n136:         REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\\n137:         REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\\n138:         REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD));\\n139:   }\\n140: }\\n141:     "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2021 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n7: \n8: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD;\n9: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD;\n10: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD;\n11: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD;\n12: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD;\n13: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD;\n14: import static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\n15: \n16: import java.time.LocalDate;\n17: import java.time.ZoneId;\n18: import java.util.List;\n19: import java.util.Optional;\n20: import java.util.Set;\n21: \n22: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\n23: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\n24: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;\n32: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\n34: \n35: /**\n36:  * Handles the CSV files format for FX Single Barrier Option trades.\n37:  */\n38: public class FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> {\n39: \n40:   /**\n41:    * The singleton instance of the plugin.\n42:    */\n43:   public static final FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\n44: \n45:   /**\n46:    * The CSV headers.\n47:    */\n48:   public static final Set<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.<String>builder()\n49:       .addAll(FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.headers(ImmutableList.of()))\n50:       .add(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD)\n51:       .add(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD)\n52:       .add(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD)\n53:       .add(REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD)\n54:       .add(REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD)\n55:       .add(REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD)\n56:       .build();\n57: \n58:   /**\n59:    * Restricted constructor\n60:    */\n61:   private FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\n62:   }\n63: \n64:   @Override\n65:   public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\n66:     return ImmutableSet.of(\"FXSINGLEBARRIEROPTION\", \"FX SINGLE BARRIER OPTION\");\n67:   }\n68: \n69:   @Override\n70:   public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\n71:       Class<?> requiredJavaType,\n72:       CsvRow baseRow,\n73:       List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\n74:       TradeInfo info,\n75:       TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n76: \n77:     if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class)) {\n78:       return Optional.of(parse(baseRow, info, resolver));\n79:     }\n80:     return Optional.empty();\n81:   }\n82: \n83:   private FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade parse(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n84:     FxVanillaOptionTrade vanillaOptionTrade = resolver.parseFxVanillaOptionTrade(row, info);\n85:     Barrier barrier = CsvLoaderUtils.parseBarrierFromDefaultFields(row);\n86: \n87:     FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder productBuilder = FxSingleBarrierOption.builder()\n88:         .underlyingOption(vanillaOptionTrade.getProduct())\n89:         .barrier(barrier);\n90: \n91:     CsvLoaderUtils.tryParseCurrencyAmountWithDirection(\n92:         row,\n93:         REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n94:         REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n95:         REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD\n96:     ).ifPresent(productBuilder::rebate);\n97: \n98:     FxVanillaOption option = vanillaOptionTrade.getProduct();\n99:     return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.builder()\n100:         .product(productBuilder.build())\n101:         .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\n102:             .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, option.getExpiryDate())))\n103:         .info(info)\n104:         .build();\n105:   }\n106: \n107:   @Override\n108:   public String getName() {\n109:     return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\n110:   }\n111: \n112:   @Override\n113:   public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\n114:     return ImmutableSet.of(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class);\n115:   }\n116: \n117:   @Override\n118:   public Set<String> headers(List<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> trades) {\n119:     return HEADERS;\n120:   }\n121: \n122:   @Override\n123:   public void writeCsv(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade trade) {\n124:     csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"FxSingleBarrierOption\");\n125:     writeSingleBarrierOption(csv, trade.getProduct());\n126:     CsvWriterUtils.writePremiumFields(csv, trade.getPremium());\n127:     csv.writeNewLine();\n128:   }\n129: \n130:   void writeSingleBarrierOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxSingleBarrierOption product) {\n131:     CsvWriterUtils.writeFxVanillaOption(csv, product.getUnderlyingOption());\n132:     CsvWriterUtils.writeBarrier(csv, product.getBarrier(), LocalDate.now(ZoneId.systemDefault()));\n133:     product.getRebate().ifPresent(ccyAmount -> CsvWriterUtils.writeCurrencyAmount(\n134:         csv,\n135:         ccyAmount,\n136:         REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n137:         REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n138:         REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD));\n139:   }\n140: }\n141: ",

com.opengamma.strata.product.swaption.SwaptionTrade;\\n37: \\n38: /**\\n39:  * Resolves additional information when parsing trade CSV files.\\n40:  * <p>\\n41:  * Data loaded from a CSV may contain additional information that needs to be captured.\\n42:  * This plugin point allows the additional CSV columns to be parsed and captured.\\n43:  */\\n44: public interface TradeCsvInfoResolver {\\n45: \\n46:   /**\\n47:    * Obtains an instance that uses the standard set of reference data.\\n48:    * \\n49:    * @return the resolver\\n50:    */\\n51:   public static TradeCsvInfoResolver standard() {\\n52:     return StandardCsvInfoImpl.INSTANCE;\\n53:   }\\n54: \\n55:   /**\\n56:    * Obtains an instance that uses the specified set of reference data.\\n57:    * \\n58:    * @param refData  the reference data\\n59:    * @return the resolver\\n60:    */\\n61:   public static TradeCsvInfoResolver of(ReferenceData refData) {\\n62:     return StandardCsvInfoImpl.of(refData);\\n63:   }\\n64: \\n65:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n66:   /**\\n67:    * Gets the reference data being used.\\n68:    * \\n69:    * @return the reference data\\n70:    */\\n71:   public abstract ReferenceData getReferenceData();\\n72: \\n73:   /**\\n74:    * Parses standard attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\\n75:    * <p>\\n76:    * This parses the standard set of attributes, which are the three constants in {@link AttributeType}.\\n77:    * The column names are 'Description', 'Name' and 'CCP'.\\n78:    * \\n79:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\\n80:    * @param builder  the builder to update\\n81:    */\\n82:   public default void parseStandardAttributes(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\\n83:     row.findValue(DESCRIPTION_FIELD)\\n84:         .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.DESCRIPTION, str));\\n85:     row.findValue(NAME_FIELD)\\n86:         .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.NAME, str));\\n87:     row.findValue(CCP_FIELD)\\n88:         .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpId.of(str)));\\n89:   }\\n90: \\n91:   /**\\n92:    * Parses attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\\n93:    * <p>\\n94:    * If they are available, the trade ID, date, time and zone will have been set\\n95:    * before this method is called. They may be altered if necessary, although\\n96:    * this is not recommended.\\n97:    * \\n98:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\\n99:    * @param builder  the builder to update\\n100:    */\\n101: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/TradeCsvInfoResolver.java%3FL1-100\"}",

additional information that needs to be captured.\n42:  * This plugin point allows the additional CSV columns to be parsed and captured.\n43:  */\n44: public interface TradeCsvInfoResolver {\n45: \n46:   /**\n47:    * Obtains an instance that uses the standard set of reference data.\n48:    * \n49:    * @return the resolver\n50:    */\n51:   public static TradeCsvInfoResolver standard() {\n52: public abstract ReferenceData getReferenceData();\n72: \n73:   /**\n74:    * Parses standard attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n75:    * <p>\n76:    * This parses the standard set of attributes, which are the three constants in {@link AttributeType}.\n77:    * The column names are 'Description', 'Name' and 'CCP'.\n78:    * \n79:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n80:    * @param builder  the builder to update\n81:    */\n82:   public default void parseStandardAttributes(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n83:     row.findValue(DESCRIPTION_FIELD)\n84:         .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.DESCRIPTION, str));\n85:     row.findValue(NAME_FIELD)\n86:         .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.NAME, str));\n87:     row.findValue(CCP_FIELD)\n88:         .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpId.of(str)));\n89:   }\n90: \n91:   /**\n92:    * Parses attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n93:    * <p>\n94:    * If they are available, the trade ID, date, time and zone will have been set\n95:    * before this method is called. They may be altered if necessary, although\n96:    * this is not recommended.\n97:    * \n98:    * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n99:    * @param builder  the builder to update\n100:    */\n101: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/TradeCsvInfoResolver.java%3FL1-100"
  }
}

}\\n48: \\n49:   /**\\n50:    * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\\n51:    *\\n52:    * @param csv  the csv row output\\n53:    * @param premium  the premium\\n54:    */\\n55:   public static void writePremiumFields(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, AdjustablePayment premium) {\\n56:     writeAdjustablePayment(\\n57:         csv,\\n58:         premium,\\n59:         PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD,\\n60:         PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD,\\n61:         PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD,\\n62:         PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD,\\n63:         PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\\n64:         PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD);\\n65:   }\\n66: \\n67:   /**\\n68:    * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\\n69:    *\\n70:    * @param csv  the csv row\\n71:    * @param adjustablePayment  the adjustable payment\\n72:    * @param amountField  the amount field\\n73:    * @param currencyField  the currency field\\n74:    * @param directionField  the direction field\\n75:    * @param dateField  the date field\\n76:    * @param dateConventionField  the date convention field\\n77:    * @param dateCalendarField  the date calendar field\\n78:    */\\n79:   public static void  String directionField,\\n85:       String dateField,\\n86:       String dateConventionField,\\n87:       String dateCalendarField) {\\n88: \\n89:     csv.writeCell(amountField, adjustablePayment.getAmount());\\n90:     csv.writeCell(currencyField, adjustablePayment.getCurrency());\\n91:     csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(adjustablePayment.getAmount()));\\n92:     csv.writeCell(dateField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getUnadjusted());\\n93:     csv.writeCell(dateConventionField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getConvention());\\n94:     csv.writeCell(dateCalendarField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getCalendar());\\n95:   }\\n96: \\n97:   /**\\n98:    * Writes a currency amount using the provided fields\\n99:    *\\n100:    * @param csv  the csv row output\\n101:    * @param ccyAmount  the currency amount to write\\n102:    * @param amountField  the amount header\\n103:    * @param currencyField  the currency header\\n104:    * @param directionField  the direction header\\n105:    */\\n106:   public static void writeCurrencyAmount(\\n107:       CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\\n108:       CurrencyAmount ccyAmount,\\n109:       String amountField,\\n110:       String currencyField,\\n111:       String directionField) {\\n112: \\n113:     csv.writeCell(amountField, ccyAmount.getAmount());\\n114:     csv.writeCell(currencyField, ccyAmount.getCurrency());\\n115:     csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(ccyAmount.getAmount()));\\n116:   }\\n117: \\n118:   /**\\n119:    * Writes a zoned date time using the provided field\\n120:    *\\n121:    * @param csv  the csv row output\\n122:    * @param zonedDateTime  the zoned date time object\\n123:    * @param dateField  the date field\\n124:    * @param timeField  the time field\\n125:    * @param zoneField  the zone field\\n126:    */\\n127:   public static void writeZonedDateTime(\\n128:       CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\\n129:       ZonedDateTime zonedDateTime,\\n130:       String dateField,\\n131:       String timeField,\\n132:       String zoneField) {\\n133: \\n134:     csv.writeCell(dateField, zonedDateTime.toLocalDate());\\n135:     csv.writeCell(timeField, zonedDateTime.toLocalTime());\\n136:     csv.writeCell(zoneField, zonedDateTime.getZone());\\n137:   }\\n138: \\n139:   /**\\n140:    * Writes a Barrier object to CSV\\n141:    *\\n142:    * @param csv  the csv row output\\n143:    * @param barrier  the barrier\\n144:    * @param obsDate  the barrier observation date\\n145:    */\\n146:   public static void writeBarrier(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Barrier barrier, LocalDate obsDate) {\\n147:     csv.writeCell(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierType());\\n148:     csv.writeCell(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getKnockType());\\n149:     csv.writeCell(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierLevel(obsDate));\\n150:   }\\n151: \\n152:   /**\\n153:    * Write the FxSingle to CSV\\n154:    *\\n155:    * @param csv  the csv row output\\n156:    * @param prefix  a prefix to use on leg headers (often far / near)\\n157:    * @param product  the fx single\\n158:    */\\n159:   public static void writeFxSingle(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, String prefix, FxSingle product) {\\n160:     FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxSingle(csv, prefix, product);\\n161:   }\\n162: \\n163:   /**\\n164:    * Write a FxVanillaOption to CSV\\n165:    *\\n166:    * @param csv  the csv row output\\n167:    * @param product  the product\\n168:    */\\n169:   public static void writeFxVanillaOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxVanillaOption product) {\\n170:     FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxVanillaOption(csv, product);\\n171:   }\\n172: \\n173:   /**\\n174:    * Write a Swap to CSV\\n175:    *\\n176:    * @param csv  the csv row output\\n177:    * @param product  the swap to write\\n178:    */\\n179:   public static void writeSwap(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Swap product) {\\n180:     FullSwapTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeProduct(csv, product);\\n181:   }\\n182: \\n183:   /**\\n184:    * Write a SecurityQuantityTrade to CSV\\n185:    *\\n186:    * @param csv  the csv row output\\n187:    * @param trade  the security quantity trade\\n188:    */\\n189:   public static void writeSecurityQuantityTrade(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, SecurityQuantityTrade trade) {\\n190:     csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \\\"Security\\\");\\n191:     csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_SCHEME_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getScheme());\\n192:     csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getValue());\\n193:     csv.writeCell(BUY_SELL_FIELD, trade.getQuantity() < 0 ? BuySell.SELL : BuySell.BUY);\\n194:     csv.writeCell(QUANTITY_FIELD, Math.abs(trade.getQuantity()));\\n195:     csv.writeCell(PRICE_FIELD, trade.getPrice());\\n196:   }\\n197: \\n198: }\\n199: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/CsvWriterUtils.java\"}",

com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityQuantityTrade;\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;\n35: import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\n36: import com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.Swap;\n37: \n38: /**\n39:  * Groups several utilities methods for CsvPlugins\n40:  */\n41: public final class CsvWriterUtils {\n42: \n43:   /**\n44:    * Restricted constructor\n45:    */\n46:   private CsvWriterUtils() {\n47:   }\n48: \n49:   /**\n50:    * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\n51:    *\n52:    * @param csv  the csv row output\n53:    * @param premium  the premium\n54:    */\n55:   public static void writePremiumFields(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, AdjustablePayment premium) {\n56:     writeAdjustablePayment(\n57:         csv,\n58:         premium,\n59:         PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n60:         PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n61:         PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD,\n62:         PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD,\n63:         PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n64:         PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD);\n65:   }\n66: \n67:   /**\n68:    * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\n69:    *\n70:    * @param csv  the csv row\n71:    * @param adjustablePayment  the adjustable payment\n72:    * @param amountField  the amount field\n73:    * @param currencyField  the currency field\n74:    * @param directionField  the direction field\n75:    * @param dateField  the date field\n76:    * @param dateConventionField  the date convention field\n77:    * @param dateCalendarField  the date calendar field\n78:    */\n79:   public static void writeAdjustablePayment(\n80:       CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n81:       AdjustablePayment adjustablePayment,\n82:       String amountField,\n83:       String currencyField,\n84:       String directionField,\n85:       String dateField,\n86:       String dateConventionField,\n87:       String dateCalendarField) {\n88: \n89:     csv.writeCell(amountField, adjustablePayment.getAmount());\n90:     csv.writeCell(currencyField, adjustablePayment.getCurrency());\n91:     csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(adjustablePayment.getAmount()));\n92:     csv.writeCell(dateField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getUnadjusted());\n93:     csv.writeCell(dateConventionField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getConvention());\n94:     csv.writeCell(dateCalendarField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getCalendar());\n95:   }\n96: \n97:   /**\n98:    * Writes a currency amount using the provided fields\n99:    *\n100:    * @param csv  the csv row output\n101:    * @param ccyAmount  the currency amount to write\n102:    * @param amountField  the amount header\n103:    * @param currencyField  the currency header\n104:    * @param directionField  the direction header\n105:    */\n106:   public static void writeCurrencyAmount(\n107:       CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n108:       CurrencyAmount ccyAmount,\n109:       String amountField,\n110:       String currencyField,\n111:       String directionField) {\n112: \n113:     csv.writeCell(amountField, ccyAmount.getAmount());\n114:     csv.writeCell(currencyField, ccyAmount.getCurrency());\n115:     csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(ccyAmount.getAmount()));\n116:   }\n117: \n118:   /**\n119:    * Writes a zoned date time using the provided field\n120:    *\n121:    * @param csv  the csv row output\n122:    * @param zonedDateTime  the zoned date time object\n123:    * @param dateField  the date field\n124:    * @param timeField  the time field\n125:    * @param zoneField  the zone field\n126:    */\n127:   public static void writeZonedDateTime(\n128:       CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n129:       ZonedDateTime zonedDateTime,\n130:       String dateField,\n131:       String timeField,\n132:       String zoneField) {\n133: \n134:     csv.writeCell(dateField, zonedDateTime.toLocalDate());\n135:     csv.writeCell(timeField, zonedDateTime.toLocalTime());\n136:     csv.writeCell(zoneField, zonedDateTime.getZone());\n137:   }\n138: \n139:   /**\n140:    * Writes a Barrier object to CSV\n141:    *\n142:    * @param csv  the csv row output\n143:    * @param barrier  the barrier\n144:    * @param obsDate  the barrier observation date\n145:    */\n146:   public static void writeBarrier(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Barrier barrier, LocalDate obsDate) {\n147:     csv.writeCell(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierType());\n148:     csv.writeCell(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getKnockType());\n149:     csv.writeCell(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierLevel(obsDate));\n150:   }\n151: \n152:   /**\n153:    * Write the FxSingle to CSV\n154:    *\n155:    * @param csv  the csv row output\n156:    * @param prefix  a prefix to use on leg headers (often far / near)\n157:    * @param product  the fx single\n158:    */\n159:   public static void writeFxSingle(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, String prefix, FxSingle product) {\n160:     FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxSingle(csv, prefix, product);\n161:   }\n162: \n163:   /**\n164:    * Write a FxVanillaOption to CSV\n165:    *\n166:    * @param csv  the csv row output\n167:    * @param product  the product\n168:    */\n169:   public static void writeFxVanillaOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxVanillaOption product) {\n170:     FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxVanillaOption(csv, product);\n171:   }\n172: \n173:   /**\n174:    * Write a Swap to CSV\n175:    *\n176:    * @param csv  the csv row output\n177:    * @param product  the swap to write\n178:    */\n179:   public static void writeSwap(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Swap product) {\n180:     FullSwapTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeProduct(csv, product);\n181:   }\n182: \n183:   /**\n184:    * Write a SecurityQuantityTrade to CSV\n185:    *\n186:    * @param csv  the csv row output\n187:    * @param trade  the security quantity trade\n188:    */\n189:   public static void writeSecurityQuantityTrade(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, SecurityQuantityTrade trade) {\n190:     csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"Security\");\n191:     csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_SCHEME_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getScheme());\n192:     csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getValue());\n193:     csv.writeCell(BUY_SELL_FIELD, trade.getQuantity() < 0 ? BuySell.SELL : BuySell.BUY);\n194:     csv.writeCell(QUANTITY_FIELD, Math.abs(trade.getQuantity()));\n195:     csv.writeCell(PRICE_FIELD, trade.getPrice());\n196:   }\n197: \n198: }\n199: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/CsvWriterUtils.java"
  }

  "content": "{\"content\":\"55: /**\\n56:  * Handles the CSV file format for FX vanilla option trades.\\n57:  */\\n58: class FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxVanillaOptionTrade> {\\n59: \\n60:   /**\\n61:    * The singleton instance of the plugin.\\n62:    */\\n63:   public static final FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\\n64: \\n65:   /** The headers. */\\n66:   private static final ImmutableSet<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.of(\\n67:       LONG_SHORT_FIELD,\\n68:       PUT_CALL_FIELD,\\n69:       STRIKE_FIELD,\\n70:       EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD,\\n71:       EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD,\\n72:       EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD,\\n73:       PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD,\\n74:       PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\\n75:       PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD,\\n76:       PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD,\\n77:       PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD,\\n78:       PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD,\\n79:       LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD,\\n80:       LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD,\\n81:       LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD,\\n82:       PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD,\\n83:       PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\\n84:       PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD);\\n85: \\n86:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n87:   @Override\\n88:   public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\\n89:     return ImmutableSet.of(\\\"FXVANILLAOPTION\\\", \\\"FX VANILLA OPTION\\\");\\n90:   }\\n91: \\n92:   @Override\\n93:   public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\\n94:       Class<?> requiredJavaType,\\n95:       CsvRow baseRow,\\n96:       List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\\n97:       TradeInfo info,\\n98:       TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\\n99: \\n100:     if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxVanillaOptionTrade.class)) {\\n101:       return Optional.of(resolver.parseFxVanillaOptionTrade(baseRow, info));\\n102:     }\\n103:     return Optional.empty();\\n104:   }\\n105: \\n106:   @Override\\n107:   public String getName() {\\n108:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\\n109:   }\\n110: \\n111:   @Override\\n112:   public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\\n113:     return ImmutableSet.of(FxVanillaOptionTrade.class);\\n114:   }\\n115: \\n116:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n117:   /**\\n118:    * Parses the data from a CSV row.\\n119:    *\\n120:    * @param row  the CSV row object\\n121: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java%3FL55-120\"}",

    "content": "55: /**\n56:  * Handles the CSV file format for FX vanilla option trades.\n57:  */\n58: class FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxVanillaOptionTrade> {\n59: \n60:   /**\n61:    * The singleton instance of the plugin.\n62:    */\n63:   public static final FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\n64: \n65:   /** The headers. */\n66:   private static final ImmutableSet<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.of(\n67:       LONG_SHORT_FIELD,\n68:       PUT_CALL_FIELD,\n69:       STRIKE_FIELD,\n70:       EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD,\n71:       EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD,\n72:       EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD,\n73:       PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD,\n74:       PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n75:       PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD,\n76:       PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD,\n77:       PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n78:       PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n79:       LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n80:       LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD,\n81:       LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n82:       PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD,\n83:       PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n84:       PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD);\n85: \n86:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n87:   @Override\n88:   public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\n89:     return ImmutableSet.of(\"FXVANILLAOPTION\", \"FX VANILLA OPTION\");\n90:   }\n91: \n92:   @Override\n93:   public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\n94:       Class<?> requiredJavaType,\n95:       CsvRow baseRow,\n96:       List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\n97:       TradeInfo info,\n98:       TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n99: \n100:     if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxVanillaOptionTrade.class)) {\n101:       return Optional.of(resolver.parseFxVanillaOptionTrade(baseRow, info));\n102:     }\n103:     return Optional.empty();\n104:   }\n105: \n106:   @Override\n107:   public String getName() {\n108:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\n109:   }\n110: \n111:   @Override\n112:   public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\n113:     return ImmutableSet.of(FxVanillaOptionTrade.class);\n114:   }\n115: \n116:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n117:   /**\n118:    * Parses the data from a CSV row.\n119:    *\n120:    * @param row  the CSV row object\n121: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java%3FL55-120"

(row.findValue(PUT_CALL_FIELD).isPresent()) {\\n127:       FxVanillaOptionTrade trade = parseRow(row, info);\\n128:       return resolver.completeTrade(row, trade);\\n129:     }\\n130:     FxSingleTrade singleTrade = FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.parseRow(row, info);\\n131:     FxVanillaOptionTrade trade = parseRow(row, info, singleTrade.getProduct());\\n132:     return resolver.completeTrade(row, trade);\\n133:   }\\n134: \\n135:   // parses the trade from the underlying FX single\\n136:   private static FxVanillaOptionTrade parseRow(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, FxSingle underlying) {\\n137:     LongShort longShort = row.getValue(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseLongShort);\\n138:     LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\\n139:     LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseTime);\\n140:     ZoneId expiryZone = row.getValue(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseZoneId);\\n141: \\n142:     FxVanillaOption option = FxVanillaOption.builder()\\n143:         .longShort(longShort)\\n144:         .expiryDate(expiryDate)\\n145:         .expiryTime(expiryTime)\\n146:         .expiryZone(expiryZone)\\n147:         .underlying(underlying)\\n148:         .build();\\n149:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.builder()\\n150:         .info(info)\\n151:         .product(option)\\n152:         .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\\n153:             .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, expiryDate)))\\n154:         .build();\\n155:   }\\n156: \\n157:   // parse the trade from the currency pairs, base currency notional, and put/call\\n158:   private static FxVanillaOptionTrade parseRow(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\\n159:     LongShort longShort = row.getValue(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseLongShort);\\n160:     LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\\n161:     LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseTime);\\n162:     ZoneId expiryZone = row.getValue(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseZoneId);\\n163:     PutCall putCall = row.getValue(PUT_CALL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parsePutCall);\\n164:     Currency ccy1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\\n165:     Currency ccy2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\\n166:     LocalDate paymentDate = row.getValue(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\\n167:     double notional1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\\n168: \\n169:     double strike = parseStrike(row, notional1);\\n170: \\n171:     Optional<BusinessDayAdjustment> paymentAdj = CsvLoaderUtils\\n172:         .parseBusinessDayAdjustment(row, PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD)\\n173:         .filter(adj -> !adj.equals(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE));\\n174: \\n175:     ZonedDateTime expiry = expiryDate.atTime(expiryTime).atZone(expiryZone);\\n176:     CurrencyPair ccyPair = CurrencyPair.of(ccy1, ccy2);\\n177:     FxVanillaOption option = paymentAdj\\n178:         .map(adj -> FxVanillaOption.of(longShort, expiry, ccyPair, putCall, strike, notional1, paymentDate, adj))\\n179:         .orElseGet(() -> FxVanillaOption.of(longShort, expiry, ccyPair, putCall, strike, notional1, paymentDate));\\n180:     return FxVanillaOptionTrade.builder()\\n181:         .info(info)\\n182:         .product(option)\\n183:         .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\\n184:             .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, expiryDate)))\\n185:         .build();\\n186:   }\\n187: \\n188:   private static double parseStrike(CsvRow row, double notional1) {\\n189:     Optional<Double> strikeOpt = row.findValue(STRIKE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\\n190:     if (strikeOpt.isPresent()) {\\n191:       return strikeOpt.get();\\n192:     } else {\\n193:       double notional2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_NOTIONAL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\\n194:       return Math.abs(notional2 / notional1);\\n195:     }\\n196:   }\\n197: \\n198:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n199:   @Override\\n200:   public Set<String> headers(List<FxVanillaOptionTrade> trades) {\\n201:     return HEADERS;\\n202:   }\\n203: \\n204:   @Override\\n205:   public void writeCsv(CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxVanillaOptionTrade trade) {\\n206:     csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \\\"FxVanillaOption\\\");\\n207:     writeFxVanillaOption(csv, trade.getProduct());\\n208:     CsvWriterUtils.writePremiumFields(csv, trade.getPremium());\\n209:     csv.writeNewLine();\\n210:   }\\n211: \\n212:   protected void writeFxVanillaOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxVanillaOption product) {\\n213:     FxSingle underlying = product.getUnderlying();\\n214:     PutCall putCall = underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() > 0d ? PutCall.PUT : PutCall.CALL;\\n215:     double strike = Math.abs(underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() /\\n216:         underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\\n217:     csv.writeCell(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, product.getLongShort());\\n218:     csv.writeCell(PUT_CALL_FIELD, putCall);\\n219:     csv.writeCell(STRIKE_FIELD, strike);\\n220:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, product.getExpiryDate());\\n221:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, product.getExpiryTime());\\n222:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, product.getExpiryZone());\\n223:     csv.writeCell(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\\n224:     csv.writeCell(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, Math.abs(underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount()));\\n225:     csv.writeCell(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\\n226:     csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getDate());\\n227:     underlying.getPaymentDateAdjustment().ifPresent(bda -> {\\n228:       csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD, bda.getCalendar());\\n229:       csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, bda.getConvention());\\n230:     });\\n231:   }\\n232: \\n233:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n234:   // Restricted constructor.\\n235:   private FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\\n236:   }\\n237: \\n238: }\\n239: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java%3FL120-240\"}",

LoaderUtils::parseLongShort);\n138:     LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n139:     LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, notional, and put/call\n158:   private static FxVanillaOptionTrade parseRow(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n159:     LongShort longShort = row.getValue(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseLongShort);\n160:     LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n161:     LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parsePutCall);\n164:     Currency ccy1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\n165:     Currency ccy2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, expiryDate.atTime(expiryTime).atZone(expiryZone);\n176:     CurrencyPair ccyPair = CurrencyPair.of(ccy1, ccy2);\n177:     FxVanillaOption option = paymentAdj\n178:         .map(adj -> headers(List<FxVanillaOptionTrade> trades) {\n201:     return HEADERS;\n202:   }\n203: \n204:   @Override\n205:   public void writeCsv(CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxVanillaOptionTrade trade) {\n206: PutCall.PUT : PutCall.CALL;\n215:     double strike = Math.abs(underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() /\n216:         underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n217:     csv.writeCell(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, product.getLongShort());\n218:     csv.writeCell(PUT_CALL_FIELD, putCall);\n219:     csv.writeCell(STRIKE_FIELD, strike);\n220:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, product.getExpiryDate());\n221:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, product.getExpiryTime());\n222:     csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, product.getExpiryZone());\n223:     csv.writeCell(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\n224:     csv.writeCell(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, Math.abs(underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount()));\n225:     csv.writeCell(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\n226:     csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getDate());\n227:     underlying.getPaymentDateAdjustment().ifPresent(bda -> {\n228:       csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD, bda.getCalendar());\n229:       csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, bda.getConvention());\n230:     });\n231:   }\n232: \n233:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n234:   // Restricted constructor.\n235:   private FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\n236:   }\n237: \n238: }\n239: ",

Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/TradeCsvInfoResolver.java",
  "new_string": "import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;",
  "old_string": "import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",

}
Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/TradeCsvInfoResolver.java",
  "newString": "import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;",
  "oldString": "import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2017 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.CCP_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.DESCRIPTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.NAME_FIELD;\n\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Optional;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.AttributeType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityQuantityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfoBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.IborCapFloorTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.CcpId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsIndexTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.deposit.TermDepositTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fra.FraTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxNdfTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingleTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSwapTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.payment.BulletPaymentTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.SwapTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swaption.SwaptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Resolves additional information when parsing trade CSV files.\n * <p>\n * Data loaded from a CSV may contain additional information that needs to be captured.\n * This plugin point allows the additional CSV columns to be parsed and captured.\n */\npublic interface TradeCsvInfoResolver {\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance that uses the standard set of reference data.\n   *\n   * @return the resolver\n   */\n  public static TradeCsvInfoResolver standard() {\n    return StandardCsvInfoImpl.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance that uses the specified set of reference data.\n   *\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the resolver\n   */\n  public static TradeCsvInfoResolver of(ReferenceData refData) {\n    return StandardCsvInfoImpl.of(refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the reference data being used.\n   *\n   * @return the reference data\n   */\n  public abstract ReferenceData getReferenceData();\n\n  /**\n   * Parses standard attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n   * <p>\n   * This parses the standard set of attributes, which are the three constants in {@link AttributeType}.\n   * The column names are 'Description', 'Name' and 'CCP'.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param builder  the builder to update\n   */\n  public default void parseStandardAttributes(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n    row.findValue(DESCRIPTION_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.DESCRIPTION, str));\n    row.findValue(NAME_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.NAME, str));\n    row.findValue(CCP_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpId.of(str)));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n   * <p>\n   * If they are available, the trade ID, date, time and zone will have been set\n   * before this method is called. They may be altered if necessary, although\n   * this is not recommended.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param builder  the builder to update\n   */\n  public default void parseTradeInfo(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n    // do nothing\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called by each of the {@code completeTrade} methods.\n   *\n   * @param <T> the trade type\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default <T extends Trade> T completeTradeCommon(CsvRow row, T trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return trade;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FRA trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FraTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FraTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SecurityTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SecurityTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the Swap trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SwapTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwapTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the Swaption trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SwaptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwaptionTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default BulletPaymentTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, BulletPaymentTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default TermDepositTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, TermDepositTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX Forward trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxSingleTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxSingleTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX European Option trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxEuropeanOptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX NDF trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade
