}\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CDS trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default CdsTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, CdsTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CDS Index trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default CdsIndexTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, CdsIndexTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CapFloor trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default IborCapFloorTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, IborCapFloorTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CapFloor trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Parses a FRA trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FRA trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FraTrade parseFraTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FraTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Security trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Security trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SecurityQuantityTrade parseSecurityTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SecurityTradeCsvPlugin.parseTradeWithPriceInfo(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Swap trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param variableRows   the CSV rows representing variable notional/rate etc\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Swap trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SwapTrade parseSwapTrade(CsvRow row, List<CsvRow> variableRows, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SwapTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, variableRows, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Swaption trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param variableRows   the CSV rows representing variable notional/rate etc\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Swaption trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SwaptionTrade parseSwaptionTrade(CsvRow row, List<CsvRow> variableRows, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SwaptionTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, variableRows, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Bullet Payment trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Bullet Payment trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default BulletPaymentTrade parseBulletPaymentTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return BulletPaymentTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Term Deposit trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Term Deposit trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default TermDepositTrade parseTermDepositTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return TermDepositTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX Single trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX Single trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxSingleTrade parseFxSingleTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX Swap trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX Swap trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxSwapTrade parseFxSwapTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxSwapTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX European Option trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX European Option trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxEuropeanOptionTrade parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX NDF trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX NDF trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxNdfTrade parseFxNdfTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxNdfTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a CDS trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the CDS trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default CdsTrade parseCdsTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return CdsTradeCsvPlugin.parseCds(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a CDS Index trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the CDS trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default CdsIndexTrade parseCdsIndexTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return CdsIndexTradeCsvPlugin.parseCdsIndex(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses an IBOR CapFloor trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info the trade info\n   * @return the IBOR CapFloor trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default IborCapFloorTrade parseIborCapFloorTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return IborCapFloorTradeCsvPlugin.parseCapFloor(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses an overnight CapFloor trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info the trade info\n   * @return the overnight CapFloor trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade parseOvernightCapFloorTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTradeCsvPlugin.parseCapFloor(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Parses any kind of trade from CSV before standard matching.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called before the standard matching on the 'Product Type' column.\n   * As such, it allows the standard parsing to be replaced for a given type.\n   *\n   * @param typeUpper  the upper case product type column\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the trade, empty if the product type is not known, or if standard parsing should occur\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the product type is known but the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default Optional<Trade> overrideParseTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses any kind of trade from CSV after standard matching.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the standard matching on the 'Product Type' column.\n   * As such, it allows non-matched rows to be captured.\n   *\n   * @param typeUpper  the upper case product type column\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the trade, empty if the product type is not known\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the product type is known but the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default Optional<Trade> parseOtherTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n}\n",

  "new_string": "  /**\n   * Completes the FX Vanilla Option trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTrade(CsvRow, FxEuropeanOptionTrade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   * @deprecated Use {@link #completeTrade(CsvRow, FxEuropeanOptionTrade)} instead\n   */\n  @Deprecated\n  public default FxVanillaOptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxVanillaOptionTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX NDF trade, potentially parsing additional columns.",
  "old_string": "  /**\n   * Completes the FX NDF trade, potentially parsing additional columns.",
  "replace_all": false
}

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/TradeCsvInfoResolver.java",
  "newString": "  /**\n   * Completes the FX Vanilla Option trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTrade(CsvRow, FxEuropeanOptionTrade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   * @deprecated Use {@link #completeTrade(CsvRow, FxEuropeanOptionTrade)} instead\n   */\n  @Deprecated\n  public default FxVanillaOptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxVanillaOptionTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX NDF trade, potentially parsing additional columns.",
  "oldString": "  /**\n   * Completes the FX NDF trade, potentially parsing additional columns.",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2017 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.CCP_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.DESCRIPTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.NAME_FIELD;\n\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Optional;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.AttributeType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityQuantityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfoBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.IborCapFloorTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.CcpId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsIndexTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.deposit.TermDepositTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fra.FraTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxNdfTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingleTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSwapTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.payment.BulletPaymentTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.SwapTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swaption.SwaptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Resolves additional information when parsing trade CSV files.\n * <p>\n * Data loaded from a CSV may contain additional information that needs to be captured.\n * This plugin point allows the additional CSV columns to be parsed and captured.\n */\npublic interface TradeCsvInfoResolver {\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance that uses the standard set of reference data.\n   *\n   * @return the resolver\n   */\n  public static TradeCsvInfoResolver standard() {\n    return StandardCsvInfoImpl.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance that uses the specified set of reference data.\n   *\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the resolver\n   */\n  public static TradeCsvInfoResolver of(ReferenceData refData) {\n    return StandardCsvInfoImpl.of(refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the reference data being used.\n   *\n   * @return the reference data\n   */\n  public abstract ReferenceData getReferenceData();\n\n  /**\n   * Parses standard attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n   * <p>\n   * This parses the standard set of attributes, which are the three constants in {@link AttributeType}.\n   * The column names are 'Description', 'Name' and 'CCP'.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param builder  the builder to update\n   */\n  public default void parseStandardAttributes(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n    row.findValue(DESCRIPTION_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.DESCRIPTION, str));\n    row.findValue(NAME_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.NAME, str));\n    row.findValue(CCP_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpId.of(str)));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n   * <p>\n   * If they are available, the trade ID, date, time and zone will have been set\n   * before this method is called. They may be altered if necessary, although\n   * this is not recommended.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param builder  the builder to update\n   */\n  public default void parseTradeInfo(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n    // do nothing\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called by each of the {@code completeTrade} methods.\n   *\n   * @param <T> the trade type\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default <T extends Trade> T completeTradeCommon(CsvRow row, T trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return trade;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FRA trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FraTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FraTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SecurityTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SecurityTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the Swap trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SwapTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwapTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the Swaption trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SwaptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwaptionTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default BulletPaymentTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, BulletPaymentTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default TermDepositTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, TermDepositTrade trade) {\n row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxSingleTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxSingleTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default CdsTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, CdsTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CDS Index trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default CdsIndexTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, CdsIndexTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CapFloor trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default IborCapFloorTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, IborCapFloorTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CapFloor trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Parses a FRA trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FRA trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FraTrade parseFraTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FraTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Security trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Security trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SecurityQuantityTrade parseSecurityTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SecurityTradeCsvPlugin.parseTradeWithPriceInfo(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Swap trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param variableRows   the CSV rows representing variable notional/rate etc\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Swap trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SwapTrade parseSwapTrade(CsvRow row, List<CsvRow> variableRows, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SwapTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, variableRows, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Swaption trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param variableRows   the CSV rows representing variable notional/rate etc\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Swaption trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SwaptionTrade parseSwaptionTrade(CsvRow row, List<CsvRow> variableRows, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SwaptionTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, variableRows, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Bullet Payment trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Bullet Payment trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default BulletPaymentTrade parseBulletPaymentTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return BulletPaymentTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Term Deposit trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Term Deposit trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default TermDepositTrade parseTermDepositTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return TermDepositTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX Single trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX Single trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxSingleTrade parseFxSingleTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX Swap trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX Swap trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxSwapTrade parseFxSwapTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxSwapTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX European Option trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX European Option trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxEuropeanOptionTrade parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX NDF trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX NDF trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxNdfTrade parseFxNdfTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxNdfTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a CDS trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the CDS trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default CdsTrade parseCdsTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return CdsTradeCsvPlugin.parseCds(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a CDS Index trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the CDS trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default CdsIndexTrade parseCdsIndexTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return CdsIndexTradeCsvPlugin.parseCdsIndex(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses an IBOR CapFloor trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info the trade info\n   * @return the IBOR CapFloor trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default IborCapFloorTrade parseIborCapFloorTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return IborCapFloorTradeCsvPlugin.parseCapFloor(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses an overnight CapFloor trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info the trade info\n   * @return the overnight CapFloor trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade parseOvernightCapFloorTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTradeCsvPlugin.parseCapFloor(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Parses any kind of trade from CSV before standard matching.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called before the standard matching on the 'Product Type' column.\n   * As such, it allows the standard parsing to be replaced for a given type.\n   *\n   * @param typeUpper  the upper case product type column\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the trade, empty if the product type is not known, or if standard parsing should occur\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the product type is known but the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default Optional<Trade> overrideParseTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses any kind of trade from CSV after standard matching.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the standard matching on the 'Product Type' column.\n   * As such, it allows non-matched rows to be captured.\n   *\n   * @param typeUpper  the upper case product type column\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the trade, empty if the product type is not known\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the product type is known but the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default Optional<Trade> parseOtherTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n}\n",

  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/TradeCsvInfoResolver.java",
  "newString": "  /**\n   * Parses a FX Vanilla Option trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX Vanilla Option trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   * @deprecated Use {@link #parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(CsvRow, TradeInfo)} instead\n   */\n  @Deprecated\n  public default FxVanillaOptionTrade parseFxVanillaOptionTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX NDF trade from CSV.",
  "oldString": "  /**\n   * Parses a FX NDF trade from CSV.",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2017 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.CCP_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.DESCRIPTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.NAME_FIELD;\n\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Optional;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.AttributeType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityQuantityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfoBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.IborCapFloorTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.capfloor.OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.CcpId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsIndexTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.deposit.TermDepositTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fra.FraTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxNdfTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingleTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSwapTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.payment.BulletPaymentTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.SwapTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swaption.SwaptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Resolves additional information when parsing trade CSV files.\n * <p>\n * Data loaded from a CSV may contain additional information that needs to be captured.\n * This plugin point allows the additional CSV columns to be parsed and captured.\n */\npublic interface TradeCsvInfoResolver {\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance that uses the standard set of reference data.\n   *\n   * @return the resolver\n   */\n  public static TradeCsvInfoResolver standard() {\n    return StandardCsvInfoImpl.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains an instance that uses the specified set of reference data.\n   *\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the resolver\n   */\n  public static TradeCsvInfoResolver of(ReferenceData refData) {\n    return StandardCsvInfoImpl.of(refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the reference data being used.\n   *\n   * @return the reference data\n   */\n  public abstract ReferenceData getReferenceData();\n\n  /**\n   * Parses standard attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n   * <p>\n   * This parses the standard set of attributes, which are the three constants in {@link AttributeType}.\n   * The column names are 'Description', 'Name' and 'CCP'.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param builder  the builder to update\n   */\n  public default void parseStandardAttributes(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n    row.findValue(DESCRIPTION_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.DESCRIPTION, str));\n    row.findValue(NAME_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.NAME, str));\n    row.findValue(CCP_FIELD)\n        .ifPresent(str -> builder.addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpId.of(str)));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses attributes into {@code TradeInfo}.\n   * <p>\n   * If they are available, the trade ID, date, time and zone will have been set\n   * before this method is called. They may be altered if necessary, although\n   * this is not recommended.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param builder  the builder to update\n   */\n  public default void parseTradeInfo(CsvRow row, TradeInfoBuilder builder) {\n    // do nothing\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called by each of the {@code completeTrade} methods.\n   *\n   * @param <T> the trade type\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default <T extends Trade> T completeTradeCommon(CsvRow row, T trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return trade;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FRA trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FraTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FraTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SecurityTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SecurityTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the Swap trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SwapTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwapTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the Swaption trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default SwaptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, SwaptionTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default BulletPaymentTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, BulletPaymentTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default TermDepositTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, TermDepositTrade trade) {\n    // do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX Forward trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxSingleTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxSingleTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX Swap trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxSwapTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxSwapTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX European Option trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxEuropeanOptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX Vanilla Option trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTrade(CsvRow, FxEuropeanOptionTrade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   * @deprecated Use {@link #completeTrade(CsvRow, FxEuropeanOptionTrade)} instead\n   */\n  @Deprecated\n  public default FxVanillaOptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxVanillaOptionTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX NDF trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CDS trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the trade has been parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default CdsTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, CdsTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CDS default CdsIndexTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, CdsIndexTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the CapFloor trade, potentially OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Parses a FRA trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FRA trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FraTrade parseFraTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FraTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Security trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Security trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SecurityQuantityTrade parseSecurityTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SecurityTradeCsvPlugin.parseTradeWithPriceInfo(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Swap trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param variableRows   the CSV rows representing variable notional/rate etc\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Swap trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SwapTrade parseSwapTrade(CsvRow row, List<CsvRow> variableRows, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SwapTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, variableRows, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Swaption trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param variableRows   the CSV rows representing variable notional/rate etc\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Swaption trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default SwaptionTrade parseSwaptionTrade(CsvRow row, List<CsvRow> variableRows, TradeInfo info) {\n    return SwaptionTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, variableRows, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Bullet Payment trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Bullet Payment trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default BulletPaymentTrade parseBulletPaymentTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return BulletPaymentTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a Term Deposit trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the Term Deposit trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default TermDepositTrade parseTermDepositTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return TermDepositTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX Single trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX Single trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxSingleTrade parseFxSingleTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX Swap trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX Swap trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxSwapTrade parseFxSwapTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxSwapTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX European Option trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX European Option trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxEuropeanOptionTrade parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX NDF trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX NDF trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxNdfTrade parseFxNdfTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxNdfTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a CDS trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the CDS trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default CdsTrade parseCdsTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return CdsTradeCsvPlugin.parseCds(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a CDS Index trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the CDS trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default CdsIndexTrade parseCdsIndexTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return CdsIndexTradeCsvPlugin.parseCdsIndex(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses an IBOR CapFloor trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info the trade info\n   * @return the IBOR CapFloor trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default IborCapFloorTrade parseIborCapFloorTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return IborCapFloorTradeCsvPlugin.parseCapFloor(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses an overnight CapFloor trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info the trade info\n   * @return the overnight CapFloor trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTrade parseOvernightCapFloorTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return OvernightInArrearsCapFloorTradeCsvPlugin.parseCapFloor(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Parses any kind of trade from CSV before standard matching.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called before the standard matching on the 'Product Type' column.\n   * As such, it allows the standard parsing to be replaced for a given type.\n   *\n   * @param typeUpper  the upper case product type column\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the trade, empty if the product type is not known, or if standard parsing should occur\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the product type is known but the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default Optional<Trade> overrideParseTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses any kind of trade from CSV after standard matching.\n   * <p>\n   * This is called after the standard matching on the 'Product Type' column.\n   * As such, it allows non-matched rows to be captured.\n   *\n   * @param typeUpper  the upper case product type column\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the trade, empty if the product type is not known\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the product type is known but the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default Optional<Trade> parseOtherTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n}\n",

  "structuredPatch": [
    {

Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/CsvWriterUtils.java",
  "newString": "import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;",
  "oldString": "import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2021 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BUY_SELL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PRICE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.QUANTITY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.SECURITY_ID_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.SECURITY_ID_SCHEME_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityQuantityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.BuySell;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PayReceive;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.Swap;\n\n/**\n * Groups several utilities methods for CsvPlugins\n */\npublic final class CsvWriterUtils {\n\n  /**\n   * Restricted constructor\n   */\n  private CsvWriterUtils() {\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param premium  the premium\n   */\n  public static void writePremiumFields(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, AdjustablePayment premium) {\n    writeAdjustablePayment(\n        csv,\n        premium,\n        PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row\n   * @param adjustablePayment  the adjustable payment\n   * @param amountField  the amount field\n   * @param currencyField  the currency field\n   * @param directionField  the direction field\n   * @param dateField  the date field\n   * @param dateConventionField  the date convention field\n   * @param dateCalendarField  the date calendar field\n   */\n  public static void writeAdjustablePayment(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      AdjustablePayment adjustablePayment,\n      String amountField,\n      String currencyField,\n      String directionField,\n      String dateField,\n      String dateConventionField,\n      String dateCalendarField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(amountField, adjustablePayment.getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(currencyField, adjustablePayment.getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(adjustablePayment.getAmount()));\n    csv.writeCell(dateField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getUnadjusted());\n    csv.writeCell(dateConventionField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getConvention());\n    csv.writeCell(dateCalendarField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getCalendar());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a currency amount using the provided fields\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param ccyAmount  the currency amount to write\n   * @param amountField  the amount header\n   * @param currencyField  the currency header\n   * @param directionField  the direction header\n   */\n  public static void writeCurrencyAmount(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      CurrencyAmount ccyAmount,\n      String amountField,\n      String currencyField,\n      String directionField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(amountField, ccyAmount.getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(currencyField, ccyAmount.getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(ccyAmount.getAmount()));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a zoned date time using the provided field\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param zonedDateTime  the zoned date time object\n   * @param dateField  the date field\n   * @param timeField  the time field\n   * @param zoneField  the zone field\n   */\n  public static void writeZonedDateTime(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      ZonedDateTime zonedDateTime,\n      String dateField,\n      String timeField,\n      String zoneField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(dateField, zonedDateTime.toLocalDate());\n    csv.writeCell(timeField, zonedDateTime.toLocalTime());\n    csv.writeCell(zoneField, zonedDateTime.getZone());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a Barrier object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param barrier  the barrier\n   * @param obsDate  the barrier observation date\n   */\n  public static void writeBarrier(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Barrier barrier, LocalDate obsDate) {\n    csv.writeCell(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierType());\n    csv.writeCell(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getKnockType());\n    csv.writeCell(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierLevel(obsDate));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write the FxSingle to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param prefix  a prefix to use on leg headers (often far / near)\n   * @param product  the fx single\n   */\n  public static void writeFxSingle(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, String prefix, FxSingle product) {\n    FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxSingle(csv, prefix, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a FxEuropeanOption to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param product  the product\n   */\n  public static void writeFxEuropeanOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxEuropeanOption product) {\n    FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxEuropeanOption(csv, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a Swap to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param product  the swap to write\n   */\n  public static void writeSwap(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Swap product) {\n    FullSwapTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeProduct(csv, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a SecurityQuantityTrade to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param trade  the security quantity trade\n   */\n  public static void writeSecurityQuantityTrade(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, SecurityQuantityTrade trade) {\n    csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"Security\");\n    csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_SCHEME_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getScheme());\n    csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getValue());\n    csv.writeCell(BUY_SELL_FIELD, trade.getQuantity() < 0 ? BuySell.SELL : BuySell.BUY);\n    csv.writeCell(QUANTITY_FIELD, Math.abs(trade.getQuantity()));\n    csv.writeCell(PRICE_FIELD, trade.getPrice());\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PayReceive;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;",

        "+import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.Swap;",
        " "
      ],

      "newStart": 32,
      "oldLines": 6,
      "oldStart": 32
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

  "old_string": "  /**\n   * Write a Swap to CSV",
  "replace_all": false
}

  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/CsvWriterUtils.java",
  "newString": "  /**\n   * Write a FxVanillaOption to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param product  the product\n   * @deprecated Use {@link #writeFxEuropeanOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders, FxEuropeanOption)} instead\n   */\n  @Deprecated\n  public static void writeFxVanillaOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxVanillaOption product) {\n    FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxVanillaOption(csv, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a Swap to CSV",
  "oldString": "  /**\n   * Write a Swap to CSV",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2021 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BUY_SELL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.PRICE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.QUANTITY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.SECURITY_ID_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.SECURITY_ID_SCHEME_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.SecurityQuantityTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.BuySell;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PayReceive;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.Swap;\n\n/**\n * Groups several utilities methods for CsvPlugins\n */\npublic final class CsvWriterUtils {\n\n  /**\n   * Restricted constructor\n   */\n  private CsvWriterUtils() {\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param premium  the premium\n   */\n  public static void writePremiumFields(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, AdjustablePayment premium) {\n    writeAdjustablePayment(\n        csv,\n        premium,\n        PREMIUM_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DIRECTION_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_CNV_FIELD,\n        PREMIUM_DATE_CAL_FIELD);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes an AdjustablePayment object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row\n   * @param adjustablePayment  the adjustable payment\n   * @param amountField  the amount field\n   * @param currencyField  the currency field\n   * @param directionField  the direction field\n   * @param dateField  the date field\n   * @param dateConventionField  the date convention field\n   * @param dateCalendarField  the date calendar field\n   */\n  public static void writeAdjustablePayment(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      AdjustablePayment adjustablePayment,\n      String amountField,\n      String currencyField,\n      String directionField,\n      String dateField,\n      String dateConventionField,\n      String dateCalendarField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(amountField, adjustablePayment.getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(currencyField, adjustablePayment.getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(adjustablePayment.getAmount()));\n    csv.writeCell(dateField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getUnadjusted());\n    csv.writeCell(dateConventionField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getConvention());\n    csv.writeCell(dateCalendarField, adjustablePayment.getDate().getAdjustment().getCalendar());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a currency amount using the provided fields\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param ccyAmount  the currency amount to write\n   * @param amountField  the amount header\n   * @param currencyField  the currency header\n   * @param directionField  the direction header\n   */\n  public static void writeCurrencyAmount(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      CurrencyAmount ccyAmount,\n      String amountField,\n      String currencyField,\n      String directionField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(amountField, ccyAmount.getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(currencyField, ccyAmount.getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(directionField, PayReceive.ofSignedAmount(ccyAmount.getAmount()));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a zoned date time using the provided field\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param zonedDateTime  the zoned date time object\n   * @param dateField  the date field\n   * @param timeField  the time field\n   * @param zoneField  the zone field\n   */\n  public static void writeZonedDateTime(\n      CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv,\n      ZonedDateTime zonedDateTime,\n      String dateField,\n      String timeField,\n      String zoneField) {\n\n    csv.writeCell(dateField, zonedDateTime.toLocalDate());\n    csv.writeCell(timeField, zonedDateTime.toLocalTime());\n    csv.writeCell(zoneField, zonedDateTime.getZone());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Writes a Barrier object to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param barrier  the barrier\n   * @param obsDate  the barrier observation date\n   */\n  public static void writeBarrier(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Barrier barrier, LocalDate obsDate) {\n    csv.writeCell(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierType());\n    csv.writeCell(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD, barrier.getKnockType());\n    csv.writeCell(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD, barrier.getBarrierLevel(obsDate));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write the FxSingle to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param prefix  a prefix to use on leg headers (often far / near)\n   * @param product  the fx single\n   */\n  public static void writeFxSingle(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, String prefix, FxSingle product) {\n    FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxSingle(csv, prefix, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a FxEuropeanOption to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param product  the product\n   */\n  public static void writeFxEuropeanOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxEuropeanOption product) {\n    FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxEuropeanOption(csv, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a Swap to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param product  the swap to write\n   */\n  public static void writeSwap(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, Swap product) {\n    FullSwapTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeProduct(csv, product);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Write a SecurityQuantityTrade to CSV\n   *\n   * @param csv  the csv row output\n   * @param trade  the security quantity trade\n   */\n  public static void writeSecurityQuantityTrade(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, SecurityQuantityTrade trade) {\n    csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"Security\");\n    csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_SCHEME_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getScheme());\n    csv.writeCell(SECURITY_ID_FIELD, trade.getSecurityId().getStandardId().getValue());\n    csv.writeCell(BUY_SELL_FIELD, trade.getQuantity() < 0 ? BuySell.SELL : BuySell.BUY);\n    csv.writeCell(QUANTITY_FIELD, Math.abs(trade.getQuantity()));\n    csv.writeCell(PRICE_FIELD, trade.getPrice());\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "   }",
        " ",
        "   /**",
        "+   * Write a FxVanillaOption to CSV",

        "+   * @param product  the product",
        "+   * @deprecated Use {@link #writeFxEuropeanOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders, FxEuropeanOption)} instead",
        "+   */",
        "+  @Deprecated",
        "+  public static void writeFxVanillaOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxVanillaOption product) {",
        "+    FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.writeFxVanillaOption(csv, product);",
        "+  }",

#completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   */\n  public default FxEuropeanOptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX Vanilla Option trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTrade(CsvRow, FxEuropeanOptionTrade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param trade  the parsed trade\n   * @return the updated trade\n   * @deprecated Use {@link #completeTrade(CsvRow, FxEuropeanOptionTrade)} instead\n   */\n  @Deprecated\n  public default FxVanillaOptionTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FxVanillaOptionTrade trade) {\n    //do nothing\n    return completeTradeCommon(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Completes the FX NDF trade, potentially parsing additional columns.\n   * <p>\n   * parsed and after\n   * {@link #parseTradeInfo(CsvRow, TradeInfoBuilder)}.\n   * <p>\n   * By default this calls {@link #completeTradeCommon(CsvRow, Trade)}.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to     "content": "  /**\n   * Parses a FX European Option trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX European Option trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxEuropeanOptionTrade parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX Vanilla Option trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX Vanilla Option trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   * @deprecated Use {@link #parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(CsvRow, TradeInfo)} instead\n   */\n  @Deprecated\n  public default FxVanillaOptionTrade parseFxVanillaOptionTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a FX NDF trade from CSV.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row to parse\n   * @param info  the trade info\n   * @return the FX NDF trade\n   * @throws RuntimeException if the row contains invalid data\n   */\n  public default FxNdfTrade parseFxNdfTrade(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    return FxNdfTradeCsvPlugin.parse(row, info, this);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Parses a CDS trade from CSV.",

com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkBlackVolatilities;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkVannaVolgaVolatilities;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Multi-scenario measure calculations for FX European option trades.\n * <p>\n * Each method corresponds to a measure, typically calculated by one or more calls to the pricer.\n */\nfinal class FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations DEFAULT = new FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n  /**\n   * The market quote sensitivity calculator.\n   */\n  private static final MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator MARKET_QUOTE_SENS = MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator.DEFAULT;\n  /**",

Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.measure;\\n7: \\n8: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.Resolvable;\\n9: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\\n11: \\n12: /**\\n13:  * The standard set of measures that can be calculated by Strata.\\n14:  * <p>\\n15:  * A measure identifies the calculation result that is required.\\n16:  * For example present value, par rate or spread.\\n17:  * <p>\\n18:  * Note that not all measures will be available for all targets.\\n19:  */\\n20: public final class Measures {\\n21: \\n22:   /**\\n23:    * Measure representing the present value of the calculation target.\\n24:    * <p>\\n25:    * The result is a single currency monetary amount in the reporting currency.\\n26:    */\\n27:   public static final Measure PRESENT_VALUE = Measure.of(StandardMeasures.PRESENT_VALUE.getName());\\n28:   /**\\n29:    * Measure representing a break-down of the present value calculation on the target.\\n30:    * <p>\\n31:    * No currency conversion is performed on the monetary amounts.\\n32:    */\\n33:   public static final Measure EXPLAIN_PRESENT_VALUE = Measure.of(StandardMeasures.EXPLAIN_PRESENT_VALUE.getName());\\n34: \\n35:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n36:   /**\\n37:    * Measure representing the calibrated sum PV01 on the calculation target.\\n38:    * <p>\\n39:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated data structure.\\n40:    * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\\n41:    * It is expressed in the reporting currency.\\n42:    */\\n43:   public static final Measure PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM = Measure.of(StandardMeasures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM.getName());\\n44:   /**\\n45:    * Measure representing the calibrated bucketed PV01 on the calculation target.\\n46:    * <p>\\n47:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated data structure.\\n48:    * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by parameter.\\n49:    * It is expressed in the reporting currency.\\n50:    */\\n51:   public static final Measure PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED = Measure.of(StandardMeasures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED.getName());\\n52:   /**\\n53:    * Measure representing the market quote sum PV01 on the calculation target.\\n54:    * <p>\\n55:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the\\n56:    * market quotes used to calibrate the data structure.\\n57:    * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\\n58:    * It is expressed in the reporting currency.\\n59:    */\\n60:   public static final Measure PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM = Measure.of(StandardMeasures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM.getName());\\n61:   /**\\n62:    * Measure representing the market quote bucketed PV01 on the calculation target.\\n63:    * <p>\\n64:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the\\n65:    * market quotes used to calibrate the data structure.\\n66:    * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by parameter.\\n67:    * It is expressed in the reporting currency.\\n68:    */\\n69:   public static final Measure PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED = Measure.of(StandardMeasures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED.getName());\\n70:   /**\\n71:    * Measure representing the market quote bucketed vega on the calculation target.\\n72:    * <p>\\n73:    * This is the sensitivity of the present value to the market implied volatilities used to calibrate the data structure.\\n74:    */\\n75:   public static final Measure VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED = Measure.of(StandardMeasures.VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED.getName());\\n76: \\n77:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n78:   /**\\n79:    * Measure representing the par rate of the calculation target.\\n80:    */\\n81: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/Measures.java%3FL1-80\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n3:  *\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\n5:  */\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.measure;\n7: \n8: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.Resolvable;\n9: import com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\n11: \n12: /**\n13:  * The standard set of measures that can be calculated by Strata.\n14:  * <p>\n15:  * A measure identifies the calculation result that is required.\n16:  * For example present value, par rate or spread.\n17:  * <p>\n18:  * Note that not all measures will be available for all targets.\n19:  */\n20: public final class Measures {\n21: \n22:   /**\n23:    * Measure representing the present value of the calculation target.\n24:    * <p>\n25:    * The result is a single currency monetary amount in the reporting currency.\n26:    */\n27:   public static final Measure PRESENT_VALUE = Measure.of(StandardMeasures.PRESENT_VALUE.getName());\n28:   /**\n29:    * Measure representing a break-down of the present value calculation on the target.\n30:    * <p>\n31:    * No currency conversion is performed on the monetary amounts.\n32:    */\n33:   public static final Measure EXPLAIN_PRESENT_VALUE = Measure.of(StandardMeasures.EXPLAIN_PRESENT_VALUE.getName());\n34: \n35:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n36:   /**\n37:    * Measure representing the calibrated sum PV01 on the calculation target.\n38:    * <p>\n39:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated data structure.\n40:    * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n41:    * It is expressed in the reporting currency.\n42:    */\n43:   public static final Measure PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM = Measure.of(StandardMeasures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM.getName());\n44:   /**\n45:    * Measure representing the calibrated bucketed PV01 on the calculation target.\n46:    * <p>\n47:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated data structure.\n48:    * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by parameter.\n49:    * It is expressed in the reporting currency.\n50:    */\n51:   public static final Measure PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED = Measure.of(StandardMeasures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED.getName());\n52:   /**\n53:    * Measure representing the market quote sum PV01 on the calculation target.\n54:    * <p>\n55:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the\n56:    * market quotes used to calibrate the data structure.\n57:    * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n58:    * It is expressed in the reporting currency.\n59:    */\n60:   public static final Measure PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM = Measure.of(StandardMeasures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM.getName());\n61:   /**\n62:    * Measure representing the market quote bucketed PV01 on the calculation target.\n63:    * <p>\n64:    * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the\n65:    * market quotes used to calibrate the data structure.\n66:    * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by parameter.\n67:    * It is expressed in the reporting currency.\n68:    */\n69:   public static final Measure PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED = Measure.of(StandardMeasures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED.getName());\n70:   /**\n71:    * Measure representing the market quote bucketed vega on the calculation target.\n72:    * <p>\n73:    * This is the sensitivity of the present value to the market implied volatilities used to calibrate the data structure.\n74:    */\n75:   public static final Measure VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED = Measure.of(StandardMeasures.VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED.getName());\n76: \n77:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n78:   /**\n79:    * Measure representing the par rate of the calculation target.\n80:    */\n81: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/Measures.java%3FL1-80"
  }
}
